C: 「第Ⅸ机关是存在的，去找吧！原始博士的一切秘密都藏在那里！」 ——某位巡海游侠，在醉酒后 世间万物都被囚禁于「存在」的牢笼之中，被肉身禁锢，被思想裹挟，被世界的表象蒙蔽。纵使拥有极高智慧的生灵也难以参会，在物质、秩序、逻辑、生命等一切「真实」的反面，都存在着等熵的「虚无」。二者紧密结合、相互制衡，构筑了完整的宇宙。 据说，在难以被物质世界感知的虚无倒影中，潜藏着被称为「第Ⅸ机关」的神秘派系。悠久凝望虚空之人，就会逐渐被深渊中蕴藏的黑暗能量吸引，最终穿过隔绝现实与虚无的「黑网」——然而传说从未得到证明。 宇宙中最负盛名的「天才」学者们曾试图解开这一谜团，向第Ⅸ机关发起挑战，但至今仍一无所获。这个组织因何建立？它的使命为何？它有多少成员，从事怎样的活动？甚至……「第Ⅸ机关」真的存在吗？答案就如命题本身一般虚无。
E: "Device IX is real. Go find it! There lies all of Dr. Primitive's secrets!" — Some Drunken Galaxy Ranger Everything in the universe is bound by the prison of Existence, constrained by their body and mind and blinded by the world's superficial appearance. Even the most intelligent beings cannot comprehend this. Matter, order, logic, and life... Everything that makes up "reality" is but one side of the coin. On the opposite side, of equal entropy, there exists "nihility." The two balance each other to create the complete universe. Legend has it, in the void of nothingness that is difficult to be perceived by the material world, there lurks a mysterious faction known as Device IX. Those who gaze into the void for a long time will gradually be drawn to its dark energy, eventually passing through the Dark Web that separates reality from nothingness. The legend has yet to be proven though. The most prestigious geniuses in the universe attempted to solve this mystery, challenging Device IX with no results. Why was this organization created? What are its goals? How many members does it have and what do they do? Does... Device IX truly exist? The answer is as empty as the question itself.

C: 「再见，诸位，我们并非就此别过——因为在宇宙不可见的终点，万物都将重逢于一点。」 ——葬仪知宾，悼亡诗 葬仪知宾是零落散布在宇宙各个角落的末王信徒。 对于「终末」，许多人犹如障目行路，绝口不提祂的存在，以及祂所象征的宇宙终结。然而也有智慧生命由衷相信，这位逆时而行的星神乃是宇宙之钟倒计时的滴答声，也是提醒人们存在意义的警钟：在命定的葬仪前，浑然无知的人应当抓紧生命的每一秒。 为此，葬仪知宾与试图逃离末日的人们逆向而行，他们钟爱末日景象，渴望目睹末日，并在此迎来与「终末」的唯一一次相见。
E: "Farewell, everyone. This is not the final goodbye — for all things shall reunite at the same pinpoint at the imponderable end of the universe." — Creed Exequy, an elegy The Creed Exequy is made up of followers of Terminus scattered across the various corners of the universe. With regard to the Finality, many refuse to speak of THEIR existence, blinding themselves to the fact that THEY symbolize the end of the universe. However, there are intelligent lifeforms who sincerely believe that this Aeon, which moves against the flow of time, is the ticking countdown to the universe's end and a reminder of all meanings of existence: Before the destined exequy comes, those who breathe ignorant of impending ruin ought to live every second of their life to the fullest. To that end, the Creed Exequy walk in the opposite direction of those trying to flee from the apocalypse. This faction adores the apocalypse and the ruin it brings, and yearns to witness its arrival. There, they shall welcome their only encounter with the Finality.

C:
「虚数之树」是现今学术界普遍接受的一种宇宙理论。

该学说将不同时空的不同世界比作树状结构：每一株枝干，都是一种世界存在的形式；每一片花叶，都是它们在时间维度中留下的现在与曾经。树冠因汲取时空维管中无主的虚数能量，而始终存在动态的结构——新芽生长，枯叶脱离，无垠宇宙中上演着无数的诞生与终结…将宇宙结构比喻为「树」，或许是一种将「虚数之树」视为生命的态度。

宇宙在「虚数之树」学说被提出之前，曾因其无法被观测的性质，被称为「虚空恒盲之物」；而学说诞生之后，人们便能借助想象勾勒其作用原理：无主的虚数能量，经过时空维管不停地奔流，在末梢形成了我们所认知的「星系」——即不可胜数的世界。而在世界与世界之间，就像树叶与树叶之间存在空间上的阻隔一般，是难以跨越的未知虚数空域。

博识学会一度认为天才俱乐部#2哈那德•庞奇率先提出了「虚数之树」的起源学说；反复审度虚构史学家的影响后，现在学界普遍认为#1赞达尔•壹•桑原才是首位提出者。
E:
The Imaginary Tree is a theory of the universe widely accepted by the modern scientific community.

This theory describes the various worlds existing in different spacetimes as having a tree-like structure. Every branch is a specific path along which worlds might exist, with every leaf being the marks these worlds have made along the parameter of time. The crown of the tree remains in a dynamic state as it absorbs the masterless Imaginary Energy from the space-time vasculature of the trunk. New shoots grow, withered leaves fall, and endless births and deaths occur among the infinite universe... Describing the universe's structure as a "tree" may be an attitude that views the Imaginary Tree as a life form.

Before the theory of Imaginary Tree was put forward, the universe had been addressed as "a void and indiscernible object" because of its undetectable nature. After the theory was developed, people would visualize its principle using imagination: The untamed imaginary energy surges endlessly through space-time vasculature, and forms at its tips "star clusters" that humans can understand — in other words, countless worlds. The worlds are separated from each other just as leaves are separated by air, between which are unknown imaginary domains that are nigh impossible to traverse.

The Intelligentsia Guild had once thought that Harald Punch, the 2nd member of the Genius Society, was the first to propose the Imaginary Tree origin theory. After multiple assessments on the influence of the History Fictionologists, the scientific community now commonly accepts Zandar One Kuwabara as the person to have proposed it.

C: 星神
E: Aeons

C: 继续追寻并归还火种，以提升供奉等级上限
E: Continue to search for and return Coreflame to raise the Offering Level Cap

C: 请继续推进开拓任务，以提升供奉等级上限
E: Please continue the Trailblaze Mission to raise the Max Offering Level

C: 无敌模式
E: Invincible Mode

C: 选择入浴剂
E: Select Bath Soak

C: 一切决定为性价比让道，最后的结果就是不断地产出垃圾！
E: If all decisions are solely driven by cost-effectiveness, it will only result in a constant stream of trash being produced!

C: 在链接梦境与现实的银行旁结识富有的老奶奶
E: Meeting a wealthy old lady near the bank that connects the Dreamscape and reality

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 修复加西亚的心绪表盘
E: Fix Garcia's Emo Dial

C: 砂金展示破碎后拼合的「存护」基石，激发基石中蕴藏的令使权能，「我任命运拨转轮盘，孤注一掷，遍历死地而后生。一切献给——琥珀王！」
E: Aventurine displayed the reassembled fragments of the Preservation Cornerstone, activating the Emanator's power within. "I entrust fortune to fate. Risk it all in a single gamble. Walk depth of death to reach light of life. All for the Amber Lord!"

C: 音符小姐释放宝具，以丝线将你们拖入黑暗中。「落幕吧，庸人的浮生咏叹调！」
E: Miss Note unleashed her Noble Phantasm, her threads pulling you into the dark. "Let the curtain fall, Canon Cancrizans!"

C: 老奥帝以自身为召唤触媒，召唤出匹诺康尼历史中的自己——「啃噬金钱的蛀虫」。
E: Old Oti used himself as a summoning catalyst and called forth his former self from Penacony's past: "the Money-Grubbing Parasite."

C: 奥列格拜托桑博把你们带回地面。希儿称布洛妮娅已先行返回，她与可可利亚之间有些事情要解决。希儿将布洛妮娅留下的信交给你。
E: Oleg entrusted Sampo with leading you topside. Seele explained that Bronya had already gone ahead, she had unfinished business with Cocolia. Before leaving, Bronya had entrusted Seele with a letter for you.

C: 你与三月七、瓦尔特抵达流云渡，仍未见到任何仙舟人士。瓦尔特提议搜寻打开玉界门的人，你们提高警惕展开探索。
E: You, March 7th, and Welt arrived at Cloudford but still saw no sign of any Xianzhou personnel. Welt suggested searching for whoever had opened the Jade Gate, and you began your exploration with heightened vigilance.

C: 卡芙卡被云骑军押送到阵心中央，即将接受审讯。符玄将以「穷观阵」对卡芙卡进行卜测，从中发掘真相。
E: Kafka was escorted by the Cloud Knights to the center of the matrix core, about to be interrogated. Fu Xuan would use the Matrix of Prescience to conduct a divination about Kafka and scry the truth from within.

C: 来古士悄然现身，称与「救世主」合作将使世界偏离「毁灭」荣光。若选择自己，刻律德菈将驱使「铁墓」征服星海，代价仅是放弃人性。
E: Lygus appeared quietly and claimed that cooperating with the "Deliverer" would cause the world to stray from the glory of "Destruction." If Cerydra chose him instead, she would command the Irontomb to conquer the stars at the cost of her humanity.

C: 彦卿怀疑镜流身份，想要将她捉拿。而镜流则提出<color=#f29e38ff>比试斩杀孽物数量</color>，彦卿虽未口头应允，却已跃跃欲试。
E: Suspicious of Jingliu's identity, Yanqing wanted to apprehend her. Jingliu proposed a <color=#f29e38ff>competition to see who can slay more abominations</color>. Yanqing didn't say yes, but was clearly eager to accept the challenge.

C: 你们见到十王司的三位判官——雪衣，<color=#f29e38ff>寒鸦</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>藿藿</color>。藿藿称桂乃芬所见鬼火实为能量生物「岁阳」，并请出<color=#f29e38ff>尾巴</color>大爷来说明情况。
E: You met the three judges of the Ten-Lords Commission: Xueyi, <color=#f29e38ff>Hanya</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>Huohuo</color>. Huohuo explained that the will-o'-wisp Guinaifen had seen was actually a "heliobus," a being of pure energy. She called on <color=#f29e38ff>Mr. Tail</color> to explain the details.

C: 千年以前，大岁阳「燎原」与罗浮将军「腾骁」曾在绥园激战。「燎原」在战败后分裂为诸多碎片，大多被封进造化洪炉中。
E: A thousand years ago, the great heliobus "Ignamar" fought fiercely against General "Teng Xiao" of the Luofu at Fyxestroll Garden. After being defeated, Ignamar split into many fragments, most of which were sealed within the Creation Furnace.

C: 驭空调侃休完产假的采翼，并表达对她的想念；聊到开斗舰，采翼表示如果让她再选一次，她还是会成为飞行士，<color=#f29e38ff>因为她已触碰过天空</color>。
E: Yukong teased Caiyi, who had just returned from maternity leave, saying how much she'd missed her. When talking about flying fighter jets, Caiyi said that if given the chance, she'd choose to be a pilot again, <color=#f29e38ff>for she'd already touched the sky</color>.

C: 你们穿过重重阻隔，到达星槎停靠之处。停云将驾驶星槎，带你们离开此地。
E: After pushing through various blockades, you reached the starskiff docking zone. Tingyun would pilot a starskiff to take you away from the area.

C: 丹恒等人路遇被魔阴身士卒围攻的少女。素裳带领丹恒、罗刹速战速决，救下那个女孩。
E: Dan Heng and his group encountered a girl being cornered by mara-struck soldiers. Sushang led Dan Heng and Luocha to fight and achieved a quick victory, saving the girl.

C: 公输师傅向你们介绍「匣里流光」，这原本是为云骑军研制的武器，威力无比，而今正好可以用来消灭增生的「建木缠结」。
E: Master Gongshu introduced "Luminflux Pyxis." This was a weapon originally designed for the Cloud Knights, now repurposed to destroy Ambrosial Arbor coils.

C: 蜃影中，神秘剑客来到鳞渊境，得知龙尊丹枫已死。剑客称此行突访只为重寻故友，只叹求之不得。
E: In Mirage Echo, a mysterious swordsman arrived at Scalegorge Waterscape, only to learn that High Elder Dan Feng had passed away. The swordsman revealed that this unexpected visit was merely to seek an old friend, but could only sigh at the unfulfilled purpose.

C: 你与流萤跟随桑博来到夜总会前，却因没有贵宾卡而被拒之门外。桑博取出寄存于此的材料，说要在附近的街机给你们看点好玩的。
E: You, Firefly, and Sampo arrived before the nightclub, yet because you didn't have a VIP card, you found yourself rejected from entry. Sampo took out the materials he deposited in the area, and said he had something fun to show you at an arcade machine nearby.

C: 你与黑天鹅遇到被怪物包围的黄泉。黄泉在此迷路，而黑天鹅正是先前与之共舞的忆者。你们合力清剿怪物。
E: You and Black Swan encountered Acheron, who was surrounded by monsters. Acheron was lost here, and it just so happened that Black Swan was the Memokeeper that danced with her earlier. You pooled your might and wiped out the monsters together.

C: 从残骸的记忆来看，黑天鹅推测对方身材高大、杀伐果断，并向酒店深处走去。你们动身打捞流萤的记忆，以免线索被毁灭。
E: Based on the corpse's memory, Black Swan deduced that the opponent was broad, tall, decisively savage and had headed further into the hotel. All of you tried to retrieve Firefly's memory to prevent clues from being destroyed.

C: 你拒绝了砂金的邀请，回到现实与同伴会合。在列车组与家族的共同努力下，公司收复星球的企图落空。谐乐大典如期举行，直至永远。
E: You declined Aventurine's invitation and returned to reality to regroup with your companions. Under the Express Crew and The Family's shared effort, the IPC's plan to reclaim the planet failed. The Charmony Festival proceeded as intended, until all eternity.

C: 你找到了「美梦糖浆」。瓶身上的封装日期写着半个琥珀纪前，想必是岁月沉淀的佳酿。
E: You found a "Dream Syrup." The production date stated on the bottle was half an Amber Era ago. It must be a traditional brew.

C: 鸢尾花家系成员艾米绮来到酒吧，劝舒翁与她一起重返舞台。为了腾出聊案子的吧台，你尝试对艾米绮施展钟表把戏。
E: Amiky, a member of the Iris Family, came to the lounge and advised Siobhan to return to the stage with her. To get the chance to ask about the case at the counter, you attempted to use Clockwork on her.

C: 砂金要通过引爆你体内星核的方式，在此制造一场<color=#f29e38ff>盛大的死亡</color>，进而让公司介入梦境。生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
E: Aventurine planned to create a <color=#f29e38ff>grand death</color> by detonating the Stellaron within you, thereby prompting the IPC to intervene in the Dreamscape. Why does life slumber? Because we are not ready for the final rest.

C: 筑梦蕉师把喷漆罐发给学生，让大家通过涂鸦来练习筑梦。想好要创造的事物，让情绪与材料共鸣，便能让想象化作梦中的现实。
E: The Dreamweaver BananAdvisor handed out spray cans to students, letting them practice dreamweaving through graffiti. When one envisioned what they wanted to create, let their emotions resonate with the materials, and their imagination would become reality in dreams.

C: 「缭乱•邪祟」监督乱破每日服药。密药中蕴含过量忍•力，咽下需承受碎骨断肠之苦。经此苦行三千夜，乱破将如忍侠一般刀枪不入。
E: The Dazzling Fiendling supervised Rappa to take medicine daily, which contained an excessive amount of ninja power, and swallowing it could bring the agony of shattering bones and tearing intestines. After enduring this ordeal for three thousand nights, Rappa would become invulnerable to blades and bullets, just like a Ninja Hero.

C: 助蕉称，波提欧比在场的任何社员都更希望回到过去。外界的声音渐次远离，波提欧在自己的潜意识中苏醒。
E: The Assistanana said that Boothill wanted to return to the past more than any other member present. As the outside voices gradually faded away, Boothill awakened in his own subconscious.

C: 米凯委婉阻止了「睡蕉」塑像的布设，并认出波提欧的巡海游侠身份。波提欧的言语被「蕉语」所影响，痛夸*他香蕉的*。
E: Micah diplomatically stopped the construction of the Slumbernana statue and recognized Boothill as a Galaxy Ranger. Boothill's speech was affected by Bananese, making him go all "son of a banana."

C: 波提欧与知更鸟遇到四处宣传睡蕉小猴的社员，他们正与流梦礁居民争夺街道。波提欧上前为居民们伸张正义，当然，用的是子弹。
E: Boothill and Robin encountered club members promoting the Slumbernana Monkey, who were fighting with Dreamflux Reef residents over the streets. Boothill stepped forward to serve justice for the residents, with bullets, of course.

C: 星期日回忆童年治理公园往事，意识到秩序曾是混乱之源。
E: Sunday recalled how he managed the park as a child, realizing that the Order was once the root of all chaos.

C: 你与丹恒意识到，是达米亚诺斯在为你们拍照时看到了相机里以前的照片。在事态失控前，你们必须找到达米亚诺斯。
E: You and Dan Heng figured out that Damionis had seen the old photos in the camera while taking your picture. You had to find him quickly before things got out of hand.

C: 万敌与遐蝶简短道别。万敌称自己无法感受到「死亡」的气息，劝勉遐蝶走进命运的归宿，去完成必须完成的事情。
E: Mydei and Castorice exchanged brief goodbyes. Mydei said he couldn't sense the presence of Death, and encouraged Castorice to walk toward her destined path and complete what must be done.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝铭记与母亲的约定，出发寻找对抗黑潮的办法。
E: Remembering her promise to her mother, Tribios decided to set out from Janusopolis and find a way to chase away the black tide.

C: 遐蝶送别阿蒙内特，为其立冢，随后离开哀地里亚。为了觐见塞纳托斯，遐蝶踏上漫长而孤独的流浪。聆听世人对死亡的恐惧。
E: Castorice set Amunet free from the mortal coil. She marked a grave for her, then bade farewell to Aidonia. To search for Thanatos, Castorice embarked on a long and lonely journey with no end in sight. She witnessed the world, and how its people feared death so.

C: 你与遐蝶在城门处遇到呢喃低语的「亡语蝶」。能听见蝴蝶们窃窃私语，说明你们确实在向死者的世界靠近。
E: You and Castorice encountered murmuring Eulogistic Butterflies outside the city. The fact that you could hear their whispers proved you were fast approaching the realm of the dead.

C: 塞涅俄丝的胜利没能改变她的族人，天空之民分裂为新信徒与旧信徒，压迫与戕害仍然存在。塞涅俄丝对公正与博爱的期待，化作泡影。
E: Seliose's triumph did not change the ways of her people. Instead, the Skyfolk split into factions, this time as new believers and old believers. Their ways of oppressing and killing each other persisted. Seliose's dreams of love and justice were reduced to dust on the wind.

C: 上秤之前，白厄与万敌交谈，得知万敌打算以悬锋印戒参与比试。那是悬锋族人的至宝，悬锋王权的象征，悬锋征战千年的荣耀所系。
E: Before the weighing, Phainon and Mydei spoke. Phainon learned Mydei planned to offer the Signet of Kremnos, a sacred relic of his people, a symbol of Kremnos's kingship, and the crystallization of the centuries of Kremnoan warfare for glory.

C: 海瑟音向白厄讲授觐见时需注意的礼节：第一，凯撒厌恶繁文缛节，不必多礼；第二，非亲信不得近身，请保持五步之遥。
E: Hysilens taught Phainon the necessary etiquette for the meeting. First, the Imperator abhorred pomp, no need for excessive ceremony. Second, only trusted ones may approach, stay five steps away.

C: 你在空间站重复着简单的工作，迟迟没有决定是否要登上列车。渐渐地，你沉溺于平静而安逸的生活，不再有离开的想法。
E: You kept doing routine tasks at the space station, putting off the decision on whether you would board the Express. Bit by bit, you drowned in the quiet and tranquil life and stopped thinking about leaving.

C: 砂金向Archer发出邀请，作为从者的Archer选择贯彻御主的意志。在聚光灯的照耀下，你与砂金展开战斗。
E: Aventurine invited Archer to come with him. As a Servant, Archer chose to stand by his Master's side. Under the spotlight, you faced off with Aventurine.

C: 你与昔涟来到你原先的「私人浴宫」前，认为这正是避人耳目的好地方。正当你推门而入时，昔涟感觉到房间里有其他人存在。
E: You and Cyrene returned to what had once been your "private bath chamber," deeming it the perfect place to speak without being overheard. Just as you opened the door, Cyrene sensed someone else inside.

C: 黑塔强行侵入，告知翁法罗斯内部已过去几年，黄金裔们启动了识刻锚，让黑塔与螺丝咕姆得以暂时阻止来古士的行动。黑塔感知到某条命途对世界的强大影响，或许其能帮助你越狱。
E: Herta broke in, saying several years had passed within Amphoreus. The Chrysos Heirs had activated the Chronocognitive Anchor, allowing Herta and Screwllum to temporarily halt Lygus's actions. She sensed a powerful influence of a certain Path upon the world, which might help you escape.

C: 游鱼天性趋光，因为海渊昏暗苍茫。海列屈拉为刻律德菈扫清征程，助其加冕登基。她之所求，一如往昔，只是一场宴席。
E: Fish were drawn to light by nature, for the deep sea knew only gloom. Helektra cleared the way for Cerydra, lifting her to the throne. Yet all Helektra ever desired was simply a feast.

C: 长夜月的威胁解除后，星穹列车着手组建讨伐铁墓的联军，黑塔、螺丝咕姆与仙舟联盟均愿为此助力。
E: After neutralizing the threat of Evernight, the Astral Express began organizing a joint force to campaign against Irontomb, with Herta, Screwllum, and the Xianzhou Alliance all pledging their support.

C: 昔涟接纳并保护着银河众生的「记忆」。你触碰记忆碎片，尝试与昔涟一同铭记银河。
E: Cyrene once embraced and protected the "memories" of all cosmic beings. You touched the memory fragments, trying to remember the cosmos together with Cyrene.

C: 战场中心出现强烈脉冲，「铁墓」即将完成自我加冕。黑塔将「谒见系统」接入权杖并启动硬件超频。
E: A powerful pulse emerged at the center of the battlefield, and Irontomb was about to complete its Self-Coronation. Herta connected the Audience System to the Scepter and initiated overclocking the hardware.

C: 在你的带领下，杰帕德与希露瓦在诊所门口与奥列格会面。奥列格欢迎你们的到来，并且邀请大家进诊所详谈。
E: Under your lead, Gepard and Serval met Oleg at the entrance of the clinic. Oleg welcomed your arrival and invited everyone inside the clinic to talk in detail.

C: 你在列车上发现一封来历不明的邀请函，根据信中内容，帕姆建议你将信交给丹恒。
E: You found a mysterious invitation letter on the Express. Based on its contents, Pom-Pom suggested handing it to Dan Heng.

C: 丹恒利用云吟术浸湿信纸，发现了新的字句：<color=#f29e38ff>人有五名，代价有三</color>。他虽不认为寄信人是刃，但还是决定前往神策府打听星核猎手的动向。
E: Dan Heng used cloudhymn magic to moisten the letter paper, revealing hidden words: <color=#f29e38ff>Of five people, three must pay a price</color>. Though he didn't believe the sender was Blade, he still decided to visit the Seat of Divine Foresight to investigate the Stellaron Hunters' movements.

C: 帕沃尔告诉你们，这把宝剑「米卡·奇瓦沙」是卡勒瓦拉选拔君主的石中剑，但拔出这柄剑、并认出它仙舟来历的却是一位<color=#f29e38ff>天外来客</color>。
E: Paavo told you that this sword "Miekka Kivessä" was Kalevala's Sword in the Stone for selecting monarchs. But the one drew it and recognized its Xianzhou origins was a <color=#f29e38ff>visitor from beyond the sky</color>.

C: 「孤云」为堕入魔阴的无名剑士带去了解脱，它感受到老友结束战斗的渴望，也厌倦了作为历代君王争夺的目标，于是决定回到石碑中。
E: Guyun brought salvation to the nameless swordmaster who had fallen to mara. Sensing its old friend's desire to end the combat, and weary of centuries as a trophy for warring monarchs, it chose to return to the stone monument.

C: 飞霄质问景元的三项过失，称步离人正受幻胧指引而蠢蠢欲动。飞霄请你和丹恒前往幽囚狱提交证言，并要求将呼雷移交曜青仙舟看管。
E: Feixiao accused Jing Yuan of three failures, claiming the borisin were being stirred by Phantylia's influence. Feixiao asked you and Dan Heng to submit testimony at The Shackling Prison, and demanded that Hoolay be transferred to the custody of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 你们向门关靠近，遭到步离狼卒的拼死阻拦。寒鸦留下断后，请你们务必阻止呼雷逃脱。
E: As you neared the gates, borisin wolftroopers barred your path with desperate resistance. Hanya stayed behind to hold them off and asked you to stop Hoolay from escaping.

C: 灵砂调查死去的云骑，发现是没来得及变回原形就被狱卒格杀的步离人。景元认为，能为劫狱者办妥这类伪装身份的人一定位高权重。
E: Lingsha examined a dead Cloud Knight and found it had actually been a borisin who got killed by prison guards before he could return to his original form. Jing Yuan concluded that whoever arranged such disguises for the intruders must have been someone in a high position of power.

C: 身为医士，椒丘觉得最可悲之事，是被救治者再赴死亡。如今椒丘必须见证呼雷的死亡，以此换得演武仪典的平安，以及被治愈的飞霄。
E: Being a medic, Jiaoqiu felt the most heartbreaking thing was watching the patients he saved march back toward death. Now, Jiaoqiu had to watch Hoolay die to protect both the Wardance ceremony and the healed Feixiao.

C: 三月七与云璃受到夕葵的接待，完成相关登记手续。顺着夕葵的指引，三月七与云璃前往选手大厅。
E: March 7th and Yunli were greeted by Xikui, who helped them complete registration. Following Xikui's guidance, March 7th and Yunli headed to the contestants' hall.

C: 两个「白露」出现在你们面前。
E: Two "Bailus" appeared before you.

C: 甜甜软糖
E: Sweet Gummy Candy

C: 至尊列车长
E: Ultimate_Conductor

C: 想去大剧院参观了…家族应该给你打钱！
E: I kinda wanna go see the Grand Theater now... The Family should pay you for this work!

C: 黄金的时刻
E: Golden Hour

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 重循苦旅的司铎
E: Sacerdos' Relived Ordeal

C:
考虑周全的怪盗总能在绝境之中安全撤离，腰间常备救命钩索。

「腰间的钩索要怎么瞄准到想去的位置…你会解释你是如何迈出脚步吗？」

放置宝物的密室里机关遍布险象环生，然而怪盗借助腰部的飞索抓钩闪转腾挪，如同在半空中舞出华尔兹。抓钩在三分之一秒内发射至数十米高墙上，滑轮随即回转，瞬间便将怪盗送到「狮子座之星」的面前。

借助腰间的钢索就能飞天遁地，这便是飞贼的基本职业素养。

「续作可以让我们的特技替身出演，还能省笔预算呢。」动作指导讥讽道。「反正带着面具，观众也看不出来谁是谁。」
E:
A well-prepared thief can always escape safely from desperate situations with a life-saving grappling hook equipped under his belt at all times.

"How to throw the grappling hook at the right target... Could you explain how you made all those moves?"

The secret treasure storage room was full of lethal mechanisms, but the thief danced around them using the grappling hook at his waist as if he were performing a waltz in midair. In a split second from when he reached for his belt, Leblanc threw the grappling hook to a wall tens of meters high, and the pulley then rolled and instantly sent the thief to the "Star of Leo."

To come and go anywhere one so desires, with just the steel grappling hook equipped under one's belt, is the basic qualification required of a professional thief.

"You know, we could just let the stunt double play his part in the sequel. That'll save us a lot of money," the action choreographer quipped. "The audience wouldn't know who was under the mask anyway."

C:
在晦暗混沌的梦境之中，她总会梦见光明复现那几日看到的事物。千顷楹树悠然摇曳，花瓣翩翩。靛蓝海浪击打着礁石，凝作逸散白玉。飞鸟展开银翼，消失在碧绿的竹林之中。

她总在梦中徒劳地寻找着另一个人，一个本该与她共同欣赏美景的人。

但她只能看到一个模糊的影子。她清楚地记得那人绸缎似的短发与墨玉似的眸子，但回忆却像是坠入了神经系统构建的迷宫，她总是在看清面庞前便骤然惊醒。惺忪恍惚间，她摩挲着令她百般疼痛的义眼。借助虚假的眼睛，她便不必再靠声音、气味和指尖拼凑一个模糊的影子。

「它已是无用之物。」烬灭祸祖的令使道。她听见扇面轻摇的风，还有令使细碎的笑声。「很快，你就能看到所有你想看到的事物了——用你自己的眼睛。」

「这便是在下自己的眼睛。」她轻笑了一声，「况且它曾目睹的美景，在下已经再也无缘得见了。」
E:
In the dim, chaotic dreamscape, she always dreamed of the brightness she had seen in those few days. Thousands of acres of eucalyptus trees swayed gently, and petals fluttered in the breeze. The indigo waves beat against the rocks and turned into scattering white jade. Flying birds spread their silver wings and disappeared into the green bamboo forest.

She was always searching for someone else in her dreams, the one who should have enjoyed the scenery with her.

But all she could see was a blurry figure. She remembered clearly the short, silky hair and the eyes like black jade stones, but her memories were faded into a maze constructed by her nervous system, and she always woke up with a start just before seeing the face clearly. In a daze, she touched her prosthetic eye that had caused her so much pain. With the help of the false eye, she no longer needed to piece together a blurry figure by sound, smell, and touch.

"It's no longer of use," said the Emanator of the Ruin Author. She heard the sound of the swaying hand fan and the flitting laughter of the Emanator. "Soon, you'll be able to see everything you want to see — with your own eyes."

"This is my own eye," she chuckled, "Besides, never will I have the chance to see the scenery it once witnessed again."

C: 扼杀混沌系统的过程，就像制作标本。将每颗粒子的信息钉上展翅板，让翅膀不再扇动，而后约束蝴蝶的轨迹，令现实以自己想要的方式起舞。任何微小的变化，都会使脆弱的平衡顷刻瓦解，学士们不断地细化模型，最终也只能将统合运动规律的愚行，视为凡人的狂妄。所以，即使过去了那么久，我依然清晰地记得，第一次杀死蝴蝶的那天，刀尖是以怎样的方式，刺进它的胸膛。
E: The process of annihilating a chaotic system is like making a specimen. Pin the information on every particle on the board and still the wings, then bind the butterfly's path and make reality dance in the way you want it to. Any tiny change would instantly disintegrate the fragile balance. No matter how much the scholars continue to perfect the model, they could only consider the foolish act of unifying the pattern of movement as the hubris of mortals. Therefore, I still clearly remember the first day I killed the butterfly, even though it was so long ago. I remember how the point of the knife stabbed into its chest.

C: 在「存护」的巨锤下，星体被加工为坚不可摧的墙基，而在伟力下溅起的残渣则迅速冷却，成为珍贵的天彗合金。这些克里珀敲打天彗星墙时迸射的细小碎片，在诞生之初便宣告着新一个琥珀纪的到来。几乎所有的天彗合金都被星际和平公司严加保存，只有P<unbreak>45</unbreak>以上的员工方有机会一窥它们的真容。
E: Under the colossal hammer of the Preservation, celestial bodies are processed into indestructible foundations, while the residue splattered by its immense force quickly cools, forming precious Celesticomet Alloy. These tiny shards, ejected when Qlipoth struck the Celestial Comet Wall, heralded the arrival of a new Amber Era from the moment they were created. Almost all Celesticomet Alloys are meticulously preserved by the Interastral Peace Corporation, with only employees ranked P<unbreak>45</unbreak> and above having the opportunity to catch a glimpse of their true form.

C: 为解决愈发严峻的肥胖与健康问题，阿塔忒博士研发出了营养管理机。它不仅能吸收主人过剩的营养将其储存，还能够过滤大气中的无害颗粒用以合成食物。可谁也没想到，因为合成食物的效率过高，没管住嘴巴的消费者们体重不降反升。铺天盖地的投诉让阿塔忒博士彻夜难眠，整个人都瘦了一圈。
E: Doctor Atarte invented a nutrition management machine to confront the increasingly dire challenge of obesity. Not only can this machine absorb excess nutrition from its owner and save these calories elsewhere, but it can also filter out the harmless particles in the atmosphere to synthesize food. However, no one expected the consumers would instead gain weight, as the synthesized foods were too efficient and caused the users to keep eating. The overwhelming complaints made Doctor Atarte lose sleep for days at a time, losing a large amount of weight.

C: 没有人知道#77迷图在临死前的最后一刻在想什么，总是事与愿违的天才，以未知的手法，在膜空间中剥离了自己的「智慧」，丢掉了所有的昨天，作为无知的庸人死去。无数学者试图解开晶体的封印，从中获取天才的真知，但最终他们只得出了一个毫无意义的结论——迷图的智慧，其重量不过与一朵盛放在家乡的野花持平。
E: No one knows what Genius Society #77 Puzzle thought in her final moments — a genius always at odds with her desires, who stripped away her "wisdom" in the membrane space, discarding all her yesterdays and dying as an ignorant mundane. Countless scholars have attempted to break the crystal's seal to access her profound insights, only to reach a trivial conclusion — the depth of Puzzle's wisdom was as negligible as that of a wildflower blooming in her hometown.

C: 有出逃者称自己曾因打开奇怪的匣子获得一枚家族缘结，误入信仰「同谐」希佩的家族聚会，他描述自己见到了前所未有的画面：群星意志彼此相连，拧成一股绳结。在家族缘结下，人们睁大双眼、面露微笑，他们的表情惊人一致，并互相看着彼此。当他发出疑问时，大堂内数千人同时看向他，并异口同声发出了同样的声音——「欢迎。」出逃者立刻毛骨悚然，最后，为谋生存，他只好同样睁大双眼、面露微笑。
E: An escapee reported that he had acquired a Family Ties after opening a peculiar box, and inadvertently entered a gathering of The Family that venerates Xipe the Harmony. He described witnessing an unprecedented scene: The will of numerous heavenly bodies were intertwined, coiling into a single bound knot. Under Family Ties, people open their eyes wide, their faces etched with eerie smiles, staring at one another with identical expressions. When he voiced a question at the scene, everyone in the grand hall simultaneously shifted their gaze towards him and spoke with the same voice — "Welcome." The escapee was instantly unnerved, and, in a desperate bid for survival, he too held his eyes wide, his face plastered with the same smile.

C: 你失去了很重要的东西，在大脑里，仿佛有一位手法精巧的小偷，悄无声息地将你的过去偷走，在心口硬生生地挖出一个洞来。焚化工，荷尔斯泰因大静默，你曾听过这些名字，却不料竟能出现在自己身边，他们剜下你的一半心灵，将那些记忆视为废品。\n\n谁能容忍珍贵的回忆被随手抛弃？你追逐着他们的身影，踏上满怀怨愤的复仇之旅。没有人有权力主宰他人的记忆，你要找回属于你的故事，哪怕它们已惨遭焚烧，你要抓住冷酷无情的盗贼，让他们为傲慢的行径付出代价。
E: You have lost something very important. It is as though a skilled thief in your brain silently stole your past, ruthlessly digging a hole in your heart. The Cremators, the Holstein Aphasia — you have heard these names before, but never envisioned their presence to be so near. They cut off half of your soul and treat those memories as scrap.\n\nWho could tolerate cherished memories being discarded so casually? You trace their shadows, embarking on a quest for wrathful vengeance. No one has control over the memories of others. You are set to reclaim your story, even if it has been callously cremated already. You will seize the merciless thieves and make them pay for their arrogant behavior.

C: 揭下榜单，嘭地一声，拍张照片，金钱滚滚转动。你是慧星酒吧名气第一的猎人，和那些欺软怕硬的懦夫不同，永远只接最不要命的买卖。银河之大，最不缺的就是亡命的恶徒，他们是能动的钱袋子，等着你去收割。\n\n你轰开星际海盗的战舰，信手消灭冲来的护卫，他们烂到姥姥家的枪法给你的义体开了个大洞，为工作增添了几分挑战。你踹开绿色的蛤蟆脑袋，对照着通缉令上的相貌挨个清点，大胡子的蟑螂，浑身钢铁的鸟人，还有些有碍美观的家伙，你扣动扳机，心里默默盘算又能快活上多少天。
E: You reveal the leaderboard with a bang and snap a photo. Ka-ching! Out goes the cash. As the most famous hunter of Comet Bar, you only take on the riskiest deals, unlike those cowards who only bully the weak. There are plenty of outlaws on the run in this vast Cosmos, and they are walking bags of cash waiting for you to reap when you capture them.\n\nYou blast open the battleship of the interstellar pirates and effortlessly eliminate the guards charging your way. Their lousy marksmanship leaves a gaping hole in your prosthetic body, making your job slightly more challenging. You kick a green toad out of your way and do a head count according to the wanted posters. A bearded cockroach, a birdman covered in steel armor, and a few unsightly fellows. You pull the trigger, already calculating how many days you'll be able to live in purchased joy with this job's rewards.

C: 快乐的糖果骑士，跋涉过汽水海洋，斩断面条恶龙的尾巴，终于抵达了饼干魔王面前。然后，天空中落下一只可怕的手，将它们通通都抓起来，扔进了你巨大的嘴巴里。听故事的皮皮西人不满地鼓起腮帮子，这乱七八糟的结局完全没有意义。\n\n你将剩下的糖果分给孩子们，刚才还愠怒的面孔纷纷化作了笑颜。不要追逐什么价值，大家都只是桌上的糖果骑士，逃不出被吃掉的命运。但在那以前，你要穿上一百种口味的包装纸，在重力井里蹦极，到钻石风里唱歌，宇宙虚妄无比，唯有快乐是属于你自己的。
E: The joyful Candy Knight strides through the soda ocean, slashes the tail of the Noodle Dragon, and finally meets the Cookie Devil face to face. Then, a terrifying hand descends from the sky, capturing and throwing them all into your mouth. The Pepeshis listening to the story pout discontentedly, finding the outlandish ending meaningless.\n\nYou distribute the remaining candies to the children, and their sulking faces immediately break into smiles. There is no point in finding meaning since everyone is Candy Knight on the table who will be eaten one day. But, before that happens, you need to wear a hundred wrappers of different flavors, enjoy bungee jumping in a gravity well, and sing in the wind of diamonds. The universe is vast and absurd beyond reckoning, and only happiness belongs to you.

C:
赫利塔克，我听到你的破喉咙，
你已许久没来看望我这老朋友，年迈的斐亚斯。
可怜战争的旧创，我已经看不清你的面容，
但请相信，工坊里的雕像，比你自己更逼真。
孩子们都躲着我，害怕那些置入了机械的雕像，
我给他们涂上颜料，行走起来，
一颦一笑，和那些死在海里的家伙们一模一样。
我是不是已经超越了那些机械师和雕塑家？
我甚至觉得，如果有吉奥里亚的赐福，
我也能重现创造生命的伟业，把他们全都带回来…
哦该死，我好像在手肘上摸到了齿轮。
E:
Helioticus, I hear your hoarse voice.
It has been ages since you last visited your old friend, me, the aging Phies.
Old scars from pitiable wars means I can no longer see your face,
But please believe me, the statue in my workshop captures your very essence more vividly than you yourself.
The kids keep their distance from me, frightened by those mechanical statues.
With a touch of paint and some skillful craftsmanship, they walk
And talk and smile just like those fellows who died in the sea.
Have I outdone those mechanics and sculptors now?
If blessed by Georios, I even feel that
I could accomplish the incredible feat of recreating life and bringing them all back...
Oh no, I think I feel a gear on my elbow.

C:
在以武力为尊的悬锋城，有这样一群特殊的文人，
他们以笔代戈，却受到悬锋人的尊敬，他们便是战争记录官。
在每一片战车碾过的土地上，同样有着他们的足迹，
连篇累牍的记录中，胜和大胜是最常见的字眼。
这并非出于惜字如金，
只是因为记录官不屑廉价的胜利。
他们钟爱失利的战争，镌刻每一次屈辱，总结失败的经验，
直到对手最终倒下，再轻轻写下大胜二字。
神悟树庭拒绝承认他们是学者，因为他们的才能只服务于战争，
可记录官根本不在乎，他们更愿意称自己为战士。
E:
In Castrum Kremnos where military might is prized above all, there is a unique group of scholars —
they wield pens instead of swords, but still receive high respect from the Kremnoans. They are the war scribes.
They lay foot on every blood-soaked battlefield where the chariots have been,
carrying scrolls that merely repeat "victory" and "overwhelming victory".
Not because they value brevity,
but because they would waste no time or parchment on easy victories.
They enjoy every disadvantageous battle, carving lessons from cadaverous failures and analyzing lessons learned.
And when their enemies finally kneel, they casually scribble "Overwhelming Victory" again.
The Grove of Epiphany refuses to acknowledge them as scholars, for they only serve wars.
The scribes couldn't care less, for they much prefer to call themselves warriors.

E: Flea Market

E: Mutterer

C: 超验之镜（其一）
E: Mirror of Transcendence (I)

C: 天才俱乐部#55余清涂的音乐品味不俗，她与阮•梅私交甚好，曾在自己最爱的古琥珀纪乐曲中选取亮眼的名字制成饮品送给阮•梅；余清涂所调制的特饮粉红冲撞被证明无毒，但一位调酒师曾夜以继日研究它的配方，试图证明其中有数种虫类尸体：虫类孢子、甲壳以及磷粉——他判断该酒可能有致幻效果。
E: Yu Qingtu, Genius Society's #55, has good taste in music. On account of her fantastic friendship with Ruan Mei, she once made a drink — to which she gave an eye-catching name taken from the title of her favorite ancient Amber Era music — as a gift to the other woman. The drink Yu Qingtu concocted, named the Pinkest Collision, was proven to be non-toxic, but a mixologist once spent days trying to recreate its formula, seeking to prove that the beverage was made from various insect carcasses, insect spores, carapaces, and phosphorous — he concluded that this drink may possess hallucinogenic qualities.

C: 一个能够预判开启者想法的匣子，在打开它的时候，匣中之物就会幻化为你头脑中的想象。它曾被黑塔评为最难对付的奇物之一，她与「猜不透匣」数次较劲，但每次都无法在开启匣子时控制自己脑内的构想。最后黑塔扔下「猜不透匣」，再也没碰过它——也许黑塔无所不能，唯独做不到放空大脑。
E: A box that can predict the thoughts of the one who opens it. When the box's hatch is lifted, the item within will manifest into what your mind envisions. Herta once rated it as one of the hardest Curios to deal with. She had butted heads with the Indecipherable Box numerous times, but never was she able to control the thoughts in her mind when she opened it. Finally, she cast it down and never touched it again. Perhaps Herta is capable of almost anything - except completely emptying her mind.

C: 九枚六面骰组成了这个奇特的三角体，它能对自身进行持续不断的降维，从而以二维平面的方式存在于立体的世界里。谁以何种目的将其创造出来，目前还不清楚。
E: Nine six-sided dice make up this bizarre pyramidal device. It can continuously reduce the number of dimensions it occupies and exists in the 3-dimensional world as a purely 2-dimensional entity. No one knows who created it or why.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 被做成奶酪外型的多面棱镜，每一个小孔都是单独镜面，被不同棱面照射到会产生不同效果，部分参与实验者被棱面照射后身体被放大或缩小，而部分参与实验者被照射后身体与原来并无区别，却无一例外接收了不属于自己的记忆，他们患上虚构记忆症，并认为在棱面中看到了星神浮黎谜样的面容。
E: A multifaceted prism made in the shape of cheese. Every hole is an individual surface, and reflections from each prism surface produce a different effect. Some participants in experiments have their bodies physically enlarged or reduced after being reflected in the prism. Meanwhile, other participants have no bodily alterations, but instead receive memories not of their own. They become diagnosed with fictmemoria, and claim that they saw the enigmatic face of the Aeon Fuli in the prism.

C: 小伊卡的速度保持为0，免疫<u>负面效果</u>，并且不会出现在行动序列上。\n若除小伊卡外的我方目标生命值降低，小伊卡会在任意目标回合开始时或行动后，消耗自身<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>生命上限的生命值，并为我方生命值降低的目标回复等同于风堇<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>生命上限+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>的生命值。\n风堇处于【雨过天晴】状态时，小伊卡会在风堇施放技能后立即获得1个<u>额外回合</u>并自动施放【乌云乌云快走开！】，并且小伊卡触发天赋的治疗效果时，额外为我方全体目标回复等同于风堇<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>生命上限+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>的生命值，小伊卡施放技能后使自身所有<u>持续效果</u>持续回合数减1。
E: Little Ica maintains 0 SPD, is immune to <u>debuffs</u>, and will not appear in the Action Order.\nIf the HP of an ally target (except Little Ica) is reduced, then at the start of any target's turn or after any target takes action, Little Ica will consume <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their own Max HP and heal the ally target with reduced HP for an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>.\nWhile Hyacine is in the "After Rain" state, Little Ica gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically casts "Rainclouds, Time to Go!" immediately after Hyacine uses an ability. Moreover, when Little Ica triggers the Talent's healing effect, additionally restores HP for all ally targets by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>. After Little Ica uses an ability, the duration of all their <u>Continuous Effects</u> decreases by 1 turn.

C: 你的「故事」•二
E: Your "Story": Part II

C: 多年以后，符玄总会想起自己获准踏入「图书馆」提问的那一日。 「你在想什么？」戴着墨镜的盲眼老者手拄拐杖，侧首静待她的回话。 「所有那些可以选择的时刻…是否早已注定？还是说，如果在那一瞬间，我若能算得更准一些，哪怕再精确万分之一，我就能做出正确的选择，让他们不必离开？」少女半闭双眸，似问似答。 「每时每刻的我们，都站在自己足迹布下的迷阵中心。」盲眼老人轻轻顿了顿手杖。「我给不了答案。我只能给予问题…和看见问题的眼界。而你一路走来，向我所求的想必也不是答案。」 「那就给我『眼睛』吧。无论命运是否从一开始就被注定了，身为卜者，我都想看得更清楚一些。」 「如你所愿。但仙舟人的肉身长存，接受我给予的『眼睛』，就意味着接受永恒的痛苦。比起求知工具，它会更像是…『刑具』。」 「这岂不是正合遍智天君的信条——知识要用苦痛来换取。我不想在未来的选择上犯下同样的错误。」 …… 在受赐「眼睛」的昏昧中，她看见了许多往事。 她看见幼时的自己正襟危坐，手不释卷。她看见父亲怜爱地点着她的眉心，自豪地称赞她聪慧灵秀。她看见长辈向她展示符氏一族作为玉阙仙舟观星士世家的荣耀历史。她看见卜者们运筹如仪，为她占得辉煌的未来——她将登上「太卜」的宝座。 「这就是我的未来？」 「一饮一啄，莫非前定。这就是你的宿命。卜测结果已上呈太卜竟天大人，他答应亲自为你督教课业。这可是天大的福分啊。」 所有过去交叠在概率的烟雾中，似梦似真，在意识的边缘变化来去，延伸成数不尽的未来。她尽力分辨，在浩瀚的瞬间里寻找她正式成为卜者的那一日。
E: Even after the stretch of many years, Fu Xuan would always think of the day she got permission to enter "the library" and ask her question. "What are you thinking about?" The blind elder wearing sunglasses awaited her response in silence, tilting his head and holding to his cane for support. "Do all those moments of choice hold predestined outcomes? Or is it that, if in that very instant, I could calculate with even greater precision, even by a fraction of a fraction, I could make the right choice and prevent them from leaving?" The girl's eyes were half-closed, and she spoke her question akin to an answer. "Across each and every moment, we stand at the center of a maze laid out by our own footprints." The old, blind man softly shifted his cane. "I cannot provide you with answers. I can only offer questions... and the perspective to see them. And whatever you have sought from me along the way, surely it is not an answer." "Then, grant me 'The Eye'. Regardless of whether fate has been predetermined from the start, as a diviner, I long to see with greater clarity." "As you wish. But the people of the Xianzhou are ageless in flesh. To accept my 'eye' means to bear timeless pain. Rather than a tool, it is more like an.... 'instrument of torture.'" "Aren't these the very words of the Wisdomwalker's creed? Knowledge exchanged with pain. I do not wish to make the same mistake in my future choices." ... In the stupor that followed the bestowal of her "eye," she witnessed a great many past happenings. She saw herself during childhood, sitting upright and diligent in her studies; her father tenderly brushing the point between her brows, proudly praising her intellect and wit; her elders revealing to her the Fu family's gloried history serving as the Xianzhou Yuque's stargazers. She saw the operations and rites conducted by diviners, divining the brilliant future for her where she would claim the throne of master diviner. "Is this my future?" "Isn't every morsel, every drop predestined? This is your destiny. The divination results have been submitted to Master Diviner Jingtian, and he has agreed to personally supervise your tutelage. This is an immense fortune you have been blessed with." All the past is layered in the mists of probability, shifting on the edges of consciousness between dreams and reality, and extending forward into futures uncountable. She strove to find the day she became a diviner in the vastness of all moments.

C: 这一天，又有两个年轻人叩响了大门。门无声无息向后打开，隐隐绰绰的烟雾中，她停下了用天平称量抵押物的动作，为两位到访者斟上了清茶。 「如我所料，欧泊还是选择了你去办匹诺康尼这案子。不过…你似乎又多了一位同盟者呢。」 她示意他们坐下，华贵的座椅上还留着上一位客人的余温。 「为了收回匹诺康尼的坏债，你们需要什么？」 「你的基石。」少年看向她的眼睛。 「第一次有人提出这样的要求，那你们愿意付出什么？」她微笑道。 「我们的基石。」少女说。 「还有我的命。要在匹诺康尼撕开一道口子，我别无选择。」少年深不见底的眼瞳中，光一闪而过。 和他们眼神相触的时候，往日种种一闪而过，最终定格在她与二人初遇的画面。 她轻轻叹息，将代表匹诺康尼的微缩模型置于天平一端。 「我们有各自的来路，也有各自的归宿。」 托帕石落在天平的另一端。 「这段同行的路可以长，也可以短…但只要还未行至终点，我们就必须履行立下的契约。」 砂金石接着落下。 「这世上不存在无价之物，一切都可被衡量、抵押、交易……」 最后是翡翠石，它坠地的刹那，天平彻底倾斜倒下—— 「现在，用它们去换取匹诺康尼的明天吧。」
E: On a different day, two young individuals arrived at her door. The door swung open silently, revealing a room veiled in smoke. Amidst the smoke, she momentarily paused her evaluation of collateral on the scales, and graciously offered fresh tea for her visitors. "As I anticipated, Opal chose you to handle the Penacony case, but it seems... you've found a new ally." She remarked, gesturing for them to take a seat on the ornate chairs that still retained warmth from the previous visitor. "What do you need to collect bad debts owed by Penacony?" "Your Cornerstone." the young man replied, meeting her gaze. "Well, this is the first time anyone has asked for such a thing. What price will you pay in return?" she asked, a smile playing on her lips. "Our Cornerstones." the young lady replied. "And my life, too. I have no choice except that if I want to tear open a gash in Penacony." A glimmer of light flickered within the bottomless pupils of the young man. When their eyes met, various memories of the past flickered past, then settled on the image of her first encounter with these two. She let out a soft sigh, placing a miniature model of Penacony on one end of the scale. "Each of us has our own beginnings and endings." The topaz stone was placed on the other end of the scale. "This journey together may be long or short, but as long as we haven't reached the end, we must honor our contract." The aventurine stone followed. "In this world, nothing is truly beyond value. Everything can be measured, leveraged, and traded..." In the end, the jade stone was placed on the scale, and the scales tipped completely and fell. "Now, let's trade them for the future of Penacony."

C: 黑天鹅：逆流河
E: Black Swan: Countercurrent

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n夜幕低垂，城中也逛无可逛，不如就此打道回府、返回歌德宾馆结束这尚可称为愉快的一天吧 。
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nIt's getting late and not much more is happening on the streets. It's a good time to return to the Goethe Hotel and bring this so-far pleasant day to an end.

C: 同病相怜的两人最终决定一起四处散散心，结果你们意外发现了正在路边聊天的希儿和娜塔莎。\n两人似乎遇到了麻烦，而娜塔莎决定向你求助——尽管希儿一万个不同意，但你还是听听娜塔莎的请求吧。\n不过，话又说回来了…为什么大家都喜欢在半夜出门乱逛啊？
E: The two suffering from the same illness decide to walk around to ease their minds. You discover Seele and Natasha chatting on the side of the street.\nThe two seem to be in trouble and Natasha asks for your help despite Seele's disapproval. You should probably hear what Natasha's request is all about.\nHowever... Why is everyone out so late at night?

C: 你们与邓恩的交涉堪称轻松写意：堂堂铁卫队长被各位打到昏迷、生死未卜，而你们拿到了解锁能源中枢大门的密钥。\n你们成功用密钥打通了前往能源中枢的道路，接下来就该轮到机械专家希露瓦大展身手了。
E: Your encounter with Dunn turns out to be easy indeed: You knock the dignified Silvermane Captain out cold and acquire the encryption key that unlocks the gate to the energy hub.\nYou open up the path to the energy hub. Now it's time for Serval, the expert mechanic, to do her thing.

C:
你的首次「开拓」之旅至此已近尾声。从此处阶梯再向上攀登，便是一切的肇端——星核之所在。
移除星核，贝洛伯格便能从摇摇欲坠的虚伪安宁中彻底解脱，这颗星球亦将迎来新生。
然而，结束不过是另一种开始——你们的列车也会重回轨道，向下一个目的地进发。
若已做好万全准备，就登上阶梯、前往见证这颗行星与这趟旅途的结局吧。
E:
Your first Trailblaze journey is nearing its end. At the top of these steps is the origin of it all — it is where the Stellaron lay.
Remove the Stellaron and Belobog will be completely freed from the instability and fabricated peace, and the planet will welcome a new life.
However, an ending is but a new beginning — your Express will also return to its rails and head towards the next destination.
Once you are ready, mount the steps and witness the ending to this planet and journey.

C: 建木重生，意味着罗浮上的星核所在已然明了。然而造成这一切的祸首却尚未露全貌。\n符玄受命率领云骑军监视毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司洞天。而你们，本着好用就往死里用…不是，本着能者多劳的原则，景元请你们往音信全无的工造司一探究竟，并借捷径赶往丹鼎司。
E: The revival of the Ambrosial Arbor makes the location of the Stellaron on the Luofu abundantly clear, but the culprit of this disaster remains obscure.\nFu Xuan is tasked to lead the Cloud Knights and keep watch over the Alchemy Commission delve next to the Ambrosial Arbor. As for you, based on the principle that a good tool should be used until it breaks — Errr, that the reward for hard work is more work! Jing Yuan asks you to find out what is happening in the radio-silent Artisanship Commission, and head to the Alchemy Commission via a shortcut.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 星期日与知更鸟以「家族」的名义为列车组打了包票——说真的，这则小插曲真的有必要惊动他们吗？\n但无论如何，他们良好的态度至少说明了这座酒店的服务确实一流，列车组想好好享受假期应该不成问题。\n风波已定，该重新向艾丽小姐办理入住了——希望这次一切顺利。
E: Sunday and Robin assured the Crew in the name of "The Family"... Honestly, was such a small matter worth all of that fuss?\nEither way, their pleasant attitudes at least showed that the service in this hotel was a cut above. The Crew should have no trouble enjoying their holiday here.\nAs the storm has settled, it's time to retry the check-in process with Miss Alley... Hopefully, things go smoothly this time.

C: 尽管你入梦的方式实在不够体面，星期日和知更鸟还是给予了你无微不至的关怀…好吧，他们本来就该这样。\n重新抖擞精神的你与三月七取得了联系，她推荐你前往「梦境贩售店」——你或许可以把它当做美梦之旅的第一站。
E: Though the way you entered the dream was less than desirable, Sunday and Robin made sure you received the utmost care... Fine. That was what they should have done anyway.\nHaving refreshed your spirits, you and March 7th received a message recommending you head to the Dreamscape Sales Store... Perhaps you can consider this the first stop on your wondrous dream journey.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 忆者同样表达了对砂金的不信任，但也说服了你以大局为重。你们决定去看看，他口中那个足以颠覆匹诺康尼的事实究竟是什么。
E: The Memokeeper similarly expresses mistrust of Aventurine, but convinces you that it is for the greater good. You decide to go and see what this truth that he speaks of is — the truth that could "overturn Penacony."

C: 匹诺康尼橡木家系的家主似乎对你颇感兴趣，向你发出私下会谈的邀请。这似乎正中你的下怀——为此，你与真理医生应邀抵达朝露公馆…只是你们还不知道，前方正有重重险阻等待着各位。\n与门卫亨德列克聊聊，开启你们两人在朝露公馆的大冒险吧。
E: The head of the Oak Family in Penacony, who seems to find you intriguing, invites you for a private chat. That's exactly what you need. To meet him, you visit the Dewlight Pavilion with Dr. Ratio... having no inkling of the perils that lie ahead of you.\nTalk to Hendrick the guard and embark on you two's adventure at the Dewlight Pavilion.

C: 你已抵达自己的结局。\n最后的时光，同████好好道别吧。尽量让自己……\n…死而无憾。
E: You have reached your final end.\nBid your farewells to █████████ in your final moments. Try your best to...\n...Die without regrets.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事已经——接近——告一段落，你终于得以和伙伴们共同度过一段清闲的时光。\n列车组在舒翁的酒吧齐聚，并准备以调饮的方式纪念逝去的伙伴、同时也合庆新生的希望。\n姬子发来消息，通知你们可以登船了。
E: The story of Penacony has (nearly) drawn to a conclusion, and you can finally spend some of your free time with your friends.\nThe Crew members gather at Siobhan's establishment and get ready to mix a few drinks in memory of those who lost their lives — while also celebrating the promise of new life.\nHimeko sends a message informing you that you may board the ship.

C: 考试结束，课程还未开始，现在是最令人欣喜的学院游览时间。一般来说，一段浪漫的邂逅、一场奇妙的冒险、一次世界毁灭的过程都是从学生在学校闲逛开始的。\n在校庆的创意集市逛逛吧，不保证有趣，但一定比上课轻松。
E: The test has concluded, and classes have yet to start. Now is the ideal time to explore the academy. Typically, a romantic encounter, a thrilling adventure, or the prelude to world destruction often begins with a leisurely stroll through the campus.\nEnjoy yourself in the anniversary's Creator's Market. While excitement is not guaranteed, it promises a more relaxed atmosphere than the classroom.

C: 这群猴子小可爱搞的蕉皮玩意儿满地都是，这该死的地方也没有环卫工——所以，你不介意帮这儿的人们打扫卫生。\n扫帚就是你手里的枪。
E: These lil' fudgin' monkeys are tossing banana peels everywhere like it's nobody's business. Since there's no janitor in this dump, you might as well lend a hand in cleaning up.\nWith your pistols as your broom, of course.

C: 最终的狩猎也已终了，恶徒已被忍法降伏，对于梦土百姓而言，今夜尚可安眠，而对忍侠来说，这只是下一场狩猎的开端……
E: The ultimate hunt is over, with the ninjas overcoming all the villains. The inhabitants of the Dreamlands can now enjoy a peaceful night's sleep, while for the Ninja Hero, this signals the beginning of a new adventure...

C: 忍者与猴子的故事暂且告一段落。众所周知，不管出了多大事，学还是得继续上，但先前被打断的校庆也得继续办下去才行。\n去体会真正快乐的校庆——虽然无人知晓你们为这份快乐付出的一切，但忍者就是在阴影中行事的侠盗，不问功名，但求太平。
E: The story of ninjas and monkeys comes to a temporary close. As you all know, no matter what happens, academic life must continue, and the interrupted school festival must resume.\nJoin the truly joyous festival — Although your contributions may remain unrecognized to all, a ninja embodies the spirit of a mysterious hero who works in the shadows, seeking not fame but peace for all.

C: 没有任何告别能一帆风顺——按照猎犬家系成员的说法，这里似乎发生了一些异常，并且，很可能与某种被扭曲过的余音有关…\n就让他们给万维克一个面子，进入艾迪恩公园调查此事吧。
E: No farewell ever goes smoothly... According to the Bloodhound Family members, something unusual has occurred here. What's more, it is likely connected to some kind of distorted Afterechoes...\nLet's have Wonweek pull some strings and head to Aideen Park to investigate.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 经过一番战斗，我们在试炼幻境中会合，并循着厮杀声寻找纷争的源头，或许白厄就在那里。
E: We finally met up in the illusion of the trial after some fighting and followed the sound of battle to the source of Strife. Perhaps that would be Phainon's location.

C: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
E: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

C: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。
E: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 自冥河之中炼成的死龙残躯，它将载着遐蝶到达无人能够渡过的彼岸。\n双子将在彼岸相会。
E: The remains of Netherwing forged by the River of Souls. It carries Castorice to a shore none could cross.\nThe twins will soon reunite at the other shore.

C: 成为半神的遐蝶成功将{NICKNAME}轻轻推出了冥界，她也为命运迎来结局。\n{NICKNAME}还记得与遐蝶再会的约定。
E: Castorice, who became a demigod, successfully pushes {NICKNAME} gently out of the nether realm and welcomes the end of her fate.\n{NICKNAME} still remembers the promise they made with Castorice to meet her once more.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 据{NICKNAME}所述，这段「记忆」中的些许细节，与我们来到翁法罗斯的经历大相径庭。似乎来古士是想借此，将翁法罗斯的真相向{NICKNAME}托出。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, certain details in this "memory" seem at odds with our journey through Amphoreus. It appears Lygus intended to use this to reveal Amphoreus's true state to {NICKNAME}.

C:
你还记得她们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
英雄撕裂天空，圣女飞落悬崖，棋手扬起初火，以负世神谕之名。
多么可敬！然而，命运从来慷慨，赴死的若虫必得赴死的结局。
你啊，救世主，看她们无光的死灰！难道还要妄想留住？
那推石攀升的，必遭大地倾覆；搅扰岁月的，也只能徒增一副零落的甲壳。
听我说，你与她们无异：正如那欢唱的也嘶声，明眸的也盲目。
去！尽管独自向前——
狂欢，起舞，投入不倦的火，永不停歇！
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
The hero tore through the sky, the Holy Maiden fell from the cliff, and the chessmaster ignited the first Flame, all in the name of prophecy of Worldbearer.
What noble deeds! And yet fate, ever generous, ensures that the death-bound nymphs shall find their death nevertheless.
O Deliverer, behold the lifeless ash they've become! Do you still futilely dream of saving them?
Those who push the boulder upward will see the earth swallow them whole. Those who meddle with time earn nothing but a shattered shell.
Hear me. You're no different from them: The singers still scream, and the bright-eyed still go blind.
Go, then! March on alone —
Revel, dance, throw yourself into the tireless flame, and never stop!

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C: 退场歌已终。你要亲手用火种烧尽台下无人的剧场，再亲手拉开下一场序幕——又是荒唐的悲剧，还是荒诞的喜剧？这一切仅有前进才得以窥见，身后万物都将迎来又一次退场。\n但无需遗憾，无需留连，因为世代如落叶，英雄亦如是。
E: The curtain call music has ended. You must use the Coreflame to burn down this empty theater, then raise the curtain for the next act. Will it be an absurd tragedy, or a preposterous comedy? Only by moving forward can we glimpse what lies ahead, while everything behind us faces another final bow.\nBut there's no need for regret or lingering attachment, for generations fall like leaves, and so, too, do heroes.

C: 群山层岩之下隐藏着无名泰坦的大墓，此处褪去了神话的装饰，直白地展现了「权杖」内部的景象。\n长夜月应该就在此地，继续前进吧。
E: Beneath the layered mountains lies the great tomb of the nameless Titan. Here, myth has been stripped away, revealing the unadorned workings of the "Scepter."\nEvernight must be close. Keep moving.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which sealed the "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Remembrance already warped the Grove. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 铁墓的恨意吞没寰宇，它的加冕即将完成，星系内一切存在都已遭其格式化。在宇宙迎来毁灭的前一瞬，我却在静谧的虚空中醒来……
E: Irontomb's hatred devours the cosmos. Its coronation is nearly complete. All existence within the galaxy has already been formatted by it. However, in the final split second before the universe's destruction, I wake up in a silent void...

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 冥火的力量在逐渐消散，看来这是一场消耗战
E: The infernal fire's power is gradually being reduced. Seems like this is a battle of attrition.

C: 一个以奇怪石膏头雕遮蔽面容的男子出现在你面前！他直接指出了阮•梅的谎言：她的野心远比表面上看上去更大！…\n她真正在培育的东西，究竟是…什么？！
E: A man masked by a strange plaster sculpture appears in front of you and pointed out Ruan Mei's lies. Her ambitions are far greater than they appear to be! ...\nThe thing she's cultivating... what is it, exactly?

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
发现一个怪地方，以前没来过。托帕就在这里。
不管她在计划什么，必须阻止。
帕姆注：「怪地方」是什么地方？好歹描述一下啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Found a weird place, never been here before. Topaz is here.
Need to stop her no matter what she is planning.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What kinda place is "weird place"? At least describe it!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n差点和托帕大打出手。好在布洛妮娅来阻止了。她说要带我们去个地方。好奇。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nAlmost fought with Topaz. Thankfully, Bronya came to stop us. She said she'll take us to a place. Curious.

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩，希莉儿。\n你帮助希莉儿解决了一个箱子谜题，但又一个诡异的谜题凭空出现在了你们面前。\n你感到事态变得愈发诡异了…但善良的开拓者决不能放着孤零零的小女孩不管。再帮他一次吧。
E: You find a strange little girl, Cyrille, in the Fragmentum.\nYou helped her solve an Armory Box puzzle, but another weird puzzle appeared out of thin air.\nYou feel things are starting to get really weird... But a kind-hearted Trailblazer can't just leave a little girl out here all alone. Help her out again.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solved the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him what the reward is — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了解开谜题的报酬——快去收下吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the rewards for solving the puzzle. Collect them now.

C: 丹枢对「龙蟠虬跃」的研究已经有结果了。她确实无愧于「天才丹士长」的称号，见识之广博令人叹服。\n将丹枢的研究报告转交给青镞吧，她现在一定很需要这份报告。
E: Dan Shu's study into the Draught of Draconic Surge managed to yield some information. She definitely deserves her title of being a genius chief alchemist, the breadth of her knowledge was jaw-droppingly vast.\nHand Dan Shu's report to Qingzu, she must need the report as quickly as possible.

C: 听芦慧说梅姐为了找到她的笔记偷偷从医馆溜出来了…你的手上拿着一些笔记，把它们交给梅姐吧。
E: Luhui tells you that Mei snuck out of the apothecary to retrieve her notes... You've got some notes with you. Hand them over to Mei.

C: 通过影像和证言的比对，你和檀檀找到了肇事星槎去往了迴星港。嫌疑人擅自改造引擎，回到了迴星港船坞修理肇事星槎…走吧，去将嫌疑人逮捕起来。
E: By lining up the footage with the testimonials, you and Tantan deduce that the offending starskiff was heading to Stargazer Navalia. The suspect was using an illegally-modded engine and headed back to Stargazer Navalia for repairs... Mosey over and arrest ourselves a perpetrator.

C: 听芦慧说梅姐为了找到她的笔记偷偷从医馆溜出来了…你的手上拿着一些笔记，把它们交给梅姐吧。
E: Luhui tells you that Mei snuck out of the apothecary to retrieve her notes... You've got some notes with you. Hand them over to Mei.

C: 刚一出地衡司，你们就看到门口有三个人在交谈。其中一个是净砚小姐，另外两个是说相声的阿往和阿来。\n你听到他们的谈话中出现了几个关键词…金发、异邦人、救命恩人…这该不会就是「罗刹消失事件」最关键的那块拼图吧？
E: The moment you step out of the Realm-Keeping Commission, you see three individuals discussing something. One of them is Jingyan, and the other two are Back'n and Forth of crosstalk fame.\nYou detected a few keywords in their conversation... Blonde, Outworlder, savior... This isn't the key information on Luocha's disappearance, is it?

C: 在三月七的翻译下，你们得知这谛听自流云渡码头某处发现了可疑线索。原来不是埋藏的宝藏啊…你内心长叹一声，再给你一次选择的机会，你肯定不会对那只小狗招手。而眼下，你只有去流云渡跑一趟了……
E: With March 7th's translation, you understand that the Diting found some strange clues in the Cloudford dock. Not a buried treasure... You sigh wordlessly. If you can do it over, you wouldn't have beckoned to the puppy. Looks like you're on a trip to Cloudford now...

C: 依附在你身上的浮烟将岁阳与仙舟的恩怨娓娓道来，同时也借你的口在这小小的迷路团队里肆意肆意撒播不合。眼下，想要从这处幻境中脱离，仍需要众人同心协力。安抚藿藿，然后一块找到离开这儿的法子。
E: Sticking close to you, Cirrus chatters garrulously about the Xianzhou's old grudge against the heliobi while also stealing use of your mouth to sow seeds of discontent among this small, lost team. It'll take everyone working together to get out of this maze. Comfort Huohuo, then find a way out of here together.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n巨大的震动仿佛一个警告，危机悄然降临。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nA tremendous quake seems to herald the silent arrival of danger.

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n必须好好问问这几位刺客，到底为什么要刺杀皇帝！
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nYou will have to thoroughly interrogate these assassins and find out why they want to assassinate the Emperor!

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness a fragment of this genius's life.

C: 离开查德威克的心绪空间，见证他生命最后的时光。
E: Leave Chadwick's Emoscape and witness the final moments of his life.

C: 好像听到了说话的声音，去前面看看吧。
E: There seem to be sounds of someone talking. Move ahead and have a look.

C: 家族秘书为你交接「晖长石号」的事项，是时候为你的飞艇招一位可靠的大副了。
E: The Family's secretary is handing over the responsibilities of the Radiant Feldspar to you. It's time to recruit a reliable first mate for your airship.

C: 为了拯救青雀，你联系了正在梦境中寻找邪恶组织线索的波提欧和银枝。\n找个安全的地点等待他们到来吧。
E: In order to save Qingque, you have contacted Boothill and Argenti, who are searching for clues about a certain evil organization in the Dreamscape.\nFind a safe place and wait for their arrival.

C: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。
E: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——逛街，促进感情的好方式，无论在哪个时代、哪个世界，都是如此。\n「迅速接受情人是可耻的，应该经过一段时间，因为时间对于许多事物常常是最好的考验。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Shopping — it is a wonderful way to increase intimacy in any world or time.\n"It is shameful to accept a lover too quickly. One must take their time — as time is often the best test."

C: 传言贝洛伯格的郊外还有冰原狼活动的痕迹，动物学专家莉拉需要你帮助她完成雪原生态调查。要找的痕迹有皮毛、脚印，还有…粪便？
E: Rumor has it that direwolf tracks have been found on the outskirts of Belobog. Lila needs your help with an ecological survey in the Snow Plains. She needs fur, footprints, and... feces?

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上署的名是说唱歌手伊妮丝，去机械聚落找到他吧。
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThis package should be sent to Eunice the rapper. Find her in the Robot Settlement.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n神采奕奕的铁卫似乎正为军务发愁……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe cheerful Silvermane Guard seems to be concerned about his duties...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 这些药王秘传十分狡猾，必须出重拳！\n动手吧，勇敢的开拓者。
E: These Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are very cunning, and we need to hit them hard!\nDo it, brave Trailblazer.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
E: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

C: 现在，就试着去解决这头大地兽的烦恼吧。
E: Now, try to solve this dromas's woes.

C: 你找到了遇难的飞行士。此时她正被困在一群孽物之间，情况万分危急。快去救人吧。
E: You find the crashed pilot. She is trapped among a group of abominations, and her situation is extremely dire. Quickly, save her!

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，他们甚至安排了白露担任「推广大使」。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." They even arranged for Bailu to serve as the "Promotional Ambassador."\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 被岁阳迷惑的藿藿，只好在幻障中寻找尾巴的踪迹。她还不知道自己将要遭遇什么——岁阳会找到宿主最为忌惮、最为脆弱的情绪，并将它放大。
E: Huohuo, beguiled by the heliobus, can only searches for traces of Tail in the illusion. She is yet unaware of what she will encounter — heliobi will find the host's most painful and vulnerable emotions, and amplify them to unbearable heights.

C: 哈努兄弟必须找到能够操控监狱电脑的秘钥，以此解开封闭了通道的隔离门。
E: Brother Hanu must find the passkey that controls the prison's computer, which can unlock the door that blocks the passageway.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 完成「枘凿六合」困难模式II
E: Complete Hexanexus Hard Mode II

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n艾尔菲突然失踪了，好在第二场演出正在顺利进行，问问现场观众对你们乐队的评价吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nArfey suddenly disappeared. Thankfully, the second performance is happening without a hitch. Ask the live audience about their reviews of the band's performance.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n详细看看这只突然出现的扑满的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nCarefully examine the condition of this Trotter that suddenly appeared.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。

C: 谢谢，咱感觉已经抓到诀窍了。
E: Thanks. I feel like I'm starting to get the hang of it.

C: 星核猎手，你们在打什么主意…仙舟联盟可不像我们这么好说话。被「{RUBY_B#岚}巡猎{RUBY_E#}」盯上，你们就不再是猎手，而是猎物了，联盟会追逐你们到宇宙尽头——
E: What exactly are you Stellaron Hunters trying to do...? The Xianzhou Alliance aren't us — they won't give you time to explain. Once you draw the attention of {RUBY_B#Lan}The Hunt{RUBY_E#}, you become their prey. The Alliance will hunt you to the end of the universe...

C: 啊，不要紧，丹恒一向守时，如果迟到了…想必有他的原因。
E: Ah, no need to worry, Dan Heng's rarely late. I'm sure he must have a good reason...

C: 所以，要么星核猎手说谎，要么仙舟「罗浮」上隐藏着更大的威胁。
E: ...Which means either the Stellaron Hunters are lying, or... there's an even bigger threat lurking on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 在星神之中，岚并不强大，祂的命途概念「巡猎」比较狭隘…但是，有别于大多数星神，岚非常关注凡人，祂几乎毫无保留地将力量交给仙舟联盟。
E: Lan doesn't rank among the more powerful Aeons — the concept of the Path of The Hunt is narrow... but in contrast with the other Aeons, THEY pay close attention to mortals. Lan grants strength to the Xianzhou Alliance without reservation.

C: 欢迎来到「存护」庇佑的贝洛伯格，朋友！愿你的未来像克里珀的琥珀一样金黄剔透！
E: My friend! Welcome to Belobog, a city protected by Preservation. May your future be as bright and golden as Qlipoth's Amber!

C: 最近我正和他、阮•梅合作推进一个项目！我希望，这个项目能够帮助我们接近宇宙的最大奥秘……
E: Recently, I have been working with him and Ruan Mei on a project! I hope this project can help us get closer to the greatest mystery of the universe...

C: 这是谁？
E: Who's this?

C: 如果您正在遭遇：心烦意乱、精神涣散、皮肤粗糙——请尽快联系医疗舱室-心理健康科。
E: If you are experiencing anxiety, lack of motivation, or skin roughness, please contact the medical cabin's Mental Health Department as soon as possible.

C: 陈列柜被打碎了，里面已经空空如也。
E: The display cabinet has been shattered, and the contents emptied.

C: 这就对了。
E: Lovely.

C: 走吧，送你回去～
E: Let's go, I'll take you to the safe zone~

C: 弄坏了？
E: It's broken?

C: 对！大部分科员已经去避难了，当务之急是返回主控舱段，组织反击！所以…你知道电梯怎么用吗？它启动不了了……
E: Yeah! Most of the staff have been evacuated safely, so right now our highest priority is to return to the master control zone and plan a counterattack! So... do you know how to use the elevator? I couldn't start it...

C: 不管什么难题，只要说这是黑塔女士的意思就行。毕竟黑塔本人，就是「智慧」价值的象征。
E: No matter the problem, you just needed to say that it was Madam Herta's wishes and all would be fine. After all, Herta herself is a symbol of wisdom.

C: 我要走，我要逃，我要离开这里……
E: I need to leave, I need to run from this forsaken...

C: 记住了。
E: Got it.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着驭空：「<unbreak>20</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Yukong: "<unbreak>20</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 随后枪上的眼睛牢牢合上，说什么也不肯睁开。
E: Then, the pistol shut its eyes tightly, refusing to open them.

C: 眼睛流露出明媚地笑意，仿佛连周遭无趣的空气都变得精彩起来。
E: The eye sparkles with radiant joy, as if even the dull air around has turned vibrant.

C: 这是用来分解空间站废弃物品的装置，对气味敏感的人或许需要屏住呼吸。
E: This is a device used to decompose rubbish from the space station. Those sensitive to odors may need to hold their breath.

C: 决定好了就来找我。
E: Come find me when you've made your decision.

C: 我们赢了吗？
E: Did we win?

C: 黑塔说我可以留下。
E: Herta says I can stay.

C: 具体情况我已经从姬子那儿听说了。听好了新人，重要的事情我只说一遍。
E: Himeko told Pom-Pom about your situation. Now listen up, Pom-Pom will only say this once.

C: 只要干掉星核，你们的世界也会更安全！
E: If we can get rid of it, your world will be safer too!

C: 你不是一个人，我也没发现什么异样。她一开始有点难说话，讲完道理后还挺温柔的。
E: Nope, she seemed normal to me too. She was kinda harsh at first, but she turned out to be a nice, reasonable lady.

C: 筑城者是星神克里珀的追随者。是他们预见了危机，并筑起高墙，建立贝洛伯格，存护了人类文明的火种。直到如今，他们依然在管理着这座城市。
E: The Architects are followers of the Aeon Qlipoth. It was they that foresaw crisis, built up our walls, and established Belobog — preserving the spark of human civilization. Even today, they are still tending to the city.

C: 给我站住，例行检查！
E: Halt, routine inspection!

C: 没、没有的事，你从哪儿看出来的？
E: N—No, why would anything have happened?

C: 跟我客气什么？对了，城里突然戒严，是出什么事了吗？
E: Why are you being so polite? Oh, and why's the city under curfew all of a sudden? Has something happened?

C: 佩拉已经把那件事摆平啦，不用怕。不过我理解你的心情，你就在我的机械屋好好整理一下头绪，想待多久都可以。
E: Don't worry. Pela has sorted it all out. But I do understand your concerns. You can think this over in my workshop, and stay as long as you want.

C: 还好，没遇到危险。
E: Fortunately, none at all.

C: 啊，就是这个！让我看看，这个钻头样的小玩意应该可以完美嵌入铁盒的钥匙孔……
E: Oh, this is it! Let me see, this drill-like gadget should fit perfectly into the keyhole of this tin box...

C: 又回到这间办公室了…想起上一次来到这里，仿佛就是上次。
E: Back in this office again... The last time I was here was... the last time I was here.

C: 呃…需要通过上车测验才行。
E: Um... You need to pass the Boarding Exam first.

C: （发个短信给姬子小姐吧……）
E: (Let's send a message to Himeko...)

C: 好啦好啦，我保证这是最后一次。
E: Okay, okay, I promise this is the last time.

C: 我一直在期待，或许有一天，她会把这把吉他还给我…等到那天，说不定我们就能冰释前嫌了。
E: I was always looking forward to the day she'd return this guitar... I thought that would be the day we could bury the hatchet.

C: 罢了…我不想提及那段往事。
E: *sigh* ...Like I said, let bygones be bygones.

C: 你真的下定决心要离开了吗？
E: Have you really made up your mind to leave?

C: 行李随意地堆在一旁。
E: The luggage was piled up randomly on the side.

C: 柜子里放的东西，你只看外形都想象不出用途。
E: You cannot tell the function of the items inside the cabinet based on their silhouette.

C: 垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片，上面写着：「住手吧，只有以下几人有权翻动贝洛伯格的垃圾桶：塔塔洛夫，垃圾之王和我。」
E: A pretty postcard lies among the garbage. It reads: "Stay your hand. Only the following persons are permitted to go through Belobog's trashcans: Tatalov, Garbage King, and myself."

C: 你看见一种细细长长的植物，杆茎呈柱形，内有孔洞。
E: You see a tall but thin plant with columnar-shaped stems, the inside full of holes.

C: 守卫对你的到来表示出不耐，显然他不欢迎你的靠近。
