E: The guard seems unhappy at your arrival. Apparently, he didn't welcome your approach.

C: 怎么处理？和其他几个一起处理呗，找机会给送回去…等等，你为什么——
E: What am I gonna do about her? Why, wait for the opportunity and send her back together with the rest of them of course, I... Hey come on, what's with the—

C: 该付多少医药费…
E: What's our medical bill...

C: 他帮我弄到了很多急需的药品，也帮过「地火」不少忙…至少，他应该没什么坏心眼吧。
E: I've managed to secure more than a few urgent medical supplies through him, and he's been a big help to Wildfire... In any case, I don't think his intentions are sinister.

C: 冷面小青龙这种绰号…
E: Cooler than Cold Dragon Young...?

C: 得找他讨个说法。
E: We've got an explanation to demand.

C: 我们追。
E: Let's get after him.

C: 说来话长咯。反正，现在上下层之间的联系几乎断绝了。
E: It's a long story. In any case, practically nothing moves up or down anymore.

C: 那伙人，毫无道德底线，抽起风来什么都抢！要不是「地火」，连这大矿区的控制权都要落到他们手上了。
E: You don't know these guys — no moral compass — they'd rob you blind in a flash! It's only thanks to Wildfire that the Great Mine hasn't fallen under their control completely.

C: 别再说了，我不容许你在我面前侮辱守护者大人。
E: Stop right there... I... won't allow you to insult the madam guardian.

C: 鼹鼠党的连胜记录，才不会轻易被打破！
E: The Moles haven't lost a game for ages! You're doomed!

C: 是啊，带丹恒去那种地方，桑博估计要出事了。
E: No kidding, they didn't exactly get off on the right foot.

C: 即使如此，也没有迷晕我们的必要吧？
E: Be that as it may, did you really have to poison us?

C: 难道有人在背后捣鬼？
E: Maybe someone's playing tricks?

C: 疲了，回房间休息吧。
E: I'm tired. Let's go back to the room to rest.

C: 呵…呵欠，突然有股睡意……
E: Hehe... *pretend yawn* Anyone else sleepy...?

C: 有点焦虑未来。
E: I'm worried about the future.

C: 你不必替我开脱，我也不止一次怀疑过自己，但履行义务的责任心总是会占到上风。
E: I don't need you to absolve me. The truth is, I didn't have every confidence that I was doing the right thing, but the sense of duty to carry out an order is bound to prevail with me.

C: 不过回想一下，感觉有点对不起克拉拉…我们本来答应她跟史瓦罗和平交谈来着……
E: *sigh* But thinking about it, I feel a bit bad about Clara... We promised her that our talks with Svarog would go peacefully...

C: 你…等等，你不会真要去吧？你一个人去？不行，这主意也太……
E: You... Hold on, you're not really going, are you? Alone? You can't, this plan is...

C: 为什么非得是我？
E: Why me?

C: 你是不知道养这群无耻的寄生虫有多难，吃我的用我的，哼……
E: You don't know what's it like to raise these shameless parasites, everything they eat and use is mine... hmph...

C: 让我再来一场吧
E: Get me another one.

C: （那边穿着盔甲的…史考特这么快就安排好了拳手？）
E: (The one in armor over there... Scott found a boxer for that already?)

C: 咳！咳咳咳——
E: Cough! Cough cough—

C: 欸？这么突然…谢谢你，这怎么好意思呢，实在是太感谢了。
E: Wait what? That's... thank you, I mean... really, thank you so very much.

C: 那肯定啊，又没和我解约，不在我们俱乐部还想去哪儿？
E: Of course he is. He's still under contract. Where else can he go?

C: 过气是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by "has-been"?

C: 怪物的盔甲都一个样！
E: There're no different kinds of monster armor!

C: 当然了，故事的细节需要一些…适当的修饰。
E: Of course, the details of the story might just need some... proper embellishment.

C: 我先去其他地方转转。
E: I'll go mill around elsewhere first.

C: 如果您想继续比赛就请随时和我说，我来为您安排！
E: If you want to continue fighting, please let me know and I will arrange a match for you!

C: {NICKNAME}，欢迎回到俱乐部！
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome back to the club!

C: 辛苦你们跑这一趟了，大家应该都没事吧？
E: Oh, is everyone alright? Thanks for your help.

C: 我猜他们没事——史瓦罗对「地火」不客气，对克拉拉可是关爱有加。不过，如果你们真的担心…那不妨去机械聚落找找他们吧。
E: I think they'll be fine... Plus Svarog's devotion to Clara is even greater than his hostility to Wildfire. If you're worried, you could look for them over at the robot settlement.

C: 有可能…
E: Maybe...

C: 那三位本事可大了，要是连他们都愿意相信铁卫，那这事儿也轮不到咱们质疑。
E: Those three are really capable people. If they believe the Guards, then there's no reason for us not to.

C: 每天晚上睡觉前我都要看一会儿《冒险鼹鼠队》，梦里全都是有趣的大冒险！
E: I read The Adventurous Moles every night before going to bed. My dreams are full of fun adventures!

C: 采矿工具的木柄上都有一片变色的区域，这是其主人辛苦劳动的证明。
E: There are discolored patches on the wooden handles of these tools, telling the tale of their owner's hard work.

C: 从沙袋上你能学会的事：你受的苦楚，多半只是另一个人成长的经验值。
E: What you learned from observing the sandbag: Your pain will likely be another person's experience.

C: 预感并不作数，但你也许会为这个小小的恶作剧惴惴不安，悲哀的是，其后发生的事你无从见证。
E: This is merely your feeling, which does not represent reality, but you do feel a little uneasy because of your tiny prank. Regrettably, you cannot witness the consequences.

C: 这花了你一点时间，但结果是好的：你成功修复了弹簧杆，现在不会再有人被垃圾箱伤害了。
E: You spent some time on it but finally succeeded. Now the spring bar is fixed and nobody will be hurt by this trashcan.

C: 按照无机军团留下的帝皇行止记录显示，兴建该遗迹最初的目的是「存放鲁珀特一世在玄想模式下产生的发明灵感」。
E: According to records of the Emperor's deeds left behind by the Inorganic Legion, the original purpose of the site was to "house the inventions inspired by the imagination of Rubert I."

C: 司辰宫？
E: Palace of Astrum?

C: 各位远到是客，断无理由卷入此事——我这么说，你们可明白？
E: You are guests from afar — there is no reason for this matter to concern you... Am I making myself clear?

C: 我已说得很清楚：这是仙舟联盟的内部事务，不劳星穹列车插手。为示尊重，我特意接见各位，传达最终的决定，不容更改。
E: I've said this and I'll say it again: This is an internal affair of the Xianzhou Alliance and there is no need for the Astral Express to get involved. I decided to arrange a meeting with you as a gesture of respect, but my decision is final.

C: …喂，这就有点过分了啊。
E: ...Huh? And what's that supposed to mean?

C: 但此行本意是「星核」。
E: Our expedition was focused on the Stellaron...

C: （发短信给丹恒）
E: (Text Dan Heng)

C: 和丹恒有一拼。
E: As icy as Dan Heng?

C: 看病可不是小孩子过家家…
E: I'm gonna need to see some qualifications...

C: 据我所知，每艘仙舟虽然独立行事，但云骑军却是由元帅统一指挥的，故而各支云骑之间常有兵将调遣，也不奇怪。
E: Every Xianzhou ship operates individually, but the Cloud Knights are all commanded by the Marshal. Therefore, it's normal for Knights to transfer between ships.

C: 怎么样，能走了吗？
E: Well? Can we move out?

C: 抱歉，让你久等了。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting.

C: 恩公，出发吗？
E: Shall we, my benefactors?

C: 那肯定不是。要不您给咱形容形容？
E: He's not lying. Still, if you describe her a little, maybe it'll jog our memory.

C: 好么，这一句话就抓准了问题的关键。
E: Write that down, write that down!

C: 你可又胡说，我和你在这站了这么久，何曾见过她？
E: Nonsense. I've been stood next to you this whole time and I don't remember anyone like her.

C: 不巧，「不夜侯」刚刚关张。您要是想喝茶，恐怕得等云骑军排查危险结束，一切太平以后了。
E: Sadly there have been fewer and fewer bookings since the lockdown, so we decided just now to close the Sleepless Earl until further notice. We'll reopen once the Cloud Knights finish addressing their "security concerns."

C: 热浮羊奶——
E: Steamed puffergoat milk —

C: 我都能想象那个女人一脸故弄玄虚的表情，一字一顿地说「来、抓、我、呀」的样子。
E: Ugh. Making us run around like jerks. I bet she's loving this! I can almost hear her whispering: "Come and get me..."

C: 等这些事忙完了……
E: I could do with a cup once we're done here...

C: 「晓钟觉迷梦中梦，烟霞聚散身外身」…各位，瞧见那边了罢？
E: "Morning bells chime in a dream, evening mist gathers around me"...Do you see that?

C: 幻胧…「药王秘传」做到了……
E: Phantylia... the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have fulfilled our promise...

C: 你可别再乱动了，让咱看看有什么办法能让你快点好起来。
E: Stop moving around! Let's see if there's a way to help you recover faster.

C: 终于！走了这一路，终于能见着云骑的影子。可算归队了！
E: *sigh* It's been such a long journey, but now we're finally gonna meet some Cloud Knights! I'll be back with my unit!

C: 过去的记忆自黑暗中浮现，紧紧攫住了你……
E: Memories from the past emerge from the darkness, tightly gripping you...

C: 好…好，我会呈报龙师们，褫夺你龙尊的名号与力量！
E: I... very well. In that case, I will report you to the Preceptors and have you stripped of the name and power of the high elder.

C: 看来，虽然「建木」近在咫尺了，但若不能完成仪式，我们便无法靠近。
E: The Arbor is near, but if we can't complete this ceremony then we won't be able to get close.

C: 不知道这和封印有没有关系？
E: Hey, do you think this could be related to the seals?

C: 这些事，就留给符卿来操心好了…我只觉得…有些困倦……
E: Leave that to the master diviner... I'm afraid I may be... somewhat spent...

C: 将军，睁大眼睛，现在可千万不能睡着啊！
E: General, keep those eyes open, now's not the time to fall asleep!

C: 速速投降！
E: Surrender!

C: 哼…他们确实成功了，但幻胧的目的又岂是为了帮他们实现愿望？这些叛徒出卖仙舟，结果却成了绝灭大君实施计划的祭品。
E: Hmm... They succeeded alright, but why would Phantylia's objective be to realize their wishes? Those traitors gained nothing — they betrayed the Xianzhou only to become sacrificial offerings in the Lord Ravager's grand scheme.

C: 那时现场一片混乱，随幻胧显形后，停云的身躯也仿佛凭空蒸发。
E: *sigh* It was all so chaotic. When Phantylia took form, it was as if Tingyun vanished into thin air.

C: 这样啊，真是遗憾。那…各位请稍等。
E: Oh, really? That's a shame. Well... hold on a sec.

C: 哎？{NICKNAME}你忘了吗，咱已经把那杯茶给喝了呀？
E: Hmm? {NICKNAME}, did you forget that we already drank that back at the teahouse?

C: 各位，将大家召集在此，是为重申罗浮仙舟对列车团无名客义举的感激。
E: Present company is gathered to reiterate the Xianzhou Luofu's esteemed gratitude for the magnanimous actions of the Nameless.

C: 我想见见旅途中认识的朋友…
E: I'd like to visit some of the friends we made along the way...

C: 对了，你肯定还会再回来的吧！你要是回来了记得来找我呀，我们还可以一起溜出去。
E: Oh, make sure you come visit! Next time you're here, we'll put my plan into action...

C: 我是丹恒的朋友…
E: I'm Dan Heng's friend...

C: 下次你可要把丹恒先生也带来，咱们几个可以一起喝喝茶聊聊天。扯、扯远了，我不耽误你时间了，那祝你一路顺风。
E: You should bring Dan Heng along next time, we can chat over some tea. Anyway, I'm getting off-track, I won't take any more of your time. Good luck.

C: 呜汪汪汪汪！汪汪！
E: Rrr—ruff ruff woof! Woof woof!

C: 我…听不懂哎…
E: I... don't understand...

C: 按景元的说法，只需握紧玉兆发出讯息，桌上这枚玉兆便能遥想感应，云骑军立时赶来——你的手指一阵痒痒，你想现在就试试。
E: According to Jing Yuan, holding the jade abacus firmly in your hand will send out a message to the Cloud Knights and they will rush to your aid. It's difficult to resist the temptation of giving it a try right now.

C: 好主意！说到旅行自然是要逛吃逛吃…啊，不过难得度个假，是不是多品尝些当地美食比较好……
E: Good idea! A vacation without munching on-the-go? Unheard of! Mm, but since time-off is a rarity, I'm kinda leaning towards savoring the local dishes...

C: 忆者…你觉得你能安然离开？
E: Memokeeper... Do you think you can just leave?

C: 很幽默呢。既然有心思开玩笑，我就认为你没事了。
E: You're funny. If you can crack jokes, you're probably fine.

C: 难怪你刚才要求出面，那位公司使节也说出了「钟表匠」这个名字。恐怕他收到的邀请函中也有类似的密文——并且同样被破译了。
E: It's no wonder that IPC ambassador also mentioned this "Watchmaker." The invite he received must also have contained a hidden message, and it seems like he decoded it.

C: 这是我的工作，不然一个赌徒要怎么替公司收复{RUBY_B#边陲监狱}匹诺康尼{RUBY_E#}？
E: It's my job. How would a gambler wrest {RUBY_B#Frontier Prison}Penacony{RUBY_E#} back for the IPC otherwise?

C: 该死的赌徒，合作的前提是互相信任——茨冈尼亚人的学前教育里不包含这个吗？
E: Damned gambler. Any true collaboration demands trust. Did that notion somehow escape your Sigonian upbringing?

C: 这就对了！朋友之间不用那么见外。有什么需要的尽管开口，我都包了。
E: That's the spirit! Nothing should come between friends. Tell me whatever you need, it's on my tab.

C: 家族的名字都这么奇怪吗？
E: Are all The Family names so strange?

C: 呵呵，别担心，你已经顺利抵达「梦境」了哦。
E: Haha, there's nothing to worry about — you've arrived at the Dreamscape.

C: 很快，您的所有理想都将跃然眼前……
E: Very soon, all your dreams will leap forth before you...

C: 我们又见面了。
E: We meet again.

C: 只要穿过那边的门扉，就可以抵达「黄金的时刻」了。如果您还有任何疑惑，我也很乐意为您一一解答！
E: Right through that doorway is Golden Hour. If you've any other questions, I'm more than happy to answer them!

C: （好了，请您作出选择吧！我会尽量满足您的需求。）
E: (Well, please make a decision! I'll do my best to fulfill your needs.)

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: 我承认这枚梦泡价格不菲——您可以再考虑一下！
E: This dream bubble is indeed pricey. Still, please give it some consideration!

C: 我买了。
E: I'll buy it.

C: 唔，所以每天只能吃一个……
E: Well, that's why I only have one per day...

C: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起勇气，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
E: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster your courage, and reach out to the suspicious screen in front of you

C: 你怎么变成这个样子了？！
E: Why did you turn into this... thing!?

C: 这有什么好玩的？
E: What's so fun about this?

C: 是啊，是啊！请你帮帮我，不然要出人命啦！
E: Yes, yes! Please help! Someone's life is in your hands!

C: 施展钟表把戏！
E: Here comes the Clockwork!

C: 哎，不好意思，请教您一个问题——是您让我冷静下来的吗？我有点发昏……
E: Hey, may I ask you a question? Were you the one who made me simmer down earlier? I wasn't my normal self..

C: 熟人说不上，有过一面之缘，{M#他}{F#她}此前在酒店帮了我，是位善良的人。
E: Well, we've only met each other once before. But {M#he}{F#she} is a kind soul for helping me at the hotel.

C: 没错！就是我，钟表小子！
E: That's right! It was me, Clockie!

C: 你在说什么！不是话疗，是钟表把戏！
E: What're you talking about? It wasn't talk therapy! It was Clockwork!

C: 我是猎犬家系的成员，负责维持梦境世界的治安——虽然在家族的保护下，梦里根本不会有危险——当然，这也意味着我是多余的，连垃圾桶都不如。
E: I'm a member of the Bloodhound Family. My job is maintaining order in the Dreamscape. In fact, no danger will arise under The Family's protection, which makes my job redundant. Even a trashcan is more important than me.

C: 喷壶？这也太…直接了。
E: Spray can? That's... rough.

C: 走这边吧……
E: Let's go this way...

C: 有种咱俩比划比划！
E: I dare you to fight me!

C: 这里是家族的秘密…？
E: This is The Family's secret...?

C: 好安静…只有钟表的滴答声…
E: So quiet... nothing but the tick-tocking of the clocks...

C: （总算拿到三个「信任的证明」了…回去交差吧。）
E: (I've finally collected three Proofs of Trust... Let's go back and deliver them.)

C: 但时间过去一万年——整整二十个五百年——始终没有桶来救我！于是我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无痛的死亡。
E: However, ten thousand years have passed. That's <unbreak>20</unbreak> five-hundred-year periods, but no cans came! Therefore, I swore that if a can came to save me, I would reward them with a painless death.

C: 推一下门。
E: Push the door.

C: 哦…很少有桶会如此开门见山，我确实拥有「信任的证明」，但如今它已经遗失在了垃圾山中。
E: Oh... it's rare for a can to be so straightforward. I do possess the "Proof of Trust," but now it's lost in the mountain of trash.

C: 我已年老体衰，无力与你并肩作战，但愿我的头脑能为你所用。
E: I'm now old and frail, no longer able to fight by your side. Hopefully, my mind can still be of use to you.

C: 会的…我们会的。但时候未到。在「巡猎」之前，我们应当擦亮眼睛，思考真正的敌人藏身何处，以及如何与之相抗……
E: Yes... Yes, we will. But not yet. Before The Hunt, we should keep our eyes peeled and consider where the true enemies are hiding, and how to fight them...

C: 我们…要从这里跳下去？
E: Are we... jumping down from here?

C: 来吧，准备好……
E: Okay, here we go...

C: 不知从何时开始，名为「死亡」的梦魇在匹诺康尼降临，它对人进行无差别袭击，将精神的死亡平等地带给了所有人……
E: Somehow, a nightmare called "Death" has descended upon Penacony, striking indiscriminately, bringing spiritual death to all equally...

C: 你看到忆者合上双眼。她在以一种近乎感应的方式搜索着房间，甚至房间以外的每一处角落。
E: You see the Memokeeper close her eyes. She is searching the room in an almost telepathic way, even every nook and cranny outside the room.

C: …各位，保持警惕。
E: ...Everyone, be on your guard.

C: 无论如何，我希望你信任砂金——或者更多地——信任我，去看看他口中的<color=#dbc291ff>「事实」</color>。这能带领我们走向匹诺康尼背后更深的秘密。
E: No matter what, I hope you can trust Aventurine — or rather — trust me and see the <color=#dbc291ff>"truth"</color> with your own eyes. This can lead us deeper into the secrets behind Penacony.

C: 你说得对，我们走吧。
E: You're right. Let's go.

C: 那位忆者显然是有备而来，谨慎为好。
E: That Memokeeper obviously came here with an agenda. We should remain vigilant.

C: 但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
E: But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?

C: 但毫无疑问…她是这场宴会中最「特别」的客人。正如砂金方才所说，你最好与她保持距离。
E: But without a doubt... she is the most "special" guest at this banquet. It's like Aventurine said just then. It's best to keep your distance from her.

C: 如果你问我概率——有，但趋近于零——用更符合匹诺康尼本土的说法，做梦。
E: A probability? Yes, it exists, but it verges on the infinitesimal. To phrase it in a manner more befitting the vernacular of Penacony, "you're dreaming."

C: 我…我这几天都在摸鱼…
E: I... I've been slacking off at work these few days...

C: 拉帝奥——我听到了——
E: Ratio... I can hear you...

C: 我现在非常了解你的为人了，砂金先生。你勤勉、慷慨、乐于合作，又成功穿越重重阻碍来到我的面前——这令我有理由相信你的智慧与果敢。
E: I have come to know you very well as a person, Mr. Aventurine. You're diligent, generous, and willing to cooperate. The fact that you succeeded in overcoming many obstacles just to meet me gave me the reason to believe in your wisdom and courage.

C: 哎呀…你怎么老喜欢问这个？我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以找你们的长官聊聊案情吗？
E: Sheesh, why do you keep asking me that? We're in the middle of investigating a murder case for The Family. May we speak to your Captain about it?

C: …你在匹诺康尼到底惹了多少麻烦？
E: ...How much trouble have you stirred up exactly on Penacony?

C: 啊？不是他派你们来这儿的吗？
E: Uh? He didn't send you all here?

C: 我说怎么这么吵…是你们啊，欢迎。都找到这来了，有什么事？
E: I was wondering what all the commotion was... Oh, it's you guys. Welcome. Since you made it here, what can I do for you?

C: （长满眼睛的怪物，这描述倒是和那忆域迷因很像，可高楼和灯光…这些东西和「死亡」没什么关系吧。估计只是个用流言蜚语拼凑出来的梦泡吧。）
E: (A monster covered in eyes... that sounds like the Memory Zone Meme, but buildings and lights... I don't think those have anything to do with "Death." That whole dream bubble was probably created using rumors and gossip.)

C: 酒水单上的什么都卖，唯独苏乐达不卖，这里没有那种无聊的饮料；酒吧里的什么都不卖，唯独快乐能购买，这里只愿你能够开怀大笑。
E: This bar offers a wide variety of drinks, but we draw the line at SoulGlad. Why settle for ordinary when you can experience extraordinary? We're dedicated to serving up nothing but pure joy and laughter.

C: 就是本人。
E: I think she is Serval.

C: <size=36>…半个琥珀纪前？！</size>
E: <size=36>...Half an Amber Era ago?</size>

C: 好了，大功告成……
E: Well, it's done...

C: 直到历史上的「钟表匠」向家族抛出橄榄枝，试图将这座监狱打造成觥筹交错的盛会之星…「匹诺康尼」才终于获得它如今的名字，走上面向群星的舞台。
E: It wasn't until the Watchmaker approached The Family with the idea of turning the prison into the Planet of Festivities... that Penacony finally gained its name and glory.

C: 行了…我可能疯，但不傻。从我脑袋里滚出去，「同谐」的新生儿。
E: Fine... I may be crazy, but I'm not stupid. Get out of my head, newborn of the Harmony.

C: 我可以证明给你看——在你彻底消失前，我会陪你最后走一段路……
E: I can show you — before you're entirely gone, I'll be with you for the last stretch of your road...

C: 我打赌你肯定忘不了他们尖利的笑声。为了让自己从那帮野蛮人的鼻子底下消失，你和姐姐只能在血水里打滚，毁了爸爸留下的唯一一件衣服……
E: I know you won't forget that sound anytime soon, those shrill cackles? You had to hide right under the noses of those savages, you and Big Sis, playing dead, drifting in all that bloody water. Completely ruined that shirt. Shame. Wasn't that the last one Dad left behind?

C: 你是说——让牌桌上的一切都消失吗？
E: You mean, it could make all the cards on the table just... disappear?

C: 这下…就剩我们了。
E: And now... only we are left.

C: 如果你不会，我可以教你。
E: If you are not familiar, I can guide you.

C: 但是，我还是觉得不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
E: But, I think we can't just ignore the safety of Penacony.

C: 我也相信——即便换作{M#他们}{F#她们}，也会做出同样的决定。
E: I also believe that, if it were their choice to make, they would make the same one.

C: 因为你行走的道路…不为「同谐」所容。
E: Because the path you walk... is not accepted by the Harmony.

C: 「一刀」…并不准确。其实是两刀，只是第二斩比较迅速。
E: A single slash of a blade... isn't really accurate. It was actually two blades, just that the second one was faster.

C: 来吧，你可以随便向我发问，看看我的回答能不能赢得你的信任。要是真觉得可疑，再让我离开也不迟。
E: Alright then, feel free to toss any question my way, and let's see if my answers can't earn your trust. If your gut tells you otherwise, it still ain't too late to show me the door.

C: 很难回答么？
E: Is it a hard question?

C: 诶？知更鸟小姐的意思是…那些筹码都是演出效果？可我明明——
E: Huh? Miss Robin, you mean... those chips were all part of a performance? But I really...

C: 放心吧，我不会告诉别人的。期待知更鸟小姐的演出！
E: Don't worry. I won't tell anyone. I can't wait for your performance, Miss Robin!

C: 我没事…抱歉，希望先前没有吓到你。
E: I'm fine... Sorry, I hope I haven't scared you.

C: 我果然还活着，且如我所想——抵达了与「美梦」截然不同的地方。匹诺康尼的梦境下埋藏着另一片更原始，也更混沌的忆域，它的名字是…「流放之地」。
E: I was still alive, and it was just as I thought — I had arrived at a place starkly different from this beautiful dream. Beneath the Dreamscape of Penacony lies another more chaotic, more primal Memory Zone. Its name... Land of the Exiles.

C: 那位「眠眠」又是…你能形容下它的长相吗？
E: This Sleepie... Can you describe what it looks like?

C: 就是刚才那位。
E: Yep, he's right here.
...Hmm?

C: 无论如何，我不能接受自己的故乡以「同谐」的名义走向「同谐」的反面。
E: Regardless, I cannot accept my home is moving towards the very opposite of what the Harmony represents, while still claiming to uphold it.

C: 我们发现得太晚了。那时家族已经手眼通天，反对者很快遭到了控制和驱逐。
E: Sadly, we realized this far too late. By then, The Family had a firm grip on Penacony, swiftly quelling any opposition that arose.

C: 嗯，让我们来看看吧。
E: Well, let's have a look.

C: 也祝知更鸟小姐的演出圆满成功！我先去蓝调的时刻参加舞会了，回见。
E: And I wish you a fantastic performance, Robin! I'm off to the Blue Hour for the ball. See you later!

C: 因为「开拓」的事业绝非凡人能够承载。否则，这条命途又怎会一度落得银轨断绝、列车废弃、{RUBY_B#阿基维利}星神{RUBY_E#}陨落的下场？
E: That's because the pursuit of the Trailblaze exceeds the capabilities of ordinary humans. Otherwise, why would this Path be filled with broken rails, an abandoned Express, and even a fallen {RUBY_B#Akivili}Aeon{RUBY_E#}?

C: 匹诺康尼究竟是给予了这些人未来，还是夺走了他们的未来？
E: Is Penacony granting these people a future, or is it taking it away from them?

C: 谨遵您的旨意。
E: I will do as you command.

C: 开始吧，我没什么好准备的。
E: Let us begin. There is nothing else to prepare.

C: 「你是否爱你的神如同爱你自身，始终记念祂的告诫？」
E: "Do you love your God as you do yourself, always heeding THEIR admonishments?"

C: 怎么了，瓦尔特先生？
E: What is it, Mr. Yang?

C: 据我所知，家族的和睦共荣从来都不依托于所谓的「律令」……
E: To my understanding, The Family's harmony and prosperity have never relied on so-called "divine laws"...

C: 信任？哈哈，哈哈哈哈哈…小可爱，你是拿我当疯子还是傻子？
E: Trustworthy? Ha... hahahahaha! Son of a nice lady! You think I'm dumb or something?

C: 大家好，我是{NICKNAME}，她是三月七。
E: Hello everyone, I'm {NICKNAME}, and she's March 7th.

C: 你认真点，这是在直播呢！
E: Hey, be a bit more serious. We're live on air!

C: 规则就是这么简单，诸位勇士明白了吗？那么我宣布，由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典——正式开始！
E: Those are the rules. Simple. Everyone clear? Now then, I hereby announce that the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival of the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises... has started!

C: 匹诺康尼果然处处是机遇！
E: O, Penacony, my Penacony! You truly abound with opportunities!

C: 接下来，你们将面对「肢体」的考验！
E: Up next, you'll be challenged with a body language test.

C: 其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。
E: Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us.

C: 美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？
E: Dreamville's in danger! How do you not understand the predicament?

C: 「游玩」…这么说来，我不仅是个失败的钟表，还是个失败的玩具。
E: "Play"... So, I'm not just a failed clock, I'm also a failed toy.

C: 应该都搞定了吧？
E: That should be all of them, right?

C: 哦！这严丝合缝的畅快感…我的强迫症被完美地治愈了！呵呵……
E: Oh my! The exquisite sensation of perfect alignment... My organizational itch has been quite thoroughly scratched!

C: 唔…究竟要如何抉择才好……
E: Hmm... What would be the noblest choice...?

C: 起作用了，滴答！接下来，只要进入它的心境空间，帮它连通通路，就大功告成了！
E: It's working, tick-tock! Next, we just need to enter its Emoscape, help connect its pathways, and we're done!

C: 各位为匹诺康尼的公义四处奔走，这一点是所有人都看在眼里的。
E: Your efforts for the justice of Penacony are evident to everyone and have been widely observed.

C: 再想想看。
E: Think it over some more.

C: 好吧。可这里到处都是门，该从哪扇门出去呢…米沙，你知道吗？
E: Alright, but there are doors all over the place... Which one should we choose...? Do you have any idea, Misha?

C: 想起什么了吗？
E: Anything special about that name?

C: 「池水像块宝石，镶嵌在所有扬帆之人的梦中。」
E: "The water resembles a precious jewel, embedded in the dreams of all seafarers."

C: 那时我会问他，自己什么时候可以像他一样踏上冒险。米哈伊尔总是笑着说，小孩子还太年轻。
E: Back then, I would ask him when I could go on adventures like him, and he would always laugh and say I was still too young.

C: 等等等等，这种除我以外的人全部心有灵犀的感觉是怎么回事？
E: Wait, wait! Why does it feel like everyone else knows something I don't?

C: 只有特定人群才能看见的模因生命，简直就像是…某个人留给无名客的密信一样。
E: A memetic life that can only be seen by a select few... It's just like a hidden message... left by someone for the Nameless.

C: 你明明说过，「开拓」之旅永远也不会结束。
E: You told me that the Trailblazing expedition would never end.

C: 很可惜，那位人人憧憬的美梦大亨早已不在了，我只是他人生的一个缩影。
E: Unfortunately, that legendary figure is no more. I'm only a reflection of his life.

C: 为了让大家有能够安身的土地，米哈伊尔必须不断出海探索，找到海水的源头。
E: To ensure that everyone had land to settle on, he had to continue exploring the sea and search for the source of the rising seawater.

C: 被笼罩在匹诺康尼光芒下的命途并不纯粹，这里的「同谐」中混入了杂质。
E: The Path in Penacony is impure. The Harmony here has impurities.

C: 如果您认为这是一场「背叛」……
E: If you consider this a betrayal...

C: 「众人啊！你们的旧主不会再归来，唯有因正道而互助，以真理相勉者，方能在彼此中收获完满！」
E: "Heed me, one and all! Your former master shall not return! It is through righteousness and unwavering support for one another that we shall attain true perfection!"

C: 而在你所谓的乐园里，这个人就是你。
E: In your so-called paradise, you would be the one reigning supreme.

C: 我…什么都不记得了。
E: I... don't remember anything.

C: 与此同时，砂金也在暗中筹备自己的计划，你们被他选为计划的推力。黄泉小姐在激战中拔刀，迫不得已<color=#dbc291ff>暴露了「虚无」令使的身份</color>。
E: Meanwhile, Aventurine was secretly carrying out his scheme, in which you were one of the pawns. In the midst of a fierce battle, Acheron <color=#dbc291ff>revealed her true identity as an Emanator of the Nihility</color> and unsheathed her sword.

C: 这观点非常犀利，但很遗憾。尽管讽刺，黄泉小姐确实在「虚无」的命途上越走越远。只因她那愿从命途枷锁中解救世人的信念非常人所能及。
E: That's a very astute guess, but unfortunately, Acheron did progress further down the Path of the Nihility. Her unwavering belief in liberating the world from the grasp of Paths surpasses the capabilities of ordinary humans.

C: 这一幕好像似曾相识…
E: The déjà vu is strong with this scene...

C: 但问题是，要怎么做？
E: Now comes the tricky part. How do we do it?

C: 人对美好幻觉的向往近乎偏执，这种心理会令人下意识地抗拒…残酷的真相。
E: Humans' yearning for sweet illusions borders on obsession, leading them to subconsciously resist... the harsh reality.

C: 你会踏上一条很长，很长的路，举目四顾皆是黑暗。但不要害怕，因为你会看见，在那道路的尽头始终会有一抹红色。
E: You'll embark on a long, long journey, shrouded in darkness. But fear not, as a touch of red will be awaiting you at the end of the path.

C: 拉勾！
E: It's a deal!

C: 太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
E: Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.

C: 你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
E: The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.

C: …哼唧！哼唧，哼唧哼唧！
E: ...Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 多谢你的讲解，再见~
E: Thank you for explaining matters to me. Goodbye~

C: 安全起见，请您远离这些按钮！
E: For your safety, please stay away from these buttons!

C: 如果我们能提前和老奥帝达成某种共识，再摸清对方的底线，未来的谈判就能顺利很多，这是明面上的一层。
E: If we can reach some sort of agreement with Old Oti beforehand and gauge our opponent's boundaries, our future negotiations will go much more smoothly. That's the obvious benefit.

C: 快来，请坐！咱们可得好好聊聊！
E: Please, have a seat! Let's have a pleasant conversation!

C: 不错的选择，开始调饮吧。
E: Not a bad choice. Let's start mixing.

C: 我拆开一看是个按钮，背后还有行字：「只要按下它，整个匹诺康尼就会被炸上天」——什么啊，太吓人了！
E: So I unwrapped it and found out it was a button, with a message on the back: "Just press this button, and all of Penacony will explode!" Sounds terrifying!

C: 没错，他很有胆量。正是凭借这份魄力，他才得以成为今天的奥帝•艾弗法。
E: Indeed, he's definitely bold. It's that kind of boldness that made him the Oti Alfalfa he is today.

C: 啊，您好，小姐——需要帮助吗？
E: Oh, greetings, miss. Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 呵…这样啊。
E: Heh...

C: 哈哈哈！不自量力的小姑娘，又来给老子送钱啦？
E: Hahaha! You stupid little girl! Coming back to lose more money, huh?

C: 但和星核猎手、星穹列车不同，我们聚集在一起…只是为了「各取所需」。
E: However, unlike you Stellaron Hunters or the Astral Express, we band together... merely to obtain what we want.

C: 你当了什么？
E: What did you pawn?

C: 感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
E: Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!

C: 你答应了？
E: Did you take the deal?

C: 快看，是知更鸟小姐！
E: Wow, it's Miss Robin!

C: 你遇到什么麻烦了？我很乐意为你效劳。但很不凑巧，我手头还有两桩疑案还悬而未决…你的问题或许得排在后面了。
E: Got yourself into a pickle? I'm more than happy to help, but unfortunately, I'm preoccupied with a couple of unsolved cases... So, you'll have to wait your turn.

C: 卟卟——回答错误！「红鲱鱼」的意思是「误导思路的假线索」，才不是什么证物～
E: Bzzt — Wrong answer! A "red herring" is a fake clue to misdirect. It's not meant to be evidence!

C: 只要你能答对我提出的唯一一个问题，就能打开桶盖看看我究竟是不是一枚炸弹。若是，我还会进行自主拆除，以免造成社会危害。
E: If you can answer the only question I have for you correctly, you can open up my lid to check if I'm really a bomb or not. If I am, I will initiate my automated shutdown sequence to avert danger.

C: 星期日？星期日是谁？
E: Sunday? Who's that?

C: 我想，现在就是「第三次」的前兆了。
E: I think this moment heralds the third time.

C: 举杯。
E: A toast.

C: 这段「开拓」之旅从{NICKNAME}和一位门童的相遇开始，一路兜兜转转，又回到了它最初的起点。
E: This Trailblazing expedition started from the moment {NICKNAME} and a bellboy ran into each other. After going on a journey of many twists and turns, they still ended up where they started.

C: 这就是「开拓」。
E: This is what Trailblazing is.

C: 在你看来，这种「似曾相识」意味着什么？
E: In your opinion, what does this "déjà vu" mean?

C: 帕姆只是…只是……
E: Pom-Pom is just... just...

C: 是「美少女冰块」。
E: At least you'll be an adorable ice cube.

C: 我原本只是想来和各位聊聊天，看看我们之间是否可能达成合作——现在看来，我的提议很可能也是各位的救命稻草哦。
E: I just wanted to chat with everyone to see if we could work together, but now, it appears my suggestion could be the very lifeline that saves everyone.

C: 啊——差点忘了，我们现在是匹诺康尼的股东了！
E: Oh, I almost forgot that we're Penacony's shareholders!

C: …我明白了。感谢家族招待，请为我们三人办理入住吧。
E: ...I see. We thank The Family for their gracious hospitality. Please help us with the check-in.

C: 好啦，别聊这些了。你们是要去听校长演讲吗？我和朋友打算去「创意集会」看看，就不奉陪啦——反正也不点名，待会见蕉！
E: Anyway, let's change the subject. Are you going to attend the dean's speech? My friends and I are going to check out the Creator's Market, so I won't be joining you. They're not taking attendance anyway. See you later, bana!

C: 不客气，你很「礼貌」，礼仪在商务场合是必不可少的敲门砖。
E: You're welcome. And you're very polite. Good etiquette can get you far in this industry.

C: 这样呀，没关系，开放的主题能带来更多「创意」。
E: I see. That's alright. An open theme can encourage creativity.

C: 可叹、可叹…纵使忍•脚步再怎么迅捷，也逃不过因果•报应啊。
E: Lamentable... My ninja speed isn't fast enough to outrun cause and effect.

C: 在下与伎乐忍徒只是萍水相逢，但也并非孤身一人。在下的伙伴——乃是这群无名•忍者。
E: My meeting with Ninja Initiate Gigaku was purely happenstance, but I did not come here alone. These Nameless Ninjas are also my companions.

C: 行啊，那就按规矩来，几个问题能难到哪儿去？
E: Okay, we'll do things your way. How hard can a few questions be anyway?

C: 莫奈拉介绍我来的
E: Monella referred me.

C: 但我第一次听见它的旋律，就觉得很适合用来讲述睡蕉小猴的故事，于是便重新填了词。
E: But the first time I heard it, I knew immediately that it was the perfect song for telling a Slumbernana Monkey's story, so I wrote new lyrics for it.

C: 他香蕉的，什么玩意儿，欢迎仪式这就安排上了？
E: Well, butter my banana and call me a biscuit, we kickin' off the member initiation rite so soon?

C: 我明白了，米凯先生，我会尽力而为。
E: I understand. I'll try my best, Mr. Micah.

C: 怎么了哥们，再过一会儿，我就得学着和家族打招呼了？
E: What's do you mean, pardner? Am I going to have to start learning how to greet The Family now?
This...

C: 噫——我就说怎么一点变化都没有，走走走，咱们抓紧时间。
E: Huh? So that's why nothing's going back to normal! C'mon, we need to hurry.

C: ——他宝贝的，这就是「人生」！
E: Fork it, that's exactly what *life* is!

C: 为让乱破参透忍法奥秘，苦茶大师给予了极其严酷的试炼。而为解放黑暗中的忍之都，乱破也经受住了重重考验。
E: To help Rappa master the secrets of the ninja arts, Master Kucha subjected her to harsh trials. And Rappa, in her quest to liberate the Ninja Capital from darkness, determinedly endured every test.

C: 但她的担忧不无道理，我也觉得…这股突如其来的猴子风潮太过古怪。
E: But her concerns are valid. I also find the sudden obsession with monkeys to be rather unusual.

C: 示范结束，有想要上来试试的同学吗？
E: That's it for my demonstration. Who would like to give it a try?

C: 不是说好了要深入调查吗，走！
E: Didn't we agree to do a thorough investigation? Let's go!

C: 大头•邪祟殿下，师者传道、授业、解惑，切不可轻易否定一位忍徒的忍道！
E: Bighead Fiendling, educators impart knowledge, cultivate skills, and clarify doubts, but they must never deny any ninja initiate of their way of the ninja!

C: 各位大佬，我也去上课了。有什么事你们找我就行，别再把蕉师搅合进来了……
E: I should get to my class too. But do me a favor buddies, just come look for me if you need anything. Let's not involve BananAdvisor again...

C: 在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的镇定产生了共鸣，你看到了流水线上的一个个纸箱，看到了阴暗街道里踌躇的人群，还有一台又一台的…电视机？
E: The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its calmness. You saw the conveyor belt's boxes, the hesitant crowds in shadowy streets, and... TVs?

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴开始发出生气的*蕉声*。
E: Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey began making angry Banagibberish sounds.

C: 我…确实不太理解。
E: I... guess not.

C: 可你知道那帮无名客的背景吗？你一个从公司扶持的边星不远万里来这读书的苦学生，想和他们比？
E: Do you have the slightest idea about the backgrounds of those Nameless? You're just a poor student from a faraway fringe planet, one that relies on the IPC for aid! Do you really think you can compare yourself to them?

C: 真、真的吗？太好了！
E: C—Can I really? Thank you so much!!!

C: 真是糟糕的忍术。
E: A terrible ninjutsu.

C: 没事啦，我后来又想了想，匹诺康尼人来人往，出现什么样的人都不该大惊小怪才是。
E: Oh, don't worry about me. I thought about it earlier. Penacony sees a ton of visitors and transiting travelers. It's only normal to meet people of all sorts of background here.
You...

C: 这…怎么可能…「退化」明明已经发生了……
E: H—How's this possible...? The regression should've occurred already...

C: 但现在没问题了，恶徒死前才会问「为什么」。
E: But now, there ain't no problem, 'cause only an evildoer asks "why" before he dies.

C: 如果还有什么要说的——精简镜头数量，巧用剪辑技巧，拍摄对话时不要越轴。
E: As for any final advice I can give you — Do not go overboard on the number of shots, be skilled in your editing, and don't cross the axis when filming a dialogue.

C: 她用鸣神大环唤醒忍者的潜能，经由雷遁忍法醍醐灌顶，身体便可拥有超凡的忍•感官。
E: She uses the Great Narukami Circle to awaken the latent potential of ninjas. After attaining enlightenment via reverse lightning ninjutsu, one's body can then possess extraordinary ninja senses.

C: 开始狩猎吧，为了打败邪忍——
E: Let the hunt begin, for the sake of defeating evil one day...

C: 太好了，看来成功了……
E: Awesome! Looks like it was a success...

C: 什么东西？
E: The what now?

C: 你看，这就是它们口中的「失败品」。
E: Look. This is what they call the "failed subject."

C: 关于「超•忍•卷轴」蕉…
E: Bana, about the Super Ninja Scroll...

C: 这就是匹诺康尼的潮流更替吗……
E: So, is this what they mean by the rise and fall of trends in Penacony...

C: 欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
E: Welcome to Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!

C: 一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！
E: An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernanas!

C: 我想，你们是计划用她大脑里的病毒摧毁这里吧。
E: Let me make a guess. You want to destroy this place with the virus in her head?

C: 邪祟•总长，阁下已无处可逃，面对缭乱•忍法的制裁吧。
E: Fiendling Chief, there's nowhere left to run. It's time to face your punishment delivered by my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

C: 告诉我，从宇宙的尺度望去，应该被淘汰的是谁，应该被留下的又是谁？
E: Tell me, on a cosmic scale, which should be eliminated, and which should be left to thrive?

C: 蕉蕉蕉，准备好接受处分吧！
E: Bana bana bana! Prepare to be disciplined!

C: 悬锋诸王，这就是你们渴望的力量么？
E: Kings of Kremnos, this is the power you desired?

C: 她…去哪里了？
E: Where... did she go?

C: 前提是，你我得在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的怒火下保全自我。
E: ...assuming we survive {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} wrath.

C: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，你体内的星核应该能与同类产生共鸣。但目前还未出现这种征兆。
E: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, the Stellaron within you should be able to resonate with other Stellarons, but we haven't encountered anything like that here.

C: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，凡有星核的世界，必定能见到星核猎手出没。
E: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, Stellaron Hunters are certain to appear on a world with a Stellaron.

C: ——小心！
E: —Look out!

C: 呀，蝶宝也在呀！想死你了。
E: And ooh! It's Cassie! I've missed you!

C: 是昵称！怎么样，可爱吧？
E: Aren't they just the cutest nicknames? Hehe.

C: 我和白厄等人曾在树庭求学，那刻夏老师当时负责教授我们与黄金裔和泰坦相关的知识。我也是在那时结识了风堇小姐——她曾是那刻夏老师的助教。
E: When I was studying at the Grove alongside Phainon and the others, Professor Anaxa was responsible for teaching us about the Chrysos Heirs and the Titans. That's also when I met Miss Hyacine... She was Anaxa's teaching assistant then.

C: …对了。缇安大人，那支<color=#dbc291ff>金色的纺锤</color>，还请借我一用。
E: ...I have an idea. Lady Trianne, could you lend me that <color=#dbc291ff>golden spindle</color>?

C: 而且，阿格莱雅说那位那刻夏还活着，那其他人应该也有希望……
E: Aglaea said that Anaxa is still alive. If that's true, then there's still hope for everyone else too...

C: 「智种学派」和「炼金」是…
E: Nousporists and alchemy refer to...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座</color>…这是个什么地方？学院为什么会有王座？
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Luminary Throne</color>? What sort of place is that? Why would there be a throne in an academy?

C: 心脏怎么可能说话——而且它都不亮！人家觉得，肯定是有什么超自然的存在在捣鬼……
E: How can a heart possibly speak — and it's not even lit up! I think that something supernatural must be at play here...

C: 啊呀…就算这样，顽石也无法开口说话呢。
E: Ha... Regardless of what you do, a stone won't be able to speak.

C: 吾之所想，一见了然——
E: My intentions should be obvious...

C: 「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
E: "O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"

C: 看来缇安大人有好好记得我们的约定。
E: It seems like Lady Trianne did not forget our promise.

C: 据说，只有向其证明心中存有「纯粹无私之爱」，才能通过蝴蝶的考验，唤醒大树开道，觐见{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: Legend has it that someone can only pass the trial of the butterfly by proving they possess pure and unselfish love within their heart. Only then can they awaken the Great Tree to open up the path to meet {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 又是一道「考验」……
E: Another trial...

C: 按照卡吕普索所说，我们须「以『金枝誓言』采撷眼前余火」么……
E: According to Calypso, we just have to "gather the embers before us with the Golden Bough of Vows"...

C: 必一举拿下！
E: Let's take him down in one go!

C: 浴场都是人呢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}被击败后，城中战士终于可以放松些时日了。
E: The baths are bustling. Now that {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen, the soldiers in the city can finally catch a break.

C: 「纷争」陨落，黑潮的威胁再度加剧…倘若{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}也受到影响，后果不堪设想。
E: With the downfall of Strife and the ever-growing threat that the black tide poses, if {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} are also impacted, the ramifications will be dire.

C: 怎么可能，克拉特鲁斯爷爷可是{RUBY_B#国王近身护卫官}王翼冠军{RUBY_E#}，最擅长追踪敌人了。
E: No way! Mr. Krateros is a member of the {RUBY_B#King's Guards}King's Aegis{RUBY_E#}. He's the best at hunting down enemies!

C: 别忘了，她可是为了你——为了重振悬锋的荣光——才会死于{RUBY_B#悬锋先王，万敌之父}欧利庞{RUBY_E#}的毒计！
E: You'd best remember that she died for you because of {RUBY_B#Former Kremnoan King, Father of Mydei}Eurypon's{RUBY_E#} schemes! To restore the glory of Kremnos!

C: 让这些人好好休息吧。两位，随我来。
E: Let these people rest. The two of you, please come with me.

C: 哼…不过是在又一场角斗中胜出了而已。
E: Tch... It's just another duel where I claimed victory.

C: 别用那眼神盯着我…是他下的战书。悬锋的字典里没有「逃避」二字。
E: Don't look at me like that... It was he who challenged me. There is no word for "flee" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 是有些好奇啦，但直觉告诉我…是不是换个话题比较好？
E: I am, but something tells me... that it might be better to change the topic?

C: 怎么了？
E: What's going on?

C: 对不起…明明你都，嘱咐过我，不要开门了……
E: Sorry... I know you... told me... not to open the gate...

C: …对了。我听到一些风声…如果你要出去闲逛，建议先避开高温浴池。
E: Oh, by the way, I heard some rumors... If you're going to wander around, I suggest avoiding the hot bath.

C: 吾师，岁月怎会让你变得如此蒙昧！
E: Age has blinded you, teacher!

C: 依照黄金裔与元老院达成的协定，私闯创世涡心之人无需经过议会审判，可由我自行发落。
E: By agreement between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders, those who trespass upon the Vortex of Genesis need not be tried by the Council. I am allowed to pass judgment alone.

C: 克拉特鲁斯，你的行为无可宽恕。我在此宣判……
E: Krateros, your actions are unforgivable. I hereby sentence you...

C: …你要如何让我看见虚无缥缈之物？
E: ...How are you going to show me something that has no form?

C: 抱歉，少主…我不能再忍耐了。
E: Forgive me, young master, but I just cannot wait any longer.

C: 是你…遭人唾弃的野兽，你真的拒绝了死亡。预言不假…朕的悬锋王朝，终究要结束在你手里……
E: It is you... the beast spurned by all. So, you did defy death. The prophecy was true... You will bring an end to my Kremnoan dynasty.

C: …因为我的族人。
E: ...Because of my people.

C: 缇安…缇宁…！
E: Trianne... Trinnon...!
My sweet girl, ██ I █ will never █ leave you.██ ██ █ ██ █ █

C: 但分裂毕竟是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的影响，也只有同为泰坦的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}能帮*我们*了。
E: Since {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} caused the fragmentation, we can only turn to another Titan, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, for help.

C: 「前方是绝路——回头，吾师。」
E: "It's a dead end ahead — turn back, teacher."

C: 这一次，你只管把前线交给我们。你将要面对的战场…同样不容失利。
E: You can entrust the front line to us this time. You can't afford to lose your upcoming battle either.

C: 我押上了母亲的名誉，向她保证你灵魂的刚直。以及……
E: I staked my mother's name to guarantee the integrity of your soul to her, and...

C: 再见了，万敌。
E: Farewell, Mydei.

C: 假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
E: If all goes according to plan, this may be our final meeting. I just want to let you know that I appreciate everything you have done for Amphoreus.

C: 死亡拒绝引渡我。若你将我送往冥界，或许我能在被遣返的路上找到些线索。
E: Death refused to ferry me. If you were to send me to the nether realm, I may uncover clues along the way back.

C: 最后一个问题。
E: One last question.

C: 为什么我们生来就要学习战斗？
E: Why must we learn to fight?

C: 这已经是奇迹了。我们找到克拉特鲁斯的时候，他几乎与死者无异。
E: This is already nothing short of miraculous. When we found Krateros, he was no better than a corpse.

C: 但这场异变打乱了一切。
E: But this unforeseen turn of events has thrown everything into disarray.

C: 万中选一的适格者，黄金裔中的魁首，若不能确信这些人拥有背负神权的潜质，我和吾师断然不会发出邀请。
E: Only a chosen few possess the capacity to assume divinity, the elite among the Chrysos Heirs. We would never hastily extend our invitation without first verifying their potential to bear such power.

C: 可要他们带着无知倒在新世界的门关前，那反而更加残酷。
E: But it would be even more cruel if we allow them to ignorantly fall before the gates of the new world.

C: 是那场仪式有问题。但一码归一码，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的回应只是一场巧合——
E: Yes, but those two occurrences were in fact unrelated. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s response was simply a coincidence.

C: 只有天气还算不错，再用相机拍几张照片吧。
E: The weather is the only lovely thing left. Let's take some more pictures.

C: 啊呀，吾只是从刚才就想说：死亡于你而言，当真有所谓么？
E: Ahh. I just have been meaning to ask: Does death really matter to you?

C: 也该让我成为欢愉星神了吧？
E: Is it time for me to become the Aeon of Elation?

C: 我「帕姆先生」不就是星穹列车的成员吗？
E: And ain't I, "Pom-Pom," a member of the Astral Express?

C: 嗯…开始吧。
E: Alright... let's begin.

C: 没有光污染、没有激动人心的音乐、没有从天而降的灵魂，只有尴尬的沉默。
E: There was no light pollution, no exciting music, and no soul that came down from the sky. There was only an awkward silence.

C: 至于你们，躲着也好，主动出击也罢，应该没有谁能威胁到你们的安全。
E: As for you guys... whether you hide or attack head-on, you should be safe for now.

C: 你也想获得胜利么…但在我看来，唯一的「胜利」只有让战争消失。
E: You want to win? To me, the only real victory is making this war disappear.

C: 我…不太明白你的意思。
E: I... don't quite understand what you mean.

C: 任何受过粗浅魔术训练的人都能感应到，力量正源源不断地聚流在此。但偏偏这个世界并没有所谓的「魔术」与「魔术师」。
E: Anyone with magecraft training can feel power continuously flowing into this place, but this world has no "magecraft" or "mages."

C: 没准儿去钓鱼了。
E: Maybe he went fishing.

C: 嗐，都是瞎想。新来的，别为已经做出的决定后悔。你看我，这样不挺好？
E: No no no. C'mon. Don't worry about the what-ifs. Why waste time regretting a choice you've already made? Look at me, things aren't so bad here, are they?

C: 我考虑一下…在列车离开前，我一定会给你答复的。
E: I'll think about it... I'll make sure to give you my answer before the Express leaves.

C: 还有什么想叮嘱我的话吗？
E: Anything else you want to say to me?

C: 奥帝先生，您的愿望真是让我感动。
E: Mr. Oti, your wish truly moves me.

C: 好了，该你了，阿斯娜小姐。我会签署声明，放弃你的名字注册而成的商标，还有对你一切创作成果的所有权的…这样，你满意了吗？
E: Alright. It's your turn, Miss Asna. I'll sign the declaration to renounce the trademark on your name and all rights to your creative works... Are you happy with that?

C: 比格兰霍姆家乡的茶还难喝？
E: Is it worse than the tea from Granholm's hometown?

C: 横亘在你们之间的短暂沉默，足以表达这位老熟人所有的无奈和愤怒。
E: The brief silence that lingers between you was enough to convey every ounce of fury and exasperation from this old acquaintance.

C: 还有完没完了？！这是恐怖片，龙套们，给我保持恐惧！
E: Will this ever end!? This is a horror film, people! Background characters, start acting scared!

C: 倒是和斯科特先生很配啊，无名小卒，手段还挺阴险。
E: Fits right in with Mr. Skott, doesn't it? A pair of nobodies with shady tricks up their sleeves.

C: 我会慢慢吞掉你的身子，哪怕是音符小姐这个借来的假名，也会成为我的所有物。
E: I'll devour your body piece by piece, and even that fake name Miss Note will be mine.

C: 不，这种程度的小喽啰，还用不着劳烦御主你出手。
E: No need to trouble yourself with small fry like this, Master.

C: 不知道敌人做了什么，知更鸟小姐她分裂成了好多的…我花了不少时间，才找到眼前的这些。
E: I'm not sure what the enemy did, but she's been split into pieces... Took me a while to find even these few.

C: 呱呱！恶灵！为何你如此憎恶人类？难道你的心中一点爱和善良都没有呱？
E: *ribbit* Evil spirit! Why do you despise humans so? Is there not a single ounce of love or compassion in your heart? *ribbit*

C: 这可真是意外收获——老朋友，你终于明白了吗？到底谁才能实现你的愿望。
E: What a pleasant surprise — old friend, have you finally understood that who it is that can truly grant your wish?

C: 静默三幕剧•其三
E: The Silent Stage: Act III

C: 静默三幕剧•特别加场
E: The Silent Stage: Special Feature

C: 这下三对三了。
E: Now we're evenly matched, three against three.

C: 别闹了，让我想想该怎么解开这个诅咒。
E: Enough messing around. Let me think how we can lift this curse.

C: 斯科特，这波是不是你打得有问题？
E: Skott, don't you think you've messed this one up?

C: 帕姆还不知道这项提议，也得征询列车长的意见。
E: We should consider Pom-Pom's opinion, too. They don't know we're considering Amphoreus as a destination.

C: 但要我说，制造混乱也是一种维稳的手段。
E: Creating chaos is also a means to maintaining social stability, if you ask me.

C: 抱歉，这位客人——
E: Excuse me, sir...

C: …你不会就这点钱吧？
E: ...Wait, is that really all you've got on you!?

C: 是六岁前的事了。我像个普通男孩一样尝试用耳羽飞翔，却摔倒在土坑里，险些折断了天环。
E: Sometime before I turned six. Like most boys would, I tried to fly with my ear feathers, only to fall into a pit. I almost broke my halo.

C: 短句？
E: Short sentences?

C: 不用担心，匹诺康尼并无危险。我们仍未启程，只是因为一位特殊的「旅客」。
E: There's no need to worry, all is well in Penacony. Our reason for lingering here is a certain unusual passenger.

C: 的确还有另一个原因：黑天鹅小姐提到翁法罗斯是个受三重命途影响的世界，而其中一条就是「智识」。
E: Yes, there is something else. Miss Black Swan said Amphoreus is a world influenced by three Paths, and the Erudition is one such Path.

C: 许久不见，各位。
E: It's been a while, everyone.

C: 总觉得打扰她会很危险……
E: Why do I feel like it's not gonna be a wise move to interrupt her...?

C: 我刚才…差点就死了一次……
E: I nearly died... just now...

C: 「毁灭」？我不太明白……
E: The Destruction? I don't understand...

C: 重新回到世上？您在说什么……
E: Return to the world? What are you saying...?

C: 啊？杨叔…仙舟使者就快到了，你不去吗？
E: Huh? But Mr. Yang, the messenger from the Xianzhou is almost here. You're not coming with us?

C: 小女子人生地不熟，担心被黑心商贾下了套，恰好送礼对象都是各位熟悉的仙舟朋友。得劳烦二位大股东多提点意见啦。
E: I'm not too familiar with this planet. I'm worried an unscrupulous cutthroat merchant will try to take advantage of me. Luckily, the people I want to buy these gifts for are friends you already know on the Xianzhou, so I'll be counting on both your stakeholder intuitions for recommendations!

C: 情商很高。
E: High EQ.

C: 还好，停云也算替您省了些力排众议的口舌。
E: Then I'm glad. I shall save you the trouble of hearing what those people may say.

C: 你不担心我借机逃脱？
E: You're not worried I'll take the opportunity to escape?

C: 感激不尽。
E: Much appreciated.

C: 你知道我要说什么，你辜负了许多人的信任，甚至包括最重要的家人。别忘记这件事。
E: You know what I'm going to say. Tons of people trusted you, but you let them all down — even your closest family. Don't you forget that.

C: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
E: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

C: 但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
E: Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.

C: 「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
E: "Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...

C: 各位，让三月七好好休息吧。我们去外面说话。
E: Why don't we take our discussion outside so March 7th can rest?

C: 明白就好。
E: Good that you do.

C: <unbreak>0011</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>0011</unbreak>...

C: 嗯，看来如此。
E: Mm-hmm, looks like it.

C: 嗯，就这么做吧。虽然有些无礼，但我们的确在赶时间。
E: ...Let's do it. I'm not sure she'll be happy about it, but we have no time to waste.

C: 黄金裔是什么？
E: Who are the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 咦，怎么感觉安静过头了？
E: Huh? But why does it feel a little too quiet?

C: 够了…内讧的时候，现在不是。疯王没有溃退…必须阻止它，黄金裔……
E: Enough... The time for internal strife, now is not. Still on the offense, the mad king is and must be stopped by the Chrysos Heirs...

C: 我们对泰坦的洗礼并无兴趣。向陌生的世界施以援手，只是身为「开拓者」的职责。
E: We have no interest in the Titan rites. As Trailblazers, lending a helping hand to unfamiliar worlds is simply our duty.

C: 这或许就是「英雄的特权」吧。
E: It's probably more of a "hero's privilege."

C: 这还真是…令人意外。
E: That is... surprising.

C: …嗡嗡！
E: ...Grumph!

C: 两位误会了。你们出手帮助奥赫玛，已经充分表达了善意。我只是……
E: Please don't misunderstand. When you helped Okhema, you already showed ample goodwill. It's just that I...

C: 不、不可能！这可是我祖上传下来的宝贝…西塔罗斯呢？让他来给我看看！
E: T—That's impossible! This is an heirloom that's been passed down by my ancestors... Where's Theodoros? Get him over here to take a look!

C: …羽翼？
E: ...Wings?

C: 至于这里发生的事…我们不会告诉他人的。快去吧，两位英雄。
E: As for what happened earlier... We won't tell anyone else about it. So, go now, brave heroes.

C: 还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
E: Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.

C: 那位是…先前遇见的女士。
E: Hey, that's... the lady we encountered previously.

C: 勇气有余，但失之纯粹…记作一步。
E: A response that is certainly full of spirit, but lacking in sincerity... A step will be recorded.

C: 想凭油嘴滑舌将自己送上末路？我可以满足，记作一步。
E: Trying to hasten your demise by being glib with your response? I can certainly satisfy your desire. A step will be recorded.
...Yeah.

C: 因为我…是「死亡」的影子。
E: Because I... am the shadow of "death."

C: 是啊，悬锋城曾是每一位战士的向往之地。
E: Yeah, Kremnos used to be the place every warrior longed for.

C: 这是…箴言石板？
E: This is... a Proverb Slate?

C: 超出你知识范围了？无所不知的野史学家。
E: Is it beyond your knowledge, amateur historian?

C: 「迎面走来的是令人闻风丧胆的角斗士组合，黑暗剑士白厄——」
E: "Approaching now are the duo of gladiators whose names strike terror in all who hear them — the one and only Dark Swordmaster, Phainon!"

C: 你们俩的妄想症吵到我了！
E: These delusions of yours are seriously getting on my nerves!

C: 她本来也要来的，但身体抱恙。
E: She was supposed to be here, but she's not feeling well.

C: 「你们不受欢迎…你们没有资格。」
E: "You are not welcome here... You have no right."

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…以我对它的了解，应该不是一位粗暴的神明。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... based on my understanding, isn't the kind that resorts to brutality.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！我们已经完成了你的挑战，可以让我们通过了吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! We completed your challenge. Can you let us pass now?

C: 「不允许…不承认…不允许你们继续前进。」
E: "No... Unsatisfactory... You cannot pass."

C: 「是你吗…是你吗？母亲她…邂逅了你。她思念着你……」
E: "Is that you... Is that you? Mother... encountered you. She misses you..."

C: …我饿了。
E: ...I'm hungry.

C: 我们受「剧本」指引聚在一处，暂时完成一个共同的目标…仅此而已。
E: Guided by the "script," we've assembled here to temporarily accomplish a common goal... That's all.

C: 唉…我这才加入多久，有问题的话，去问卡芙卡不行吗？
E: Oh... I've only just joined recently. If you have questions, can't you just ask Kafka?

C: 我记不起任何事…
E: I can't remember anything...

C: 昏过去？你在说什么？
E: Pass out? What are you talking about?

C: 啊，怎么又让我做场外支援？真无聊……
E: Ugh, why do I have to be the standby support again? So boring...

C: 什么结局？
E: What fate?

C: …多么可惜！那三位斗士只差一点便能通过试炼，觐见雄伟的欧利庞王，摘得悬锋勇士的桂冠……
E: ...Such a pity! Those three warriors were so close to completing the trial, to emerging as victorious Kremnoan warriors, and to earning an audience with our glorious King Eurypon!

C: 我已强调过了——这是同时考验三人的试炼！若是连愿意和你出生入死的同伴都找不到，还是尽早回家放牧吧！
E: I've told you before — this is a trial for three! This is a trial that requires three people! If you can't even gather enough comrades to stand by you in life and death, it's time you went home and took up herding!

C: 我们两个是他的队友！
E: We'll be his teammates!

C: 无妨！既然你找到了愿意一同赴死的战友，那便上前来吧，愚氓！
E: As you wish! Good for you, you now have allies to court death with. Come on up here, fool!

C: 这一路你都在压制体内的暗潮…你欺骗不了我。
E: You've been fighting to suppress your true thoughts within you all this while... You cannot deceive me.

C: 这样…就可以了。
E: That... will do.

C: 前进…不允……
E: Entry... forbidden...

C: 连我自己也依旧感到神奇。
E: I can barely believe it myself.

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，请问你为何而战？
E: Lord Gnaeus, may I ask what is it you are fighting for?

C: 不知有多少人能走到这一步……
E: Are there others who made it this far...?

C: 咳…咳咳……
E: *cough* *cough*

C: 我理解你的苦楚，女孩。但现在，你必须先把它搁在一边。
E: I understand your pain, child. But you need to set it aside for now.

C: 万敌去哪了？
E: Where did Mydei go?

C: …你察觉到了吗？
E: ...Did you notice?

C: 万敌阁下没有到场……
E: Lord Mydei isn't here yet...

C: 哀丽秘榭的白厄——请上前来。
E: Please step forward, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

C: （泰坦的呓语）
E: (Titan's murmurs)

C: 坐等被命运仲裁的感觉，我不喜欢。不知道在场的其他人会如何看待。
E: I don't know about the rest of them, but I don't like to just sit by and wait for my fate to be decided.

C: 胜利在望！最后一击——
E: Victory is at hand! Time for the final blow...!

C: 相信你能做到，朋友。
E: I believe that you'll be able to pull it off.

C: 试炼已经开始了吗？
E: Has the trial begun?

C: 一阵无名之花的暗香涌入了你的鼻腔…余韵如此甜美，令你逐渐忘却了呼吸的意义。
E: A subtle fragrance of an unnamed flower fills your senses, its sweetness making you forget the need to breathe.

C: 汝那位白发的门生呢？如此妄为…就不怕陷其于不义？
E: What about that white-haired student of yours? Acting so recklessly... Do you not care about what might happen to him?

C: 喔，吾记得他。就是他首先提出了「灵魂」的概念，没错吧？
E: Oh, I remember that person. He was the one to come up with the concept of "souls," right?

C: 这、这可是渎神哪…即便自由如树庭，此举也足以将你送上火葬的尸床…！
E: B—But this is absolute blasphemy... Regardless of how much freedom the Grove provides, such an act could cause you to be burned at the pyre...!

C: 看来凯妮斯阁下已对我相当了解，倒也免了自我介绍的工夫。
E: Since Lady Caenis is already well acquainted with me, I won't waste any effort introducing myself again.

C: 我这个年纪，根本睡不着觉。
E: Sleep is a luxury when you are at my age.

C: 我只要你思考死者为何而痛苦。然后让你的每一次触碰，都比上一次更加坚决。
E: I'm asking you to consider the source of the dead's suffering, and use that knowledge to fortify your future touches with more and more determination.

C: 可现在事情迎来了转机：既然终于能够觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…那我就还有机会为那注定的预言，写下另一种诠释。
E: And yet things have taken a turn for the better: Now that I can finally have an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, perhaps I can rewrite the meaning of that fated prophecy.

C: 我要真想藏起来，又何必当着你的面出现呢？
E: Come on. If I really wanted to hide, you'd never find me.

C: 但现在，我需要你。请你不要拒绝我的请求。
E: But I need you right now, so don't turn me down.

C: 别误会，我可不是来帮你们探险的…毕竟，我这辈子最讨厌的就是水了，何况还是这臭烘烘的冥河……
E: Hey, I'm not here to aid your adventure. I hate water more than anything else in this world, especially that stinky River of Souls...

C: 附近有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的「追忆符文」，使用祷言，让河流回到还没泛滥的时候吧！
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Rune of Recollection is nearby. Use prayers to return the river to before it got flooded!

C: 守城士兵们的亡魂，随着百夫长的「死亡」一同消散了。
E: The souls of the city's guards dissipate along with the centurion's "death."

C: 愿闻其详。
E: But why?

C: 哈哈，我知道。即便你能让我活过来，我也不会这么选。
E: Hah, I'm well aware of that. Even if you were able to revive me, I would never choose that option.

C: 我无法苟同。
E: I can't agree with you on this.

C: 楼梯断掉了，道路也断掉了，这算是危房吧……
E: Broken stairs, blocked paths... This place is gonna fall down soon...

C: 玻吕刻斯…它就是塞纳…不，「死亡」的化身？
E: Pollux... Is that the embodiment of Thana — no, "Death"?

C: 你和龙…是生死的两面？
E: You and that dragon... Are you the two sides of the same coin?

C: 就由已与死亡擦肩过千万次之人…为你们引路……
E: Let the person who has brushed against death countless times... guide your way...

C: 缇安答应过，缇宝，缇宁。等小小蝶来到这里，缇安要准备好礼物，第一个跑来迎接你。
E: Trianne promised Tribbie and Trinnon that when Little Cas got here, Trianne would get the gift ready and be the first person to run over and welcome you.

C: …我答应你。
E: ...I promise you.

C: 奇迹作用的范围不大，还请阁下再靠近一些……
E: The miracle's range is limited. Please come a little closer...

C: 好了，前进吧，孩子。你孤独的求索路即将迎来新的起点——
E: Go now, child. Your lonely pursuit is about to welcome a new chapter...

C: 嗯，就像其他半神一样，我也要留在这里…拥抱自己的命运了。
E: Mm, just like the other demigods, I will stay here... and embrace my destiny.

C: 不过…与诸位同行的人里，似乎没有遐蝶的身影。
E: But... I don't see Castorice among your number.

C: 不过，既然你我都对此感到好奇——
E: But since we are both equally curious...

C: 你引领我们前来翁法罗斯，却始终不愿谈及真实目的。「收集记忆」…并不是一个能让我信服的回答。
E: You've guided us to Amphoreus but refused to tell us your true intentions. "Collecting memories"... is simply not a convincing answer.

C: 你尽力游说列车来到这片星域，为的是揭开秘密，挫败这些人的阴谋？
E: So, the reason you did everything you could to convince the Express to come to this star zone is just to uncover the secrets and foil the plans of these people?

C: 遵命，黑塔女士。
E: As you command, Madam Herta.

C: 欸嘿嘿…乐意效劳，黑塔女士……
E: Hehehe... I'm happy to help, Madam Herta...

C: 但标准总是灵活的。在不违反终极协议的前提下，我可以透露一条信息：如您所想，此地是「翁法罗斯」的入口。
E: However, standards are always flexible. While not violating the ultimate protocol, I'm able to disclose this piece of information: As you thought, this is the entrance to Amphoreus.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛向神悟树庭派出以缇安、遐蝶为代表的外交使节。众人抵达时意外发现黑潮来袭，并与神秘剑士交战，但最终还是成功救出那刻夏和他身负的火种。
E: Meanwhile, Trianne and Castorice are dispatched to the Grove of Epiphany as diplomatic envoys of Okhema. When they arrive, they discover to their surprise that the black tide has struck, and they fight a mysterious swordmaster. In the end, they manage to rescue Anaxa and the Coreflame that he carries.

C: 有支持和反对很正常，就像世间也分贤才和笨货。
E: It's normal for ideas to have supporters and dissenters, just like how there are two types of people in this world — geniuses and dimwits.

C: 要帮忙么？
E: Need a hand?

C: 你之前进入过这里么？
E: Have you ever been here before?

C: …你在说什么胡话，少主赞不绝口的猛士就这副德行？
E: ...What is that supposed to mean? Is this really the sort of person that the young lord praised as a ferocious warrior?

C: 嘘，安静点…！
E: Shh...! Keep it down.

C: 哦？莫非，盗火行者亲口告诉你了？
E: Oh? Could it be that you heard that from the Flame Reaver themself?

C: 奥赫玛选择了她的命运。本次公民大会议题将变更为「暂停逐火之旅」，该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。
E: Okhema has chosen her destiny. The issue up for discussion at this citizens' assembly shall be modified to the "Suspension of the Flame-Chase Journey." This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.

C: 既然卡厄斯为吾等留以指引，要将这场试炼留待最后…那末，还有很多时间供汝沉思。
E: Since Khaos is willing to guide all of us and leave this trial to the end... There is still plenty of time for you to ponder.

C: 对此，我早有三种猜想。不过现在，先接着往下看吧。
E: I have long held three hypotheses about this. However, let's continue watching for now.

C: 这里封印着格奈乌斯阁下的「荣耀」……
E: Lord Gnaeus' Honor is sealed here...

C: 记住，不要向死者的疆域回首，不要停下你的脚步。在预言允诺的新世界里，行向属于你的人生……
E: Remember, do not look back on the land of the dead and do not stop moving. In the new world promised by the prophecy, march toward your new life...

C: 汝还是一副胜券在握的样子哪。可要是汝猜错了呢？
E: You still look as confident in your victory as ever, but what if your conjecture is wrong?

C: 对人子感到绝望的塞涅俄丝给天空之子降下了死刑，将他们抛入了我们脚下滚烫的黄金池中……
E: Seliose gave up on the children of humanity, and handed the Skyfolk a death sentence... throwing them into the boiling pool of gold beneath our feet...

C: …而是一位在她面前乞哀告怜的无名黄金裔。
E: ...but from a nameless Chrysos Heir who begged for mercy before her.

C: 她的话语就是一切：我们的指引、宽慰、命令、训诫。
E: Her words were everything to us: Our guide, comfort, command, and admonition.

C: 哪怕是最怯懦的小人物，她的心底也留有一颗种子。或许在你所处的时代，天边的光线过于昏暗，以至于种子未能发芽……
E: Even the most cowardly individual harbors a seed within. Perhaps in your era, the light on the horizon was too dim for it to sprout...

C: 他们毫无保留地爱着世人，甘愿舍弃自身为人子洒下光芒。
E: They love the people of this world unreservedly, willing to sacrifice themselves to shine a light upon the children of humanity.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>地上的人子已经归来，我们…会再度挑战天空！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The children of humanity have returned from the earth, and we... will challenge the skies once again!</color>

C: 恐怕这就是*我们*最后一次给你写信啦。奥莱诺斯陷入了漫长的黑夜，可怕的生物不断从黑潮里涌现，让整座城邦陷入了混乱。
E: We are afraid this might be the last letter we ever write to you. Oleinus has sunk into an endless night, with dreadful creatures continuing to surge from the black tide, plunging the entire city in chaos.

C: 塞涅俄丝拥有弑神的力量……
E: Seliose possessed the strength to slay gods...

C: 终于…能稍微松一口气了吗？
E: Finally... can we catch our breath now?

C: 还真羡慕裁缝女的神权哪，没法从面相上看出来的品性，交给金线判断就行了。
E: It's amazing what the seamstress can do with her divine authority. She sees right through people with that golden thread of hers, beyond whatever facade they put up.

C: 哈…看来他们成功了啊。
E: Ha... it looks like they pulled it off.

C: 唉…怪我怪我，怎能指望一个彻头彻尾的疯子听进去苦口良言？
E: Ugh, my bad. Why bother offering wisdom to a mad dog who wouldn't understand it anyway?

C: 「再和我…说句话吧……」
E: "Say something... anything..."

C: 怎么突然问起这个？还是先回到地上……
E: Why bring this up now? Let's focus on getting back down there...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，我会留在天空，为人们降下庇护。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I'll remain in the sky and cast my protection over the people.</color>

C: 献上「火种」吧，黄金裔。
E: Surrender the Coreflame, Chrysos Heir.

C: …再引入第一缕烈阳的光芒。
E: ...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.

C: 与此同时，在神悟树庭……
E: Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...

C: 《禁忌之恋：树与蝶》
E: Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly

C: 喔，经你这么一提醒，还真是！要是能换成其他材质，比如水晶…就更好啦！
E: Oh, now that you mention it, yes! It would be even better if it were made of, say... crystal!

C: …我曾以为，我还能争取到更多时间。
E: ...I thought I could buy some more time.

C: 嘴欠的家伙，小心我把你丢进冥河里喂鱼！
E: Watch your mouth, or I'll feed you to the fish in the River of Souls!

C: 哇…好大一个宝箱！让开让开，我要亲手把它撬开！
E: Wow... that's a huge chest! Move over. I want to open it myself!

C: 这玩意，启动起来动静太大…还是别节外生枝了吧？
E: This thing's way too loud when it's on... Let's not stir up more trouble, okay?

C: 冲冲冲，下一处宝藏！
E: Let's go, to the next trove!

C: 「伴随着时光的推移…我也开始越发依赖自己的侥幸心理。」
E: "As time passes... I find myself leaning more and more on blind luck."

C: …嘁。我会考虑的，裁缝女。别再监视我了…除非你想彻底失去我的影踪。
E: ...I'll think about it, seamstress. But stop watching me... unless you want to lose me for good.

C: 你们…阿格莱雅。
E: You... Aglaea.

C: 意识到自己人性将尽之际，我便开始筹划自己的退场。要以怎样的方式离席，才能不浪费这一场迟来的死亡？我一时还未找到最理想的答案。
E: Realizing that my humanity was fading, I began to plan my exit. What kind of departure would not waste such a belated death? I have yet to find the ideal answer.

C: …哈，我记下啦！那你接着忙店里的事，我先……
E: ...Nice! Got it! Well, please keep looking after the shop while I—

C: 谎言永远都是谎言，赛法利娅……
E: Lies will always be lies, Cifera.

C: 三位英雄，你们回来了。
E: Heroes, you're back.

C: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧——」
E: "Spirit water, reveal the way —"

C: …咳，你好，粉彤彤的后辈。我是赛法利娅，来自早就陨落的城邦多洛斯。其它的…史书传记里都写了，也用不着我再介绍了吧？
E: ...Ahem. Well, hello there, pink child. I'm Cifera from the long-fallen city-state of Dolos. As for the rest... it's all in the history books, so I don't need to repeat it here.

C: 那还真是…人不可貌相。我还以为塞涅俄丝的后裔会更…呃…高大威猛一点儿。
E: Well, that's... unexpected. I figured Seliose's descendant would be... I don't know. Taller? Stronger?

C: 您的认可是无价之宝，将军。请安歇吧…我一定会将您的馈赠物尽其用。
E: Your blessing is a treasure beyond measure, General. Rest well... I'll make sure your gift is put to its best use.

C: 从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
E: Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.

C: 祖先们生活在艾格勒的光芒照拂之下，眼中却只容得下一种颜色。
E: Our ancestors lived under Aquila's light, yet they were blinded to all but one color.

C: 轮到我们挑战泰坦了。
E: It's our turn to challenge the Titan.

C: 她最后去哪儿了？
E: Where did she go in the end?

C: 但她没能终结艾格勒，归还「天空」的火种。有人说，她以自身封印了神明的怒火，将它囚禁在晨昏之眼深处，永世支撑翁法罗斯的苍穹。
E: Yet she still could not end Aquila nor bring back the Coreflame of Sky. Some say she sealed the wrath of the god within herself, trapping them deep within the Eye of Twilight to support the heavens of Amphoreus forever.

C: 不愧是迷宝，帮大忙啦。
E: I knew you could do it, Memmie! You are a huge help.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand now.

C: 或许它感应到了我们的苏醒。
E: Maybe they detected our awakening.

C: 你们给我套上的枷锁已经锈蚀脱落，我将决定自己应飞向何方。
E: The shackles you bound me with have rusted away, and I shall decide which direction I'll fly.

C: 我是英雄塞涅俄丝的后代…我们是来完成她的使命的！
E: I am the descendant of the hero Seliose... We have come to complete her mission!

C: 黑潮生物…准备战斗！
E: Black tide creatures... Prepare for battle!

C: 记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间…哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往事的痕迹。
E: The textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus... Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

C: 即便是在如此绝望的时刻，你们还是遵守了与我的约定…我无以言谢。
E: Even in such desperate times, you still managed to keep your promise to me... I am grateful beyond words.

C: …那就用你自己的选择开辟出新的道路吧——这是你最擅长的事，对么？
E: ...Then use your choice to open up a new path — that's what you're best at, right?

C: 这的确…在意料之外。
E: This certainly was... unexpected.

C: 那黑衣剑客似乎不太对劲？
E: That black-clad swordmaster... something seems off.

C: （白厄，他准备好「再创世」了吗…？）
E: (Phainon... is he ready for Era Nova?)

C: 就到这里吧，该完成仪式了。
E: Let's leave it at that. Time to complete the ritual.

C: 于是，我想起了小时候常玩的「神谕牌」——虽然{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}神谕总是解读不准就是啦。
E: Which made me think of those old oracle cards I used to play with as a kid — though the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} prophecies were always hit or miss.

C: 散了散了，都不许看。
E: Not happening. This stays sealed.

C: 我有漫游签证，不怕拒签。
E: My Trailblazer Profile should get me in, right?

C: 怎么突然这么说？
E: What makes you say that?

C: ——正如你我命运常在。
E: —just as our paths stay forever linked.

C: 背负…心愿？
E: Bear their... wishes?

C: 是一起泡过高温浴池那种熟。
E: You'll be the kind of friends who think nothing of sitting shoulder to shoulder in a hot bath.

C: 蜗居公主，你说对吧？
E: Right, Princess Homebody?

C: 他是不是…有点…？
E: Isn't he... you know, a little...?

C: 啊，白厄……
E: Look, Phainon...

C: 这可真是…我刚刚还在想，你是不是也在神殿里，没想到重逢来得这么突然。
E: This is... incredible. I was literally just thinking about how you might be here, but I never imagined I'd see you this soon.

C: 命运已经付诸实现，何不让我们设宴迎宾，为这场相逢再添一笔？
E: Now that the wheels of fate are turning, what finer way to celebrate this fortuitous encounter than a feast?

C: 可笑。难不成，我们的「救世主」竟在这种关键时刻掉链子，被那愚蠢的谵语吓破了胆？
E: Ha! Could it be, that now, at the critical juncture, our mighty "Deliverer" is chickening out? Scared of a stupid prophecy?

C: 毕竟，诸神的火种如今皆已收殓于此……
E: Well, all the Coreflames do lie here now...

C: 去吧，脏东西留给我，做你该做的事。
E: Go on then, I'll handle the filth. Do what you need to do.
Yeah...

C: 我相信，既然阁下沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视——
E: I believe that, since you've bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>—

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{M#他}{F#她}就是少年儿时的憧憬，幻想中引领自己毅然前进的「救世主」——现在，以「无名客」的名义，{M#他}{F#她}已然成为翁法罗斯史诗不可或缺的一部分。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>{M#He}{F#She} is the swordsman's ideal in his youth, the "Deliverer" that guided him resolutely onward through fantasy — And now, in the name of the "Nameless," {F#s}he has become an essential and inseparable part of the epic of Amphoreus.</color>

C: 那么，请上前吧。
E: Now, if you would.

C: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>——赐你众星俱焚的曙光！</size></color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>And grant you a dawn where all stars burn to ash!</size></color>

C: 来…让怒火吞噬我…！
E: Come... let the fires of fury devour me...!

C: 毕竟，您也沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视，能唤醒男人心中，沉睡已久的本能……
E: After all, you've also been bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>, which can awaken the long-dormant instinct inside a man...

C: 没错。泰坦是过去的黄金裔，黄金裔是未来的泰坦——阿那克萨戈拉斯对「再创世」的推演基本属实。作为「理性」的模型，他达到了前所未有的高度。
E: Exactly. The Titans are Chrysos Heirs of the past, and Chrysos Heirs are the Titans of the future — Anaxagoras's theory of "Era Nova" holds true. As the model of "Reason," he reached unprecedented heights.

C: 不。恐怕，我只能独自上路了。
E: No. I'm afraid I'm on my own this time.

C: 凯撒有令：「『救世主』绝不会在这个时代出现，须留心可疑之人」。
E: The Imperator decreed: "The 'Deliverer' will not appear in this age. Be wary of suspicious individuals."

C: 攀上，落下；攀上，落下；攀上，落下……
E: Climb, fall, climb, fall, climb again, and fall...

C: 闲话少叙，我们走吧。如果遇到其他学者，交给我来应付。
E: Enough chitchat. Let's go. If we run into any other scholars, leave them to me.

C: 真是如出一辙啊，就像我过去认识的许多个他们……
E: They're exactly like all the past ones I've known...

C: 什、什么，你知道本大爷…？
E: Wh—What? Do you know who I am?

C: 什么……
E: What...
No...

C: 原来如此，因为你也在场……
E: I see. You were there all along...

C: 但现在，一切都不同了。你的坚持迎来了转机，地平线的远方，我看到…黎明的轮廓正在缓缓成型，驱逐永夜。
E: But this time... things are different. Your persistence has shifted the tide. On the horizon, I see it, faint but undeniable, the shape of dawn, breaking through the eternal night.

C: 若是由{NICKNAME}来接过「全世」的职责……
E: If {NICKNAME} takes on the weight of the whole world...

C: ——求之不得！
E: That's all I ever wanted!

C: 我最最重要的两个朋友，已经先一步出发了，目的地就是翁法罗斯。虽然看上去还挺靠谱，但只有我知道……
E: Two of my closest friends are already on their way to Amphoreus. They may seem capable, but only I know...

C: 但你要睁大眼睛，千万别被蒙蔽了呀。
E: But keep your eyes open, don't let them fool you.

C: 你还活着…？
E: You're still alive...?

C: 但实验出现了异常，你知道原因：计算中的十二因子——我是说，十二名半神里，有一位通过「毁灭」破坏了自身。
E: But now there's an abnormality within the experiment. You know what I'm talking about. One of the model's twelve factors — that is, one of the twelve demigods — destroyed himself using the power of the Destruction.

C: >>>HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：律法，命途：██<<<
E: >>>HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: █████████, Titan Authority: Law, Path: █████<<<

C: …醒了呀，那就不对你使用唤醒的魔法了。
E: ...Awake at last? I guess I won't have to use my "wake up" magic on you then.

C: 小心，里面似乎有人在。
E: Careful. Sounds like someone's in there.

C: 虽然不是你熟知的她们……
E: Not the ones you're familiar with...

C: 幸会，我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军的参谋。
E: Greetings. I am Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

C: 我叫拉比努斯，你这贵客！
E: I am Labienus, honored guest!

C: 得了吧，哈巴狗！你就连要用狗嘴吠出什么声调，都得请示那该死的凯撒吗？
E: Enough, you pathetic lapdog! Do you need to beg for permission from that cursed Imperator even just to bark?

C: 关于你的身份…
E: About your role...

C: 抱歉啦，让我们再逛逛这个美丽的地方吧～
E: Apologies. We want to explore this beautiful place some more~

C: ——腐朽的旧律已随着{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}一同陨落，不再配得尊敬。但，倘若诸位还坚持标榜自己捍卫「律法」……
E: The decaying old laws fell with {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and are no longer deserving of respect. But, if you still insist on proclaiming yourselves defenders of the "Law"...

C: 吼吼吼，今天的客人真多呀，瞧瞧又是谁来了？
E: Roarrr, so many guests today! Let's see who's here now!

C: 对于我们这些常年洄游在生死间的战士，那是比胜利还值得期待的时刻。
E: For us warriors who swim constantly between life and death, these feasts are more worth looking forward to than victory.

C: 不知等我接过神权，这个世界会变成什么样貌？
E: I wonder what this world will look like when I take the divine authority?

C: 总算能和大人物过过招了。
E: Finally, we'll get to face off with some big names.

C: 屏住呼吸……
E: Hold your breath...

C: 这是？你做了什么…
E: What... What did you do...?

C: 其余诸神的蜜露皆会引人沉醉，唯独欢宴之神的蜜露……
E: The Dew of other gods all intoxicate humans, but the God of Banquets' Dew...

C: 听好：铁墓必将诞生。要想让「毁灭」降临，纵使身负枷锁，我也有千般方法……
E: Listen: Irontomb is fated to be born. You may shackle me and put me in chains, but I have thousands of ways to ensure the Destruction's descent...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>警告！检测到非法访问…无法锁定信号来源……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Warning! Unauthorized access detected... Cannot lock onto signal source...]</color>

C: 你觉得将圣城夷为平地，就可以找到它么？我看…你只能徒然落得一身尘灰。
E: You really think you'll find it by razing the holy city to the ground? From what I see... all you'll get is dust and disappointment.

C: 痛苦会带来漫长的折磨，但它绝无可能摧毁我。
E: Pain brings endless torment, but it can never destroy me.

C: 「理性」和「诡计」……
E: Reason and Trickery...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>把计划告诉海瑟音，让她也加入战局。我会提前将自己炼成贤者之石，写入术式……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Loop Hysilens in. Let her join the final act. I'll transmute myself into a Philosopher's Stone and embed myself into the formula...</color>

C: 此时此刻，{NICKNAME}会露出怎样的表情呢？肯定和以前一样，从容、坚定，充满自信吧？
E: I wonder what kind of expression is {NICKNAME} is wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.

C: 女王在召见我们。想必她已精疲力尽，黑潮终将流入边境。
E: The queen summons us. She must be near exhaustion... The black tide will soon enter our borders.

C: 只是可惜…我们已无法前行，请你代我们给人类歌唱，歌唱深海的传奇……
E: But what a shame... we can go no further. Please, sing to the humans for us. Sing of the deep sea's legend, in our place...

C: 看！火光投影出了她追忆中的面容，也是这场剧目的演员。
E: Look! The fire projects the face from her memories: an actress upon the stage of this play.

C: 从女王杯中诞生的她，领受了最深的祝福，继承了无上神力……
E: Born of the queen's Chalice, she bore the deepest blessings and inherited supreme divine power...

C: 早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
E: I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

C: 以一场持续千年的接力，面对远超自身的敌手，他们在徒劳的抗争中赢得惨胜。
E: In a relay spanning a thousand years, they stood against enemies far beyond their strength, and won a bitter victory through what seemed like futile resistance.

C: 海瑟音……
E: Hysilens...

C: 该给一切做个了结了。
E: It's time to end everything.

C: 所以在那之前，我们有义务告诉你……
E: But before that, we have to tell you...

C: 但这一切早就发生了，不是吗？
E: But that's already happened, hasn't it?

C: 只要和{NICKNAME}一起，我们就什么都做得到。
E: As long as {NICKNAME} and I are together, we can do anything.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 这书页里有什么？
E: What's on this page?

C: 只是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属啊，令人失望。
E: Just {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}'s Titankin? Disappointing.

C: 好残忍，是窃忆者干的？
E: That's so cruel... Did the Memosnatchers do that?

C: 「姬子，你还好吗？我很少见你…如此紧张。」
E: "Himeko, are you alright? I've never seen you this anxious before."

C: 让来历不明的忆者上车，果然不是什么明智的决定。
E: It was not a wise decision to let a Memokeeper of unknown origins board the Express.

C: 无论其中有什么隐情，我们都会不遗余力找到那位「三月七」，带回{NICKNAME}，和我们熟悉的三月。
E: No matter what secrets are buried within, we'll do whatever we can to find that "March 7th," and bring back {NICKNAME} and the March we all know.

C: 我不知道。也许其中还有更深的纠葛……
E: I don't know. Perhaps there are even deeper things at play here...

C: 是「开拓」打破了封锁，让他们有机会趁虚而入；而现在，这些人一定会不择手段，阻止外部势力干扰翁法罗斯。
E: The Trailblaze broke the seal around Amphoreus, giving these people the opportunity to enter. Now, they'll do anything to prevent outside powers from interfering.

C: 黑塔女士虽不偏重人情世故，但她一定会享受来自诸位的赞誉。
E: Madam Herta doesn't care much for favors, but she'll be happy to receive everyone's praise.

C: 谁在暗中帮助我们？
E: Someone's helping us out from the shadows?

C: 可能对她而言，这是唯一能捍卫自身人性，并留下痕迹的方法。
E: It might have been the only way for her to maintain her sense of humanity and leave her mark in this world.

C: 接过它的时候，「我」也开始感到不安……
E: "I" have started to feel uneasy whenever "I" take it into my hands...

C: 我就会去现实中，找到「真正的你」。
E: I will head into reality and find the "true you."

C: 为了你们，还有「三月七」——在我看来，这抉择十分合理。
E: For your own sake, and for the sake of "March 7th," I think my choice is a very reasonable one.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: {RUBY_B#「了解」}和新的伙伴相遇，又与新的伙伴离别——{RUBY_E#}
E: I {RUBY_B#Understand}met new companions{RUBY_E#}, then bid them farewell.

C: 终于，能和你们说上话了呀！
E: Finally... I can talk to you all at last!

C: 所以，我唯独能确信：<color=#dbc291ff>流光忆庭是你的敌人</color>。
E: Therefore, there's only one thing I can be sure of: <color=#dbc291ff>The Garden of Recollection is your enemy</color>.

C: 「毁灭」。
E: "Destruction."

C: {NICKNAME}想上前看看吗？可以哦，就当是回望过去。
E: Want to take a closer look, {NICKNAME}? Go ahead, think of it as a glimpse into the past.

C: 要如何，才能理解……
E: What does it take, to make you understand...

C: 明知故问：那<color=#dbc291ff>化龙妙法</color>不正是你的看家本领么，「不朽」的后裔？
E: You already know the answer: Is the <color=#dbc291ff>Transmutation Arcanum</color> not precisely your specialty, descendant of the Permanence?

C: 换言之，那是「长夜月」现身的地点……
E: In other words, that is the place where "Evernight" came into being...

C: 原始、兽性…我理解这种本能。
E: Primitive and animalistic... I understand these instincts.

C: 这光芒，竟出乎意料地温暖…就像是……
E: The light is unexpectedly warm... It's just like...

C: 一生都在「反叛」的野兽…不难理解，它为何如此疯狂了。
E: A beast that's been "rebelling" its whole life... No wonder they descended into madness.

C: 昔涟…她在哪里？
E: What about Cyrene? Where is she?

C: 如此看来，前方的秘密比想象中还要浑浊得多。
E: It appears the secrets ahead are even murkier than I imagined.

C: 或许他的心智早已消陨；或许他依然清醒，仍在和黑潮的低语抗争。
E: Perhaps his mind has already eroded away... Or perhaps he is still awake, still fighting the whispers of the black tide.

C: 卡厄斯兰那……
E: Khaslana...

C: 躁动从神悟树庭传来，阁下该启程了。
E: There is a ruckus coming from the Grove of Epiphany. It is time for you to set out, my lord.

C: 当三重命途再度交汇，翁法罗斯将迎来壮烈的终局。
E: When the Three Paths cross once again, Amphoreus shall face a most magnificent end.

C: …好坏与否，恐怕还不得而知。
E: ...Whether this news is good or bad remains to be seen.

C: 让温柔的「天空」呵护世间。不再分贵贱高低，只有你、我，还有大家共同的心愿。
E: May the gentle "Sky" watch over all beings. There'll be no more distinctions of status or rank... only you, me, and everyone's shared hopes.

C: 好消息是：截至目前，它对有机体的影响可控。感染进程缓慢，造成的神经病变也不致命。
E: The good news is, so far, its effects on organic life are under control. The infection progresses slowly, and the resulting neuropathy is non-fatal.

C: …是的。方才的会议我无法回应，现在也只能以伪装示人，实在抱歉。
E: ...Yes. I apologize for not being able to respond during the meeting earlier, and even now I can only appear in disguise.

C: 不是庇护，也不是拯救。一如既往……
E: It's neither protection nor salvation. As always...

C: 让我们把这地方收拾干净，看看「德谬歌」到底是何方神圣。
E: Let's tidy this place up and see what this "Demiurge" really is.

C: 高能辐射、虚数内能污染，以我的见识，只有一种现象与这些描述完全吻合。
E: High-energy radiation, internal Imaginary-energy contamination. From what I know, there's only one thing that fits.

C: 这倒是意外收获。谁能想到，真有人会把实验室建在一片数据废墟里。
E: Didn't expect that. Who builds a lab in the middle of digital rubble?

C: 那些沉重的「记忆」，都将成为新世界萌芽的土壤。而这一次，我们会让它开出不一样的花。
E: Those heavy "memories" will all become the soil upon which the new world shall bud, and this time... We will make it bloom with a different flower.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 正合我意。收拾收拾，准备随堂测试。
E: Exactly. Alright, gather yourselves. It's time for a pop quiz.

C: 即便在那些保有理智的轮回中，他和我们…也从未越过「合作」的界限。
E: Even in the cycles where he remained sane, his ties with us... never went beyond "cooperation."

C: 那男人心中看似空无一物，憎恨却相当鲜明。自然也容不得一位凌驾于世界的王，和她的锋刃。
E: That man's heart may seem hollow, but his hatred is clear. Naturally, it holds no place for a monarch who stands above the world, nor her blade.

C: 「负世」的另一半……
E: The other half of Worldbearing...

C: 背负「负世」的绝望。
E: Bear the despair of Worldbearing.

C: 保持冷静，各位——等到决胜时，再倾注全力一击。
E: Stay calm, everyone. We'll put all our forces into an all-out attack when the decisive moment arrives.

C: 小海兔，在命运的海洋中，一同掀起巨浪吧。
E: Let us stir up torrents together in the ocean of fate.

C: 诞生之地？什么意思…
E: Birthplace? What do you mean...?

C: 「但我还在，{NICKNAME}还在，对吗？」
E: "But I'm still here, and {NICKNAME} is still here, no?"

C: 「这片惨状…终究，还是晚了一步么……」
E: "Look at this mess... were we still too late...?"

C: 「莉维娅，快看！天上有一道红色的光，好漂亮！」
E: "Livia, look! There's a red light in the sky! It's so pretty!"

C: 都说了，要前进的是我们♪
E: I told you already... We are the ones who will move forward ♪

C: （浴室里，有人？！）
E: (Someone's in the bathroom!?)

C: 这…真是有些骇人听闻。千万别让阿格莱雅女士发现了——她可是古典沐浴的坚定捍卫者啊。
E: That's... quite bizarre, to say the least. Please make sure Lady Aglaea doesn't find out. She's a firm defender of traditional bathing, you know.

C: 我书读得少，不懂这些。
E: I'm not well-read enough to understand all this stuff.

C: 律法和纷争确实相生相克……
E: Law and Strife are indeed two sides of the same coin...

C: 怎么，都沉默了？
E: What's wrong? Everyone's gone quiet?

C: 「你所在的地方，就是温柔的花海。」
E: "The place you reside is the gentle sea of flowers."

C: 回想起来，当时听见的话是……
E: Now that I remember, what I heard back then was...

C: ——叙说「逐火的预言」。
E: — Narrating "The Prophecy of Flame-Chase."

C: 有关<color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯之心」</color>的真相。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...The conclusion regarding the truth of "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>

C: 保持沉默
E: Remain silent

C: 「就拜托下一位『昔涟』继续守候啦。」
E: "I'll have to ask the next 'Cyrene' to continue our watch."

C: 昔涟。是桃子。是爱。
E: Cyrene. Is Peach. Is love.

C: 「笑一笑，好吗？」
E: "C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?"

C: 这么说来，还没回答你什么是「爱」呢。
E: Right. I still haven't told you what "love" is.

C: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
E: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

C: 我们一起，画上最后的句号。
E: Together, let's write the finale.

C: 危险、压抑、混沌……
E: Dangerous. Oppressive. Chaotic...
███████ Nameless one, fateless one ███████

C: 于是，花儿在旅途的终点收梢，又在起点生根。\n为昨天带去「爱」的结局。
E: And so, the flower fades at the journey's end, only to take root again at the journey's beginning\nIt leaves "love" as yesterday's conclusion.

C: 螺丝咕姆
E: Screwllum

C: 风堇
E: Hyacine

C: 是你做的？
E: You did that?

C: 修改现实数据而已，不值一提的小把戏。
