E: Just a little trick of tampering with the data of reality, I wouldn't call it fancy.

C: 载体锁定好了吗，随时可以带来？
E: Is the receptacle ready for use?

C: 怎么样，有什么发现？
E: Well? Found anything?

C: 那调查这些东西的重要性是？
E: What's so important about investigating this?

C: 这大裤衩分明是水魈对我的栽赃！我温明德作为堂堂应物科负责人，奇物再收容小队队长，绝不能让水魈牵着鼻子走，被人随意戏弄！
E: These boxers are clearly planted by the Xenohydro! I, Wen Mingde, the dignified leader of the Department of Implement Arts and head of the Curio Collection Squad, will not allow the Xenohydro to mock me like this!

C: 我才不是水魈！而且，请等一下，没有人听到他发出了奇怪的声音吗？
E: I'm not the Xenohydro! Wait a minute, did anyone hear him make that weird noise?

C: 哟，你也是来放风的么？有品位！能跟我选中同一处地方。
E: Ah, I see you're a {F#lady}{M#man} of culture as well. You've also come out here to unwind, and even picked the same spot as me.

C: 回来啦，动作还挺快。来来来，我这账本上有的是空余地方，看看你都拍了些啥？
E: Back already? You're fast! Here, I have plenty of blank space in this ledger. Let's see what you managed to capture.

C: 列车嘛，按规矩它不归空间站管。
E: Well, strictly speaking, the Express isn't part of the space station.

C: 我可听说，地概科现在有不少年轻人，把那老斑鸠当作精神偶像，真是不学好。
E: I've been told there are many young people in the Department of Cosmic Geography who worship that old scoundrel like a spiritual idol. What a bunch of buffoons.

C: 废话也挺有意思。
E: Nonsense can be very interesting to listen to.

C: 如果你是一个具有娱乐精神的年轻人，我建议你把它们都收集起来，生活不顺时就拿出来看看，在黯淡无光的塔内研究之余，给自己找点乐子。
E: If you are a fun-loving young person, I suggest you collect them all. Take them out when life is bad, and have some fun while studying in the dark tower.

C: 你看起来还挺开心的。
E: You seem pretty cheerful about it.

C: 可惜我一早上也没碰上「瓜农」，不如你回去躺着等消息？
E: Well, too bad, I haven't seen Gossipmonger this morning. You should rest up and wait for more news.

C: 那必须不能够啊。我这才值多少点，人总得有个自知之明不是？
E: Certainly not. I have a very clear notion of how much different favors cost.

C: （看来只是虚惊一场……）
E: (Seems like it's all just a scare...)

C: 没有什么办法。
E: There aren't any.

C: 你们都还太年轻…还不知道，这世间但凡需要等待的事，一般没有结果。
E: You are way too young... you don't understand. Things that require a lot of waiting don't usually end up well.

C: 红色真相。
E: The Red truth.

C: 蓝色谎言。
E: The Blue lie.

C: 怎么很犹豫的样子，确定蓝色是我的吗？
E: You seem hesitant. Are you sure the blue one is for me?

C: 我没想过这个问题…
E: That never crossed my mind...

C: 她身边又是何等角色，汇集了全银河、全宇宙的智囊，我？连吊车尾都排不上。
E: Come to think about it, who is she surrounded with? The aggregated wisdom of the entire cosmos, or even the universe. And who am I? I'm not even in the same league.

C: …哼，也就是他那样一个地概科的愣头青、穷光蛋，才会血气上头，认为自己付得起所谓一切。
E: Hmph, only a Department of Cosmic Geography imbecile who lives in poverty would think he has nothing to lose.

C: 我还记得你，怕死的伙计。
E: I remember you. You are that guy who is morbidly scared of death.

C: 那一瞬间，我的脑海中闪过阿尔弗瑞德那双逐渐涣散、黯淡的瞳孔。紧接着我呼吸急促，一身冷汗，双腿也打起颤来……
E: At that moment, Alfred's fading eyes flashed in my head. I felt short of breath, with cold sweat all over my body and my legs trembling...

C: 盘龙在胸前！
E: The dragon on your chest!
I — can't — hear — you!

C: 给钱也不干。
E: I don't want your money.

C: 仿佛突然堕入无始无终的空间，镜头终于聚焦——你正透过一副最常见的航行面罩观看着庞然的宇宙腹地。在邈远的深处，点缀着一颗尖锐的黯淡蓝点，仿佛凝结的水滴。你认出来，那是，「黑塔」空间站。
E: The point of view appears to be falling into empty space without beginning or end. The camera eventually gets focused — now you're looking at the vast hinterland of the universe through a standard-issue navigation visor. In the distance is a bright blue dot, like a condensed water droplet. You recognize it as the Herta Space Station.

C: 她对失忆现象的察觉、向你们求援的举动，都暗藏着实验失控的风险。
E: When she became aware of her own memory loss and began to ask around for help, the situation could've easily gone out of control.

C: 毕竟这世上，还有许多秘密等待着有缘人的见证。
E: After all, there are still many secrets in this world waiting to be unearthed.

C: 古兽的话也可能是宠物哦，宠物的话…咳咳…我、我、哎呀，我刚刚那份研究报告还没写完，过几天我再答复你吧。
E: Leviathans can be pets too. Well, pets... ehem... I... Well, there is a research report that I haven't finished working on yet. So I'll get back to you later.

C: （难道是在研究中接触了什么不可名状的古神古兽的，被精神污染了？真是奇怪。）
E: (Did she come into contact with some kind of Leviathan during her research? And got her mind contaminated? That's very strange.)

C: 既然之前调查不出什么来，那直接去查询这三位可疑人员的浏览记录，就能知道他们到底是哪位感染的了。
E: Since we couldn't get much from our previous investigation, let's check the browsing records of the three suspects. Then we should be able to identify the source of the infection.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 这是为什么呢？
E: Why?

C: 但我好像没什么爱好…
E: But I don't seem to have any hobbies...

C: …空间站手册的更新都没这么认真频繁呢。
E: ...Even the space station handbook doesn't get updated this frequently.

C: 大哥全身上下就剩下这么个小弱点，还如此追求上进！实在是太厉害了！
E: Brother Arlan only has that one weakness in his armor, but he won't ignore it! He's too awesome for that!

C: 首先是从心——直面心中产生的这股压力，从而更好地面对它。
E: Firstly, the trial of the heart. One needs to acknowledge the pressure in one's heart, and only then can one face it.

C: 不过，这狗狗有点眼熟…啊，难道是阿兰的佩佩？真可惜，你的主人不在这儿，他一个人去调查啦～
E: Huh, this little guy looks familiar... Ah! Are you Arlan's Peppy? Awwww I'm sowwie, your master isn't here. He's gone off to investigate~

C: 小姐…你们…怎么都来了？
E: Lady Asta, you... Why are you all here?

C: 你别仗着我是应物科的忽悠我啊。这等厉害的银河生物，在「黑塔」周遭早绝迹了。除非…除非是你们界种科的奇物跑了！
E: Don't try to spook me just because I'm from the Department of Implement Arts. A cosmic entity as strong as this around the space station would already have been wiped out. Unless... unless it's one of your Curios at the Department of Ecology!

C: 总之把东西拿上，你快走吧。
E: Anyway, take the stuff and leave, quickly.

C: 阿德勒，你和这只呜呜伯刚刚在密谋什么？现在告诉我，我可以不追究你的责任。
E: Adler, what are you and the Wubbaboo conspiring to do? Tell me now, and I promise I won't hold you responsible.

C: 嗯，可能会经过的舱室都已经检查过了，记得向艾丝妲站长汇报一下……
E: Correct. All the cabins they might pass by have been checked. Remember to report to Lead Researcher Asta.

C: 只是一点心意。
E: It's just a little something I whipped up.

C: 嗯，那我先走了。
E: Alright, see you later.

C: 是挺可疑。
E: It is pretty suspicious.

C: 相信我们能解决。
E: Have some faith — we'll figure this out.

C: 还有这边， 小号安抚型毛绒鲨鱼？这又是什么东西…收容室里有这玩意儿吗？
E: And here — what the heck is a "small stuffed animal shark for emotional support"? This kind of stuff is in storage?

C: 他因机缘巧合成为了一名「巡海游侠」，在漫长的时光中纵横银海，遨游四方，见证过诸多奇人异事。
E: He became a Galaxy Ranger by accident and spent many long years traveling among the stars. He encountered countless fascinating individuals and saw wonders witnessed by few.

C: 记得是平手…
E: I recall that it was a draw...

C: 说话了？！
E: It... speaks!?

C: 那是自然。
E: Naturally.

C: 银狼的真正目的是？
E: What is Silver Wolf truly after?

C: （咦，怎么这么多人聚在这儿，发生什么事了？）
E: (Why there're so many people here? What is going on?)

C: 就我一个人…怎么，你想一起来？
E: Yup, just me... Why? Do you want to come with?

C: 通过这场演练，一定能让大家对网络安全有更深的认识。当然，在正式开始前，测试和反复的修改肯定是少不了的。
E: Through the drill, I can definitely help deepen everyone's understanding of network security. Of course, before we start, testing and repeating revision is compulsory.

C: 为什么是《太空大战争》？
E: Why's it called Cosmic Warfare?

C: 追随女神「伊德莉拉」！
E: Follow Idrila, the Goddess!

C: …最好不要耽搁太久，事态随时可能恶化。
E: ...Well, try not to take too long. Things could deteriorate at any moment.

C: 你发现这里的虫卵已开始发出哼哼声，它们就像美妙的音乐，你沉浸其中……
E: You realize that the eggs here have started humming, creating a symphony of sorts, and it captivates you...

C: 或许可以尝试令列车引擎暂时过载，撞击虫胃，以超速度冲出「巨真蛰虫」的躯体。
E: ...then perhaps we could try pushing the Express's engine into a temporary state of overload... and use the momentum to burst out of the Giant Sting's body.

C: 不过那又怎么样咧？我还是觉得他是个好人呀…虽然怪怪的……
E: But, so what? I still think he was a nice guy, even if he was a bit weird...

C: 别装傻，好好想想。
E: Don't play the fool. Think.

C: 抱歉，情况特殊，我真的不能多说，只能告诉你是个秘密任务。
E: I'm sorry. The situation is very delicate. I can't say anything except that it's a secret mission.

C: …我和你坦白吧，非常棘手。监控没有拍到任何一名失踪科员消失时的影像。
E: ...I'll be honest with you — it's been tough. The surveillance didn't capture anything regarding the researchers' disappearance.

C: 不要装傻，你知道我在说什么！
E: Cut the act. You're perfectly aware of the point I'm making.

C: 毫无疑问，黑塔委托{NICKNAME}寻找的奇物就是「相位灵火」的火种。
E: Undoubtedly, the Curio Herta asked {NICKNAME} to find was the Phase Flame.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 是的，我与母亲二人在那里度过了十一个漫长的极夜。
E: Yes. My mother and I once spent <unbreak>11</unbreak> long polar nights there.

C: 当然，这可是三位天才的聚首。
E: Of course. This is a summit between three geniuses.

C: 尝一点。
E: Take a bite.

C: 螺丝咕姆的追随者们呢？
E: What about Screwllum's followers?

C: 我并不知晓他的真名。原始博士曾犯下诸多反人类罪行，因此有人猜测他并非有机生命。逻辑：无机生命与有机生命都应崇尚和平。
E: Dr. Primitive's true identity is not known to me. His previous transgressions against humanity lead some to conclude he may be an inorganic entity. Affirmation: All beings, organic or otherwise, should value peace.

C: 除研究外的生活呢？
E: What about life outside of research?

C: 你为什么戴着石膏头…
E: Why do you wear an alabaster head...

C: 真正的「阮•梅造物」就藏在下方的巨型培养皿中。
E: The real "Ruan Mei's Creation" is hidden in the giant incubator below us.

C: 维持舱段运转。无机生命的工作。嘶嘶。
E: Maintain zone operation. Job of inorganic lifeforms. *buzz*

C: 嗯，我们走吧。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 琐事就交给其他人干吧。
E: Can't we just get someone else in to do the menial jobs?

C: {NICKNAME}，你的花选好了么？我们来帮你结账吧，算是表达一下谢意。
E: {NICKNAME}, have you picked your bouquet? Let us buy it for you as a little token of our gratitude.

C: 没准是求救信。
E: Maybe it was someone asking to be rescued.

C: 恒星风气球…这人脑子里到底都有多少不切实际的想法？
E: A stellar winds balloon... Just how many ludicrous ideas can one person have in their head?

C: 要不一起搭个伙呗？我有可靠消息：银鬃铁卫的主力都被调去前线了，这可是千载难逢的好机会……
E: Say, why don't we join forces? I have reliable intel the main strength of the Silvermane Guards is being deployed to the front line. This is a golden opportunity...

C: 「存护之城」，「永屹之城」，「人类抵御寒潮的唯一壁垒」…听上去唬人，却句句属实。人类只有在这个铁围墙里才能活命。
E: The City of Preservation, the Towering Citadel, humanity's last bastion against the Eternal Freeze... It may sound a bit over the top, but those names are grounded in truth. The only place humans can eke out an existence is behind those impregnable walls.

C: 此时不跑，更待何时！
E: It's now or never!

C: {NICKNAME}，缓过来没有？等你准备好了，咱们得狠狠收拾收拾这帮公司的跟屁虫！
E: Caught your breath yet, {NICKNAME}? It's time to show these IPC fools who they're dealing with!

C: 看，下面有个大家伙！管事的会不会就是他？
E: Look — that big guy down there — is he the one in charge?

C: 这个「托帕」，到底是什么人物？不但能驯服裂界生物，还能把那帮黑衣服治得服服帖帖……
E: So who is this "Topaz" anyway? She seems to have no problem ordering these idiots around, or taming Fragmentum creatures, for that matter...

C: 「长远利益」——概念模糊。评估意图中……
E: "Long-term interests" undefined. Analyzing objectives...

C: 另外，计算表明：假如我拒绝合作，你有<unbreak>96.4%</unbreak>的概率会强迫我服从。
E: Additionally, calculations indicate a <unbreak>96.4%</unbreak> probability of compliance through force if I refuse to cooperate.

C: 你不是说那破「公司」的武器很先进吗？正好趁这个机会让我见识见识——来过两招！
E: Didn't you claim the IPC was all-powerful? Well now's the perfect chance to show us what you can do!

C: 我已经为你们争取到了最好的方案。只要签下这份合同，贝洛伯格欠下的所有债务都可以一笔勾销。此外，公司还会设立专项小组，支援雅利洛-Ⅵ的重建工作。
E: I have already negotiated the best possible deal for you. Once you sign this contract, all of Belobog's debts will be forgiven. In addition, the IPC will set up a special team to support the reconstruction of Jarilo-VI.

C: 终于来啦~我还以为你们要赶不上了呢。
E: Oh, hey there slowpokes! I was starting to think you weren't gonna show up.

C: 列车组的各位，也请和我们一起来吧。
E: Members of the Express, we'll need your help, too.

C: 原来如此，希露瓦是这么想的啊……
E: I see... I suppose that makes sense.

C: 小三月，{NICKNAME}？你们居然在下层区…而且还绷着脸，发生什么了吗？
E: Miss March, {NICKNAME}, what brings you two to the Underworld? And why the long face?

C: 那说明你对「战略投资部」这个部门还不太了解，{NICKNAME}。
E: That tells me you really don't understand the Strategic Investment Department, {NICKNAME}.

C: 好像有这个可能性…
E: It's not impossible...

C: 哎，多的话我也没力气说了。至少现在我和老伴儿还能尽力帮帮她，希望她有朝一日还能像个正常人一样生活吧……
E: *sigh* Talking about it tires me out. At least my husband and I are able to help her where we can. I just hope that one day she can lead a normal life again...

C: 有我的「互助会」帮她接手那些已经走投无路的患者，你家那位医生难道不该感谢我吗？
E: My mutual aid society has relieved that doctor of patients at the end of the road. Shouldn't she be thanking me?

C: 他…真的已经不在了？
E: Did he...really pass away?

C: <size=36>「灰背鲸」——以及它完全升级的遥控支援系统「龙骑兵」！</size>
E: <size=36>Grayback Whale, and its fully upgraded remote support system, the Dragon Rider!</size>

C: 但如果您还想和我们的拳手过过招，也请告诉我！掘掘博士立刻为您安排！
E: But if you still wanted to spar with our boxers, lemme know! I can arrange it for you immediately!

C: 算了，我看你根本没有悔改的意思，等你哪天在这里呆得头晕眼花，前途灰暗，你自然会再回来寻求「波少」的帮助。
E: Forget it. I don't think you are going to repent at all. One day, when you're sick of this place and your future is gloomy, you will come crawling back to seek help from me.

C: 难道{NICKNAME}觉得…还有其他的可能？不可能吧……
E: {NICKNAME}, do you think... there's another explanation for this? Surely not...

C: 听起来很合理！
E: Makes sense!

C: 你还有机会，但水魈必须回收。
E: You still have a chance, but the Xenohydro must be returned.

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么看待这件事？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you think of this?

C: 再见，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。希望你在商店街逛得开心。
E: Bye-bye {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Hope you have fun on the shopping street.

C: 哔嘟…查宝不是东西。本机为「家用寻物仪『理查德』•版本<unbreak>0.63</unbreak>•专家型•年度豪华版」，昵称「查宝」。
E: Beep... Findie is not a thing. I am Richard, the Home-Use Object Finder. Model information: Version <unbreak>0.63</unbreak>, Professional model, Annual Deluxe Edition. Nickname: "Findie."

C: 但也只是些已经废弃的试管、烧杯，还有其它容器。没有留下任何试剂样品，甚至没有用来记录实验结果的笔记……
E: Still, it's all just used test tubes, beakers, and other vessels. No sign of any sample reagents, or lab notes for that matter...

C: 他留下的药够你们所有人分吗？
E: Is there enough for all of you?

C: 是你啊，{NICKNAME}！还能在行政区碰见你真是太好了。最近怎么样？
E: Hey, it's you, {NICKNAME}! I didn't expect to see you here in the Administrative District. How have you been lately?

C: 那我们走吧，进去再聊。
E: Great! What are we waiting for?

C: 不过，如我之前所说…我们遇到了一些阻力，急需有心人士的支援。
E: ...but like I mentioned earlier, we're in a bit of a bind — we could really use a helping hand.

C: …还不知道，这也是让铁卫头疼的主要原因。
E: ...Not yet. That's why this case is such a conundrum for the Silvermane Guards.

C: 这就去了。
E: On my way!

C: 不过首先我得给你看一样东西，跟我来吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: First, I need to show you something. Here, {NICKNAME}, this way.

C: …状况？能详细说说吗？
E: ...Something strange? Can you share any details?

C: 我要接着去调查展品失窃案了，不知道其他人有没有在史瓦罗的地盘上找到什么决定性的线索……
E: In the meantime, I'll follow up on the exhibit theft case. I wonder if any new clues were found over in Svarog's domain...

C: 咳，不好意思，又犯了当讲解员的老毛病了…你见多识广，肯定见过很多比它更精密的设备。
E: ...Oh, sorry, I'm doing my tour guide thing again. I'm sure someone as well-traveled as yourself has seen much fancier equipment than this.

C: 如果她能调用更多的资源参与调查，案件应该很快就能有所进展。
E: If she can delegate more resources to the investigation, that should help it move forward faster.

C: …啊，对了。诺尔伯特少爷那边，如果我们从他嘴里撬出什么值得留意的信息，我也会及时通知你的。回见啦，{NICKNAME}！
E: ...Ah, by the way, I'll keep you informed if we pry anything noteworthy out of that Mr. Norbert guy. See you later, {NICKNAME}!

C: 一定要多加小心，{NICKNAME}。
E: We should proceed with caution, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我不想蹲大牢啊，一天都不想！
E: I don't want to go to prison! Not even for a day!

C: 那位「寒腿叔叔」除了给他介绍买家之外，还会给他出谋划策，而且最后只收他三成的顾问费用…在咱们的大少爷看来，这笔生意可太划算了。
E: Mr. Cold Feet not only introduced him to buyers, but also gave him advice, and only charged him a <unbreak>30%</unbreak> consultant's fee... In the opinion of our young Mr. Norbert, the deal was too good to refuse.

C: 养父他是贝洛伯格首屈一指的外科专家，把自己的一生都奉献给了仁爱医院；而养母她更擅长理论研究，因此留在了医学院带领项目组进行学术攻坚。
E: My adoptive father was the leading surgeon in all of Belobog — he devoted his life to Charice Hospital. Mom was better at theoretical research. She stayed at the medical school leading the project team in their academic research.

C: 娜塔莎小姐——您希望成为志愿导览员的原因是什么呢？
E: Miss Natasha: What is your reason for wanting to be a volunteer guide?

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}！哎呀，今天还带着一位这么可爱的小朋友呢。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}! I see you've got the company of a lovely kid today.

C: 那我给她发个短信确认下。
E: I'll send her a message to ask about it.

C: 干脆精简一下吧：「除了赚钱都很擅长」——怎么样？
E: Let's shorten it: "I'm good at everything other than making money." What do you think?

C: 另外，刚才的面试里欺负你欺负得有点过头了，非常抱歉。
E: By the way, I must apologize for being such a bully just now.

C: 哼哼，那倒不是。这套招募流程是馆长的要求，我只是照办而已——但无论如何，你身为摇滚明星，愿你能够点燃大家前来博物馆参观的热情。
E: Um... You're overthinking this. The hiring process is requested by the curator, and I'm merely doing my job... But anyway, I hope you, as a rock star, can ignite everyone's passion to visit the museum.

C: 这是事实嘛。我还是有自知之明的——小时候娜塔按着我脑袋让我读书，那简直跟要了我的命一样。
E: Well, the truth is, I'm simply not cut out for this line of work. Nat used to press my head down, forcing me to read when I was little. It was so suffocating.

C: 喂，接下来我该做什么，布洛妮娅？快点安排任务吧。
E: Hey Bronya, what should I do next? Hurry up and assign some jobs to me.

C: 这一天天的，都叫什么事儿啊……
E: What kind of days are we living through...

C: 矿区里发生了什么？
E: What happened in the mine?

C: 那当然，下层区哪个人不知道矿车的构造？让我检查一下……
E: Yeah, of course, every Underworlder worth their salt knows how to fix a mine cart. Let me see...

C: 会变装魔法的小朋友…
E: The young little master of disguise...

C: …然后你会一直问我。
E: ...But you'll just keep pestering me.

C: 哥们儿，你当真？这玩意可不多见啊，你真愿意这个价格卖我？
E: My friend, are you serious? This device is quite rare. Are you really willing to sell it to me at such a low price?

C: 我桑博虽说惜财如命，但这点判断力可还是有的——这里面不会有诈吧？
E: I mean, I love a sweet deal as much as anyone, but I still have common sense — there has to be a catch, right?

C: 但归根到底，探测器也就是一件工具而已。真正的宝贝…对于拥有它的人来说，一定有着不可替代的意义。
E: But at the end of the day, the detector is just a tool. A true treasure must have irreplaceable importance to someone.

C: 这么独一无二的颜色，还要验？
E: With a color that unique, do you even need to double check?

C: 裂界怪物冲着这边来了…怎么办，杰帕德？
E: There's a monster heading this way... What should we do, Gepard?

C: 我兄弟也、也追出去了，可现在都没、没回来……
E: My brother went after her, but they haven't come back...

C: 话说回来，我看你们来自那个方向——你们有见过两个人吗？是姐弟俩，一大一小……
E: Speaking of which, you came from that direction, right? Did you see two little kids? A girl and her brother...?

C: 啊？！坏了，我就知道……
E: What!? Quick! I knew I shouldn't have—
██Gepard█ █Serval█ Landau ██ ███ █...

C: 我上次遇见她的时候，她似乎正准备去雪原跟某人见面，还问我要了一套炉具……
E: The last time I saw her, she was preparing to meet someone on the Snow Plains. She even asked for a stove set from me...

C: 但这次情况特殊，我们确实放心不下她随便和陌生人见面——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
E: But this is different. We're worried about her running into strangers... She might get herself into trouble.

C: 支架、横杆、缆绳…都没问题……
E: Main poles, check. Brow poles, check. Ropes, check...

C: 别被外表骗了。历年在裂界里失踪的银鬃铁卫，有两成就是因为不听指挥、擅自追逐这种裂界生物才没能归队的。
E: Don't be fooled by its appearance. About <unbreak>20%</unbreak> of our Silvermane Guard Fragmentum losses are a result of chasing this creature.

C: 我很开心。一点都不麻烦。
E: I had a great time — it's been a lot of fun.

C: 佩拉，这个人是谁？
E: Pela? Who is this?

C: 好吧好吧…确实是一次开心的经历。多亏了玲宝…还有你，{NICKNAME}。
E: *sigh* It was a great experience... thanks to you Lynxy... not to mention you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我…你太夸张了，姐姐。
E: I... Sis, you're exaggerating.

C: ——那一年，佩拉出生了。
E: ...Pela was born.

C: 不，我只是…觉得有点熟悉，没事。
E: No, it's just... this place seems familiar somehow. Never mind.

C: 但无论如何，偷东西肯定是不对的，必须让帕斯卡明白这点。
E: Stealing is always wrong, and Pascal needs to learn that.

C: 事件的原貌居然是这样……
E: So that's what happened...

C: 我的最高纪录可是六天不合眼，你还得加把劲啊。
E: You're gonna have to step it up, y'know. My record is six days no shut-eye.

C: 呜哇！这、这你也能蒙对？难道你背着我们去参加什么音乐节了吗？
E: Whoa! Was that a lucky guess? *gasp* Did you go to a music festival without us?

C: 呜哇！这、这你也能蒙对？难道你背着我们去参加什么音乐节了吗？
E: Whoa! Was that a lucky guess? *gasp* Did you go to a music festival without us?

C: …原来这就是认证标记吗？
E: ...So this is the certification mark?

C: 这下，聚落里的能源问题应该暂时解决了吧？
E: So, the settlement's energy supply problem is solved for the time being?

C: 「变量」就是…我们的到来！十几年来首次有外人进入地下……
E: The variable is... our arrival! No outsider's set foot in the underground for over a decade...

C: 在等待的时间里，大家会生病，会失去家园，还会不断地发生争斗…就像之前在矿区里那样。
E: And all the while, people would be getting sick, losing their homes, and fighting... just like in the mine.

C: 喂，他好像愿意跟我们沟通了欸！快，{NICKNAME}，该你的三寸不烂之舌出场啦！
E: Hey, sounds like he's willing to communicate! Quick, {NICKNAME}, time to smooth-talk him!

C: 生存还是毁灭？这是一个问题！
E: To be, or not to be, that is the question!

C: 请、请等一下！
E: Wait! Wait!

C: 克…拉拉……
E: Cla...ra...

C: 我们，还有他们的战斗…都才刚开始而已。
E: Our battle... their battle... it's just beginning.

C: <unbreak>13175</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。接下来播放：资料编号<unbreak>24830</unbreak>。
E: Cache number <unbreak>13175</unbreak>, transmission complete. Next transmission: Cache number <unbreak>24830</unbreak>.

C: 你居然是「地火」的首领。
E: So you're the leader of Wildfire.

C: 史瓦罗先生，你还好吗？我先帮你修补一下语言模块吧……
E: Mr. Svarog, are you okay? Let me repair your language module first...

C: 史瓦罗先生，我能不能删掉一部分……
E: Mr. Svarog, can I delete some of them...?

C: 去把老爹的探针找回来吧。
E: We should go get your dad's probe back.

C: 来，请在这份商品委托合同上签上名字——
E: Please sign this commodity contract here...

C: 哼，「菌菌」肯定值大价钱没错！
E: Hmph, Junjun will break your bank for sure.

C: 比如，有一只叫「菌菌」的大熊玩偶就很不错！歌蒂阿姨的侄女一定会喜欢的！
E: For example, there's this teddy bear called Junjun! Your niece will love him!

C: 我的合同是被一台机器人给偷走的。那家伙躲到机械墓场那边去了，我有点害怕，不敢追上去。
E: A robot stole my contract. Now it's lurking somewhere in the machine graveyard, and I'm too terrified to go after it.

C: 啊？它不是被机器人偷走了吗？怎么会在你手上……
E: Huh? But that robot stole it! How did you...?

C: 嘿！可算找着你了，别跑啊！这孩子怎么不听话呢…我都说了多少遍了，叫你跟紧我，别走丢了。
E: Oh! Finally. Don't run off again! You're such a disobedient... How many times have I told you to stay close to me? You'll get lost!

C: 我跟他也没那么熟，要不你们直接去镇上找他吧？
E: I don't know him all that well. Why don't you just head into town and look for him?

C: 七百！
E: <unbreak>700</unbreak>!

C: 计算结果…更新。任务编号<unbreak>0001</unbreak>，「存护下层区」——完成。任务关闭。
E: Calculation result... update. Mission number <unbreak>0001</unbreak> — Preserve the Underworld — complete.

C: 别激动，慢慢说。
E: Relax, explain it slowly.

C: 欸？！声音太大啦…如果犯人就在这里的话，肯定会被吓跑的！
E: Hey! You're being too loud... If the culprit is nearby, he'll just run away!

C: 嗯，看来{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}和我想的一样……
E: Hmm, it appears we're thinking the same thing...

C: …欸？原来{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也这么觉得吗？
E: That's not the word I'd use.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！等把这个小家伙修好了，克拉拉会用短信联系你的。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! I'll text you when this little fella is fixed.

C: 可以再给我些时间吗，史瓦罗先生？克拉拉想和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再继续调查一段时间…如果实在没有进展，再把帕斯卡纳入网络也不晚。
E: Mr. Svarog, could you give me a little more time? I want to investigate this further. If we don't find anything, you can integrate Pascal into the network.

C: 这里…还是老样子呢。到处都是失去自主功能的机器人……
E: It's the same old place. Everywhere you look, there are robots that have lost the ability to function...

C: 啊，光顾着聊天，都快忘记时间了。
E: Ah, I was talking so much that I totally lost track of time.

C: █回来█等待██。继续█修█等待██失？败█等██！待██——
E: █Return█waiting██. continue█repair█waiting██failure█wait██—ing██!

C: 还是不行吗…咦？帕斯卡，你怎么……
E: Still not functioning properly? What's wrong, Pascal?

C: 克拉拉建议将选择权托付给外来者。我尊重她的选择。
E: Clara proposed that you should choose, outsider. I respect her wish.

C: 已经，抵达，目标！等待，进一步，指令！
E: Already, arrive, target! Waiting, further, instructions!

C: （抱紧帕斯卡）
E: (Holds Pascal tightly)

C: 不，不对——我又仔细想了一下，这可能是故意的安排。
E: I... huh. Y'know, the more I think about it, the more it seems deliberate.

C: 希、希露瓦，好久不见…你还是那么…咳，你气色不错。
E: S—Serval, it's been a long time... you're still so... Ahem. You look good.

C: 希露瓦…你还是跟从前一样，不擅长说谎啊。
E: *sigh* You haven't changed Serval... You're still a lousy liar.

C: 容我确认一下，希露瓦。如果我们和令弟无法达成一致——你会站在我们这边吗？
E: We need to be sure, Serval. If we can't reach a common understanding with your brother... will you stand with us?

C: 想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。不过换个角度想想…对咱们来说，那里更像彰显实力的舞台吧？
E: As I mentioned, if we want to progress further north, we're gonna have to cross that "hell." Still, look at it this way: Just another arena to showcase our skills, right?

C: 该去结束这一切了。
E: It's time to finish this.

C: 数量再多也只是杂碎而已——别退后！
E: The more the merrier, these guys are nothing! Hold the line!

C: 这么说未免太过分了……
E: That's a bit harsh...

C: 虽然我很想追究你擅闯军事禁区这件事——但看在希露瓦对你能力和品行高度评价的份上，我想拜托你协助我处理这起事故…就当是将功补过吧。
E: Even though I really want to hold you responsible for your trespassing into the military zone, I will however let it slide this time, since Serval vouched for your ability and character. I would also like to ask you to help me deal with the incident, which is a chance for you to make up for your mistakes.

C: 也许解开了这个谜…不，不能期望太多。斯捷潘先生说过，要抛弃不切实际的奢望…一切必须由我们自己争取。
E: Maybe by solving this puzzle... no, I can't get my hopes up. Mr. Stefan said to forget about any unrealistic expectations... Everything must be fought and won by ourselves.

C: 奇怪的女人？确定不是后勤队或者科研部的成员吗？
E: A strange woman? Are you sure it wasn't someone from the logistics team or Scientific Research Division?

C: （尝试复述方才听见的低语）
E: (Try to repeat the whispers you heard)

C: 就算有也荒废很久了。或许这儿藏着什么有价值的信息…可惜我们没时间四处翻腾。
E: If there were, they left a long time ago. There might be valuable information here... shame we don't have time to look for it.

C: 好耶！这下，这个世界的危机就算是解除了吧？
E: Nice! The crisis on this world is basically over, right?

C: 用一个谎言去遮蔽另一个——但如果这样做，我……
E: ...Use a lie to conceal a lie. But if I do that, then...

C: 那么，按照我们之前的约定…着手重建上下层之间的桥梁吧。
E: Well then, as promised, let's start rebuilding the bridge between the Overworld and the Underworld.

C: 这历史性的一幕，还想请你们两个共同见证。
E: ...I'm glad you guys are here to witness it.

C: 太可惜了。
E: Shame.

C: 你…真实存在吗…？
E: You... are you real?

C: 我…没有恶意……
E: I... don't mean... trouble...

C: 噗…这下我完全明白了。
E: Pfft... I totally get it now.

C: 嘿嘿，放心吧。钱能解决的事都不算事。
E: Hehe. Don't mention it. Any problem that can be solved with money is no real problem at all.

C: 星槎都有些什么型号？
E: What models are there?

C: 交给我吧，我在这附近找找。
E: I'll handle it. I'll look nearby.

C: 没想到夕葵姐姐性格如此恶劣…
E: Didn't think you'd be so witty...

C: 就是这艘了，我来查查它的记录。
E: Alright, let me check this starskiff's record.

C: 那她是在担心什么呢？
E: So what is she worried about?

C: 放心，咱们先从简单的跑腿开始。
E: Don't worry. We'll start with running an errand, the most simple task of all.

C: （向他们借阅医典）
E: (Ask to borrow the textbook from them)

C: 博识学会的借阅申请啊？我好像听过类似的事。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild's application to borrow textbooks? I think I've heard about this.

C: 谜题的答案总会指向另一个谜。
E: The answer of one question will always lead to another.

C: 能不能拜托你，找个丹士挖出线索来？不管是用钱收买，或是…用什么更有说服力的方法，找出答案来。
E: Can I please ask you to find an alchemist and get some clues out of them? Please find some answers either through greasing some palms or... more persuasive means.

C: 我和佩拉回来了。
E: Pela and I are back.

C: 「具体时间不太确定，我在长乐天若木亭附近走失一台俗称『阴晴伞』的机巧，……」
E: "I don't know exactly when, but I've lost an ingenium called Baroumbrella somewhere near the Synwood Pavilion in the Exalting Sanctum..."

C: 你真的见过这样的蘑菇？
E: Have you really seen this kind of mushroom before?

C: …我确实张贴了很多寻物启事，但是你说的具体是哪一张呢？
E: ...I have indeed put up many Lost and Found notices. Which one specifically are you talking about?

C: 目前没有线索，但我可以帮你。
E: No clues at the moment — but I can help you out.

C: 行，我帮你找找「离别情景」。
E: Alright, I'll help you snap a pic of a "parting scene."

C: 我刚才在拍风景，没有拍你。
E: I was taking pictures of the scenery, not you.

C: 那是他蜕生出世时就握在手心的同心锁。但那种东西，对我已经没有意义了。
E: That was the lock he held in his hand when he underwent hatching rebirth. Yet, that lock means nothing to me now.

C: 你不是才被拒绝了吗？
E: Didn't you just get rejected?

C: 明白了，我去看看小聪吧。
E: I get your point. Let me check on Cong.

C: 你是谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: 你这位朋友是什么人啊，不会是地衡司的条子吧？
E: Who's your friend? Not a Realm-Keeping Commission spy, is {F#she}{M#he}?

C: 你要我告诉他们「狐仙黛青」是假的，其实我是躲在集装箱里的大汉吗？
E: You want me to tell them that the Foxian Beauty Daiqing is fake, and that I'm actually just a dude who hides in a container?

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: …你先把你的反诈骗意识关闭咯。
E: You'll need to turn off your anti-scam vigilance.

C: 你的表情可不是这么说的。
E: That's not what I gather from your face.

C: 没问题，没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 我想写一份综述性的报告，讨论鳞渊境的变化，还有龙尊传承制度的得失。当然，这些需要最新的资料。一如既往地……
E: I'd like to compose a report discussing the changes in Scalegorge Waterscape and the pros and cons of the high elder succession system. For this, I need the latest information. As usual...

C: 鳞渊境，鳞渊境…贝尼尼老师到底看到了什么样的奇景呢？
E: Scalegorge Waterscape... What kind of spectacle did Bernini see?

C: 老夫已经在地图上标出了几个地方，这些可能是我的老师贝尼尼考察过的地方。
E: I've marked out several points on the map. They are the places where Bernini may have investigated.

C: 对了，拿好这个，这是我对这些图样的解读。虽然篇幅不多，但老夫觉得这东西可以扩展成一份不错的仙舟历史报告。
E: By the way, please take this. You can find my interpretation on the drawings inside. Although it isn't much, it's got potential to be made into a good Xianzhou history report.

C: 咳，抱歉，我刚刚太专注于解读了。人上了年纪，反应都会变得迟钝起来。
E: *coughs* Sorry about that. I was too concentrated on the interpretation. When you start aging, your reactions start to become slow.

C: 好了吗，还要去下一处呢…
E: Are you done? We need to head to the next spot...

C: 老人凑近珍珠般的持明卵，仔细观瞧其上的流光与鳞纹，浑然不知时间流逝。
E: The old man approaches the pearl-like Vidyadhara egg to examine the glimmer and scales on its surface. He is so captivated that he has lost track of time.

C: 在仙舟，这就是犯罪。
E: That's a crime on the Xianzhou.

C: 何况翘家出逃算什么罪过，她的身份地位摆在那，我们还能把她关进牢里不成？这事儿只好拜托给你啦。
E: Besides, it isn't a crime for her to run away from her residence. And even if it were, given her status, we couldn't exactly stick her in jail and throw away the key! You're the only person we can turn to.

C: 听医生的安排！
E: Doctor's orders!

C: 他说：「我想去看一眼翁瓦克的树海。为了完成想做的事情，我必须不停去画那看不见的未来。我一定要治好自己，就算锒铛入狱、被驱逐出境。」
E: He said, "I want to see the vast forests of Vonwacq one day... and to make a dream a reality, you must paint an invisible future. I must get well by any means, even if it means jail or exile."

C: 「药王秘传」为何对汝等紧追不放？
E: Why are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus pursuing you?

C: 我们是丹鼎司的救护小队。
E: We're an Alchemy Commission rescue squad.

C: 哪儿有让你说书的时间啊……
E: We don't have time for storytelling...

C: 我听说过龙女大人总是喜欢偷偷跑出丹鼎司，没想到有幸见到本尊。
E: I heard the Dragon Lady liked to sneak away from the commission, but I never thought I'd have the honor of seeing her in person.

C: 长生是最重要的事情？
E: Is being immortal the most important thing for you?

C: 立刻离开这个是非之地。
E: Leave this troubled place immediately.

C: 见个面而已，有这么复杂吗？
E: It's just a quick meeting. What's the big deal?

C: 龙师被弹压已久，难免会做些小动作。
E: The Preceptors have been suppressed for some time now — they will inevitably try to overturn the situation.

C: 丹恒大人，您来了。您是否做出决定了？
E: Master Dan Heng, you're back. Have you made your decision?

C: 「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
E: "Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."

C: 这是什么？
E: What is this?

C: 你造出的那头孽龙不正是「化龙妙法」成功的证明吗？
E: Isn't that draconic abomination you created proof of the Transmutation Arcanum's success?

C: 丹恒，你不用听他说完的。
E: Dan Heng, you don't have to listen to him.

C: 为了避免居民被怪物攻击，我们会提前疏散丹鼎司附近的居民。这样的话，扑满也能放下戒心前来进食。怎么样，这个想法是不是很大胆？
E: We'll evacuate the residents living near the Alchemy Commission in advance to protect them from the monster's attacks. This way, the Trotter will let down its guard and take the bait. How does this sound? Isn't it a bold plan?

C: 来了来了，别喊。
E: Coming, coming, stop yelling.

C: 还有那谁，你叫啥来着…给几位贵客看茶。
E: And you, whatshisname... Get our guests some tea.

C: 我是地衡司的执事，以官方身份下场帮民间人士调查别人，是不是不合规矩。
E: Isn't it inappropriate for an officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission to assist the public in investigating someone?

C: 三月姑娘真是好品味啊。《渔公案》是仙舟上很经典的一套侦探小说…我小时候看完这本书，就立志要在司部当差了……
E: You have good taste, Miss March. The Angler Mystery is a classic detective novel on the Xianzhou... I read it when I was young and dreamed about working in the Commission ever since.

C: 为什么一个茶话会这么凶狠…
E: Why would a "tea society" be so vicious...?

C: 当然没有！我们三言两句就把他吓跑了。
E: Of course not! We scared him off.

C: （我们先往那个方向走吧。从地图上来看，那里似乎很适合坏蛋做坏事。）
E: (Let's try that direction first. On paper, that area looks the perfect place for bad guys to do bad things.)

C: （为了增加一些紧迫感……）
E: (Y'know, just a little dramatic effect...)

C: （都有坏蛋要在这里和星核的买家接头了……）
E: (Is it really so far-fetched? We're already assuming that Luocha came here to sell the Stellaron to a bunch of cut-throats — may as well throw in some monsters here and there...)

C: 到底哪里说得通了？！
E: Make sense how!?

C: （这个罗刹的人设也太多变了……）
E: (Luocha's personality changes by the minute...)

C: 你信用点太多可以选择请客。
E: If you ever feel like you have too many credits, you could always take us out for dinner.... Just a thought.

C: （这哪里无关紧要了？这可是至关重要的推理呀。）
E: (How is this minor? It's an important link in my deduction!)

C: （就这样，罗刹跳上了星槎，在不明人士的帮助下逃离了现场。而这，这就是本次「罗刹消失事件」的全貌。）
E: (So Luocha hopped on a starskiff and fled with the help of his accomplice... And that, ladies and gents, is the truth behind Luocha's disappearance.)

C: 好耶！
E: Yay!

C: （嗯，从地图上来看，应该只有这里最为隐蔽。）
E: (Plausible — looking at the map, this place is well-hidden.)

C: 这样吧，接下来请二位来司辰宫稍坐，我们饮茶小叙一番…一是奉上香茗当做答谢，二是与两位英雄交个朋友。
E: In fact, by way of thanks, I'd like to invite you to the Palace of Astrum for tea. It is about time we knew each other better.

C: 和你们一同战斗时，我才明白，原来这世上真有能让我感到恐惧的事…抱歉，谈这些糟心事打扰了客人的雅兴。
E: But when I fought alongside you, I realized there are still things that can terrify me... Sorry. Talking about such vexing matters is unbecoming in front of guests.

C: 现代艺术？
E: Modern art?

C: 如果是司舵本人不愿提及的事情，天舶司的人们即使知情，恐怕也不愿轻易说出口吧。我倒是觉得，可以先去问问景元将军。
E: If the helm master herself is reluctant to talk about it, then the Sky-Faring Commission staff would be even less likely — even if they know the truth. I think we should try General Jing Yuan first.

C: 驭空的事？我听说了，天舶司中有位文员开星槎抢险，结果自己遇到了危险，幸有两位异邦人仗义搭救，才保全了性命。我要代表罗浮感谢你们。
E: Yukong? I heard an office worker from the Sky-Faring Commission flew a starskiff to assist in the present crisis, but ran into trouble herself. She was only saved thanks to a couple of travelers... On behalf of the Luofu, you have my thanks, once again.

C: 是啊，是很幼稚。
E: Yeah, I agree.

C: 岩明先生，您说的我都明白。但是事到如今，比起自己能否成为斗舰飞行士，我更想知道妈妈经历了什么……
E: I understand, Mr. Yanming... but now, compared to becoming a fighter pilot, I'm more interested in knowing what my Mom went through...

C: 里面有个展阅诶，搞不好是我们要找的东西。啊！这是…阵亡将士的档案…妈妈将他们每个人的信息，放在自己手边。
E: There's some exhibition material, not sure if it's relevant... Ah! This is... the fallen heroes archive... Mom stored them right next to her..

C: …明白了。那我们陪你去找驭空司舵吧……
E: ...I see. Let's find Helm Master Yukong — we'll accompany you...

C: 妈妈……
E: Mom...

C: 妈妈…不必道歉，真的不必道歉……
E: Mom... you don't need to apologize. Really, you don't need to...

C: 但直觉告诉我，她不会做伤害你的事情。如果她真的遇到了麻烦，还是去见见她比较好。
E: ...but my intuition tells me she won't do anything to harm you. If she's really in trouble, it'd be best to go see her.

C: 艾利欧说，你会帮助我。不知道那是他在多少种可能性中窥见的真实……
E: Elio said that you would help me. I wonder how many possibilities he saw before he got a glimpse of that reality...

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 我以前是什么人？
E: Who am I?

C: （是否要大胆尝试一下全新的问题呢？）
E: (Should I venture into a whole new topic?)

C: 胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: They're talking nonsense. Everyone, take them down!

C: 然而有人替我们开门…
E: Yet someone opened the gate for us...

C: 若是没个合理的解释，一旁这几位云骑大哥怕是不得不押各位一程啦。
E: If you can't offer an explanation, I'm afraid these Cloud Knights will have to escort you out.

C: 我不出手，你就要受伤了呀。
E: Forgive me miss, but you were too busy being hit yourself. It's a good thing I joined the fray.

C: 恩公不必担忧。身为接渡使，星槎操舵可是咱们这行的必备技能。
E: Don't fret. All Amicassadors know their way around a starskiff.

C: 帕姆一直在这儿打扫，没看见有什么信呀！
E: Pom-Pom's been cleaning up this whole time and didn't see any letters!

C: 真是见鬼了…
E: This is creepy...

C: 朋友…景元？
E: Friends... Jing Yuan...?

C: 此处毫无变化，一如数百年前。
E: Everything looks the same... just as it was hundreds of years ago.

C: 我有事求见将军。
E: I need to speak to the general about something.

C: 哦，您记不得她了？这样啊…持明转世，前生的一切果真烟消云散了。
E: ...You don't remember her? I see, I suppose the memories of your previous life really were wiped clean after the rebirth.

C: 我施展这些动作，就像…
E: When I move... it's like...

C: 没有酒，只有苦涩，这样的聚会真是令人一言难尽啊。
E: A wineless gathering, accompanied by only sadness and bitterness. What a depressing reunion.

C: 这场聚会结束后，我会重新返回列车，继续我的旅行。
E: Once this gathering ends, I will return to the Express to continue my journey.

C: 我…还没想明白。
E: I... haven't thought it through yet.

C: 你手执「应星」为你打造的剑器…一遍一遍挑刺、切割、洞穿，一遍又一遍……
E: You used the sword Yingxing crafted... and pierced, sliced, and impaled me time and time again...

C: 「饮月君」的所作所为亏欠了许多人。你打算为他们讨回公道？
E: Imbibitor Lunae's actions affected many... Are you here to set things straight?

C: 「人有五名，代价有三。」
E: Of five people, three must pay a price.

C: 为什么她这样的人却要被埋葬，被烧成灰烬，被人遗忘…为什么？！
E: Why does someone like her have to be buried, burned to ash, and eventually forgotten...? Why!?

C: 无妨。她是我的授艺恩师，我在云骑军时，她是我的上司。不过，她已离开仙舟许久了……
E: ...No harm done. She was my mentor and my superior when I was a member of the Cloud Knights. However, she left the Xianzhou a long time ago...

C: 还在通航的星槎…有了！
E: Active starskiff, active starskiff... there!

C: 这伤痕，不是云骑军留下的。
E: This kind of wound... is not the work of a Cloud Knight.

C: 就从这儿开始好了。
E: May the best swordmaster win.

C: 我们岂敢拿这等事情劳烦你。抑制魔阴之事，将军自有计较。
E: We wouldn't have the audacity to trouble you with that — the general has a plan to suppress the illness.

C: 怎么样？跟我一起去个更适合讨论这些事的地方吧？
E: What do you say? How about we find a more suitable spot to talk about all this?

C: 你怎么穿着军装就来了…
E: Why did you come here in your uniform...?

C: 井圆是谁…
E: Jim Yan? Never heard of him...

C: 那你现在想怎样？
E: What's your next plan?

C: 我寻思我也没说会暴露的话啊…
E: I don't think I said anything that revealed my identity...

C: 确然。
E: Indeed.

C: 我公输梁又岂是贪生怕死之辈，工造司的安危如今全指着我一人啦。
E: I fear not death, for the fate of the Artisanship Commission now rests entirely on my shoulders.

C: 小意思，我每天起床办公前都会一口气就日常问题卜个十几卦，结果往往灵验无差。
E: Of course — I run a dozen hexagrams before I even get around to breakfast. The results are never far wrong.

C: 别说话，集中注意力，冷静应对！你是这段经历的主人，它们斗不过你的。
E: Enough talk — focus and stay calm! You're the master of this experience — you cannot be beaten.

C: 丹恒，我们一起把这块冰打开…里面的人说不定还有救。
E: Dan Heng, let's crack open this ice block. Perhaps we can still save the girl inside.

C: 别太担心，本座在穷观阵外有能力与你随时沟通，可以有限度地干涉回溯进程。
E: Don't worry. I can communicate with you from outside the Matrix and manipulate the recollection process to a certain extent.

C: 无法反驳……
E: I'm not denying it...

C: 我…我没有不相信你的意思…只是……
E: I—It's not that I don't trust you... It's just...

C: 这…菜单从上到下？
E: The... entire menu?

C: 多…咳，其实也不太多。
E: Yeah... Ahem, I mean, not too much, actually.

C: 这是什么生物识别技术？
E: Is it some sort of biometric technology?

C: 为什么不留下宝剑？
E: Why don't you keep the sword for yourselves?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 持有魔剑的人虽然能在剑技上一蹴而就，如同饱经苦练的高手一般，但这一切都有代价。
E: While a cursed sword grants instant abilities to its wielder, it comes at a cost.

C: 内鞘中铺设华贵的织物里衬，中心的凹槽恰好能放入一柄单手剑。
E: Inside the case, a luxurious fabric lining snugly cradles a recess designed to hold a single-handed sword, marrying opulence with precision.

C: 你为我已做了很多。现在该是我独自面对她的时候了。
E: You've done so much for me already. It's time for me to face her alone.

C: 唉，老朽这个孙女，性格向来执拗。云璃，你真的确定要这么做吗？
E: Well, my granddaughter has always been stubborn. Are you really sure about this, Yunli?

C: 这个世界将只剩下唯一的怪物……
E: Soon, this world will only be left with one final monster...

C: 话不能这么说啊，就算结果构不成伤亡，这犯罪意图…也够明显了吧？你们特地过来封锁现场，不就是因为这案子性质恶劣？
E: Not necessarily. Even if the result does not constitute harm, the criminal intent is... clear enough? You specifically came here to cordon off the scene because of the unsavory nature of this case, right?

C: …桑博…是谁…？
E: ...Sampo... Who is... Sampo?

C: 不必了，我都记住了。
E: That won't be necessary. I've memorized every detail.

C: 最后，根据监控录像，目击者证词，还有各种乱七八糟的证据，凶手一定在这三个人里——而且他们绝对不是共犯。
E: Based on surveillance footage, witness testimony, and various pieces of evidence, the killer is ultimately among these three — and they were not working in cahoots.

C: 花…花火小姐？你在和谁说话呢？
E: Miss... Miss Sparkle? Who are you talking to?

C: 至于第二个结论就更显而易见了。众人闯入现场时，助手为什么要冲上去止血？这样的专业人士，怎会不惜破坏现场也要抢救一个明显死去多时的人？
E: As for my second conclusion, it's even more obvious still. When everyone broke into the scene of the crime, why did the assistant rush off to staunch the blood? A trained professional was somehow happily destroying a crime scene just to save someone who's obviously been dead a while?

C: 另一个谜底？
E: Another answer?

C: 请问您还有什么问题吗？
E: Have you got any more questions?

C: 「佐罗」是个富商，和花火大人龙争虎斗数十载，可真是势同水火啊！
E: Lefton is a wealthy merchant who has been competing with Miss Sparkle for decades — they're always at each other's throats!

C: 花火小姐着实是位有趣的人。她的内心看似混乱，却又很容易理解，像一位舞台上的伶人，又像个渴望被注视的孩子。
E: Truly, Miss Sparkle is a fascinating person. She seems chaotic inside, but easy enough to understand — like a performer on the stage, or a child hungering for attention.

C: 列车团的各位，久见了。
E: It's been a while, my astral guests.

C: 你…就为了这个？为了这种事情？
E: T—That's it? Is that what you want?

C: 这是青雀带咱们看过的那半截枯木吧，怎么突然长起来了？
E: Wasn't this the dead tree Qingque showed us earlier? How did it grow all of a sudden?

C: 我还要提醒将军！「建木」所在是秘中之秘，让化外民接触——
E: Do I need to remind you, general, that the Ambrosial Arbor's access point is a closely guarded secret? Allowing outworlders would be—

C: 我可不敢命令贵客，只是同各位说好了我会开诚布公的。
E: This is no order, honored guests. I am merely stating what needs to be done, should you wish to help us.

C: 为何还逗留不去？若是担心前路吉凶，本座已为你们算过啦，卦象是上上大吉。
E: What's the delay? If you're worried about the road ahead, I've already told you — the hexagram indicates an auspicious result.

C: 杨叔那是有感而发，你说这个就叫矫情啦。
E: I think they call that "complaining from the heart."

C: 快点离开这儿吧。
E: You should leave.

C: 老夫「镕金铄铁第一巧手」公输梁的名气这么响亮了？
E: Does the reputation of Gongshu Liang, "the smelter extraordinaire," precede one?

C: 他们称自己「登仙」。可惜，仙舟上到底没有什么仙人。建木一枯萎，丹士们也没了倚仗，沦落成了只能研究岐黄之术的医师。
E: They called themselves "Saints." Unfortunately, they didn't possess any saintly powers. As soon as the Ambrosial Arbor withered, the alchemists lost their status and were reduced to medical researchers and practitioners.

C: 师傅，这东西真的能保护工造司吗？这一路都闹成这样了，怎么也没见他发挥作用？
E: Master, are these creations truly able to protect the Artisanship Commission? There's already been so much destruction — why haven't we seen any in action?

C: 老大是不想跟你一般见识，绝不是怕他爹打他屁股！给老子记住了！
E: Yeah, the boss doesn't wanna stoop to your level. Now buzz off, before he yells at you and makes you cry!

C: 你从口袋深处摸出两包即将过期的零食，交给了「罗浮三少」。
E: You produce two packs of snacks close to their best-by date and give them to the Luofu Trio.

C: 我都看到了，这家伙突然用内力暗算老大，你太卑鄙了！
E: They used some kind of hidden power — I saw it! You're a cheater!

C: 在黑暗中独行，恐惧着突如其来的障碍，不能理解别人描述的所见所闻…
E: Walking alone in the darkness, fearing every incoming, invisible obstacle, unable to understand other people's descriptions...

C: 为什么孽物不会「天缺」？
E: Why wouldn't abominations be Incomplete?

C: 我刚才怎么了？
E: What happened to me?

C: 不必客气，帮助人们解决问题是我的本职工作。
E: Don't mention it. It's my job to help people with their problems.

C: （准备应战）
E: (Get ready to battle.)

C: 现在是「三大善人」！我们一致认为，应当让你替咱们解决眼下的难题。
E: It's Three Benevolent Ones now! Well, we've agreed that we should let you solve the problem at hand for us.

C: 这下可好，冬妮娅他们都摊上了麻烦事儿。
E: Tonya and the rest are in trouble.

C: 确实很令人在意…
E: This is really concerning...

C: 那咱们快找找他们吧。
E: Let's hurry up and find them.

C: 消消气，消消气！大家不都是丰饶之道的践行者嘛，以和为贵……
E: Take it easy! Aren't all of you the practitioners of the way of Abundance? Peace and harmony are priceless...

C: 滚边去！等老娘养好了伤…老娘要先找那两个白痴算账，接着是你们，你们俩谁都跑不掉！
E: Get lost! When I get well, the first thing I'm going to do is settle the score with those two idiots. Then, I'll deal with you two. Don't think that you're going get away with this!

C: 不过对于那些一直以来被他们放生行为困扰的人来说，这点惩罚也许只能算是小意思。
E: For those who have been troubled by the actions of the Unshackled all this time, this punishment is nothing.

C: 十王司…是什么？
E: What's... the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 停停停，停下。
E: Wait, wait, wait — stop.

C: 真的吗？我不信。岁阳？那是什么？我明白啦，在仙舟上，岁阳就是幽灵的别称，对吧？一定是这么回事。
E: ...I... Really? I don't believe it. "Heliobi"? What's that? Ohh, I get it — "heliobi" is just another word for "ghost" on the Xianzhou, right? That's gotta be it.

C: 寒鸦身为因果殿录事者，虽然谈不上无所不知，但会尽量满足你们的好奇心，问吧。
E: As a clerk at the Hall of Karma, my knowledge on these matters is somewhat limited, but I will try my best to satisfy your curiosity. Please proceed.

C: …我从没往这个角度想过。崇拜你，家人。
E: ...Mm, I never thought about it like that. Nice take!

C: （我这是在哪儿？绥园里？似乎又有些不一样？）
E: (Is this... Fyxestroll Garden? But it looks different somehow...)

C: 不过是一口塞不满牙缝的小点心，说吃掉也显得太用力过猛了吧？
E: Bah, I did no such thing — you're barely big enough to be an appetizer.

C: 听懂了吗，怂包？打醒精神，眼前这队十王司的人马里，没一个能强过你！
E: You hear that, scaredy-cat? You're the ace of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 答应浮烟吧。
E: We should allow Cirrus to go ahead with their plan.

C: 连你们两位都说自己会害怕，我…我心里居然松了一口气。
E: ...I—I guess if even you two are afraid, then... I—I feel a little better now.

C: …浮烟？
E: ...Cirrus?

C: 「奉十王敕：冥差藿藿，艺精业勤，资赋具足，可堪要任。即日擢为判官。」
E: "By decree of the Ten-Lords: Spiritfarer Huohuo is skilled and diligent, capable and worthy of officialdom. She is hereby promoted to the position of judge."

C: 也许这几面是最后的镜子了？
E: Maybe these are the only mirrors left?

C: 藿藿，动身吧，这应该是最后的铜镜了。
E: Hurry, Huohuo. This should be the last mirror.

C: 谁告诉你这批货有问题了？柯柯娜，你记住——在「黄金的时刻」，那些有钱的客户看重的不是商品的质量，而是品牌效应！
E: Who told you there was a problem with these? Cocona, you best remember — In the Golden Hour, those wealthy customers don't care about product quality, but branding!

C: 我只知道…现在绝对不是放手的时候。
E: All I know is... it's absolutely not the time to let go right now.

C: 你一把抓住柯柯娜的手腕，将她带到了钟表小子广场……
E: You grab Cocona's wrist and take her to Clockie Plaza...

C: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
E: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

C: 在人群的鼓励下，柯柯娜的歌声变得愈发动听、自信……
E: With the crowd's encouragement, Cocona's voice becomes more euphonious and confident...

C: 我乘坐的「星云之末」号旅行舰的引擎在毫无预兆的情况下发生了故障，随后引发了爆炸——依常理推断，我的生还概率无限趋近于零。
E: The engine of the "Nebula's End" cruise ship that I was aboard malfunctioned completely without warning, causing an explosion. Logically, my chances of survival were almost zero.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您愿意再帮我一次吗？我想<color=#dbc291ff>唤醒那些创造出我的人们</color>。
E: {NICKNAME}, would you help me once more? I wish to <color=#dbc291ff>summon the people that created me</color>.

C: 但若是我贴近观察，能看到的却只有空洞——一个真实的灵魂是没法被凭空捏造出来的。
E: But if I look closely, all you can see is a void... A true soul cannot be simply created from thin air.

C: 必须得让罗伯特记起来…要让他回忆起自己生命中曾拥有过的那束光芒。
E: We have to make Robert remember... We have to make him remember that light he once had in his life.

C: 哪怕最初的过程会很痛苦，我也希望他能记起儿时玩伴的模样，记起对他来说真正重要的人。
E: Even if the beginning of this process is painful, I hope that he can recall his childhood friend and remember who is truly important to him.

C: 我们的行为越是奏效，构成这具躯体的根基就越是脆弱。到时候，我应该能感受到它带来的影响……
E: The greater the effect of our results, the weaker the foundation of this body should become. When the time comes, I should be able to feel the effects our actions have brought...

C: 真是悲哀。
E: That's sad.

C: 任何诋毁莱斯利•迪恩的人都是我的敌人。他们是恶棍，他们……
E: Anyone who slanders the name of Lesley Dean is my enemy. They are villains, and they...

C: 姬莲望向你，她的脸上写满了失落和迷茫。
E: Jillian looks toward you, her face awash with loss and bewilderment.

C: 大概只是重名吧？抱歉，只是这个名字激起了莱斯…我的一些回忆。
E: They must just be someone with the same name, surely? Sorry, this name just seemed to rouse Les— my memories...

C: 我们走近些看看吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's get closer and take a look, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 你的准则是？
E: What are these guidelines about?

C: 所以我恳请您能授权予我，让我按照这项管理准则试运行一段时间……
E: So, I implore you to allow me to follow this management style for a trial period...

C: 船员们向我提出建议：应当更换空艇尾翼的涂装，更换空艇的旧称，以便凸显空艇易主后的变化。
E: This is the suggestion given by the crew: It's time to change the empennage and the name of the airship to denote the changes that have taken place since the airship's change of hands.

C: …我直说吧，有点奇葩，但我很喜欢，平凡的东西配不上船长您。
E: ...To be honest, it's a little weird, but I love it. After all, you're above ordinary things, captain.

C: 呃…您喜欢猜谜游戏，对吗？
E: Err... You like riddles, is that right?

C: 现在，唯一的风险就是白日梦酒店的<unbreak>135</unbreak>层并没有空置的客房。但没关系，你百分百信任同事解决问题的能力，哪怕你们素未谋面——
E: Now, the only risk is whether there actually is a spare guest room on the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor. But you're sure that's fine — you trust the problem-solving skills of your coworkers, even if you've never actually met them before...

C: 虽然不知道为什么你会在酒店当大堂经理，但现在我也不想多问了…假期的时间这么宝贵，可不能浪费在瞎聊这种事上。
E: I have no idea why you'd be working here as lobby manager in this hotel, and I'm not about to ask... Vacation time is too precious to waste on things like gossiping...

C: 有需要的话，您可以至酒店前台大堂经理处，向礼宾部订购整箱……
E: If you want, you can go to the lobby manager at the hotel reception to order a full box from the concierge...

C: 匹诺康尼…每次回到这里，我的心情都非常复杂。梦境的十二时分就像一座永不落幕的舞台，台上的表演永远不能停歇，就像人的心脏不能停止跳动。
E: Penacony... I have mixed feelings every time I'm back here. The Twelve Hours here are like a show that never ends. The performances onstage never cease, just like our hearts can't stop beating.

C: 精彩，真精彩！小兄弟，没想到你居然这么有本事！
E: Amazing! Spectacular! I'm blown away by your talent, buddy!

C: …但是收效甚微，如同你在游戏中用普通系的技能攻击钢系的对手。
E: ...But with little success. Imagine using a Normal-Type attack on a Steel-Type opponent in a game.

C: 无可救药的恶徒，背负原罪的邪恶巨人……
E: You incorrigible, sinful giant...

C: 真是太感谢你们啦。回想一下，我之前可真是蠢得离谱…那条邀请信息明显有猫腻，我怎么就没看出来呢？果然是被小便宜给蒙蔽了双眼。
E: I owe you guys a big one! Looking back, I realize I was really foolish... That invitation message was so shady. Why didn't I notice it? I was totally blinded by greed.

C: 发出一声挑衅的「哼」。
E: Let out a provocative "Hmph."

C: 呃…不瞒您说，最近入住白日梦酒店的客人数量明显变少了，我头一次感觉到工作如此清闲。
E: Er... just between us, the number of guests at The Reverie has drastically dropped recently. It's my first time experiencing such a lull at work.

C: 离开罗浮之前还能跟诸位见上一面，实在是飞霄的荣幸。
E: I am truly honored that I was able to meet with you all one more time before I left the Luofu.

C: 稍等一下，我还有些事情。
E: Wait a moment. There's something I need to do.

C: 灵砂大人也要离开？
E: You're leaving too, Miss Lingsha?

C: 我只是一个出不了师的小学徒，我还没资格授徒带队呢。您可别再叫我「师傅」了。
E: I'm just a young apprentice who cannot graduate, so I'm not qualified yet to lead any team. Please don't call me "Master."

C: 青雀尽量将取回手稿的过程描述得惊险无比，铖杰听完之后也大概了解了事情经过。
E: Qingque tries to be as dramatic as possible while describing how the manuscript was retrieved. Chengjie seems to have a good idea of the situation after listening to everything.

C: 琼实鸟串、貘馍卷、热浮羊奶…还有最近小店推出的盲盒包子！
E: Berrypheasant skewers, tuskpir wraps, steamed puffergoat milk... plus the famous mystery steamed stuffed buns that everyone's been eating lately!

C: 我看客人心事重重，梦茗也不便催促。客人先落座，有需要再叫我。
E: I can see you have a lot on your mind, and I don't want to pressure you. Please take your seat and call me whenever you need.

C: 救命——
E: Help—

C: 但是幸好我来到了这里。我重新收获了动力，此时此刻只想赶紧完成师傅的手稿。
E: But luckily, I'm here. I've got my motivation back, and now all I can think about is completing my master's manuscript as soon as I can.

C: 这张拍得好，真是麻烦你了。
E: This is a great shot. Thank you so much.

C: 不太可能吧…
E: I don't think you can make it...

C: （向后行驶）
E: (Move backward)

C: 难道你还不信任公输师傅？
E: Don't you trust Master Gongshu?

C: 不仅是为了请教他问题，我…我想见他。我想让老师告诉我，我接下来该怎么做……
E: Not only do I want to ask for his advice, but I... I'd like to see him in person. I hope he can tell me what I should do next...

C: 莱、莱恩老师？
E: M—Master Ryan?

C: 我不过是赢了一场小小的拳赛而已——你们俩的事迹可比这伟大多了。我们……
E: I just won a little fight in the cage — what you did was much bigger than that. We...

C: 呵，总算醒了！你这一躺就是一整天，可把我们给吓坏了。
E: Ha, you're finally awake! You've been out for the whole day. We were really worried!

C: 希望你们能好好相处，不要被一些琐事影响了彼此间的关系。
E: Don't let small things get in the way of your friendship.

C: 怎么了？快去俱乐部吧，不然比赛就该结束了。
E: Huh? Hurry and run to the Club now. Otherwise, the fight'll be over when you get there.

C: 我怀疑是有人盯上了我的机器伙伴，趁我不在偷偷把它们带走了——虽然我不知道那家伙是怎么做到的，难道是篡改了系统？不可能啊……
E: Someone must have set their sights on my robots and stolen them while I was gone — I just don't know how they managed it. Did they change the programming? But that's not possible...

C: 原来如此！丢了两台机器人，是吧？那你手上有什么线索没？或者只是合理的猜想也行。我们想帮忙调查，总得找个入手点吧？
E: I see, two robots... Do you have any clues? Any reasonable guesses? We need to have an opening to start the investigation.

C: 走吧，我们回家。
E: Come on, let's go home.

C: 消息应该无误。看来史瓦罗大佬也放松警惕了啊…居然放任这些家伙在他的地盘捣乱！
E: Our intel should have been accurate... Seems like Boss Svarog must have let his guard down — these guys are messing up his turf!

C: …因为我想让卢卡哥哥知道，我会一直以你为目标努力！而且，我还想把自己的愿望偷偷跟你分享…哪怕只是我的幻想！
E: ...I wanted to tell you that you've inspired me to keep working hard and achieve my goal, even if it's hard to reach!

C: {NICKNAME}，丹恒，没问题吧？
E: What do you two think, {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng?

C: 放你和{NICKNAME}两个在罗浮上乱逛？我可不放心。
E: Just let you and {NICKNAME} wander around aimlessly on the Luofu by yourselves? I don't think so.

C: 让各位久等了。演武仪典在即，星槎海又是罗浮的交通枢纽，我光是从人群中找人就花了不少时间。
E: Sorry for the delay. With the upcoming Wardance, and the Starskiff Haven being so busy, things are a little hectic.

C: 朱明仙舟一直以能工巧匠著称，听说朱明的怀炎将军自己就是工匠中的翘楚。啊…要是能有幸得到他亲手锻造的宝剑，我怕是做梦都要笑醒了。
E: The Xianzhou Zhuming boasts skilled craftsmasters, and General Huaiyan is a top-notch craftsman himself. Ah... if only I could get a sword forged by him! I'd be on cloud nine.

C: 按照流程，危险重犯应当收押在星槎中，全程不落地送往幽囚狱。是谁允许押解犯人的船停靠在客运码头的！
E: According to the protocol, borisin prisoners should be held on a starskiff and taken directly to The Shackling Prison under strict supervision without ever touching the ground. Who allowed a prisoner transport ship to dock at the passenger terminal?

C: 这恐怕不好。
E: Nope, that won't do.

C: 你以为我想回来吗！我原本以为只是进港维修一番，就能离开这晦气的地方。谁知道一进港就冲上来几个云骑，把货舱里的货物都抢走了！
E: Like I wanted to come back! I thought I'd just dock at the harbor for repairs and leave this forsaken place for good. Little did I know, as soon as the ship entered the harbor, a bunch of Cloud Knights showed up and snatched all our cargo from the hold!

C: 过几日引擎修复完毕，我们的船就会离去。
E: Our ship will leave in a few days once the engines are repaired.

C: 龙师大人的「薄礼」想来相当贵重吧。我一个小小的丹士长，可不敢代为转交，若是中间出了纰漏，我可担待不起啊。
E: I'm pretty sure this "humble gift" from the Preceptor himself is quite valuable. As a mere chief alchemist, I am unable to deliver it. Should any mishap occur, I couldn't bear the consequences.

C: 你没听错。丹鼎司的局面糜烂至此，要为此负上责任的，除却药王乱党之外，还有神策将军。
E: You heard it right. The ones responsible for the corruption in the Alchemy Commission are not just the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, but even the Divine Foresight himself.

C: 凭什么有人插队！
E: And now someone cuts in line!?

C: 他真的好帅！
E: Yep, those moves were fabulous!

C: {NICKNAME}，事情已经够麻烦的了。
E: Things are already complicated enough as they are, {NICKNAME}.

C: 一日奔波，你们来到浥尘客栈安顿歇息……
E: After a day of running around, you finally arrive at Petrichor Inn for a well-deserved rest...

C: 哎？怎么这第一堂课就是实战训练？！会不会太激进了些？
E: Wait, we're having actual combat training for the first lesson!? Isn't that a bit too intense?

C: 想什么呢，你不过练了这么短的时间，怎么可能？
E: Get real, you've only been practicing for a short while. How could that possibly happen?

C: 听说罗浮与朱明两位将军的高徒原本预定登上演武擂台一较高下，却不知因为什么缘故突然联手教起了徒弟来。这流言竟是真的。
E: There was talk that the leading disciples of the Luofu and Zhuming generals were supposed to face off in the Wardance, but for some reason, they suddenly teamed up to train an apprentice of their own. Turns out the rumors are true.

C: 这叫「颠踬散」！是用域外奇花「押不芦」提炼浓缩而成的汤剂。
E: This is called "Tumbledust"! An extract from an exotic flower named "Yabruh."

C: 你不像个厨子，倒是更像主持人。
E: You don't talk like a cook, you sound more like a TV host or something.

C: 箱底的悬浮机关被启动。你们感到它开始向着前方缓缓飘行。
E: The floating mechanism at the bottom of the crate is activated. You feel it begins to drift slowly forward.

C: 将军没告诉我们你想做什么…
E: General Jing Yuan didn't tell us about your intentions at all...

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 可恶，这些孽物人数太多了。
E: Detestable things, there are too many of them.

C: 大人！这个奴隶是在胡说八道，我从未听过这样的消息！请允许我立刻杀了他！
E: My Lord! This slave is talking nonsense. I've never heard anything about this! May I just kill him now?

C: 呼雷现在还下落不明，椒丘先生也落在他手中，咱们等待的时间越长，情况就越不可控啊。
E: Hoolay's whereabouts are still unknown, and they've even taken Mr. Jiaoqiu hostage. The longer we wait, the more complicated the situation becomes.

C: 灵砂受教了。您当年也怀着这样的心态「权衡」了我的师父，将她放逐去了朱明仙舟，却坐看「药王秘传」在其中死灰复燃？
E: Thank you for enlightening me. Was it for the same reason that you "traded off" my mentor to the Xianzhou Zhuming, only to stand idle and allow the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 听好了，「狼」绝不会允许自己成为猎物。接下来你必须听我的命令行事。
E: Listen up, a wolf never allows itself to become prey. From now on, you'll follow my orders.

C: 了解，如果您需要帮助，请来找我。
E: Understood. Please come to me if you need any help.

C: 有一伙步离人假扮身份重新回到了迴星港，答案已经显而易见了——
E: So, it seems that some borisin have returned to Stargazer Navalia in disguise. The answer seems quite obvious...

C: 我也这么认为。
E: That's my suspicion as well.

C: 一段模糊的，几乎快记不清的过去罢了。在许久以前，我…曾是行走在他们中的一员。
E: Well, just a hazy past that I can barely recollect. Long ago... I was one of them.

C: 和所有的弟兄们一起分享我的赤血。用它来感染狐人，用它来制造恐惧！
E: Share my crimson blood with our brethren! Use it to infect those foxians and strike fear into their hearts!

C: 貊泽…快走——
E: Moze... run...

C: 你知道吗，爷爷常对我说，物肖主人形。一个人的武器会反映出他的习惯和性格。
E: My grandfather always told me that "a weapon mimics its master." That means that a person's weapon will reflect their habits and personality.

C: 云璃师父的「老铁」看着比人都高，能挥动这样的武器，显然应该有一身怪力吧？
E: Master Yunli's Old Mettle is taller than a person. Being able to wield a weapon like that must mean that you have ridiculous strength, right?

C: 天舶司作为主办方准备的还挺周全，有点意思。
E: I see the Sky-Faring Commission has really gone all out as the host. Interesting...

C: 听说这次来了不少高手。
E: I hear there's quite a few masters here...

C: 彦卿，{NICKNAME}，随我来。
E: Yanqing, {NICKNAME}, follow me.

C: 说说看，他打算怎么向我宣战…是单枪匹马的决斗？还是交换人质？
E: Tell me, how is he planning to declare this war against me...? With a one-on-one duel? Or with a hostage exchange, maybe?

C: 赶快疏散所有狐人吧！
E: Evacuate all the foxians immediately!

C: 我记得你，末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。
E: I remember you, Mok Tok... You are harder to kill than a cockroach.

C: 长乐天那边的情况如何？
E: How are things at the Exalting Sanctum?

C: 不过，演武仪典筹备良久，势在必行，宣布中断又让我心疼得很。我转念一想，既然不得不开，那还是开吧。只是今日召开的又何必是真正的演武仪典呢？
E: However, preparations for the Wardance were in the works for so long, I couldn't bear to announce its cancellation. So, I thought, if the show must go on, then let it go on. But that doesn't mean that the Wardance we hold today has to be the real event.

C: 彦卿骁卫，你来执行云骑的军规。明白吗？
E: Lieutenant Yanqing, you are to enforce the Cloud Knights' military rules. Understood?

C: 在每一次狩猎前，我都会做好失败而归的准备。但这次不一样，这一次…失败就是我奔赴的终点。
E: Before every hunt, I make preparations for defeat and retreat. But not this time. This time... defeat was exactly the ending I was racing towards.

C: 那是「流星」！流星在照耀我们，只要向它许愿，就能得到自由！
E: That's a "shooting star"! It's shining down on us! If we just tell it our wish, we can have our freedom!

C: 很有气势，不过还远远不够。
E: Impressive, but you will need much more than that.

C: 按联盟与持明的盟誓，不得在持明领地中令持明流血受伤。各位要在罗浮龙尊的见证下破弃盟誓？
E: According to the oath between the Alliance and the Vidyadhara, it's forbidden to spill Vidyadhara blood on their own territory. Are you all ready to violate this oath in the presence of the Luofu's high elder?

C: 而在丹鼎司中，{NICKNAME}正悼念着某人……
E: Meanwhile, in the Alchemy Commission, {NICKNAME} is mourning for someone...

C: 啊，看来这曜青仙舟的使团，整个都在丹鼎司里集合了。要不我们买些水果，去看望一下飞霄将军？
E: Ah, it looks like the entire delegation from the Xianzhou Yaoqing has gathered at the Alchemy Commission. Why don't we go see General Feixiao and bring her some fruit?

C: 不能打个电话吗？
E: You can't make a call?

C: 这是被绑架了？
E: Did he get kidnapped?

C: 灰骑士，朕有些吃不准…朕是不是应该找回那些记忆？至少能搞清楚…为什么这些刁民这样恨朕……
E: Gray Knight, I'm in a conundrum... Should I be finding those memories? Then at least it'll be clear... why these ruffians hate me so much...

C: 和你说过多少次了，称呼绝对不能搞错！怎么就不长记性呢！哎，你们这些平民出身的骑士，什么都好，就是缺点文化。
E: How many times have I told you not to get the titles wrong! Why can't you remember! Bah, you knights risen from common lineage are excellent in everything but etiquette.

C: 侍卫，动手吧。
E: Retainers, do it.

C: 或许你曾经被卷入过战争。
E: Maybe you were once caught up in a war.

C: 秘密就在我们眼前。
E: The secret is right in front of us.

C: 眼前的老人平静地凝望着远方的梦想之城。
E: The elderly man in front of you gazes calmly at the City of Dreams in the distance.

C: 「选择性阻断药」——我有所耳闻，大概是那位脾气古怪的药剂师的发明。的确，那位女士从不与公司来往，不必担心她会做出出卖同僚的行为。
E: The Selective Blocking Agent — I've heard of it. I suppose it's the brainchild of that eccentric pharmacist. Indeed, that lady has no dealings with the IPC, so the risk of her selling you out is low.

C: 我很抱歉。
E: I'm sorry to hear that.

C: 他一直都是个天才，黑塔女士——但他的意志并非一直如此坚韧。
E: He's always been a genius, Madam Herta, but he isn't always this determined.

C: 但我可以告诉你的是：你在这里绝对不会被打扰。
E: But I can tell you this: You will absolutely not be disturbed here.

C: 你不会啾啾叫！
E: You don't tweet!

C: 当然，我会再次考虑的。不过…今天似乎还有别的客人来访。
E: Of course, I'll reconsider. But... we appear to have other guests today.

C: 「与此同时，隐夜鸫向银河发出邀约——欢迎宇宙中的建筑家与忆质学者来到匹诺康尼，共筑美梦世界……」
E: "Concurrently, the Nightingales have also extended an invitation to the universe — to welcome the architects and memoria scholars of the cosmos to build this world of Dreamjoy together..."

C: 普通路过的好心人。
E: Just someone who happened to be passing by.

C: 混乱已经结束，走吧，跟我回去吧。
E: The chaos is over. Come on, let's go back with me.

C: 费歇尔让我转交这张照片。
E: Fischer asked me to pass you this photo.

C: 那就是「湛蓝爵士」…
E: That is Dr. Blues...

C: 没必要这么想，未来之事本就不可预料。而且对那些外邦人来说，这是十足的好消息。
E: Don't think of it like that. Future events cannot be predicted. And to these outlanders, that is most welcome news.

C: 你这货是从墓里挖来的？
E: From which grave did you dig that crate up?

C: 他出事了？
E: Is he in trouble?

C: 苏克提瑞斯在这里吗？
E: Is Soctires here?

C: （再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>劣质的食物</color>。）
E: (After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid in the abyss. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>low-quality meals</color>.)

C: 应该直接处死！
E: Execution is in order!

C: 这…你总不能要求每个人都那么做。
E: This... You can't expect everyone to perform such ridiculous feats.

C: 随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了帕拉滕的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到义愤填膺……
E: As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Palaten's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, indignation aflame within them...

C: 外邦人的事，你怎么看？
E: What's your view on the outlander situation?

C: 或许应某个逸闻中所说，在这黑潮覆压的乱世，蝴蝶载着这座城飞到了谁也见不到的地方吧。
E: It could be the case, according to one story, that in this war-torn world savaged by the black tide, a flock of butterflies carried that city to a place that no one could see.

C: 这些口述和雕像小姐的记忆，应该足够让我们回到过去了，去找雕像小姐吧！
E: These descriptions, along with the statue lady's memories, should be enough for us to return to the past. Let's go and find the statue lady!

C: 再说了，除非通过「神性」的力量，否则没人能打开牢房的门…快走吧！
E: What's more, no one can unlock the prison gates without some form of "divine" power anyway... Let's get out of here!

C: 伙计，你说的戏总不能是我们被处刑的表演吧？这可不好看，放了我，带你去圣城看好的！
E: My friend, by show... you do not mean the performance of our execution, do you? That would be a terrible display. Release me and I will take you to a real show in the holy city!

C: 我是银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 唉，怎么又都是泰坦们的东西，他们这些家伙还真是爱难为凡人。
E: Ah! Why are all those things derived from the Titans. Oh, how they rejoice at the suffering of mortals.

C: 这就进约会剧情了？
E: Are we going into a romance plot now?

C: 哎哟，那我可真是谢谢您嘞，现在我活着回来了，不如就把这祭品送我吧。
E: Oh, then I thank you for your kindness. Seeing as I have returned alive, how about giving these offerings to me instead?

C: 真是稀奇呀，天谴之矛的士兵在云石市集可不常见——欢迎来到永恒之城，悬锋的客人。
E: How unusual! A soldier of the Lance of Fury browsing the Marmoreal Market is a rare sight indeed... Welcome to the Eternal City, guest from Kremnos.

C: 姑娘——你在哪呢？
E: Girl... Where are you?

C: 自从这个眷属来到了奥赫玛，你就变得愈发散漫。别忘了，你还是圣城戍卫的一员，总有一日要为了保护奥赫玛，而与她的族人相杀。
E: Ever since that Titankin came to Okhema, you have grown even more undisciplined. Do not forget that you are also a member of the holy city's garrison. There will come a day when you will have to fight to the death against her kind to protect Okhema.

C: 所以，随他们怎么说吧，叛徒、逃兵，懦夫…我都无所谓，义务、责任、使命我都可以背弃，但我一定要到那个地方。
E: So, let them say what they will about me. Traitor, deserter, coward... My duty, my responsibility, and my mission, I will happily abandon them all, but I must reach that place.

C: 俄诺涅元老，抱歉…我无法参与此事的审判，我必须要走了，城外还有人在等我。
E: Elder Oenone, I am sorry... I cannot take part in this judgment. I must go. Someone is waiting for me outside the city.

C: 没错，你是灾星，你为奥赫玛带来了动荡，你让这对你有恩的城失守，你是纷争的灾星。
E: That's right. You bring calamity, and you've caused Okhema to fall. The city was kind to you, but you brought strife on them all.

C: 伊阿宋队长，很遗憾。
E: Captain Iason, I have unfortunate news.

C: 这段回忆的味道好奇怪…嗯？帕里斯在那儿干什么呢？
E: This memory tastes weird... Hm? What is Paris doing there?

C: 不知道呀。
E: I have no idea.

C: 当然，以上全都是相对认知学派瞎编的。
E: Of course, the above was all made up by the School of Relative Cognition.

C: 幽灵？
E: Ghost?

C: 日记里的事，我一时没法解释清楚。但我希望你和那位叫做迷迷的朋友，能帮我找一个「人」。
E: The situation with the diary... I can't really explain clearly now. But I hope you can call upon that friend you call Mem to help me find someone.

C: 现在，你们有改变命运的机会。她会成为衣食无忧的圣女，作为补偿，我们也会给身为母亲的你足够的粮食，挺过这场饥荒。
E: Now, you have the chance to change destiny. She will become a Holy Maiden who does not need to worry about food and shelter. As compensation, we will offer you, her mother, enough food to tide through this famine.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要你让谎言自口中流出，就能踏上通往另一条未来的道路，逃离这可悲的命运。</color>孩子，你会做出怎样的选择？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as you allow lies to flow from your lips, you will embark on a path toward another future, and escape this tragic destiny.</color> Child, what choice will you make?

C: 请不必惊慌，欧洛尼斯派遣我来到这里，正是为了拯救你们。
E: Please do not panic. Oronyx sent me here to offer you all salvation.

C: 听好了！屹立在你们面前的，正是命运泰坦的神殿，一直往里走，在废墟的深处，你们会找到一位先知。
E: Hear me! Before you stands the temple of the Fate Titans. Walk forth, deep into the ruins, and you shall find a prophet.

C: 这是出于善意的谎言。
E: They were lies out of goodwill.

C: 荣誉队员？你可算来了！我的腿快要没知觉了……
E: Honorary member! Finally, you're here! My legs are going numb...

C: 是啊。答案从一开始就再明显不过。三位无名客的故事，不就是最好的证明吗？
E: Yes. The answer was crystal clear from the start. The story of the three Nameless is the best proof of that, isn't it?

C: 说起来，黑塔呢？
E: Speaking of which, where's Herta?

C: 区区绝灭大君，还不至于让我「消耗过度」。我只是没上线而已。
E: A mere Lord Ravager isn't enough to make me "overexert" myself. I just wasn't online, that's all.

C: 公司那边非要拉人组建什么「同盟」。我受不了他们纠缠，就开启了自动应答模式。
E: The IPC keeps pestering me about forming some "alliance." I got tired of their nagging, so I just turned on auto-answering mode.

C: 学术会议的邀请将纷至沓来，我将在会议开幕时第一个致辞。休息时，除非我先动手，否则没人敢碰茶歇！
E: Conference invitations will come pouring in, and I'll be the first to give a speech at the opening ceremony. During breaks, no one will dare touch the refreshments unless I make the first move!

C: 快看，是{NICKNAME}。
E: Look, it's {NICKNAME}.

C: 放心好了，戏曲、说书、相声…对于脍炙人口的故事，罗浮从不缺乏传播的手段。
E: Rest assured, whether through opera, storytelling, or crosstalk... The Luofu never lacks ways to spread stories that capture people's hearts.

C: 片刻过后，你也回过了神…眼前的「她」只是一笔留在过去的墨痕：只能捎来信息，无法交换言语。
E: A moment later, you too regained your senses... The "her" before you was nothing more than an ink trace left from the past: able only to carry a message, unable to exchange words.

C: 我会带他们遍历星空。
E: I'll take them across the stars.

C: 你想到：可以让更多人阅读《如我所书》，留下这个世界的记忆。如果这么做，因果会变得更加坚固…你无法确信，但愿意相信。
E: You think: you can let more people read As I've Written, preserving the memories of this world. If you do this, the causality will become more stable... You can't be certain, but you're willing to believe.

C: 我是为讲述而来。
E: I'm here to tell a story.

C: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
E: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

C: 呃，老师你还有什么事吗？你教我的我可是都学到了哦。啊差点忘了，古恩先生说过，等我学习完毕，你记得去找他聊聊。
E: Uh, {M#mister}{F#miss}, is there anything else you want me to study? I've learned everything you taught me. Ah, I almost forgot. Mr. Gunn said that when I am done studying, you should go talk to him.

C: 谁是当事人？
E: So, who reported it?

C: 不过这件事还挺有意思的，我得把前因后果通通记下来！
E: But this is actually pretty fun for a story. I've got to note down the whole thing!

C: 具体的坐标我晚点发给你。
E: I'll send you the exact coordinates later.

C: 不过这应该是我能研究的最后一个怪谈了。哎，温世玲那边催得紧……
E: But this is probably the last ghost story I can investigate. *sigh* Wen Shiling has really been on my tail...

C: 我怕老姐妹们会笑话我，想了想还是决定不染了。
E: I was concerned my girlfriends would laugh at me, so I decided not to dye it after all.

C: {NICKNAME} ，你觉得我该选哪个？
E: {NICKNAME}, what should I do?

C: 这是调查结果。
E: There are the findings.

C: 没错，我要找的东西就是「朋友」——我，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，这一生中从来没拥有过真心的朋友。这一点必须改变！
E: That's right. The thing I am looking for is a friend. I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, have never had a true friend in my life. And that must be changed!

C: 我总结了过去的失败，得出一个结论：错不在我。
E: I've studied my failures and come to one conclusion: It's not my fault.

C: 来吧，来行政广场的喷泉找我。该让你看到华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀不一样的一面了。
E: Come and meet me at the fountain in the Administrative District Plaza. It's time to show you a different side of me.

C: 华劳斯？哪位？是找我咨询过法律问题的市民吗？恕我直言，我每天要见那么多人，怎么可能每个名字都记住……
E: Wallace? Who is that? Is he a citizen who came to me for legal advice before? With all due respect, I need to see so many people every day... How could I remember each of their names?

C: 长官，有何吩咐？
E: Captain, what can I do for you?

C: 快看，荣誉队员！今天这里居然一个人都没有，我们运气真是太好了！
E: Look, honorary member! There is no one here today. We are in luck!

C: 不是「地火」，是鼹鼠党哦！
E: It's not Wildfire! It's The Moles!

C: 哈哈哈，先把话说明白咯，这可不是我出的主意啊。要我猜的话…指定是娜塔莎跟虎克说了什么悄悄话吧？
E: Hahaha, let's make it clear first, this is not my idea. If I had to guess... it must be Natasha who told Hook some "secrets."

C: 老奶奶…你就好好在这儿休息吧！鼹鼠党记住你的难处了——以后我们也会经常给你送药的。
E: Grandma... have a good rest here! The Moles have heard about your problem, and we will continue delivering medicines to you from now on.

C: 呃…整天待在后勤区域里，这些先进的机兵武器本来就没什么机会接触到啊。
E: Uh... I spend all of my time on the logistics side of things. I don't really get any chances to see an advanced mechanical war machine like this.

C: 哎，那个老头儿……
E: *sigh* That old man...

C: 我想给爸爸写一封回信，和花束放在一起送给他。
E: I want to write him a letter and send it together with a bouquet.

C: 请问您打算给什么人送花呢？不妨告诉我，说不定我能帮您出出点子。
E: If you could tell me more about the person you're sending flowers to, I can give you some suggestions.

C: 等会儿…你刚才说，他们给你出了道题？快快快，把题面也给我讲讲。
E: Wait a minute... did you just say that they posed you a question? Quick — hit me with it.

C: …他给的实在是太多了。
E: ...He gave way too much.

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 但这次是直接交给教育部的大臣了，也许情况会有所不同……
E: But maybe things will be different this time because it's been handed over directly to the Minister of Education.

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
E: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

C: 我想接受测验。
E: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

C: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
E: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

C: 我想接受测验。
E: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

C: 尤利安。
E: Julian.

C: 咳，抱歉，请允许我回避您的这次提问。请问您还有别的事吗？
E: Ahem, sorry. Please allow me to sidestep this question of yours. Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 打开金门。
E: Open the gold gate.

C: 你不能自己去吗？
E: Can't you just go yourself?

C: 你别直接去啊…你要是这么唐突地跑去问塔米拉小姐，她那么聪明，肯定立刻就能猜到是小女子了吧…哎~小女子对她的热情，可是一股秘而不宣的烈火呢~
E: No, don't... she's a smart lady. If you ask her so suddenly and directly, she'll definitely know what I'm up to... *sigh* My passion is a fire that has to burn in secret~

C: 喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
E: Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.

C: 不过，你说得对——确实有件要紧事。只是，我不知道该不该托付给你……
E: You're right, though. There is something urgent I need help with. I just don't know whether I should ask for your help...

C: 结果我老爹半道杀出，那人估计见状跑得没影了…你说说吧，这都办的什么事啊！害得我又得浪费时间等那人带着书回来……
E: Then my dad popped out of nowhere, and the book owner probably ran away... Seriously, what is this mess? Now I have to waste time waiting for the person to bring the book back...

C: 那我可不客气了啊。
E: Count me in then.

C: 嚯嚯，想必你也是这商业街的常客了。
E: Oho, then you must be a regular to this commercial street, too.

C: 年轻人，我看你手里那物件与我的很是类似——能拜托你为我这老头子掌掌眼吗？
E: Kiddo, what you have in your hand looks similar to my gadget — Can I please ask you to give a good look at this thing?

C: 可这世道实在是太难了，根本找不到合适的工作…实在没办法，我这才做了扒手，每个月再以「贝洛伯格供暖」员工的名义给老爹寄去生活费。
E: But the world is way too hard. I couldn't find a suitable job at all... So, I had to become a thief. I mail my Dad some money every month under the pretense of working for Belobog's heating system.

C: 只是…我…坚持不了了……
E: I... I can't...

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)

C: 但你实在想不起来那究竟是什么，只觉得熟悉无比，亲切，又带着几分莫名的心安——
E: Although you can't recall precisely where the sensation comes from, you feel a sense of warmth and security enveloping you, like a feeling of déjà vu...

C: 这些石灰岩似乎并不产自奥赫玛本地…奇怪，这里的人们为什么没有尝试使用红土作为建筑材料呢？是因为都用做大地兽的饲料了吗？
E: These limestones do not seem to be of Okheman origin... Strange, why do the people here not experiment with using red clay as a construction material? Is it because it has all been used as dromas feed?

C: 靛石堆
E: Indigo Steel Pile

C: 话不多说，你决定——
E: Enough said, you decide to...

C: 整理思绪
E: Collect your thoughts

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: 生命图书馆
E: Vitae Library

C: 在离神明最近的地方我们仰头凝望，
E: At the edge of divinity, we look up in awe.

C: 虫豸正吞吃我的手指，荒草已覆盖我的背脊，可铎音仍无法唤回你，
E: Insects devour my fingers, wild grass creeps up my back, yet the bell's chimes cannot summon you,

C: 之前与你交手的时候，我的耐力不足，险些因你的痛击弃了剑柄。若非技巧略胜一筹，恐怕真要败给你了。
E: When I crossed swords with you before, I lacked endurance and your powerful blows nearly knocked my blade from my hands. If it weren't for my slightly superior technique, I fear you would have defeated me.

C: 你记住了「曾在福坛获得过赐福」
E: You remembered "Receiving a Blessing at the Altar."

C: 打卡结束。好在这里并没有负责收费的管理员，你完全可以跟从自己的心意，坐到世界毁灭都没有关系——如果瑟希斯不来找你算账的话。
E: It's done. Thankfully, no fee-collecting administrators are present. You can follow your heart and remain seated here until the world crumbles — if Cerces doesn't come to make you pay.

C: 根据，面部表情，收获，肯定有。别给他，给我，给你报酬。
E: Judging... by facial expressions, you have. Don't give it to him. Give it to me. Reward for you.

C: 指示…已有…先找到它……
E: Instruction... already given... Find it first...

C: 做出决定后，你马上爬起，但木马却因这些微的动作而重心不稳。只听「咕咚」一声——顷刻，你已身处冥河之上。
E: As you make your decision, you swiftly stand, but the horse shifts beneath you, unsteady from your movement. With a loud "thud," you find yourself floating above the River of Souls.

C: 没错。巴特鲁斯，这不正是你想要的吗？最孱弱的影子，却负担起此世的黎明……
E: That's right. Isn't this what you've always wanted, Bartholos? You are the weakest shadow, yet you now bear the only dawn of this world...

C: 哈哈…几乎每段史诗都以英雄的功业作结。
E: Haha... almost every epic tale concludes with a hero's great deeds.

C: 永无休止█永无休止——<color=#eb4d3dff>骄纵仇恨苦痛</color>永无休止，█无休止。永█████永无休止█无休止骄纵仇恨苦痛。██让我再看一眼再看███永无休止永无<color=#eb4d3dff>永不停歇永无休止永不满足永无尽头！</color>
E: Never cease█Never cease<color=#eb4d3dff>pride hatred pain</color> never cease, ██ver cease. End████ ████ █ndless pride hatred pain never cease. ██████ Let me see once more, let me see ███ ████ Endless, never-ending <color=#eb4d3dff>never stopping, never ceasing, never satisfied, never-ending!</color>

C: 你想起那位被称为「救世主」的白发少年，哀丽秘榭的白厄，负世与救世之人。历经三千万次轮回，以自身承纳火种，只为扭转世界毁灭的命运。
E: You think of the white-haired boy once hailed as the Deliverer, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, bearer and savior of the world. After thirty million cycles of rebirth, he carried the Coreflame within himself, all to defy the world's doom.

C: 在你到来之前，此处只有停滞的时光、荒芜的鲸骨、永恒的寂静，以及只属于某人的等待与孤独。
E: Before you arrived, there was only still time, barren whale bones, eternal silence, and someone's long, lonely wait.

C: 「死亡之半神」遐蝶，生于光历？？？年，逝于光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年。
E: Castorice, the Demigod of Death. Born Light Calendar ???. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>.

C: 老师—我想看星神列传！
E: Can I read Aeon Chronicles, please?

C: 吟风爵托我帮她…
E: The Dux Carminum asked me to do her a favor...

C: 容我问你一句：刻法勒的神性，比起尼卡多利的神性，会更为完美么？
E: Let me ask you this: Is Kephale's divinity more perfect than Nikador's?

C: 缇安才要谢谢阿姨呢，你好温柔，让缇安想起了妈妈…明天见——
E: It's us who should thank you. You're so gentle, reminding us of our mom... See you tomorrow...

C: 不，我的身躯不如你高大，没法看到那么远。
E: No, I'm not as tall as you. I can't see that far.

C: 所以我就是这里的墓主喀！
E: Which makes me... the owner of this tomb, crrk!

C: 当一只若虫也不错。
E: Being a nymph isn't so bad either, you know.

C: 我懂了！我真是天才！放心把武器生产交给我吧喀，我会为翁法罗斯，炸出一个崭新的黎明！
E: I understand now! I am a genius! Leave weapon production to me, crrk! I will blast a brand-new dawn for Amphoreus!

C: 当初…该把…它…新电池…抢到…手…喀…「已关机」。
E: Back then... should've... grabbed... its new battery... into my... hands... crrk... "Shut Down."

C: 异乡的旅者，你也是为了探求真理才来到这个圣地瞻仰的吧。
E: Traveler from distant lands, you too have come to this sacred place in pursuit of the truth, haven't you?

C: 现在，我们就算认识啦？
E: I believe we've become acquainted now.

C: 银鬃铁卫后勤安保部第三支队副队长，「副官」，向您报道。哔——啵。
E: Aide, deputy head of division 3 of the Silvermane Guards' logistics and security department, reporting for duty. Beep — boop.

C: （打听「管家」的秘密）
E: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

C: 啊，这…这我不好说。
E: Ah, that's... that's hard for me to say.

C: 这家伙根本不是它所吹嘘的那样，<color=#dbc291ff>什么不用进食，它特别喜欢吃炒饭</color>，我亲眼看到过好几次。
E: This guy is full of hot air, <color=#dbc291ff>claiming to not need food. It loves to eat fried rice</color> — I have seen it with my own eyes.

C: 阮•梅女士真的教过你这个吗？
E: Miss Ruan Mei really taught you this?

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: 至于汇报的内容，最近吃了什么，做了什么，有什么烦恼，事无巨细，我都会整理好，再汇报给她。
E: I will tidy up the details of the report: Recent food intake, activities, or troubles. Matters big or small, I will report them back to her.

C: 虽然完全没有头绪，但人家好喜欢这个故事。人们说，梦是欧洛尼斯垂下的帷幕，这有没有可能是它送出的礼物？毕竟那位泰坦和我一样，特别喜欢你呢。
E: Although I'm completely in the dark, I adore this story. They say dreams are veils cast by Oronyx. Could this be a gift from them? It appears that Titan cherishes you just as much as I do.

C: 人家有种预感，刚才那颗漂亮的星星，也许就是带来故事的宝物。在今后的旅途中，我们还会遇见好多好多。
E: I've got a hunch that the beautiful star we just saw is a treasure that brings stories. In our travels ahead, we're sure to encounter many more.

C: 不过，如果你有什么心事，真的睡不着…别担心，人家会一直陪着你的。
E: But hey, if you've got something on your mind and can't sleep, don't worry. I'll stay up with you all night.

C: 哎呀，对不起，对不起嘛！肯定是假的啦！
E: Ah, sorry, I'm sorry! I made that up, it's not true!

C: 嗯哼，可睡前故事不就是这样的吗？大家一遍又一遍地听，也一遍一遍讲给别人…所以「故事」才会口口相传嘛。
E: Nope. Bedtime stories are just like that, aren't they? People hear them over and over, and then tell them to others again and again. That's how "stories" get passed down.

C: 不过，人家还是不太懂，那就换一个问法吧——
E: But still, I don't quite get it... so let me ask in another way—

C: 等{NICKNAME}的故事结束吗？那人家再也不好奇了，不要结束嘛……
E: Wait, does that mean {NICKNAME}'s story will end? Then I won't be curious anymore. Don't let it end...

C: 周一总是奄奄一息…
E: Monday always feels like it's draining the life out of me...

C: 嘻嘻，都不用仔细去想——我们成为伙伴一起旅行，已经过去很久很久啦。所以，人家想把一同经历过的点点滴滴，全都记录下来，每一句话都不放过。
E: Hehe, no need to overthink it — we've been traveling side by side for so long now. That's why I want to capture every little moment we've shared, without missing a single word.

C: 好呀。
E: Sure!

C: 借我十万周转一下…
