E: Lend me a hundred big ones to ride this out...

C: 你怎么就敢进来？
E: How dare you come in?

C: 仿造造化洪炉的工艺结构，「匣里流光」也可以有个融合炉。融合炉能够将岁阳充能粒子稳定在低速状态，从而增加杀伤面积……
E: Just like the technological structure of the Creation Furnace, the Luminflux Pyxis can also have a fusion furnace, which can stabilize heliobus charged particles at a low speed, thereby increasing the damaging area...

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 到底是什么事情？
E: What's going on?

C: 恕我稍后再讲。
E: Excuse me, but let's put a pin in that for now.

C: 你这是公器私用吧。
E: You're working a side gig while you're still on the clock.

C: 我一直在接私活，用穷观阵赚些外快。
E: I've been moonlighting on the job this whole time, using the Matrix of Prescience to pull in a little pocket money.

C: 我再准备下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 贵客，麻烦您帮个忙…
E: A favor if I may, dear esteemed guest...

C: 我知道你有很多问题想问我，你问吧，问完我还有事得拜托你……
E: I understand you have lots of questions for me. Go ahead, and I'll have a favor to ask in return...

C: 想聊些什么？
E: What do you want to talk about?

C: 不瞒你说，这两天来大学参观的人实在是太多，负责引导的同学一个个都忙不过来，于是我就站这了。
E: To be honest, there have been too many visitors at the college these few days. The student guides have been overwhelmed, which is why I'm standing here.

C: 这借口听着挺安全的，所以就不等他了。谢谢你陪我打发时间！
E: This excuse sounds pretty safe, so I won't be waiting for him. Thank you for spending time with me!

C: 这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光。
E: This dummy is covered in dark patterns. Perhaps it will shine with light at some moment.

C: 触碰这座人台时，阿格莱雅的声音从里面传出，让你不自觉哆嗦了一下。
E: As you touch the mannequin, Aglaea's voice emanates from within, causing you to shudder involuntarily.

C: 诚如你所说，我确实有些可靠的帮手，但他们大都身负元老院的公务——在这个节骨眼上，我必须避免节外生枝。
E: As you said, I do have some reliable helpers, but most are burdened with duties from the Council of Elders — at this critical moment, I must avoid unnecessary complications.

C: 依我看，这应该是对某个地点的暗示。那里或许存在什么值得注意的东西……
E: The way I see it, this should be a clue about a certain location. There may be something worth paying attention to there...

C: 拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。
E: Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."

C: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
E: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

C: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

C: 嗯…有位织者决心证明自己的力量，但似乎找错了对象。金丝带来消息，它意图向<color=#dbc291ff>尼卡多利的神龛</color>发起挑战，去看看结果如何吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is determined to prove its strength but has picked the wrong opponent. The golden thread brings tidings: They now seek to challenge <color=#dbc291ff>the shrine of Nikador</color>. Go and witness the outcome.

C: 嗯…有位织者不惧于向深渊发问。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>横贯深渊的锁链桥梁上</color>向下凝视，控诉霾中之影的恶行…请将它带离险境吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver unafraid to pose questions to the Abyss. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze down <color=#dbc291ff>at the Abyss spanned by a chain bridge</color>, confronting the shadow lurking in the haze... Please bring them out of danger.

C: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: 最惊险的，莫过于那次——塞纳托斯派了只乌鸦向我递话。
E: There was no more thrilling escapade than the time Thanatos sent me a raven with a message.

C: 桀桀桀，财物只是最庸俗的目标。可偷的东西还很多…记忆、智慧、乃至身份。
E: Crrkrrkk... material wealth is a most trite goal. There are many things to steal... Memories, wisdom, even status.

C: ——扎格列斯老祖在成功骗过瑟希斯时如此评价。
E: ...Ancestor Zagreus said this after successfully deceiving Cerces.

C: ——扎格列斯老祖在逃跑中磕到小脚趾时有云。
E: ...Ancestor Zagreus mentioned this after stubbing its toe while fleeing.

C: 老巴特鲁斯一直都有这样的人生哲学——诡计如果蔓延到游戏之外，那肯定不是什么好事。
E: I, Bartholos, have a philosophy: Tricks taken outside the game would be a problem.

C: 桀桀，等的就是你这句话！
E: Hehe, that's exactly what I wanted to hear!

C: 诶，你算得泰坦，我就算不得泰坦？老伙计，人还是要发挥一下想象力嘛——我在现实中不是泰坦，那也不妨碍我在故事里是个泰坦嘛。
E: Hey, if you can call yourself a Titan, why can't I? Old buddy, let's use some imagination here — I may not be a Titan in real life, but that doesn't mean I can't be one in stories.

C: 从前，有个不知哪来的外地富商在奥赫玛大摆筵席，一连摆了一百多天——都是免费自助！随便什么人，只要搞到了他的请柬，就可以进去大吃大喝，看演员唱歌跳舞，玩一整天都行。
E: Once, a wealthy foreign merchant from parts unknown hosted an extravagant feast in Okhema for over a hundred days — completely free! Anyone with an invitation could enter, feast lavishly, watch entertainment, and enjoy themselves all day.

C: 你也是分身？
E: Another projection, huh?

C: 小奇美拉用真诚的眼神看着你，不再言语。
E: The little chimera stares at you with sincere eyes, falling silent.

C: 桀桀桀，你这不知从哪学来的说话方式还挺有趣！
E: Hehehe, what a strange way of talking. Where'd you pick that up?

C: 逻辑：人是由自我定义的物种。
E: Logic: Humans are a species defined by itself.

C: 或许，黄金替罪羊就是某个已经陷入沉睡的泰坦的梦境……我们不能想当然地就否定这种猜想。说不定做梦就是泰坦的思考方式呢！
E: Maybe the Golden Scapegoat is the dream of a slumbering Titan... It's a conjecture that we can't just rule out. Perhaps dreaming is how Titans think!

C: 神奇的气流将你带到了上层……
E: A strange current of air lifts you up to the higher level...

C: …就位吧，辅祭。
E: ...Take your position, acolyte.

C: 银卷。
E: The Silver Scroll.

C: 白卷。
E: The White Scroll.

C: 记得那老祭司说过，谜题会随着岁月不断扩张…看来就是这么个意思了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司，厉害吧？
E: I remember the old priest saying that the puzzles would keep expanding over time... Looks like this is what he meant. The priest of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} — impressive, isn't it?

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 但愿一切都是值得的。
E: Let's hope it was worth it.

C: 我就是为了不上战场才来当祭司的，这些事情…对我来说果然还是太勉强了。
E: I became a priest so I wouldn't have to fight on the battlefield. This... This is just too much for me.

C: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下？对了，火种匣，要继续打开火种匣。
E: You're... {NICKNAME}? Right... the Caskets. I need to keep opening them.

C: 封存余火的火种匣由三层秘术锁保护，{NICKNAME}阁下，只差最后一步…相信您一定能把它打开。
E: The Coreflame Casket holding the ember is sealed behind three layers of arcane seals. {NICKNAME}, this is the final step... I know you can do it.

C: 所以，已经够了…对吧？我真的…好想…再见到你们……
E: So, it's enough... right? I really... just want to see you both again...

C: 「打个比方而已，差不多这个意思吧。」黑塔不屑地说，「模拟宇宙可不是游戏。别告诉斯蒂芬•劳艾德，不然他听到『存档』二字八成就会开始兴奋…这家伙什么游戏模式都想做！」
E: "It's just an example. Something like that." Herta dismisses the notion. "The Simulated Universe is not a game. Don't let Stephen Lloyd hear you, otherwise he'd get excited just from hearing the word 'save'... That guy wants to make every game mode under the sun!"

C: 瞧，和现实中没区别。你可以自由行动了。找几个怪物打打，做点符合命途的事情。让我看看你会先把哪个模拟星神引来。
E: See? It's no different from reality. You can move around now. Find some monsters to fight. Do something in line with a Path. Let me see which simulated Aeon you'll attract first.

C: 好好地走「存护」命途，行吗？看看能不能让克里珀再出现一回。
E: Take the Path of Preservation again, okay? See if we can get Qlipoth to visit once more.

C: 黑塔？
E: Herta?

C: 不过没事，我们不搞盗梦那一套。就算你在模拟宇宙中死了，现实中也不会受伤。
E: But it's okay. It can't hurt you — even if you die in the Simulated Universe, you'll be untouched in reality.

C: 多给我讲点星神之间的交情故事！
E: Tell me more stories about the relationship between the Aeons!

C: 你抬头，看到一个身影张开六臂，祂肆意伸展虬美身姿，关节舒张，就像在表演宇宙之舞。
E: You look up and see a figure with six arms wantonly stretch THEIR body and bones, as if performing a cosmic dance.

C: 这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
E: There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.

C: 退出。
E: Exit.

C: 你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」</color>
E: You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if he's avoiding something. <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, I wanted to add some random Occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, bland. Sorry about that."</color>

C: …好吧，模拟宇宙会给我点什么吗？
E: ...Fine then. Will I get anything from the Simulated Universe?
█████████Although you can feel ███, the Aeon's ████████████ ██████████appearance, you can hardly █████████.

C: 你怀疑刚刚是不是自己产生了幻觉。
E: You wonder whether you were hallucinating just now.

C: 「…『沙王』通过自我复制、分裂创造的恐怖军团，发源自蠹星系…部分虫群成为地面作战单位…以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与坚硬的甲壳…通常在虫群入侵中担任先锋，利用自身重量踏平大陆，突破防线…」
E: "The formidable army spawned by the self-replication and division of the Sand King originates from the Lepismat system. Some units of the Swarm have transformed into ground combat units... They have sacrificed flight for colossal size and hardened carapaces... These units often serve as the shock troops of the Swarm Invasion, using their massive bodies to break through defenses..."

C: 「伟大生命致力于成为面点大师。」螺丝咕姆转动着他眼镜上的齿轮，研究第三次生命体培育的命运细节，「他拒绝了模拟英雄的帮助，说锤炼好面皮才会回来找我们——他认为小笼包的精髓在于薄面皮。」
E: "That great being was devoted to becoming a master pastry chef." Screwllum turns the gears on his glasses, studying the details of the latest subject's fate. "He declined the help from the superheroes, stating that he would only return to us once he had perfected the art of baking. And he believed that the key to tasty Xiaolongbao was in the thin pastry."

C: 你们围着贡多拉跳舞，悲悼伶人们开心地哭了起来。
E: As you dance around the gondola, the Mourning Actors burst into tears of jubilance.

C: 而在塔伊兹育罗斯陨落、虫潮褪去后，太阳又被温柔地归还。
E: And when Tayzzyronth fell and the Swarm withdrew, the sun was gently returned.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 「上次没怎么说明，现在是时候和你解释『位面』是什么了。」黑塔嗤嗤地笑着，「我刚去做了点别的——如你所见，我邀请伟大的机械贵族——螺丝咕姆加入这场对话。」
E: "I didn't tell you about the planes last time, so let's do that now." Herta snickers, "I was working on something else just now. As you can see, I've invited Screwllum, the great mechanical aristocrat, to this chat."

C: 「同时，『秩序』与『存护』的命途产生了交汇——二者对生命的庇护光辉交集到了一起。」
E: "At the same time, Order and Preservation's Paths crossed — their lights that blessed life intertwined."

C: 螺丝咕姆…可能…但也不一定。
E: Screwllum... may have... but I can't be sure.

C: 哼，一些秘密的情报让我怀疑：<color=#dbc291ff>「塔伊兹育罗斯」可能终将归来</color>。可能性有多大？这就不好评估了。
E: Hmm, some classified intelligence has left me suspicious that <color=#dbc291ff>"Tayzzyronth" may eventually resurface</color>. As for the likelihood, that's difficult to gauge.

C: 向前走吧。
E: Let's keep moving.

C: 然后你抬起头，钟声敲响了。天色阴沉，星空蒙上一层血色。群鸟在枯萎的花与树海间逃散，果实在地上腐烂，「博识尊」计算中的第三个时刻到来了。
E: You look up and hear the chimes. The sky is overcast and shrouded in a blood-like layer. Flocks of birds flee among the withered flowers and trees, and fruits are left rotten on the ground. The third moment calculated by Nous has come.

C: 你审视陌生的四周…星际和平公司招聘专员微笑着站在你面前，你意识到这是你该做出*选择*的时刻。
E: You check out the unfamiliar surroundings... An IPC recruiter stands in front of you with a smile. You realize it is time for you to make a *decision*.

C: 毁灭！
E: Be gone!

C: 来客们纷纷瞪大眼睛，他们看见一群游在半空的鱼，将你驮着送到面前。这些自带微型引擎的飞行装置缺乏负载能力，一个人的重量也需要数十条个体才能承担。
E: Visitors stare agog as they see a group of fish swimming through the air, upon which you are mounted. These flying crafts with their micro-engines lack any load capacity, and just one person's weight would require dozens of craft to bear.

C: 经历了过多的复制和穿梭，收集的记忆杂乱地堆砌在身体里，它们失去了约束，在信息构成的迷因中相互撞击，模糊原本的认知。在它们将你的自我吞噬以前，必须要回到那里。
E: After far too much cloning and going back and forth, the collected memories piled up inside the body haphazardly. Unbound, they collide with each other in the information-medium of memes, blurring the original sense of cognition. Before they devour you, you must go back there.

C: 请赐予我们永生。
E: Please gift us eternal life.

C: 要不要来点饮料？
E: Would you like a drink?

C: 你看见水面的死亡。
E: You see death on the water surface.

C: 学者，我好冷。
E: Scholar, I am so cold.

C: 五分钟后，乌鸦被天使雕像手上的五分硬币吸引。一分钟后，它被一群白鸽袭击，衔在嘴里的硬币坠在地上，半个币身嵌入地砖的缝隙。两分钟后，一辆马车疾驰而来，碾过硬币并剧烈颠簸，马车倾倒、马匹脱缰，受惊的马狂奔而出，离开广场并撞上满载易燃品的板车。
E: Five minutes later, the crow is seduced by the five-piece coin in the statue's hand. One minute later, it is attacked by a flock of doves, and the coin falls from its mouth to half-embed itself in a crack in the plaza tiles. Two minutes later, a carriage comes rushing through the plaza, running over the coin and jolting violently. The carriage overturns and the horses break free, running wild in a panic as they leave the plaza and crash into a trailer loaded with flammable materials.

C: 普拉多斯对你的茫然早有预料，他向你伸出援手，往沙盘中输入一个引导常数。「权杖」恢复了运作，指出内部纪年<unbreak>5011</unbreak>年，<unbreak>013</unbreak>次文明将毁于无工质推进研究。
E: Prados had clearly predicted your confusion and lent you a hand, inputting a guidance constant into the sandpit. The Scepter regained normal function and pointed out that Civilization <unbreak>013</unbreak> would be destroyed in the year <unbreak>5011</unbreak> by an EM drive research.

C: 或许需要欺骗星神？
E: Perhaps you need to deceive the Aeon?

C: 你的答案没能让原告满意。半月后，一颗子弹造访了你的脑袋。你的影响可谓深远，即使在学派战争结束后很久，人造奇物技术依然未能问世。
E: Your response was not able to satisfy the plaintiffs. Two weeks later, your brain received an impromptu visit from a bullet. Though it is fair to say that you were influential. Even long after the Scholars' Strife had passed, synthetic Curio technology was still not available.

C: 广场上不时爆发出阵阵欢呼，那是相对认知学派的集会，你知道他们在庆祝，因为最后一批顽固分子即将被清理。
E: Occasional bursts of cheers ring out from the plaza. It is a meeting of the School of Relative Cognition. You know that they are currently celebrating the fact that the last batch of stubborn hold-outs is about to be cleared out.

C: 你被赶出校长室的同时，下一个教授走了进去。
E: As you are rushed out of the dean's office, the next professor enters.

C: 「纵观整个博识学会，帕提维娅都可以算是最优秀的学者。即使远达不到天才的水准，她的成就也足以让烛墨学派为她单开一页。」
E: "Within the entire Intelligentsia Guild, Patavia is recognized as one of its most distinguished scholars. While she may be far from a genius, her achievements have earned her a separate page in the Candelagraphos' records."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>完美学者</color>，求知者的终极理想，在「智识」尚未诞生的年代，便已具价值的词语。无穷的生命，无穷的视域，无穷的思维，而后知识亦向他俯首称臣。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A perfect scholar</color>, the ultimate ideal for any truthseeker — an invaluable title even in ages where the Erudition was not yet born. A being with infinite life, infinite perspectives, infinite thoughts... and then knowledge also bowed down unto it.

C: 其一名<color=#dbc291ff>能源</color>，痛饮虚数的河水，以期炼就无尽的黄金。你看见技术研发部的徽章，星际能源战争仍未终结。
E: The first is called <color=#dbc291ff>Energy Source</color>, drinking heartily from the Imaginary river, in hopes of tempering boundless gold. You see the emblem of the Technology Department, and the Interstellar Energy War is far from over.

C: 作为科研助理，你和黑塔被蛮横地赶出控制中心，漂浮在「权杖」的外围。伴着空间场的振动，引擎牵引的黑色巨构仍陆续地跃迁至此。
E: As research assistants, you and Herta are unceremoniously ejected from the control center, drifting on the outskirts of the Scepters. Accompanied by the tremors of the spatial field, the black megastructures dragged by engines continue to warp here.

C: 我是谁？我在哪儿？
E: Who am I? Where am I?

C: 但是，你却由衷地与它们产生了共情，心脏颤动，眼泪止不住地流下。
E: Yet, you find yourself genuinely empathizing with them, your heart quavering, your tears streaming uncontrollably.

C: 你感受到「愤怒」。
E: You feel "rage."

C: 如果把宇宙比作一间图书馆，即使宇宙在面前一览无余，只有百年躯体的你，也无法穷尽所有的书籍。人类从出生起就站在已知的圆圈里，无论怎么向外走，总会被更大的圆圈束缚，难以再离开。
E: If the universe is a library, even if it laid bare in front of you, you still wouldn't be able to consume all its books within a lifespan of a mere century. Humanity has stood within the circle of the Known from our birth — No matter how we try to walk outward, we will always be confined by a bigger circle, never to leave.

C: 你大声呼唤，但直到走至黑塔的面前，她才恍然发现，模拟宇宙里多出了一个活人。
E: You loudly call out to her, but it is not until you are right in front of her that she realizes that the Simulated Universe has gained another living being.

C: 「模拟实验室，我的微型培养皿。」她皱眉。
E: "This is the simulated lab, my miniature petri dish." She says with a frown.

C: 听说分部最近人心惶惶，一些员工似乎因工作犯错而被秘密处理。但你仍然沉浸在自己将会晋升的美好愿景里，你认为自己应该将此生的目标定为「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」，分部的领导者！即便「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」仍离总部的大门还有很长距离，但对于你这位青年才俊那都不是问题！
E: You hear that some employees were secretly fired due to work-related mistakes lately, and this has put everyone at the branch on edge. Nevertheless, you are still immersed in the belief that you will be promoted in the future. Reaching level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>, branch director, should be your lifetime goal! Although P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> still has a long way to go before you reach the headquarters' gates, it won't be a problem for a young talent like you!

C: 「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多。」柜员的笑容极具感染力，他举止优雅得体，你相信他是受过公司「人才激励部」培训的优秀员工。
E: "The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate." The teller has an infectious smile and an elegant demeanor. You believe he is an excellent employee trained by the Talent Motivation Department of the IPC.

C: 你需要带着你的「设备助理」来时刻确认自己的状态。是的…「古脑体」将会影响你的精神。
E: You need to carry your Device Assistant with you to ensure you maintain a normal mental state. Yes... the *ancient brain* will affect your consciousness.

C: 你将莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶向其投掷…你成功了！「古脑体」看上去很爱吃这种*热锅*佳肴。
E: You throw a Molotov cocktail at it... and succeed! It seems like the *ancient brain* loves piping hot delicacies.

C: 「嗯，无所谓。实验成功后，恶的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」
E: "Well, it doesn't matter. After the experiment succeeded, my evil self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"

C: 「你好。」一位圣多明戈机械警察向你鞠了个躬，「走一趟吧。证据：您之前的『作弊代码』已被记录在案。」
E: "Hello." A St. Domingo mechacop bows to you and says, "Please come with me. Evidence: Your previous usage of cheat codes have been documented."

C: 「时候选得不错。」阮•梅停下手头的工作，饶有趣味地看着你，「这批作品很快就能完成，只可惜，你应该没法在切片里停留太长的时间。」
E: "You came at a good time." Ruan Mei pauses her work and regards you with amusement. "This batch will soon be completed. It's a shame that you probably can't stay in the world slice for too long."

C: 顷刻间，房间开始颤动，脚下不断传来齿轮啮合的声响，无论它到底是什么，你都一定唤醒了某位极其恐怖的存在。
E: In an instant, the room begins to shake and the sound of gears turning together comes endlessly pouring out from under your feet. Whatever it is, you must have awakened some kind of terrifying existence.

C: 你坐在时间代理银行的人工服务台前，透过水缸，娇小的柜员在处理器前变换表皮的色彩，向你简述大致的开户流程。
E: You sit before the manual service desk of Time Agency Bank. Looking through the water tank, you see a petite teller in front of a processor, changing their skin color and describing the general account opening process.

C: 「再确认一次，您将存入<unbreak>100</unbreak>个标准时的定期存款，按照2％的利率，时间代理银行将在五个公转周期后向您支付报酬。如确认无误，请遵照开户流程进行验证。」
E: "Just to confirm, you will be depositing a one-hundred standard hour deposit and the Time Agency Bank will pay your interest at a rate of two percent in five rotations' time. If this is correct, please complete verification according to the account opening process."

C: 「计划有变，有成年个体向你方向高速前进，马上进入隐蔽！」
E: "Change of plans. There are fully grown specimens approaching your location at high speed. Hide, now!"

C: 作为画室里最具天赋的学生，你笔下酷似无形目生物的人类，哪怕放在庇尔波因特的画展上，都是足以为万人称赞的前卫艺术。之所以没能完成「幻造」，只是风格差异而已。
E: As the most talented student in the studio, your art is avant-garde and worthy of praise from tens of thousands of patrons even at a mere Pier Point art exhibition. The reason this human you drew that so resembles a Shapeless creature could not fully manifest is just because of a difference in style.

C: 骰子停下，数字和你猜测的相差无几。成功的正反馈在你的内心扩张，它逐渐淹没对风险的预警。要再来一次吗？多洛斯人的声音融化在一起。
E: The dice stop, and their numbers are identical to your guess. The success of positive reinforcement burgeons within you, gradually drowning out the warnings of risk. How about another roll? The voices of Dolos' onlookers are starting to melt together.

C: 一阵寒意从你的脚尖传来，潮汐的尽头，塞纳托斯的长船即将把你载向来生的旅程。
E: A chill rises from your toes. At the end of the tide, Thanatos' longship will ferry you on a journey into the next life.

C: 于是，艾格勒闭上眼睛。全能的刻法勒，将「黎明」带至世界的边缘，一片黑暗里，唯有扎格列斯的影子无限地延伸，指引出它的踪迹。
E: Therefore, Aquila closed their eyes. The omnipotent Kephale shifted "Dawn" to the world's edge, where in the darkness, only Zagreus's ever-reaching shadow marked the trail.

C: 生命从此会疲惫。
E: From that moment, life became capable of exhaustion.

C: 当你抵达河畔，塞纳托斯已撑着长船等候多时。没人知晓它的相貌，知晓它相貌的人早已前往来世。
E: When you reach the riverside, Thanatos will have been waiting with the longboat for ages. No one knows their true face, for those who do have already crossed into the afterlife.

C: 所有落到地面的雨露，它们都将渗透、蒸发、流淌，回归法吉娜的神域。
E: Every drop that lands on earth will seep down, evaporate, and flow back to Phagousa's divine realm.

C: 但大海向来无常，它也曾在醉意里掀翻战船，用波浪把游子推向孤岛。
E: But the sea is ever capricious. In their drunken whims, they have overturned warships and cast wanderers onto desolate islands.

C: 英雄们也在船上设宴，鞋子在甲板上敲打出节拍，附和着吟游诗人、琴师和随意的哼唱。
E: The heroes, too, hold banquets on the boat, their feet tapping rhythms on the deck, accompanied by the spontaneous hums of bards and harpists.

C: 出征的英雄彻夜未眠。
E: The heroes lie awake through the night.

C: 愿他们在阳光里相拥。
E: May they embrace under the sunlight.

C: 「呀，真不巧了，宝贝又卖掉一件。您要还有看上的，可得抓紧出手啊。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Ah, too bad! Another prized treasure just left the shelves. If you've got your eyes on something, don't wait too long!" The merchant prods.

C: 纷争踏着战鼓声滚滚袭来，紧随其后的是种种诡计。所有的确定性都被打破，今天还活着的人，明天就可能死去，不管你是贱民还是国王。
E: Conflicts, accompanied by the sound of war drums, surged forward, followed closely by various schemes. All certainties were shattered. Those alive today could be dead tomorrow, regardless of whether you are a commoner or a king.

C: 欧洛尼斯是位好泰坦。
E: Oronyx is a good Titan.

C: 人子对塔兰顿的感情十分复杂，它既不像美丽的墨涅塔和智慧的瑟希斯那样人人欢喜，也不像狡诈的扎格列斯那样人人唾弃。
E: Humanity's opinion of Talanton is complicated. They aren't universally beloved like the beautiful Mnestia or wise Cerces, but they also aren't disdained like treacherous Zagreus.

C: 塔兰顿会理会他们么？在这位铁面无私的泰坦看来，弑君者只是一颗扰动了天平的砝码，而反对者的声音，也不会对平衡造成丝毫波澜。
E: Would Talanton heed them? To this implacable Titan, the kingslayer was merely a weight that disturbed the scales — and the protesters' cries could never ripple the balance.

C: 百无聊赖的吉奥里亚选择沉睡，它呼出气体中冷的那部分，在上升的过程中凝聚成露水。露水降落回大地，最终在凹陷的地区汇聚成大海，这便是法吉娜。
E: Bored and restless, Georios chose to fall into a deep sleep. The cold part of the air they exhaled condensed into dew as it rose. The dew fell back to the earth, eventually gathering in the sunken areas to form the great sea, which became Phagousa.

C: 为什么人类的活动范围基本都在陆地，偶有横渡大洋者，也难免葬身海底，更别提那不可逾越的高天。
E: Why is it that the range of human activity is mostly confined to the land? Even those who occasionally cross the oceans often meet their end at the bottom of the sea, not to mention the unreachable heights of the sky.

C: 悲悯的吉奥里亚为人子求情，瑟希斯允许麦子从土地中长出。
E: The compassionate Georios pleaded for humanity, and Cerces allowed wheat to grow from the soil.

C: 勇敢的启程。
E: A brave journey.

C: 骄傲的天空之主，何尝能忍受这般质疑？
E: How could the proud ruler of the heavens tolerate such doubt?

C: 神明创造了新的神明。
E: A god begets a new god.

C: 于是他放下天平，躺倒在吉奥里亚的背脊上，短暂地进入睡梦。他的一缕头发落到石头上，因他在睡梦中仍然在思考生命，这缕头发便长成一棵巨树。
E: Kephale then set down the scales, lay upon Georios's spine, and drifted into a brief slumber. As they slept, a single strand of their hair fell onto a stone. But because the giant continued to ponder the essence of life even in dreams, that strand of hair took root and grew into a mighty tree.

C: 于是，巨人冥思苦想。终于在某一刻，顿悟了自身的使命——
E: And so, Kephale pondered deeply. Until, in a single moment of revelation, they understood their true purpose —

C: 可我没求职啊。
E: But I didn't put in for the job.

C: 你记得在危难时刻，阿兰让你带上它…如今空间站危机已经解除，也该物归原主了。
E: You remember Arlan asking you to take it during that crisis... and now that everything's over, it's time to return it to the original owner.

C: 「哈哈，密码当然要简单才好啊！<unbreak>123</unbreak>，<unbreak>321</unbreak>，<unbreak>1234567</unbreak>！」
E: "Ha! Of course the password's gotta be simple, right? <unbreak>123</unbreak>, <unbreak>321</unbreak>, <unbreak>1234567</unbreak>!"

C: 还是别帮它打榜了。
E: Just don't upvote it.

C: 你回到了这里，故事开始的地方。恍惚之间，思绪开始飞旋——
E: You're back where the story started. In a trance, your thoughts begin to whirl —

C: 纯净水。
E: Pure Water.

C: 比如说…你知道公司的取木星吗？把它们出口的木材，按「公司」采购清单上的种类名称排序，摘出开头第一个读音，再拼起来——
E: Like... you know the IPC's planet, Junipter? Take the types of lumber it exports, list them according to the categories in the IPC's purchase orders, then take the first letter of each one and spell it out —

C: 只可惜你只浅尝了一口，并未品出更多的韵味。也许应该再多喝一些！
E: It's a shame you only took a tiny sip and couldn't taste more of the aroma. Maybe you should drink some more!

C: 你醒啦？感觉如何？还头晕吗？
E: Are you awake? How are you feeling — dizzy?

C: 流光忆庭的成员，穿行于各世界收集珍贵的记忆。你早晚会遇上他们的，银河列车乘客的记忆，流光忆庭一定特别想要。
E: They are members of the Garden of Recollection who travel between worlds to collect precious memories. You will run into them sooner or later. I bet the memory of a Astral Express passenger is highly sought after by them.

C: 两对身躯虬曲着，纠缠着，舞动着，俨然一道石质的螺旋；却又自腰部以下融合，共享同一半身。那姿态十足诡丽，令你如痴如醉，心荡神驰。
E: The pair of twisting, entangled, and intertwined bodies look like a spiral made of stone. Yet, they are joined together from their waists down. You are mesmerized and fascinated by the remarkably gorgeous and bizarre posture.

C: 怎么不提你<unbreak>27</unbreak>届冠军的事？
E: Why didn't you mention your <unbreak>27</unbreak> championship victories?

C: 看你这架势，是要赶着去帮助其他遇到困难的人吧？哈哈哈，我从老远就能嗅到乐于助人的味道！
E: You look like you're rushing off to help others in trouble, right? Hahaha, I can smell the willingness to help from miles away!

C: 你听见那可憎的长袍窸窸窣窣地在石质地面上拖行，以及那对赤足坠在地面上的闷响。声音越来越近、越来越大——然后在距你咫尺之远的位置戛然而止。
E: You hear the rustling sound of that annoying robe being dragged along the stone tiles and the muffled thump of a pair of bare feet landing on the ground. The sound gets closer, louder, and suddenly comes to an abrupt halt somewhere very close to you.

C: 嘿，有胆来比一比吗？
E: Hey, you've got enough guts to compete with me?

C: 别、别拽我！我才刚开始学，等我挪动一下……
E: D—Don't pull me! I'm only just learning what to do. Let me shift a bit...

C: 嚯，你这人倒是实诚，讨饭也不带个碗。
E: Heh. Aren't you just an honest soul? If you're gonna beg, you better bring a bowl.

C: 告诉你吧，规则很简单：看见这几盘炸好的岩居蟹了吗？等我开始掐表，您就使劲把蟹肉往自个儿嘴里塞——只要能在<unbreak>20</unbreak>秒内吃下5盘，本摊位全场对你免单！
E: Let me lay it out for you. The rules are simple. See these plates of already fried Rock Crabs? As soon as I start the clock, you need to do everything you can to stuff all that crab meat into your mouth. If you get five plates knocked out in twenty seconds, then everything in this stall is free for you to enjoy!

C: 哦，对了——你如果还想参加磐岩镇大胃王挑战的话，不妨明天再来咱的摊位看看。我保证，以你这优秀的底子，肯定用不了几次就能闯关成功！
E: Oh, right. If you want to participate in the Boulder Town's Competitive Eater Championship again, feel free to come by tomorrow. With your excellent ability, you won't need more than a few tries to beat the challenge!

C: 「幸运」的箱子里有什么？
E: What's inside the chest with good luck?

C: 似乎有人将那球体拾起，然后再次抛出；又是一声*砰*，*咚*，然后骨碌骨碌；拾起，抛出，*砰*，*咚*，骨碌骨碌…如此循环往复，始终没有停歇的迹象。
E: It seems like someone has picked up the ball. They throw it again. There's that same thunk, thud, and roll. The person picks it up and throws it again. Thunk. Thud. Roll... And so it continues without any signs of stopping.

C: 什么误会？希露瓦大人的粉丝之间没有误会！
E: Wrong impression? There are no wrong impressions between the fans of Lady Serval!

C: （拍到希露瓦了…拿回去交差吧。）
E: (I got a picture of Serval... Time to go back and deliver it.)

C: 想和你聊聊狂热粉丝的事…
E: I wanted to talk with you about your maniac fans...

C: 这就是它的大本营？
E: This is their base camp?

C: 我切切思慕…
E: I long for...

C: 对、就是这样！尽情惊叹、尽情赞美吧！那位大大就该获得如是尊崇喀！
E: That's right! Marvel and praise freely! Such reverence is exactly what the master deserves, crrrk!

C: <size=36>无语了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too shocked to talk!</size>

C: 老大，我觉得{M#他}{F#她}就在里面！
E: Hey, boss. I think {M#he}{F#she} is inside!

C: 不愧是你！不过还是虎克更厉害一点！
E: I should have expected as much from you! Unfortunately, I'm just a bit more amazing!

C: 喔，这是……
E: Oh, this is...

C: 等下，你怎么在这儿？
E: Wait, why are you here?

C: 「Re」…我似乎在哪里听过这旋律，它应该是第二个音。
E: "Re"... I feel like I've heard this tune before, it should be the second note.

C: 总感觉哪里有问题…好像不是这个顺序？
E: Something's wrong... Is this the correct order?

C: 我偏要看看你是个什么怪东西。
E: I want to see what kind of a strange thing you are.

C: 结果你其实也不清楚吗？
E: You can't tell?

C: 机巧鸟还是挺可爱的。
E: What a cute little cycrane.

C: 这一次成功的侦察，提高了你的自信心，使你不动声色地离目标更近了一步。
E: The successful Spot Hidden check boosts your confidence, making you quietly move one step closer to your target.

C: 恶龙
E: Dragon

C: 为为为什么会这样说…我做了什么吗？
E: Wh—Wh—Why are you talking like that... Did I do something wrong?

C: 你都存了些什么啊？
E: What did you download?

C: 你如果是他们派来找我的，不用担心，我一会儿就回去了。
E: If you were sent here to retrieve me, relax — I'm going back soon.

C: 你看的出，尽管这只机巧鸟想要在你面前高高在上，但是它离开的背影却很卑微。
E: You can see that although this cycrane tries to look snooty and dignified in front of you, its silhouette shows a rather ignoble figure.
7 strales!

C: 上了锁的箱子里那绝对藏了你的仇家，不打开翻翻你晚上都睡不着，连垃圾桶都不放过。
E: Your greatest enemy is a locked chest, and if you can't open it, you'll lose sleep wondering about what's inside. Not even a trashcan is safe from your prying eyes!

C: 你好，我想和你外交…
E: Hello, let's talk diplomacy...

C: 还没有…
E: Not yet...

C: 有什么优惠活动吗？
E: Are there any discount events going on?

C: 没错，我们的那位用户给你寄过来的。事情的前因后果，我们也了解了。
E: Correct, one of our users has sent it over for you. We know how everything's gone from start to end.

C: 无论如何，谢谢你，这是你应得的报酬，我该带雷力去医馆了。
E: No matter what, I want to thank you. This is the reward you deserve. I should take Leili to the apothecary now.

C: 不客气，应该的。
E: No need to thank me. It's the least I can do.

C: 我也不知道我算不算是…
E: I don't know if I am...

C: 他逐一驳斥了我举出来的那几条「工造司的好处」，骂得可凶了，还说什么现在仙舟上最吃香的就是太卜司。
E: He refuted the advantages of the Artisanship Commission I raised one by one, and gave me a fierce tongue-lashing, saying that the most popular workplace on the Xianzhou now is the Divination Commission.

C: 「你来工造司最大的货运星槎上，咱俩当面论道论道」这条回复是我公开发的，他看到了，大家也看到了，他还答应要来呢！
E: "Come to the largest freight starskiff on the Artisanship Commission, let's talk face-to-face." I posted this publicly, so he and everyone should have seen it. He even said he'll be here!

C: 为什么选在这个地方？
E: But why this place?

C: 你就是「摆烂真舒服」？
E: ...are you ComfortablySlacking?

C: 还有什么靠机巧发明一夜暴富的事，那都是老掉牙的事情了。这么多年下来，殊不知那些自诩天才的想法，早就被前人做了个遍。
E: And that point about overnight wealth from inventing ingenia... those are all old-fashioned stories. Over the years, those ideas from self-proclaimed geniuses have been done over and over again by past generations.

C: 但这家伙非说我在冒充匠人，缠着要我和他来工造司最大的星槎上碰一碰。笑了，也不知道是谁给他的底气！
E: But this guy keeps insisting that I am impersonating a craftsman and keeps asking me to meet him on the largest starskiff of the Artisanship Commission. It's ridiculous. I don't know who gave him the confidence!

C: 嘻嘻，我看他们活了几百岁，怕不是活到机巧鸟身上去了。你要是想看热闹，就去货运星槎上找找吧，说不定能见到这两个蠢蛋呢！
E: Hee-hee, look at them, living for centuries in vain. If you want to see some fun, go check out the freight starskiffs. You might even see the two dolts!

C: 得再换个标题才好……
E: I need to change the title...

C: 这不是豪华飞车，这是家族的观影包厢。在广阔的银河系里，一个私人包厢大概是对逐梦客来说最有用的东西了。
E: This isn't a luxury speedster but The Family's private cinema box. In the vast Cosmos having a personal box is pretty much the most useful thing for a Dreamchaser.

C: 这里曾经是多么热闹…
E: This place used to be so busy...

C: 所有谎言都将被揭穿！
E: All of their lies will be exposed!

C: 好欸，居然真的爬上来了！如此美妙的位置，真想把鞋底都涂上胶水，永远地粘在这里——不过，你很快发现，自己好像真不知道怎么下去。
E: Nice, you actually climbed to the top! Such a gorgeous vantage point... You just want to slather your soles with glue and be stuck to this place forever... But, you quickly realize that you have no idea how to get down.

C: 匹诺康尼的谐乐颂…
E: Penacony's Odes of Harmony...

C: 这可是法吉娜的圣兽！
E: This is the sacred beast of Phagousa!

C: 注意到了吗，最近大浴场…
E: Did you notice? There seem to be more...

C: 奥赫玛不会陷落的。
E: Okhema won't fall.

C: 感觉快要沉下去了…
E: Feels like I'm sinking...

C: 命运圣城，我们终于到了…
E: At last, the Holy City of Fate...

C: 只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
E: Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!

C: 看到旁边的「万能合成机」了嘛？集制造、合成、烹饪、维修等多功能于一体…星际和平公司广告上是这么说来着……
E: See that Omni-Synthesizer over there? It integrates a load of features into one machine: Manufacturing, synthesizing, cooking, maintenance... At least, that's what the IPC advert claims...

C: 没…没莓果汁？哦！帕姆想起来了！这是三月乘客专门为不爱莓果的乘客制作的特定饮料配方！
E: N...NO-Berry Juice!? Oh, Pom-Pom remembers now! This is a special recipe crafted by March 7th, especially for passengers who don't like berries!

C: 让帕姆看看…诶？！竟然还矮了这么多？有问题，绝对有问题！帕姆不相信！
E: Let Pom-Pom see... Huh!? Pom-Pom is actually shorter now? Something's wrong. Something's definitely wrong! Pom-Pom doesn't believe it!

C: 走进来又是一地灰尘，晚点得打扫一遍。
E: When Pom-Pom walked in, it was covered in dust. Pom-Pom will clean it again later.

C: …不过仔细想想，确实是在列车上培育出来的，叫这个名字也好像很合适？
E: ...If you could think about it though, if it was cultivated on the Express, then perhaps it might be appropriate to name it after that?

C: （建议帕姆吃止痛药）
E: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they take some painkillers)

C: 跟我聊会儿不行嘛？
E: Can't you chat with me for a while?

C: 怎么样？是不是感觉很…很自然，对吧？
E: What do you think? It makes you feel very close to nature, doesn't it?

C: 好了，流程审批已经搞定，之后会有对应人员送过去的，你回去等着吧。哈欠——
E: Well, the approval process has been completed, and the corresponding personnel will send it over later. You can go back and wait now. *yawns*

C: 所以帕姆只要看到三月乘客开着相机，帕姆就会想办法去做别的事。而且帕姆也是真的很忙啦。
E: So whenever I see March with her camera in hand, Pom-Pom will find an excuse to go do something else. Pom-Pom's always really busy, after all.

C: 关于三月七：少女的心事
E: About March 7th: A young girl's heart

C: 想要挑战「少校」，就必须先<color=#dbc291ff>调度齿轮栈桥，打通道路。</color>
E: You'll need to <color=#dbc291ff>configure the gear bridge to make a path</color> before you challenge the Major.

C: 怎么上升？
E: How do you improve yourself?

C: 哈！哈！哈！
E: Bwahaha!

C: *电波滤音*「牧场行动」成败在此一举！
E: *electronic voice* It's up to you to complete this "Herding Operation."

C: 我从来没有犹豫过，现在就抓。
E: I've never hesitated before. I'll catch it now.

C: 很抱歉，不过这就是工作。
E: I'm sorry, but when it comes to work, it's not always about having fun.

C: 「黑暗拳斗大赛」是什么？
E: What is the Dark Fist Tournament?

C: …那你别来凑热闹！
E: ...Then go away!

C: 哼，你怕了？怕了就赶紧回家吧！
E: Are you chickening out? You wanna go home now?

C: 快去挑战三位「四大天王」吧——记住，是一局一胜！
E: Go challenge the Formidable Four. Remember, it's one round each!

C: 出石头！
E: Rock!

C: 不说话装高手是吧？
E: Not talking because silent waters run deep?

C: 在好运的加持下，你终于给了这骄傲的小朋友一记深刻的教训。或者，用简单的话来说——你赢了！
E: With luck on your side, you taught the arrogant kid a lesson. Or in other words, you won!

C: 邓恩队长也打不过我。
E: Captain Dunn isn't a match for me, either.

C: 不，那才不是什么客房服务…那是寄宿在歌德宾馆里的恶魔！它沉睡在肮脏的、无人打扫的小阁楼里…专门以可怜又无辜的外来者为食。
E: No, that's not room service... That's the Goethe Hotel's resident devil! It hibernates in dirty unattended small attics, specifically feeding on innocent and vulnerable outsiders.

C: 那是寄宿在歌德宾馆里的恶魔！它沉睡在肮脏的、无人打扫的小阁楼里…专门以可怜又无辜的外来者为食。
E: That's the Goethe Hotel's resident devil! It hibernates in dirty unattended small attics, specifically feeding on innocent and vulnerable outsiders.

C: 当然满意，画得很好看啊。
E: Of course I am. They're nice.

C: 对贝洛伯格人来说，星球仪只是一件古董玩物。和一张详细标记出所有商铺位置的行政区地图相比，它毫无实用价值。
E: To Belobogians, this armillary sphere is but an antique plaything. It has no real practical use, especially when compared with a map of the Administrative District that explicitly depicts the locations of all shops.

C: 海洋上零星散布着几个没有被命名的小岛。也许这个世界也曾有流浪汉留下孤岛求生的日记？
E: Scattered in the ocean are a few unnamed isles. Perhaps there are journals left behind by drifters documenting their survival on those isolated islands?

C: 啊，对了。正好你在这儿——我有样东西要给你。
E: That's right. It's good that you're here — I've got something for you.

C: 不错！身为开拓者，你怎么能连这点冒险精神都没有？
E: Yes! No true Trailblazer should ignore such an adventure!

C: 你不明白。这么多年了，你从来就没真正反省过……
E: All these years, you never once blamed yourself...

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 退赔的钱您拿好了。下次遇到这种情况，先别急着给钱。记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
E: Here's for your reparations. Next time if you encounter situations like this, please don't give money in a panic. Remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 那件「谢礼」有着柔软光滑的表面。它散发着温热的气息，在你的指尖有节奏地起伏着。感知到你的存在，它缓缓翻了个身，抱住了你的手指。
E: This "thank-you gift" has a soft, sleek surface. It radiates warmth, which rises and falls rhythmically against your fingertips. Sensing your existence, it slowly turns over and hugs your fingers.

C: （把手伸进去。）
E: (Reach in with your hand.)

C: 哦…那可真是遗憾。
E: Ah... that's a real shame.

C: 机巧鸟还挺好玩的…
E: Cycranes are fun to play...

C: 收下这些吧，这是给你的谢礼。
E: Please take this. It's my token of appreciation for you.

C: 行医市集还藏着药王秘传…
E: Some Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are still hiding in the Healer's Market.

C: 接下来…稍等我看下记录…去<color=#dbc291ff>行医市集</color>附近看看吧。
E: Next... let me check the records... Let's head to the area near the <color=#dbc291ff>Healer's Market</color> for a look.

C: 信号监测系统提示，当前区域搜寻任务已完成，机巧鸟即将前往下一片区域。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the search in the current area has been completed. The cycrane will head to the next zone.

C: 这个铁盒是客户不需要的宝物。说是宝物，你看，它还有个钥匙孔，已经生锈了，钥匙还找不到……
E: It's a treasure that a customer no longer needs. By treasure, I mean... Look here, there's a slot for a key that's rusted over. And I don't have the key...

C: 家里人？
E: Your family?

C: 「智囊」不愧是工造司出身的工匠，「枘凿六合」经过他的改造，已经改头换面。
E: No wonder Think-Tank is such an accomplished craftsman at the Artisanship Commission. The Hexanexus is completely modified as per his specifications.

C: 为了离开母星，我寒窗苦读数十载，终于敲开了博识学会的大门——再看看这里的人，他们把这来之不易的机会用来干什么了？花天酒地！
E: I studied painstakingly for decades to leave my home system before finally entering the hallowed realm of the Intelligentsia Guild — and just look at the people here. What have they done with this hard-earned opportunity of theirs? Live out a life of debauchery!

C: 哈，有些星球或许存在这个选择，但我的母星不包括在内——在我们那儿，不干活，就没饭吃。
E: Ha, that might be an option on some planets, but my home planet isn't one of them — where I'm from, if you don't work, then you don't eat.

C: 生病？嗯…大概是吧——如果精神不稳定能被称之为「病」的话……
E: Sick? Hmm... Probably — if mental health falls under the category of being "sick"...

C: 我还有事要办，就不多跟你闲聊了。保重。祝你好运。
E: I have other business to take care of, so I'll cut the pleasantries. Take care. Good luck.

C: 大恩不言谢。如今依附合约已解除，我也没个好去处，往后该如何安置，听凭您差遣。
E: Words will never be enough to describe my gratitude. Now that the contract of subservience is broken, I have nowhere to go. I shall leave the decision of my future in your hands.

C: …小女子在这等了许久，还以为您不会来了呢。
E: ...I have been waiting here for so long. I thought you would not come.

C: 欢迎下次再来体验*豪华版*的内容啊。
E: You're welcome to come back to experience the *deluxe edition* of our show!

C: 老爷出手这么慷慨。
E: Boss is so generous.

C: 给我讲讲你自己吧。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 我只是一瓶普通的朗姆，注定给不了它渴求的地位和认同。现在我想做的就只是默默地守护它，不让它被其它酒占了便宜…仅此而已。
E: Being just a bottle of rum, I'll never be able to offer it the prestige and recognition that it desires. I just want to protect it from being taken advantage of by other wines... That's it.

C: …你…不说点什么吗？
E: ...Don't you... have anything to say?

C: 你先说说想干什么。
E: Tell me what you want me to do first.

C: 现在的工厂都太注重品牌，反而忽视了酿造原料的质量，这样的极品，已经很多年没喝到了。
E: Factories these days are so obsessed with labels that they overlook the quality of the brewing ingredients. It has been many years since I have enjoyed a fine creation like this!

C: 靠你了，大侦探。
E: We're counting on you, great detective!

C: 他根本没接你的电话，短信也没回复——教授或许正在上课，还是算了吧。
E: He never even picked up the phone. He didn't reply to your message, either... Forget it. Maybe he's teaching a class right now.

C: 寒鸦…
E: Hanya...

C: 呀，这么多家人都来啦？让小桂子我好好拗个造型……
E: Ah, all the fam are here? Let me pull a cute pose...

C: 卡芙卡，你生命中既熟悉又陌生的那个女人…也许她会答应你的请求。
E: Kafka, the lady in your life that you are both familiar with and yet don't know at all... Perhaps she will agree to your invitation.

C: 他气泡的！那是什么邪道饮料，宇宙怎么会容许如此亵渎的苏乐达存在？
E: What the BUBBLE!? What kind of cursed drink is that? How could the universe allow such a blasphemous SoulGlad to exist?

C: 说到哥哥——虽然我们只找到了这本手记，但我觉得这并不能说明什么。直觉告诉我，哥哥现在肯定还好好的，就在美梦的某处…正在为我们共同的理想寻找新的出路。
E: Speaking of my brother... though we only found this journal, I don't think it means anything right now. My instincts tell me that he's definitely alive and well somewhere in this dream... and looking for a new way out for the ideal that we share.

C: 包裹封口完好，包裹表面并无破损或污渍，寄送信息上清楚地写了你的名字，寄件人则是「砂金」，并细心地附带了星际和平公司的防伪标识。
E: The package is neither damaged nor dirty, and has its seal intact. Your name is printed clearly in the recipient field on the waybill, with Aventurine listed as the sender. The Interastral Peace Corporation's mark of authenticity has also been carefully made visible on the package.

C: 邀请花火！
E: Invite Sparkle!

C: 换句话说，你或者上面那个「你」，其中一个就是「无相者」嘟嘟。
E: In other words, either you or the one upstairs is the Shapeless Doot-Doot.

C: 我只负责摇人，不负责卖命。
E: My job is just to locate you, not spill blood for it.

C: 在下是路经仙舟的行商，不幸卷入某起事件之中，被收押至此实属不幸。
E: This humble self is a traveling merchant passing along a Xianzhou ship. Alas, I've been unfortunately embroiled in a certain incident and ended up being detained here.

C: 这名囚犯并不简单，根据一番调查确认，他口中的「老友」也是逃狱五人组其中一人。据说那位「老友」的纹身掌握着「黄金乡」的秘密，所谓「归葬」只是逃犯的托辞。
E: This prisoner is no simple individual. According to our investigation, the old friend he mentioned is also one of the fugitive quintet. Apparently, that old friend has a tattoo that holds Goldville's secret. This so-called burial is just a code word among them.

C: 你就像是用绳子牵引着我，让我在漆黑的箱子与箱子之间来回穿梭，实在是太可靠了！
E: I must say, the way you guided me from crate to crate in the dark, it's like you were leading me around with a rope. I've never known a more dependable ally!

C: 光是口头上说说可不算。你需要用实际行动证明自己。
E: Action speaks louder than words. You have to walk the talk.

C: …不过，你不必担心，就算没有我陪着你，你自己来也能看到编队表演。记得换一台更好的设备啊！
E: ...However, there is no need to worry. You will still be able to see my flight team's performance, even if I'm not with you. Make sure you watch it on something better than a phone, though!

C: …不对。
E: ...Wait...

C: 罢了，你累了，或许人与人之间就是永远也无法相互理解，或许这课堂之上本就无你一方容身之所……
E: Forget it. You're tired. Maybe people will never be able to understand each other. Maybe you never belonged in this class in the first place...

C: 嘿~滴答！我的朋友，钟表小子来了！
E: Heyyy tick-tock! My friend, Clockie is here!

C: ——你对舞台的强烈渴望，正是成为主角的理由。
E: ...Your unquenchable thirst for the stage is the reason you're protagonist material.

C: 你向附近商铺的顾客询问，比对过钱袋信息后，将钱袋还了回去。
E: You seek out the clients at the nearby shops to compare details about this pouch and finally return the money.

C: 来点吃的吧。
E: Give me something to eat.

C: 恭喜，您是一位「热血开拓者」！无论面对什么困难，你都愿意一往无前！
E: Congratulations, you are a Hot-Blooded Trailblazer! No matter what kind of difficulties you may face, you will march forward!

C: 就这样，{NICKNAME}睡到了宇宙热寂，连大道都磨灭了。
E: And so, {NICKNAME} slept until the heat death of the universe, and even the laws of physics collapsed.

C: 没人能叫醒一个装睡的人，更没人能叫醒一个打定主意睡下去的开拓者。
E: No one can wake up a person who pretends to be asleep, and no one can wake up a Trailblazer who has made up their mind to sleep.

C: ——请回答，这是什么？
E: ...Question: What is it?

C: 「零分！下一个！」——熟悉的声音在你的脑海里响起。毫无疑问，拥有了却等同于一无所有的东西，是一张被打了零分的考卷。
E: "Zero Points!" A familiar voice echoes in your mind. Undoubtedly, an exam paper with zero points is something that you own that equals to nothing.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么连半句解释都没有就直接动口？
E: Ouch! This lion bit me before they even gave me a reply!

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 之后再说。
E: Maybe later.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 还是说，你也认为我是一个废桶，特意赶来嘲笑我的？
E: Or, are you here solely to mock me, a basket case?

C: 规矩必须传承…
E: But it's important that we pass on the traditions to future generations...

C: 再见，好心的路人，谢谢你给了我这么深刻的启示。或许某一天，我们会在梦境的尽头再见……
E: Goodbye, kind passerby. Thank you for providing me with such a profound revelation. Perhaps we'll meet again one day, at the Dreamscape's end...

C: 模仿白厄的语气。
E: Imitate Phainon's tone of voice.

C: 这么久都等下来了，也不差这一两天。
E: After waiting all that long, what's another day or two?

C: 咪发迷也经历了跌宕起伏的冒险，击败了坚不可摧的敌人呢！对它来说，甲壳虫也算坚不可摧了。
E: Mifamem has faced wild adventures and conquered unbreakable foes! Though to them, even a beetle counts as unbreakable.

C: 它睡得如此香甜——最好不要打搅它的美梦吧。
E: It's sleeping so peacefully... Better not disturb its sweet dreams.

C: 嗷…嗷呜嗷！暖暖的！
E: Awoo... awooo-wooo! So warm!

C: 但她静谧的睡靥明明没有变化…除了嘴角不知何时勾起的笑意。
E: And yet, her tranquil sleeping face hadn't changed at all... except for the faint smile that had somehow curled at the corner of her lips.

C: 对不起，说出来有些为难，我也不知道丢失的是什么，只是被莫名的遗失感萦绕着，觉得自己应该要去寻找……
E: Sorry, I can't really explain it, but I don't know what I've lost. Yet, I feel an inexplicable sense of loss, and I feel like I should be searching...

C: 瞧！这个稻草人的模样，是不是和你特别像？我可是观察了好久才做出来的。
E: Check it out! Doesn't this scarecrow look just like you? I spent ages observing just to get it right!

C: （想办法让外面的人注意到）
E: (Think of a way to get their attention)

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 你呼唤活火，吉奥里亚的眷从，几乎微不可闻的声音从枯柴中传来。
E: You call upon the Living Flame, the attendants of Georios, a faint, almost imperceptible voice rises from the dry kindling.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you alright?

C: 我是…我是什么呢？
E: I am... What am I?

C: 你也可以给它取一个属于专属绰号——
E: You can also give it your own nickname—

C: 它们的语言习惯和我们不是同一个维度，经常一个音节就能表示很多意思。
E: Their languages are not in the same dimension as ours. They use one syllable to express many different meanings.

C: 请问你是负责空间站复兴的工作人员吗？
E: Are you responsible for the space station revival?

C: 我不过是有些太过幸福，所以导致呼吸失常罢了。
E: I just got too carried away, making me a bit out of breath.

C: 复读也是没有办法的办法。都怪我之前没有随身携带纸笔，记录卡波特大人的吩咐。现在，只能依靠这不争气的脑袋了……
E: I have no choice. It was my fault I didn't bring a pen and paper with me to record Master Capote's orders. Now, I have to rely on my useless brain.

C: 为了你自己的安全，最好还是少去人少的地方晃悠吧！
E: For your own safety, you'd better not go to remote places!

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 不过我听人说过…你好像也经常这么干？总之，你也要多加小心。
E: Although I did hear that you like collecting those leaflets as well. Better be careful.

C: 而且艾丝妲小姐也信任着黑塔女士，我没有理由…去质疑她的行为，嗯。
E: Lady Asta trusts her, so I don't have any reason to, uh, question why she's doing what she's doing.

C: 没什么了，只是随口一提。
E: Just a random thing I thought I'd mention.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 阮•梅女士不在的日子，我们也不能偷懒呀。
E: We can't slack off even though Miss Ruan Mei isn't here.

C: 它似乎快要哭了，但撇了撇嘴后又把泪珠憋了回去，使劲挤出一个并不怎么好看的笑容。
E: It is verging on crying, but it purses its lips and holds its tears back. Then, it forces a stiff smile on its face.

C: 你瞬间明白了它的秉性为何如此急躁，原来是生来如此。
E: You immediately understand why it is so impatient — it was born that way.

C: 大家想让呜呜，呜呜放东西，东西放呜呜身上，呜呜答应了！
E: Everyone wanted to woowoo, put things on woo me. Woo, I said yes!

C: 又碎了——这是什么天生神力啊，你不会是尼卡多利本人吧？
E: It shattered again — what is this godly might? Could you be Nikador itself?

C: 试试就试试！
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess!

C: 这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？
E: My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.

C: 这种玩弄文辞的论辩还是少听些为好。渎神的罪名暂且不论，要是因为沉迷驳倒对方，反而损害了思考的能力，就得不偿失了。
E: These debates of rhetorical wordplay are best avoided. Putting aside the matter of blasphemy for now, if you end up damaging your brain trying to refute your opposition's argument, the victory is still not worth the loss.

C: 不错。我便是其中之一。
E: That's right. I am one of those refugees myself.

C: 不错。异乡的智者果然精通辩论，你成功抓住了这番话里的薄弱环节，但还没有彻底击倒我。我将继续我的论证。
E: Not bad. You excel in the art of debate — as expected, wise one from outlands. You have successfully grasped the weaknesses within my assertions. However, you have not completely refuted my argument. Allow me to continue my point.

C: 要是它在时空外存在，那么我实在想不出能以什么方式来认识它。观察依赖光线，发声需要时间，文字借助形状，时空外存在的事物，是如何被你知晓的？
E: If it exists outside of space-time, then I truly cannot think of what method I can use to gain knowledge of it. Observation relies on light, sound requires time, and words make use of shape... How can that which exists outside of space-time ever be known?

C: 你沉默地从角落里翻出那个布满泥污的背包，取出了里面属于波瑟芬妮的<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。
E: Silently, you pull the backpack soaked in mud from out of the corner and fish out Possephone's <color=#dbc291ff>teleslate</color> from within.

C: …是、是这样啊…那…那你们说…我的波瑟芬妮……
E: ...I—I see... So then... You mean, my darling Possephone...

C: 我的项链？你们是怎么找到的？快把它还给我！
E: My necklace? How did you find that? Give it back to me, now!

C: 蛮横的举动，无礼的话语…你变成如今这样，是我们做父母的失职。
E: Such rude behavior and disrespectful language... Your current behavior is because of our failure as parents.

C: …咦？等等。在你刚才提供的信息中，那个妄图盗取火种的神秘剑士，他看起来毫无怜悯，径直前往了供奉火种的王座——是这样没错吧？
E: ...What? Hold on. From what you just told me, that enigmatic swordmaster who tried to steal the Coreflame seemed ruthless, marching straight toward the Throne where the Coreflame is enshrined — Did I get that right?

C: 呃…这是个玩笑吗？抱歉，我现在很难笑得出来。
E: Uh... was that a joke? Sorry, I'm not really in the mood to laugh right now.

C: 你怎么在这？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
E: I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!

C: 谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
E: Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.

C: 我这么年轻，我还不想死！
E: I'm still young. I don't wanna die!

C: 前辈你好，请多指教。
E: Hello, senior. How do you do?

C: 其实很简单：我们把研发成本压得很低，把经费花在了别的部分。
E: It's actually quite simple: We keep our R&D costs low and spend our budget elsewhere.

C: 我这辈子不会就这样了吧？
E: Am I doomed to do this for the rest of my life?

C: 这得看「公司」那边的安排。
E: Depends on the IPC's logistics.

C: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
E: Grumph... Grumphhh!

C: 他要干什么？我们还是赶紧追上去吧，那家伙好像还没从戏里出来！
E: What's he up to? We should catch up! He doesn't seem to have snapped out of the role!

C: 「我是谁」这个问题一直很有争议，这是由他人决定的吗？还是自己决定自己是谁？
E: The question of "Who am I?" has always been debated. Is identity decided by others? Or by oneself?

C: 都怪你写得太烂了。
E: It's your fault for writing something so terrible.

C: 你是哪位来着？
E: Who are you again?

C: 也是他以刻法勒之名，用另一种方式陪伴孩子的证明。
E: It was proof that, in the name of Kephale, he stayed by his child's side in his own way.

C: 太好了！下届「奥凯纳斯运动会」，我会邀请你坐在掷铁饼比赛的第一排，近距离感受铁饼迎面而来的冲击感！
E: Awesome! For the next "Okeanas Games," I'll invite you to sit in the front row of the discus throw event. So you can experience the thrill of a discus flying straight at you up close!

C: 平民？我早就说了，我才不是什么「平民」。
E: Civilians? I've already told you, I'm no "civilian."

C: 你们是谁来着？
E: Who are you guys again?

C: 呃啊……
E: Ugh... ah...

C: 复仇者们，集结！
E: Avengers, assemble!

C: 为他们祈祷吧…
E: Let's pray for them...

C: 门径的导引是——「欢宴之出口，虚妄的边境」……
E: The guidance from the Gate is — "The egress of banquets, the border of futility"...

C: 是的。自产生疑虑至今，我已经知道得太多太多。我是宴会中的杂音，我眉间的忧愁会让我爱的人们也失去笑容，甚至将他们也拽出这方美景……
E: Yes. Since doubts first arose, I've learned far too much. I'm a discordant noise at a party — the worry between my brows steals smiles from those I love, even dragging them away from this beautiful scene...

C: 在踏出斯缇科西亚城门的刹那，阿波罗尼便化作泡沫飞散……
E: Just as Apollonius passed through Styxia's gates, his entire being dissolved into sea foam and vanished into thin air...

C: 委托名「我的真爱会在哪」，推演结果是「很遗憾」。
E: Request: "Where will my true love be?" - Extrapolation Result: "Unfortunately..."

C: 救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？只要走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿便好。
E: Great Deliverer, might I trouble you to verify? Simply step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.

C: 我很期待哦。
E: Looking forward to it!

C: 嗯，大家都在为更广阔的风景而努力……
E: Mm, everyone's working hard for the bigger picture...

C: ——想象是一切存在的源泉，孩子只需要想象便能理解列车，不需要任何解释。
E: ...Imagination is the source of all existence. Children need only their imagination to understand the Express.

C: 呵呵…罢了罢了——那孩子要是发现相机丢了，肯定会着急的吧？况且……
E: Haha, that won't be necessary — I can't imagine March reacting well if her camera went missing. Besides...

C: 你怎么知道？没有这么大的糖，说不定有蜂蜜味的星球呢？
E: How do you know? Hmph, even if they don't, who's to say there isn't a planet that tastes like honey...

C: 我们出发吧！{NICKNAME}！
E: Full speed ahead, {NICKNAME}!

C: 嘿嘿，我就知道！果然还是诊所更漂亮啦！
E: Hehe, I knew it! Of course it does!

C: 克拉拉知道…克拉拉今天晚上要高兴得睡不着了……
E: I know... I think I'll be too excited to sleep tonight...

C: 感觉可以试试。
E: Why not give it a go?

C: 我们聊了好多——从她怎么修复这辆列车，到她跟着列车经历的冒险，再到那位毛绒绒的列车长帕姆和你们……
E: We talked about a lot of things — how she repaired the Express, all about her adventures, a certain resident fluffy conductor, and you guys...

C: 我看列车上也没有养宠物，但…也有一些掉毛…呃…我猜测可能是列车长有类似的情况，所以询问了它。
E: I knew there were no pets on the Express, but I saw signs of shedding. That's when I realized that, uh... maybe the conductor was having the same problem. That's why I wanted to get Pom-Pom's advice.

C: 长期在宇宙中旅行的人，人体生物周期多少有些紊乱，属于太空病的一种。
E: Those who travel the vastness of the universe for extended periods will often find their bodily cycles to be in some sort of disarray. It's a form of space sickness.

C: 不不，你误会丹恒兄弟了，这是我自己的猜测。
E: You are mistaken. Dan Heng told me nothing of the sort — this was my own conjecture.

C: 原来是{NICKNAME}你啊，吓我一跳。
E: It's you, {NICKNAME}! Are you trying to scare me to death?

C: 我给你带了点儿好东西！
E: I've got something good for you!

C: 为什么有个呜呜伯长得特别大？
E: Why is there one really big Wubbaboo?

C: 咳咳…当然，这些只是心灵上的援助。如果真的感到不适，还是需要找正规医疗途径。
E: *cough* Of course, this is just psychological help. If you feel any real discomfort, please seek out a medical doctor.

C: 我没有什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 那看起来并不是我选择的话题他不感兴趣，到底是为什么呢……
E: So if the topics I chose interest him... why is he still like that?

C: 哎呀，光是想想，就觉得心潮澎湃。
E: Haha, just the thought of it gets my blood pumping!

C: 还是…不打扰你了。
E: I'll... leave you to it.

C: 查阅了你们列车的智库之后，我才意识到，我们贝洛伯格拥有的知识与你们相比，实在是不值一提……
E: After going through the Express' data bank, I've truly realized just how little knowledge Belobog possesses compared to you...

C: 好期待以后的列车生活。感觉一定会很有趣。
E: I'm really looking forward to my future here. It's gonna be so much fun.

C: 哇，谢谢玲可！
E: Woah. Thank you, Lynx!

C: 不客气，希望你喜欢。
E: You're welcome. I hope you like it.

C: …不过，条件大概会比那时候艰苦得多——你要做好心理准备哦。
E: ...But the conditions will probably be a lot worse this time around — you'll need to be ready.

C: 还没有诶…
E: Not yet...

C: 什么草？
E: What are they?

C: 我还是带它去餐车吧…走了，账账~
E: I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage... Let's go, Numby!

C: 星神，还有命途……
E: Aeons... Paths...

C: 嗯嗯，我懂。
E: Hee-hee, I know.

C: 我喜欢这里巨大的窗户，视野不错，可以看到宁静的星空。
E: Isn't it wonderful? Through these windows you can lose yourself in the peaceful starry sky.

C: 绣图时…伤了手。
E: Got hurt while embroidering...

C: 在寒冷中，嗯，似乎还有一丝执着的温暖。
E: There seems to be a hint of warmth in this one, despite the cold.

C: 感谢列车上的大家，米沙已经很久没有这么开心过了！
E: I'm so grateful to everyone, I haven't had this much fun in a long time!

C: 爱你，太爱你了…
E: Lit as fudge! It's just... so peak...

C: 今晚也准备好失眠吧！
E: Prepare to lose sleep tonight too!

C: 这样啊…我这就托管家帮忙，照你的样子订做一个可爱版玩偶。
E: I see... I'll ask the butler to help make a cute doll that looks like you.

C: 如果是这样，我更不能无动于衷了。
E: If that's the case, then that's even more reason not to be flippant about it.

C: {NICKNAME}，我有一个问题：星穹列车…有兴趣把我放进合作对象储备库里吗~
E: {NICKNAME}, I have a question: Is the Astral Express... interested in adding me to the Partner Database?

C: 好！
E: Sure!

C: 我曾为这些不留痕迹的逝去感到遗憾，幸运的是，后来我们得以感知、发现、收藏。
E: I once felt regret for those that were lost without a trace, but fortunately, we were later able to sense, discover, and preserve them.

C: 还有那面充满了列车组快乐回忆的照片墙，看得出三月小姐很喜欢记录生活。
E: And that photo wall filled with the Express Crew's happy memories — it's obvious that Miss March loves keeping records of her life.

C: 访客登记…
E: The guest book...

C: {NICKNAME}，这本访客登记簿…方便让我看看吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, this guest book... May I have a look?

C: 我也是从姬子小姐处听说的，光是听着，小女子的内心便甚是澎湃。
E: I only heard it from Miss Himeko myself. Just listening to it made my heart fill with excitement.

C: 接下来，等修复工程完毕，我们就可以为阮•梅女士准备一个。呃，准备个什么好呢？
E: Next, once repairs are all done, we can get something ready for Ms. Ruan Mei. Um, what should I prepare?

C: 你努力踮起脚尖，试图看懂屏幕上的数据与理论。但你目光所及之处，只有空白的墙壁。
E: You stand on tiptoe, trying to read the data and theories on the screen. Yet, within your vision exist only blank walls.

C: 我走了，你别有压力…
E: I'm leaving. Don't get stressed...

C: 我懂了，再见。
E: I get it. Bye.

C: 虽然我没法出去，但就像这样看看外面的星空，好像也挺不错的。
E: Pom-Pom can't go outside, yet even from here, the stars are still so pretty to look at.

C: 问得好！我的工作可能有点琐碎，但却是贝洛伯格正常运转中不可或缺的重要环节！你甚至可以说，我是这座城市的无名英雄。
E: Excellent question! My job involves a little bit of everything, but vital to keeping things running smoothly in Belobog! You could say I'm the unsung hero of the city.

C: 过得怎样？如你所见，还是老样子。办着一样的公事，领着一样的工资。
E: How have things been? As you can see, it's just the same old, same old. Doing the same work for the same pay.

C: 我这几天都在品尝下层区的新菜，比如蘑菇和可食用苔藓什么的…味道还真不错。等以后彻底放开了，我得好好下去感受下那里的就餐环境。
E: I've been trying new dishes from the Underworld in the past few days. I've had mushrooms, edible moss, and more... The flavor has been pretty good. Once travel between the two areas fully opens up, I simply must go down there and experience the dining environment.

C: 我赶时间，再见。
E: I'm in a hurry. See you later.

C: 你误会了，我是在思考生命、价值和永恒。
E: You misunderstood me. I am pondering about life, value, and eternity.

C: 抱歉，我最近遇到了瓶颈……
E: Sorry, I've had a difficult time lately...

C: 小说都讲了些什么？
E: So what's the novel about?

C: 我想不到更好的办法了。
E: I can't think of a better way to help.

C: 总之，这部剧还在排练阶段，小女子可是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，你要是真的喜欢这首歌的话，就让我们在剧院里再会吧～
E: Anyway, the play is still in rehearsal. I'm the leading.... actress' voice. If you like the song, we can meet again in the theater.

C: 说出来还有点不好意思呢，小女子自幼喜欢唱歌～无论什么歌都可以，一天唱到晚我也不会腻。
E: I've loved singing since I was a little girl... I could sing all day long, no matter what the song is.

C: 你的脾气一直这么大吗？
E: Are you always this grumpy?

C: …好家伙，看看第三版这条，气不死你！「贝洛伯格供暖称外环供暖系统持续故障，面向社会招募紧急维修工人」……
E: ...Get a load of this guy. Check out what's on the third page. It kills me! "Belobog's outer ring heating system continues to malfunction. Now recruiting emergency repair workers"...

C: 呃…你好像来找过我。怎么，碰到什么大案了吗？
E: Hmm... I remember you. Got some big case?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 哈哈，原来是「外来者」！怪我有眼无珠，多有冒犯，请你不要介意。
E: Haha! So you're an outsider! I'm being blind here. Sorry if I offended you.

C: 还好，这两天没他比赛，要不他这一出准给我生意搅黄咯。我还得赶紧把后边的安排调整调整……
E: Luckily he doesn't have any fights for a while, otherwise he'd definitely mess up my business. I gotta switch things up quickly behind the scenes...

C: 这个嘛…我也不知道。可能因为大家都很善良吧～
E: Well... I don't know. Maybe they are just nice.

C: 咦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}说什么啦？如果遇到了什么问题，可以直接对我说哦～
E: Sorry, what did you say? You can tell me if you have any problems.

C: 爸爸妈妈来接我的时候，总会看到那些小朋友远远躲着，好像不想让别人看到自己……
E: When my mom and dad are here to pick me up, those kids always hide far away. They don't want other people to see them...

C: 哎呀…让你见笑了，嘿嘿，睡了一天，我也该起来吃早饭了。
E: Hehe, time to get up for breakfast. I've been sleeping all day.

C: …你等等，给我点儿时间。
E: ...Hold on, give me some time.

C: 嗯…现在应该只缺「逻辑语言中枢」了吧。
E: Hmm... The only thing missing is a language module, right?

C: 歌德家族以前也算兴盛一时，祖辈们投资了不少产业，可惜因为经济不景气，终归还是没落了。先辈心灰意冷，卖空所有家产以后搬到了下层区居住。
E: The Goethe family used to be prosperous. My ancestors invested in many industries. Unfortunately, due to poor economics, our family declined. Frustrated, my ancestors sold all of their properties and moved to the Underworld.

C: 是你啊，这次来可不是来观光的吧？是来住店、吃饭，还是特意来找老头子我聊聊的？
E: It's you. You're not here for sightseeing, are you? Are you here to stay or for our afternoon tea? Or did you come here to chat with me?

C: 欸，我说出声了吗？抱歉……
E: Eh, did I say that aloud? Sorry...

C: 哎呀，原来是你！抱歉，我的视力太差了，居然连自己的救命恩人都没看清楚！
E: What? It's you! I'm sorry I have poor vision. Can't believe I didn't recognize the person who saved my life!

C: 之前在大矿区能获得你的帮助，我真是太幸运了…要不然的话，我的全部积蓄都可能被那群流浪者给抢走了……
E: I was so lucky to be saved by you in the Great Mine... Or my entire savings would've been taken away by those tramps...

C: 关于可可利亚…
E: About Cocolia...

C: 对，是我同意让他们驻留在贝洛伯格的。
E: Indeed, I permitted them to station in Belobog.

C: 吉他手兼主唱嘛，当然是我啦。键盘手是我们朗道家最小最可爱的妹妹——玲可。
E: Guitar and vocals are handled by me, of course. The keyboardist is the youngest and cutest of us Landaus — Lynx.

C: 好啊，欢迎下次光临！
E: Alright, come back soon!

C: 好啊，之后想聊天的话我也随时都在哦。
E: Alright. I'll be here any time if you want to chat later.

C: 真是辛苦你们了。
E: Thanks so much.

C: 不过有一点还是挺可惜的——这姑娘好像对摇滚不太感兴趣……
E: But it's just a pity that this kid isn't into rock 'n' roll...

C: 只要工程一步入正轨，我就把担子丢给佩拉，自己找个地方逍遥快活去。
E: As soon as construction gets on track, I'll hand the reins over to Pela and find a place to enjoy myself.

C: 「裂界」、「寒潮」——不过是贯彻「存护」意志路上的小小磨难！兄弟姐妹们，和筑城者站在一起，和大守护者站在一起！追随她的步伐——我们注定胜利！
E: The Fragmentum and the Eternal Freeze — These are just bumps in the road on the path to carrying out the will of Preservation! O brothers and sisters, stand together with thine Architects and our Supreme Guardian! Follow in her footsteps — for victory is our destiny!

C: 难道是佩拉？
E: Could it be Pela?

C: 我想聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 听说佩拉是你的副官？
E: I hear Pela is your aide?

C: 好吧，我明白了。
E: All right, I got it.

C: ——只是，克拉拉已经做出了判断。我会陪伴她，在这无尽的循环中寻找除彻底格式化之外的突破口。
E: But, Clara has already decided. I will accompany her and seek a breakthrough in this endless cycle that does not involve complete reformatting.

C: …多亏了我们鼹鼠党哇！
E: ...It's all thanks to us Moles!

C: 我很喜欢和姐姐在一起。她性格开朗，多才多艺，我很佩服。
E: I really like hanging out with my sister. She's so cheerful and is so talented in so many things. I admire that about her.

C: ...要不，这玩意你先拿着？多一事不如少一事，咱们就当交个朋友……
E: ...How about you take this thing for now? The fewer complications the better. Just treat this as the beginning of a new friendship...

C: 小冰原熊歪着脑袋打量着你，扑扇着两只半圆形的耳朵。
E: The little arctic bear cub watches you with its head tilted, flapping its semicircular ears.

C: 这件事，大家懂的都懂……
E: Y'all know what's up with this...

C: 真的？！我老早就觉得她眼熟了…啊不是，耳熟！
E: Really!? I knew she looked familiar... I mean, sounded familiar!

C: 要是能进入「炉心」……
E: If we can get into the Furnace Core...

C: 漂亮！再给他来两下！
E: Beautiful! Give him another two!

C: 哈，她急了！
E: Ha, she went bananas!

C: 欢迎来到铁卫禁区。
E: Welcome to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.

C: 哎，怎么又输了…
E: Ack... how did I lose again...?

C: 还会有下次的啦~
E: You will win, sooner or later.

C: 不同展馆中设有不同种类的历史文物，您可以在此欣赏到贝洛伯格历史文化的不同侧面；此外，我们还将不定期举办专题展览，您也可以随时前来参加！
E: The three different areas each have different kinds of historical artifacts on display. You can see Belobog from different angles in each of the areas. Other than that, we will occasionally have themed exhibitions that you can check out!

C: 在最开始的时候，观众们都以为我是来视察展览状况的，根本不敢上前询问…不过，现在大家似乎已经渐渐习惯了——不得不说，这可真是新奇的体验。
E: At first, visitors thought I was here to monitor the status of the exhibition. They were scared to approach me... But now, it seems like everyone started getting used to it — you know, this is a novel experience.

C: 咳咳。虽然排练了好多遍，但这还是太尴尬了…我看，咱俩之间就没必要端着了吧？
E: Ahem. It still feels too awkward even after so many rehearsals... I think we can skip the formalities, right?

C: 这样吗？都怪我我问得有些奇怪了。
E: Is that so? I guess I'm the one asking a strange question.

C: 您是想问咱为什么要开这么一家店吗？哎，这可就说来话长了……
E: You're wondering why I opened this restaurant? Well, it's a long story...

C: …唱歌？哦哦…我这哪是唱歌啊，我这是吆喝！
E: ...Singing? Oh... I'm not singing. I'm hawking for business!

C: 在文明尚未完全开化的铁器时代，伊须磨洲人在海底建立了壮观的建筑群。在遗迹的中心有一座巨大的造像，从海底直冲云霄。
E: Back during the Iron Age, when civilization had barely begun, the people of Insumousu constructed magnificent buildings on the sea floor. Right in the middle of them is a huge statue, rising up out of the sea and stretching into the sky.

C: 哦，你又来啦。要修理旧物，还是要随便聊聊呢？
E: Oh hey, you're back. Got something for me to fix? Or just a casual catch-up?

C: 书肆老板是我的亲戚，他喜好听人闲聊，说是为了收集灵感，用来作为写书的点子。
E: I'm a relative of the owner. He likes listening to other people's conversations, saying that it's good inspiration as an author.

C: …可能你确实没有敷衍我。唉，真的就像你说的，我差一些「文化品味」。
E: ...Maybe you aren't tricking me. *sigh* You're right. I'm lacking in culture and taste.

C: 你还有没有别的文学作品？
E: Have you tried any other forms of literature?

C: 你是世界尽头的叹息，而我只是一枚小小的螺丝钉。我手足无措，不知道如何修补你的心。哎，静斋……
E: You're a sorrowful sigh at the end of the world, while I am just an insignificant screw. I'm at a loss, helpless in ways to mend your broken heart. Oh, Jingzhai...

C: 是我。
E: It's me.

C: 抱歉，他有点情绪激动。…「星和幻娱」只是尝试在仙舟本土试验一种新的娱乐模式——「交感幻戏」，跟我们的传统幻戏不一样。
E: Sorry, he gets a bit emotional sometimes. Interastral Peace Entertainment is just trying to test out a new kind of homegrown entertainment format called "Empathic Immersia" — which is different from our traditional performing art.

C: 「交感幻戏」会提供一个有多种故事走向的幻境。
E: Empathic Immersia will provide a dreamworld with multiple different story directions.

C: 饿不死的，别这么短视。我要认真考虑一下要不要投身「交感幻戏」……
E: We're not starving to death. Don't be so short-sighted. I have to give serious consideration as to whether or not I decide to get into this Empathic Immersia thing...

C: 我乍一听也觉得太难了，但判官们给我指了条明路——协助十王司工作1次，就算1次「小功」。完成<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「小功」，可以合成1次「中功」。
E: At first, I too thought that it was way too difficult, but the judges gave me a clear direction — each time I help the Ten-Lords Commission, it would be considered 1 "Small Merit." After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Small Merits," they can be combined into a "Moderate Merit."

C: 她是我见过最全能的姑娘了。无论是什么工作，只要交给她，她都能顺利完成。
E: She's the most capable girl I've ever met. No matter what the job is, she will get it done.

C: 不会是因为练习拳法吧？
E: Is it because they practice boxing?

C: 那人…似乎叫作广大。
E: He... I think his name is Guangda.

C: 反正你就是一帮我挣工时的，就别管那么多了。
E: And this way, you'll be helping me clock some hours, so don't worry about it.

C: 你这话什么意思？噢，我知道了——你果真是来找我茬的！
E: What does that even mean? Oh, I see — You're just picking a fight!

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 算了，下次再说吧。
E: Forget about it. Maybe next time.

C: 哈哈，就怕我下辈子也只是个小勤务。我已经开始怀疑自己上一世的结局究竟如何了。
E: Haha, I'm afraid that I'll be a lowly orderly in my next life. I've started to wonder how exactly things ended up during my previous life.

C: 你想啊——仙舟民个个长命百岁，哪会专门记得有过一面之缘的小毛贼？
E: Think about it — Xianzhou people live for so long. How could they possibly remember some little punk that they bumped into just once in their life?

C: 你看门口站岗的那些卫兵，领头的叫浴铁…其实，他们都叫「浴铁」。「浴铁」并非一个人的名字，而是一个组织。
E: Those guards over there at the entrance, we call their leader Yutie... But the truth is, they're all Yutie. Yutie is not a person's name, but an organization.

C: 等彦卿兄弟再长高一些，他便能穿上合身的盔甲，与我轮流值守了。
E: Once Yanqing grows a little taller and fits this armor properly, we'll rotate and take turns guarding.

C: 是啊，终于结束了。说起来，卑职和将军大人申请了好几次，要上前线去处理建木危机。
E: Yes, it is. Speaking of which, I have asked for the general's permission to deal with the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis at the frontline several times.

C: 海海，话可不能这样说嘛……
E: C'mon, don't be like that...

C: 有一些商团在黏菌计算机技术上颇有见解，希望和我们达成合作。但是你看到了，神策府对这样的合作过于谨慎了。
E: Certain business interests with a keen insight into mycelium processors are looking to cooperate with us. But, as you can see the Seat of Divine Foresight is being overly cautious.

C: 嗯，再见，路上小心。
E: So long, and safe travels.

C: 计算。
E: Calculations.

C: 恒星改变温度、引力带来潮汐，「洞天」似乎将我们隔绝于宇宙之外，但宇宙始终对我们施加着影响。
E: Changes in star temperature, fluctuations in gravity waves... The delves seemingly isolate us from the rest of the universe, but our fates are still impacted by the expanse.

C: 但他自尊心又高，又不服老，我只能「偷」他的工作来做。我毕竟是持明，忙点就忙点吧，又不会忙到蜕生。
E: But he has a high self-esteem and refuses to accept that he's aged. So, I can only do some of his work for him secretly. As a Vidyadhara, this much work isn't going to force me into hatching rebirth.

C: 别别别，你还是把麻烦事交给净砚吧，她才是地衡司的主心骨。
E: No no no, any thorny problem should be handed over to Jingyan. She's the main backbone of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 据我观察，净砚基本什么都做。处理诈骗、聚众斗殴、各种突发事件处理，还有刑事案件的调查。「有困难找地衡司」，在罗浮仙舟上算是常识了。
E: Based on my observations, Jingyan basically does everything. Dealing with fraud, riots, various emergencies, and criminal investigations. "When there's trouble, call the Realm-Keeping Commission" really is a common saying about the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 呵呵…这最终使我变成了自己最讨厌的人，忠诚于欲望不惜破坏法律的人……
E: Hehe... That has twisted me into the kind of person I hate most, the kind who's loyal to their desires and gives no second thoughts to breaking the law...

C: 您好，尊敬的异邦人。我是翔水商会的专员，我叫茂贞。请问您也是来此处洽谈商业合作的域外行商吗？
E: Hello, dear traveler. I am Maozhen, a member of the Aquaglider Guild. Are you an Outworld traveling merchant also here to discuss some business opportunities?

C: 我再煽风点火一下，比如「我听说最近有其他商团也有超导合金想要出手」之类的…他们的价格还能再降一些。
E: Let me stir things up a bit more, something like, "I heard there's another guild selling superconducting alloys these days"... Their price might drop yet.

C: 我带了一批货物停放在流云渡的积玉坊里，虽然天舶司承诺了货物安全，但是这附近总归是有些孽物不太安全，我经常来这里清点货物。
E: I loaded up a bunch of my stock into the Trove of Verdure here in Cloudford. Despite the Sky-Faring Commission guaranteeing security for me, there's always an abomination or two nearby, so I often stop in to check on my stock.

C: 您过奖了。这只不过是我唯一的长处罢了。
E: You flatter me. This is but my only strength.

C: 互相包容，你们还得一起共事。
E: Show tolerance to each other. After all, you still have to work together.

C: 家家都有本难念的经。
E: Every family has their own difficulties.

C: 阁下还有什么事吗？
E: Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 是说「百般冗物，一抛成空；旧缘宿业，舍手烟消。」…这一句么？
E: You mean "Dispose of all your troubles, leave old grudges in the dust"?

C: 你真是打得好算盘。
E: You really do have a cunning scheme.

C: 是吗？确实有很多化外民都觉得仙舟医学很奇妙。
E: Really? I guess lots of Outworlders usually do find Xianzhou medicine to be rather wonderful.

C: 今日为何不适合占算？
E: Why isn't today a good day for divination?

C: 那位卜者叫作若月，您可能在长乐天广场上见过她的占卜店「鉴爻轩」，从太卜司里离职之后，就回去继承家业了。
E: Her name is Ruoyue, and you've probably passed by her divination shop in the Exalting Sanctum Plaza called the Looking Bronze. After leaving the Divination Commission, she went back home to take over her family business.

C: 公司自然是不会缺钱的，但我们花出去的每一笔账都只为公司的发展负责，不会为「历史价值」埋单。
E: No, of course not, but we'll only pay for things that actually help IPC move forward and get ahead, and definitely not just because of "historical values."

C: 公司是来建设金人巷的，不是来破坏金人巷的。金人巷只会比以前更有价值，我看{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你有些见识，别跟老古董一般见识呀。
E: We're here to develop this alley, not destroy it. The new Aurum Alley is only going to get better. Don't be like those stubborn folks, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 我看你还是不喜欢金人巷。
E: I can tell you're still not a fan of Aurum Alley.

C: 哦，你很上道嘛。
E: Uh-huh. You know what I'm talking about, don't you?

C: 劳务中介。给别人介绍工作的。
E: I'm an employment agent. I introduce jobs to people.

C: 矿泉水也能放生？
E: Can mineral water be "released"?

C: 业缘就是我们作为人和外界一切物体之间的联系。我天天放生积攒功德，为的就是斩断业缘，保持一颗纯真的心。
E: Karma refers to all connections between a person and the outside world. I release things every day, so I can eventually sever these connections and purify my soul.

C: 金人巷这么有名吗？
E: Is Aurum Alley really that famous?

C: 你不也是游客吗？
E: Aren't you a tourist, too?

C: 根据我的经验来看，聊天主要得看客人，几杯烈焰浓茶下肚之后，客人们总是能讲出一些真假参半的故事，而我只用稍稍回应就可以了。
E: But, based on my experience, the quality of the conversation is up to the customer. Once my customers had a few cups of Flaming Potent Tea, they'll start telling stories and half-truths. In that case, all I need to do is nod and play along.

C: 你担心我会泄密，会不知分寸地把客人的故事往外说？
E: Are you implying that I may blabber my customers' secrets to others?

C: 这句话送给您——「没有砸在手里的货，只有不会卖货的人」。像您这样有本事的人我也会向您多取取经的。
E: Here's a piece of wisdom for you: There are no bad goods, but only bad salespersons. As you are a capable person, I'd like to learn from you.

C: 难怪我听说这罗浮的龙尊有名无实…依我看，倒不如早日移民我们方壶去呢！
E: No wonder I heard people say that the Luofu's high elder is an incompetent figurehead... You know what? My kin here are betting off immigrating to the Fanghu!

C: 今时往日，物是人非，只剩喧闹依旧…呵呵，不好意思，这不过是一个老东西怀古伤今的自言自语罢了。怎么，有事要找我吗？
E: So much has changed, yet this alley remains the same... Hehe, please don't mind this old man's sentimental remarks. How can I help you?

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 也许再过一段时间，它会变成一个连你都会觉得惊讶的好地方吧。
E: Perhaps in a little while, it will transform into a place so wonderful that it will blow you away.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 至于老师的事…算了，我还是先冷静冷静再想想怎么办吧。
E: As for Master's subject... Ah, forget it. I need to calm down, and perhaps I'll figure out something later.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 平日工作很危险吧？
E: Is your job dangerous?

C: 不过现在还没到演出的时候，悠姐可以陪你唠唠。小朋友，有什么事吗？
E: But it's not time for the show yet, so I'm here chatting with you. How can I help you, my young friend?

C: 门口石狮子是为朔雪而立。
E: The stone lions at the entrance were built in Snowmoon's honor.

C: 我也是听了这套话本以后，才立志要加入云骑的。
E: I was actually inspired by that story to join the Cloud Knights.

C: 但是黉学的先生们早都告诫过我了！「李大枕头，你和别人不一样，千万不要把时间浪费在学习上。」
E: But the teachers at the lyceum warned me ages ago: "Sleepy Sushang, you're cut from a different cloth, so don't waste your time on the books."

C: 最后又复活了四次，我们实在是打不动了，又不想让小桂子失望，只能硬着头皮继续打……
E: In the end, we came back four more times. We were completely worn out, but we couldn't bear to let Little Gui down, so we had to bite the bullet and keep pushing through...

C: 你对卜算的原理感到好奇？容本座找找…嗯，拿着这个。
E: Are you curious about how divination works? Let me see... Take this.

C: 本座不过是暂代将军之责几日。等景元身体复元，他仍要回归原职的。
E: I'll only be the acting general for a couple of days. Jing Yuan will be back when he recovers.

C: 如今不少仙舟民心高气傲，自以为短生种的学养注定比不上自己…无论长生短生，本座还不到三十岁的时候，就已经比大部分几百岁的老家伙有学问了。
E: Nowadays, many Xianzhou residents arrogantly think that the short-life folks can never catch up with them in terms of knowledge... But knowledge cares not about your age or your lifespan. By the time I was just under thirty years old, I had already surpassed the knowledge of many centenarian old-timers.

C: 啊，这个吗，其实这是古帝国时代就存在，法星辰天象而成的游戏。很少有人知道是我从书库里考古复原的。
E: Oh? The game has been around since the days of the Primeval Imperium, and it is based on astronomy and celestial phenomena. Few know that I was the one who restored it from ancient records in the repository.

C: 寒鸦最近怎么样？
E: How's Hanya doing?

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 我是自己人。
E: I'm one of us.

C: 这十种罪行都是动摇联盟根本的大奸大恶，也必将招致严酷的惩罚。
E: These ten offenses are the greatest sins that could shake the very foundation of the Alliance, and offenders must be severely punished.

C: 算了，我下次再来吧。
E: Forget about it. I'll come back next time.

C: 这位客人您来得正是时候，赶得早不如赶得巧，今天「赎珠阁」剩下的绝当押货都是些好东西。
E: Dear guest, you have arrived just in time. Better in luck than out of it: We have some amazing leftover goods for you.

C: 一般来我们店里的客人有两种，一种是带着东西来的，他们大多会把想要典当的东西小心包装，这是来店里周转济急的。
E: There are two types of customers who come in. The first has something on them, and will wrap with great care what they wish to pawn. They come in search of salvation.

C: 您就算不买东西，我也得留着您在这里聊上一会儿呀。
E: Even if you aren't buying anything, I have to keep you here for a chat.

C: 小便宜都让你给占完了。
E: I got the short end of the stick.

C: 放心，实际结账的时候，那位客人只支付了原价。
E: Don't worry. When the time came to pay, he only had to pay the original price.

C: 他如愿以偿了？
E: Did he get his wish?

C: 我拒绝了。我给了他丹鼎司的地址，医士们或许对这种奇怪绝症感兴趣。
E: I declined. I gave him the Alchemy Commission's address. I figured the healers there would be interested in his rare condition.

C: 不过毕竟我的年纪也比短生种长，要是我说自己去过的地方特别少，也显得有点儿不够真诚。
E: But seeing that I've lived longer than any of the short-life species, it'd be a little patronizing to say I haven't been to many places.

C: 反物质军团。
E: The Antimatter Legion.

C: 嗯嗯。如果有什么适合我的外驻工作，记得推荐给我哦。
E: All right then. Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me.

C: 你要是知道什么有什么适合我的外驻工作，千万别忘了我呀。对了，你找我有什么事情吗？
E: Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me. Oh right, you wanted to find me for something?

C: 看过了，其实感觉没啥意思…一是那边戒严，不让靠近。二是这东西本身也没什么看头。
E: Having seen the tree, I'm not too impressed. Firstly, the place is heavily guarded, and people can't get too close to it. Secondly, there's nothing special about it.

C: …咳，这几百年来，我确实遭遇了很多的事情。至于故事有没有趣，全看你怎么想了。
E: ...Ahem, I've had many encounters these past centuries. Whether they are interesting is for you to decide.

C: 你真的是犯下了大罪了吗？
E: Have you really committed a serious crime?

C: 想听你聊聊异世界经历。
E: I want to hear your stories of other worlds.

C: 让我想想，这回给你说说我生涯中最危险、最接近死亡的一次冒险好了。
E: Let's see... I'll tell you about my most harrowing experience this time, when I was closest to death.

C: 你就别嘚吧嘚了，咱俩往这里一站，大家伙儿看看谁才是太卜司的卜者。
E: Quit your nagging. Let's just stop here and leave it up to everyone else to decide who's the real Divination Commission diviner.

C: 你*仙舟粗口*为什么非要接那一箭？
E: *Xianzhou profanity* — why do you have to catch her arrows???

C: 银河里真的有「筋肉」命途吗？
E: Is there really a Path of Brawn in the cosmos?

C: 冬生也想成为神仙，但爹说，只有修道有成的人才能去到仙宫，跟神仙一起喝桂花酒，吃大鸡腿！
E: I want to become a celestial too, but Dad said only those who have reached the pinnacle of cultivation may enter the Celestial Hall, drink osmanthus wine, and feast on chicken drumsticks with the gods!

C: 有一天咱在山上砍柴。瞧见一艘大船——不是水上漂的那种，是…是飘在空中的，跟鸟毛一样轻——飘向咱们给神仙姐姐立的生祠那儿去了。
E: I was cutting wood in the mountains one day when I saw a giant ship. Not the type that floats on water, but... but one that floats in air like a feather. It floated towards the temple we built for the celestial lady.

C: 那个丹药果然不同凡响，周大善人家的傻孩子吃了不久，突然会开口叫爸爸了，后来长大还考取了功名。
E: That medicine was a miracle. After Kind Zhou's son took it, he suddenly said the word "Father." And when the son grew up, he even passed his exams with flying colors and became an official.

C: 神仙姐姐当时住在镇上的大宅子里，经常给大家看病。很多人病得特别特别重，谁都治不好，但是神仙姐姐轻而易举就治好了。
E: The celestial lady was living in a big manor in town and treated lots of people's illnesses. Some of them were really really sick and no one could cure them, but she cured them really easily.

C: 学会的学士们遍历宇宙，搜集一切有价值的知识，然后用所得知识与其他学士们交换知识，为的是寻求真正的无价之宝。
E: Our scholars traverse the universe collecting all knowledge of value, and trading learnings with other scholars in the hope of attaining priceless wisdom.

C: 嗯，那再见~路上小心，一定要注意交通安全！…哦对了，如果想做「交通志愿者」，记得来找我哦。
E: So long then~ Take care driving out there, and pay attention to the traffic! ...Oh yeah, if you do ever want to be a traffic volunteer, come find me.

C: 哈哈哈哈，谢谢你喜欢我。
E: Hahaha, thank you for liking me.

C: 这群庸才就差把「友谊万岁」写在脸上了。全部加起来，都赶不上我一根脚指头。
E: They might as well fly a flag that says, "I'm just happy to be here!" All of them combined aren't even close to holding a candle to me!

C: 其实我跟彦卿很熟…
