E: Actually, I know Yanqing pretty well...

C: 我更喜欢仙人快乐茶。
E: I prefer Immortal's Delight.

C: 师父，我好紧张。
E: Master, I'm nervous.

C: 管他呢，喝茶喝茶！
E: Who cares. Just drink more tea!

C: 得了怪病，尾巴掉了…
E: I caught a rare disease and it fell off...

C: 仍有人滞留…
E: There are still some people held up...

C: 可如果你选择把钱给我，立刻就能让我吃上一顿好的。而且因为我没有工作，所以我真的需要这笔钱。既然把钱给需要的人就算是行善，那给谁不一样呢？
E: But if you choose to give me that money, I'll be able to afford a delicious meal this instant. And because I'm unemployed, I REALLY need this money. Since giving money to those who need it is an act of kindness, why does it matter who it's given to?

C: 这么高，掉下去怎么办？
E: It's so high. What am I gonna do if I fall?

C: 甲方都满意了，你算老几？
E: The outsourcer is satisfied with the colors. Who are you to talk?

C: 怎么还要质疑我呢…不行就是不行。等等，你不会真的要试试吧，我劝您不要！
E: I can't believe you're doubting me... No means no. Hold it, you can't be serious, are you? I'm sincerely asking you not to!

C: 就是就是，给透点消息呗。
E: Yeah! Can't you tell us just a bit of information?

C: 签什么呢？
E: What do you want him to write as a message?

C: 怎么样，今天是否有兴趣了解一下？
E: How about it, are you interested in learning more today?

C: 你们岁阳不是没法被消灭吗？
E: I thought you heliobi can never be destroyed.

C: 所以，你想不想跟着我发一笔横财，{F#小妹妹}{M#小子}？
E: So then, would you like to hit the jackpot with me, {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

C: 滚一边去，别烦我。
E: Get lost and don't bug me again.

C: 你就在这个距离说吧。
E: You can say it from where you are.

C: 不得已，本座只得将卜算结果呈给景元，然后惴惴不安地在「玉阙」开会。
E: My only choice was to report the results of my divination to Jing Yuan and impatiently await as I held the meeting at the Yuque.

C: 啊！草！你是多么地草！
E: O grass! How grassy you are!

C: 吾有一言，记之曰「零」。再有一言，记之曰「一」。
E: I've got one word for you: "Zero." And another word for you: "One."

C: 天舶司一般会如何处置？
E: How does the Sky-Faring Commission usually deal with them?

C: 看来是只能销毁了。
E: Looks like we have to destroy them.

C: 啧，肯定不是什么好食材。
E: Tsk, I bet they use bad-quality ingredients.

C: 你收到邀请了吗？
E: Did you get the invitation?

C: 我从来没有参加过「奠仪」…
E: I've never taken part in a soul-soothing ceremony before...

C: 感觉每次见到阿雅都有新鲜感。
E: Meeting Agy always feels like a fresh experience.

C: 圣女大人可喜欢我做的小甜饼了…只不过后来担心会得蛀牙，我就偷偷把甜饼藏了起来。
E: The Holy Maiden really loved my cookies... but later I got worried about cavities, so I secretly hid them away.

C: 当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
E: Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—

C: 扑哧…难道说，白厄阁下要重写一篇「论大地兽优于泰坦」的论文了？
E: Pfft... Don't tell me Phainon is about to rewrite another study on "On Dromases' Superiority to Titans"?

C: 起码不是犯人身份。
E: Well, at least you're not here as a prisoner.

C: 莳者同心，同登仙道。
E: Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Immortality's true path.

C: 我说这就不是你，通缉令上的倒像你。
E: I say that this cannot be you. Rather, you look like the person on the wanted poster.

C: 最近加班有点太多，过几天必须还阳一趟。
E: I've been working too much overtime lately. I must go back to the world of the living soon.

C: 你看，这幽囚狱就是一方宝地，咱们犯罪界多少大圣先贤就是在监狱里开悟的。
E: Look, the Shackling Prison is a treasure trove. Do you know how many criminal elites and bigwigs obtained enlightenment in this prison?

C: 什么叫「拔得头筹」。
E: What does "prevail" mean?

C: 所以你逃票成功了？
E: So, did you successfully skip on the ticket?

C: 据说守在门口的石狮子往往雌雄成对——雌狮脚下是幼狮，雄狮脚下是绣球。可这里的石狮子脚下全都是绣球。恐怕是地衡司开需求单时填错了吧。
E: It's said that the pair of stone lions guarding the entrance are often of opposite genders. The female lion has a cub at her feet, while the male lion has an embroidered ball at his feet. Yet, all the stone lions here have an embroidered ball at their feet. It could be that the Realm-Keeping Commission had made a mistake in filling out the request form.

C: 你曾经在太卜司见过这些玉兆单元，但是没有见过这种*锁链形态*…呃，在仙舟，犯了错的玉兆也会被锁在幽囚狱里吗？
E: You've seen Jade Abacus Units at the Divination Commission, but not these chain-shaped ones... Um, in Xianzhou, are jade abaci that have made mistakes also incarcerated in the Shackling Prison?

C: 双身人。
E: The Twin-Vesseled One.

C: 大舌头贝壳。
E: A shell with a big tongue.

C: 《遥远歌谣》
E: Distant Ballad

C: 观看这卷轴无法使你习得任何魔法，更无法增长能力，还是放弃吧。
E: You won't learn any magic or improve any of your skills by staring at the scroll. Just give up.

C: 骗我可以，但是别骗你自己！
E: You can try and fool me, but don't try and fool yourself!

C: 做好事，我从来不留名。
E: I never leave my name when doing good deeds.

C: 气？我们不是用肺呼吸么？
E: Qi? Isn't that something we breathe into our lungs?

C: 对啊，那丹腑到底是啥？
E: Yeah, what exactly is Core Esse?

C: 刚才比赛太精彩了！
E: The match was so exciting!

C: 确实，有一种历经岁月的美。
E: Actually, it has a beauty that has endured the test of time.

C: 这和开赛车有关系吗？
E: What's this gotta do with racing?

C: 迎接玫瑰色的校园生活！
E: Embrace a rosy school life!

C: 「租赁——全新鸢型商舸租赁，市舶备案文件齐全，随租随用，价格优惠。」
E: "Lease: A brand-new kite commercial fly ship is now available to be leased. The Maritime Trade Officer has all the necessary documents, so it is ready to be leased anytime at an affordable price."

C: 「请容许我怀着十万份的真情，再一次问你！你是否愿意接受我的爱意？我会始终等待你的答复！」信中言语近乎恳求。
E: "Once again, please allow me to ask you with all my sincerity: Would you be my lover? I'll wait for your answer forever!" The question almost sounds like an imploration.

C: 带走它。
E: Bring it with you.

C: 你竟能辨认出每只机巧鸟来自何处又去向何方…这没什么值得惊讶的，做了七百年物流专员，这些事你早就烂熟于心了。
E: You find yourself being able to tell the origin and destination of each cycrane... It is not a surprise. After all, you know these things like the back of your hand, having worked as an Express Specialist for seven centuries.

C: 她的活泼、可爱、大方将你百年来的阴翳一扫而空，你们相遇相识的时光似乎要再度上演…突然你开始紧张了起来，事情不能再继续下去了。
E: Her vivacious, lovely, and elegant personality cheers you up after being depressed for a hundred years. You seem to be reliving the time you got to know her... Suddenly, you feel anxious, knowing that you should stop things from going any further.

C: 看来「枘凿六合」并不受欢迎……
E: Seems like Hexanexus is not very popular...

C: 你捏开那朵花苞，里面装着一颗小小的丹药。
E: You squeeze the bud open and notice a tiny pellet concealed inside.

C: 尽管刚才所发生的一切都有违常识，但铁一般的事实摆在你眼前，你不得不接受。
E: Although what just happened wildly contradicts common sense, you are faced with iron-clad proof and have no choice but to accept it.

C: 我是阿往，这位是阿来....
E: I'm Forth, and this is Back'n...

C: 那你露面呗，给他们个惊喜。
E: So do it, give them a surprise.

C: 堆叠的访客行李。即使在去往梦境的途中，有些人也想让自己拿得更多。
E: Guest luggage that has been stacked high. Even when visiting the dreamworld, some people want more and more.

C: 你无法想象这块广告牌多么渴望像球笼一般自由。
E: You can't imagine how much this billboard wants to be free as a spheroid.

C: 有时这扇门会迎接一些着装不算体面的顾客，有时它会用来销毁秘密。
E: This door is sometimes used to welcome more unsavory customers. Other times, it is used to destroy secrets.

C: 靠近这面书架时，你闻到了令人平静的木头气息——不是活的，而是原生的、经过碾压和漂白的木制纸张。
E: When you near this bookshelf, you catch a whiff of a wood scent that soothes the nerves — not alive, but all-natural, compressed, and bleached paper made from wood.

C: 你随手抽出本书、翻开，里面的字符模糊成一片，即便是联觉信标也识别不出来。
E: You casually pull out a book and flip it open — the characters in it are so smudged that even a Synesthesia Beacon cannot comprehend them.

C: 如果再多几个孩子，这间屋子或许会变得热闹又温馨。
E: If there were more children, this house would perhaps be more lively and cozy.

C: ——请不要将手指伸进叶片的缝隙间，除非你想被强制送回现实酒店。
E: Please do not stick your fingers between the slits in the blades, unless you wish to be forced to return to the hotel in reality.

C: 「不要幻想从这里跳下去，里面的场景都还没做完。」来自某位筑梦师的留言。
E: "Don't harbor delusions of jumping down there. The set pieces aren't done yet." A note from a Dreamweaver.

C: 等新梦境开放后，人们就会为这面广告牌争相竞价。
E: When the new Dreamscape goes public, many will clamor to bid for this billboard space.

C: 门锁着，这算是一种保护——毕竟没人能说清门后的空间有没有建造完毕。
E: The door is locked, which is a kind of protection in itself — no one is really clear on whether or not the construction behind the door is complete.

C: 只可惜——哦不，应该说可喜可贺——你根本过不去。
E: Alas... Or rather, congratulations — you can't go through at all.

C: 曾经完整的圆桌，如今已四分五裂。
E: A once complete round table, now shattered into pieces.

C: 一道欢快的嗓音在这空荡荡的宴会厅中炸开、回响：「诸位的掌声与喝彩是对我们最大的鼓励，谢谢大家——」
E: A cheerful voice explodes and reverberates through the empty banquet hall: "Your applause and cheers are the greatest motivation for us. Thank you, everyone..."

C: 希望你对人的情绪足够了解，当心玩火自焚。
E: I hope you know enough about human emotions, or you'd be playing with fire.

C: 家族能够在匹诺康尼取得如此成就，得益于从一开始就选对了方向。我们第一时间发现，肆意蔓延的情绪能量正在摧毁梦域，它们必须受到控制。
E: The Family has been so successful in Penacony because we chose the right direction right from the start. We were the first to discover the need to control the rampant emotional energy, as it was destroying the Dreamscape.

C: 相比权贵名流，我对那些选择孤注一掷的逐梦客更感兴趣。他们怀着不成功便成仁的决心来到这里，只为了追逐一个泡影。
E: Compared to the rich and famous, I'm more interested in the Dreamchasers who risk everything in their venture. It's all or nothing for them, and they're here to pursue something that might not be even real.

C: 然而即便是这玩意，比起此刻你带给我的安宁感…唉，要是能把你绑走、随时带在身边就好了。
E: And yet, what it provides is nothing compared to the feelings of calmness and security that you are making me feel right now... Alas, if only I could kidnap you and keep you next to me at all times.

C: 还有几款产品可以给您推荐呢，这是我的名片，要不您先拿着？诶，您走好！
E: I have some other products I can recommend. Here's my card. Why not take it with you first? Oh, have a nice day!

C: 嘿，又见面了！这位{F#姐}{M#哥}，还记得我吗？我是苜蓿草银行的基南啊！
E: Heyo, we meet again! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, remember me? I'm Keenan, from Alfalfa Bank!

C: 情绪崩溃的基南突然狂笑起来，有张花花绿绿的纸掉落在他脚边。
E: The emotionally broken Keenan suddenly laughs maniacally, a piece of floral green paper falling by his feet.

C: 球笼轨道维修资格、剧院报幕员证、训物大赛银奖、还有酒店下水道疏通技能证……
E: Spheroid rail repair, theater announcer, object training silver medal, and hotel drainage unclogging certificates...

C: 我知道了。你是在开玩笑，想让我心情变好。呜呜，谢谢你。
E: I've got it. You're just joking, trying to get me to laugh.

C: 我的直觉…难道出错了吗？我资深调查记者的美名就要葬送在这了吗……
E: Are my instincts... Wrong? Will this prolific investigative reporter meet her demise here...

C: 小捐一笔。
E: I'll donate a little.

C: 谛听呢？
E: What about a Diting?

C: 无机生命好不容易争取到了入梦的权利——那其它动物呢？熊？谛听？呜呜伯？凭什么那些小生命就不能获得入梦权？它们难道不配享有这片乐园吗？
E: Inorganic life has finally wrested the right to dream for ourselves — but what about other creatures? Bears? Ditings? Wubbaboos? Why can't those other life forms enjoy the right to dream? Do they not also deserve a little slice of this paradise, too?

C: …不见也好，我不在意。
E: ...Or not, I don't care.

C: 你认识她？
E: Do you know her?

C: 不过仔细一想，我训出来的脆筒味道不错…或许改行卖脆筒也是个好主意？
E: But on second thought, the cone I trained tasted delicious... Maybe it would be a good idea to sell crunchy cones instead?

C: 比起之前哄闹的酒店环境，我更喜欢这样…一个人待着，只和我的画布、画笔在一起。
E: As compared to the former hotel from before, I prefer this place... Alone with my canvas and paintbrushes.

C: 我…不擅长聊天。但如果你坚持的话……
E: I... am not good with small talk, but if you insist...

C: 啊，一切用于形容美好的词汇都不足以形容那个瞬间——就像是宾客喝多了苏乐达，晕晕乎乎，但无比快乐！
E: Ah, any words that describe beauty would fail to capture the perfection of that moment... I was like a guest that had overdone it on SoulGlad, dizzy, but that's the happiest moment I had ever had!

C: 你说的有道理…没人规定广告牌不能搭乘「球笼」…或许我可以试着潜入车站……
E: You're right... There are no rules stating that billboards can't take the Spheroid... Maybe I could try sneaking into the station...

C: 动画家、梦境大亨、匹诺康尼之父…这座城市中的每个人都听说过他，这座城市的每处细节也都与他有关。
E: A great animator, a Dreamscape tycoon, father of Penacony... Everyone in this city has heard his name, and every single detail of this city is intertwined with him.

C: 活着总得有个梦想，我就是要成为匹诺康尼最伟大的脱口秀演员！
E: Everyone needs a dream to chase, and mine is to become Penacony's greatest stand-up comedian!

C: …听说购物中心的珠宝店新出了一套钻石首饰，你想要吗？
E: ...I hear the jeweler at the mall has recently launched a set of diamond jewelry. Do you want it?

C: 我不过是尽量把事想得周全、做得谨慎，但哪个正经做生意的不是这样呢？
E: I just did things as best I could, as cautious as I tried. Any business owner would do the same thing, no?

C: 是我想得太多了，区区物件的拙劣模仿，怎么能比得上人类用心奏响的音乐呢？
E: I'm overthinking it — how can music made by a mere object compare to music made from the heart?

C: 可我们的车比球笼要舒适呀。像您这样尊贵的宾客，出行最讲究的就是*松弛感*，来梦里是为了放松，要是再成天挤来挤去，可就得不偿失了。
E: But they're more comfortable than Spheroids. For an esteemed guest like you, *chill and relax* is the name of the game when you're traveling. It'd be a waste if you're being bustled all about when you've come to the dream to relax.

C: 可是我不会开车。
E: But I can't drive.

C: 你看上去不太好。
E: You don't look so good...

C: 好啊，下次如果有时间，可以聊聊你对二次元的理解。
E: Alright. If you get time, you can talk to me about your understanding of anime.

C: 究竟该怎么做呢？真是难以抉择……
E: What are we supposed to do? This truly is a difficult decision...

C: 「对五个琥珀纪以来极繁主义滥觞的驳斥」、「阐释了非资本性的资本竞技及其先天性的二律背反」…实在太过佶屈聱牙，我一个智械都背不出来。
E: "A rebuttal against the origin of maximalism for five Amber Eras," "An analysis of non-capital capital competition and their intrinsic antimony"... It was so convoluted that even an Intellitron like myself would struggle to memorize it.

C: 比如…一定程度的安全性。真的只是牺牲了一点点安全性，一点点而已。我又不是疯子，不可能完全罔顾安全。
E: For example... a set level of safety. It really was just a little safety precaution that I sacrificed, just a tiny one... I am not a madman, so I would never completely forsake safety.

C: 我也绝对不是反对人们追求「艺术」，只是反对建筑师和筑梦师们普遍性地搞错重点。
E: I am also in no way opposed to humans pursuing "art." I am just opposed to architects and Dreamweavers widely mistaking what is truly important.

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 这杯就当是我送您的见面礼吧，不收钱——记得以后常来。
E: Here, this is on the house. Don't forget to come here often.

C: 呃，我想想…是皮戈家族。对，皮戈！我的全名是萨宾娜•皮戈。
E: Last name, let me see... Oh, it's Piggot! Yeah, my full name is Sabrina Piggot!

C: 哦，{NICKNAME}，多美的名字！我会牢牢记在心里的。
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}, what a lovely name! I'll make sure to remember it this time.

C: …既然他们能在这里工作，能力素质自然不会差。
E: ...All of them possess the necessary skills to fulfill their roles effectively.

C: 丹尼斯狡黠地朝你眨了一下眼。
E: Dennis winks at you astutely.

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 但至少这消除了你内心长久以来的一个迷惑：没错，仿生人偶确实是会梦到电子羊的。
E: However, this outcome does resolve a long-standing confusion for you: Androids do dream of electric sheep.

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 不打扰您了，有需要随时喊我就行。
E: I won't impose any further, please feel free to reach out to me if you require any assistance.

C: 吃了。
E: I have eaten.

C: 不饿？无所谓，快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，用美味为您筑梦。
E: You aren't hungry? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain anyway! We'll build your dreamland with our yummy treats.

C: 要是见不到背包外的世界，我肯定会因为寂寞而死的。
E: I'll be killed by loneliness if I'm confined in your backpack forever.

C: …来吧，我就知道你想上来。
E: ...Come on in. You know you want it.

C: 很有气势！好，快上来吧，不管你要去哪，疾风侠都会准时抵达。
E: I love your energy! Come on in! I'll give you a lift to wherever you want to go.

C: 不用感谢我，护送乘客是疾风侠的职责！
E: There's no need to thank me. Offering rides is my job!

C: 就喜欢你看不惯我，又拿我没办法的模样！
E: I enjoy watching you getting all frustrated at me but can't do anything about it.

C: 这就要走了？我还没呆够呢。哎，行吧，我是你的飞车，都听你的。
E: Leaving already? I wanted to stay here a while longer. Well, alright, I'm your flying car after all. Your wish is my command.

C: 你咽下最后一个脆筒，打了一个满意的饱嗝——在美食面前就没必要矜持了。
E: You swallow the last cone and let out a burp in satisfaction. There's no need to care about table manners when enjoying good food.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 什么过时设计。
E: What an outdated concept.

C: 还有什么我能帮到您的？
E: Is there anything else I can help you with?

C: 这是哪里？
E: Where is this place?

C: 请问你如何看待美梦？
E: What's your take on dreams?

C: 哎，大概这就是清闲的代价吧……
E: Ah, I guess this is the cost of having a leisurely job...

C: 来啊，迷途的羔羊，向我敞开你的心扉吧。
E: Come, lost lamb, open your heart to me.

C: 知道模范怎么评的吗？每位家人都会被发到一个沾满奶油的甜甜圈，好把它扔到自己推荐的人身上。谁被沾了最多的奶油，谁就是年度模范。
E: Do you know how this prize is decided? Every Family member will be sent a donut doused in cream to be thrown at the person they wish to recommend. Whoever gets most covered in cream will be the model employee of the year.

C: 我们所做的基础工作，会切实地为克劳克影城提供帮助。指不定下一部钟表小子电影的片尾名单里就有我呢。
E: All the groundwork we do will realistically help Clock Studios Theme Park. Who knows, I might be in the ending credits in the next Clockie movie.

C: 心有不甘又怎样、天赋异禀又如何——当钱和权成了高不可攀的门槛，所谓的艺术又怎么可能保持它的「纯粹」呢！
E: So what if I can't take it lying down? So what if I possess exceptional talent... When money and power become insurmountable barriers, how can the so-called "art" even preserve its purity!?

C: 虽然我并没怎么看过钟表小子的动画，却依旧为他们之间纯粹的友谊而动容。
E: Although I've never watched much of Clockie's animation, I'm still moved by the pure friendship between them.

C: 我承认自己是个懦夫，但我无论如何也无法接受…他居然先我而去了，从此我们再也没有和好的可能……
E: I know I'm a coward, yet there's no way I can ever accept the fact that... he passed away before me. There's no chance for us to ever patch things up...

C: 穿上它之后，哪怕虫群和军团携手入侵朝露公馆，也会被我打得落花流水！
E: Even if the Swarm and the Legion were to launch a joint attack on Dewlight Pavilion now, I would be able to crush them when wearing it!

C: 说到这个…哈哈，黄金扭蛋机旁边那三个一排的美梦排排乐，你有空可以看去看一眼。
E: Speaking of which... Haha, that line of three Dreamy Slots next to the Golden Capsule Machine... if you get a chance, you should go and check them out.

C: …滴答？看、看不到？这…天呐，我的朋友，你是怎么知道的？
E: ...Tick-tock? C—Can't see me? This... Oh dear, my friend, how did you know?

C: 好家伙，当场下班是吧？
E: You're just clocking off right now, huh?

C: 所以您看，要不还是算了吧？
E: So, why don't we just forget it?

C: 别看艾米绮蛮横不讲理的样子，其实心软得很，稍微哄几句就消气了。
E: Amiky isn't the rude and unreasonable girl that you think. She's actually very gentle, she just needs a few words of comfort and she calms down.

C: 自动乐团制造出来那些噪音不算是音乐啊，别想投机取巧！
E: And don't try cheap tricks! The noises coming from automated orchestras don't count as music!

C: 别说傻话，别做傻事，你就不会惹上麻烦。也祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
E: There won't be any trouble so long as you don't say or do anything foolish. I hope you enjoy your time in Penacony.

C: 最后，像个上流人士一样走进大剧院，美美地享受一场演出。
E: Last but not least, I would be an upper-class person and waltz into the Grand Theater to enjoy a performance.

C: 你说话的方式有点瘆人…
E: The way you talk is a bit creepy...

C: 「托斯卡尼乐团」？
E: Toskani Orchestra?

C: 我无意针对任何人，但必须得说，会场里进行的那些挑战都极其愚蠢，毫无技巧可言。
E: I don't mean to criticize, but I have to say that all the challenges were so stupid that they barely took any skill.

C: …我是真的没听说过。
E: ...Really? I've never heard of you.

C: 对对，就是这个银枝！她还单挑过塔伊兹育罗斯，打算成为「繁育」令使来着。
E: Ah yes, that's the one! Argenti! She also called out Tayzzyronth to try and become an Emanator of the Propagation.

C: 呵呵，找个人说说话后感觉好多了…虽然改变不了什么，但还是谢谢你。
E: Haha, I feel so much better after talking with someone... even though nothing's actually changed: Thank you very much.

C: 怎么就连她都退圈了……
E: How did she even end up getting kicked out?

C: 整天鸡蛋里挑骨头，自己偏偏还不会下蛋，也不知道哪来的优越感。
E: Just being super picky and fussy all day and all night without actually having any skill of your own — who knows where this sense of superiority comes from?

C: 哎唷，口气还不小呐？告诉你吧，只要你领的还是<unbreak>1200</unbreak>苜蓿币一天的工钱，哪怕你美若天仙也只是个小群演！
E: Oh, you sure talk a big game. Let me tell you something: As long as you're getting paid a daily rate of <unbreak>1200</unbreak> Alfalfa credits, I don't care if you're Aphrodite herself — you're still just a lowly extra!

C: 告诉你吧，在匹诺康尼举办的这些个比赛、选秀…就没有一个不是被内定了结果的！
E: Let me tell you something, there isn't a single contest or show in Penacony that isn't rigged!

C: 我吓坏了。按理说，我应该会吓醒的…但你经历过吗？ 就是你明知自己在做梦，想要醒来却动弹不得。到处都是怪物，我只能逃——
E: I was terrified. Normally, I should have woken up from the fear but... Has that ever happened to you before? You know you're dreaming, and you want to wake up but you're paralyzed. You're surrounded by monsters and all you can do is run...

C: 这不是什么都没解出来嘛！
E: That didn't explain anything!

C: 啧，钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
E: Tsk... Where are you, Watchmaker...?

C: 城市化不好吗？
E: Is urbanization not a good thing?

C: 一问才知道，他居然想把苜蓿钞种在地里，还说过上几年就能成为梦境首富。我拗不过他，就圈了一块地让他自己捣鼓……
E: It was only when I asked him that I learned he planned to plant Alfalfa credits in the land... He said that in a few years, he would be a Dreamscape millionaire. I couldn't convince him otherwise, so I circled off some land for him to play with...

C: 我能理解这样的悲观预期，但我不明白，他们为什么要当面打击孩子的自信心！
E: While I understand their pessimistic outlooks, I don't understand why they would attack a child's self-confidence in front of them like that!

C: 不对…肯定有什么怪东西在影响着流梦礁……
E: It can't be... There's definitely something strange affecting the Dreamflux Reef...

C: 我不该在那个时候对他们坦诚我的测算结果——他们在离世的时候，会对流梦礁的未来感到多么绝望啊……
E: I shouldn't have been honest with them about my measured results — how much despair they would have felt about the future of Dreamflux Reef when they passed on...

C: 历史会记住他们。
E: History will remember them.

C: 其它店员们也都有着自己独特的演奏风格与技巧，如果你感兴趣的话，不妨亲自看看它们。
E: The other staff all have their own unique playing style and tricks. If you're interested, why don't you go and take a look for yourself?

C: 是否是因为我疏于照顾，才没能给它足够的安全感？是不是我并没有尽到应尽的责任……
E: Did I not give it enough sense of security because I failed to care for him enough? Was it because I didn't do everything I could for him...

C: 亲爱的客人，欢迎光临，想吃点什么？
E: My dear guest, welcome! What would you like to eat?

C: …哎，又一个没看过《钟表小子》的土老帽。
E: ...Bah, another bumpkin who's never seen Clockie before.

C: 关于猫头鹰老师…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 再见，贫穷的客人——下次记得带着硬币来啾。
E: Goodbye, impoverished guest. Bring me some coins next time, tweet.

C: 哎呀～客官您出现得可真及时，是专程来安慰人家的吗？啾啾？
E: Ooh, you've shown up just in time. Have you specially come to comfort me? Tweet tweet?

C: 让我想想…对了，听别的小鸟说，有个坏孩子，<color=#dbc291ff>最近经常带着一只恐龙吓唬大家，就连哈努兄弟也抱怨过它的事</color>啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, I heard from a bird that there's a naughty child that <color=#dbc291ff>has recently been scaring people with a dinosaur. Even Brother Hanu has grumbled about it</color>, tweet!

C: 感觉没什么用。
E: Doesn't sound it's of much help.

C: 来到匹诺康尼之后，我可以自由地做各种想做的事情，但我再也找不回跟那三块积木相伴时的满足了。
E: Upon arriving on Penacony, I could do anything as I wished, but I could not re-discover that sense of satisfaction that I experienced with those three blocks.

C: 通过和他们对话，我逐渐在脑海里拼凑出了星海的全貌，哪怕我打出生起就从没离开过阿斯德纳。
E: Through conversations with them, my mind gradually pieced together the entire cartography of the stars, even if I had never left Asdana since the day I was born.

C: 哈努努…匹诺康尼的缔造者，猎犬家系的第一任家主，这片梦境成为美梦之前的主人。
E: Hanunue... Penacony's founder, the Bloodhound Family's first head, and the master of this Dreamscape before it became a beautiful dream.

C: 所以，我要把哈努努的英雄事迹传遍梦境，当大家知道了这些故事，才能给他一个公正的判词！
E: This is why I wish to spread Hanunue's heroic deeds across the Dreamscape. The people will only give him a fair judgment when everyone becomes aware of these stories!

C: 我目睹了她如何将自己献祭给虚无——
E: I witnessed how she offered herself to the Nihility...

C: 莱斯特先生，今晚您有空吗，我想请您……
E: Mr. Lester, are you free tonight? I wish to invite you to...

C: …我的母亲是位美丽的女士，她知性又优雅、独立而自由…她将我培养成为一位「绅士」，然后为了追求自由弃我而去……
E: My mother is a gorgeous lady. She's intelligent, elegant, independent, and uninhibited... After raising me as a gentleman, she abandoned me in pursuit of her own freedom.

C: 实话实说，即使能当上船长，恐怕我的心境和现在也不会有什么差别。
E: In all honesty, even if I'm able to become a captain, I'm afraid my state of mind at that point in time won't differ too much from how it is now.

C: 草莓
E: Strawberry

C: 可在某场宴会上，他在一位阅历极其丰富的老饕面前败下阵来，他所收藏的一切珍奇食材，在对方眼中都是见惯了的庸常之物。
E: But he met his match in a seasoned glutton at a banquet one day. Every exotic ingredient he presented from his collection was commonplace in the eyes of the glutton.

C: 这时，迟来的悲伤出现在了她的脸上。
E: A look of sadness finally shows on her face.

C: 「你意外落入星际监狱。星际法庭毫不留情，给出最严重的判罚！
E: "In a twist of fate, you find yourself cast into the Interastral Prison. The merciless Interastral Court has handed down its harshest sentence to you!"

C: 那自然没问题。闲聊的话欢迎，但长期来往的话还是算了，我不想在人际交往上浪费太多时间精力。
E: Sure, small talk's fine. But long-term connections are a no-go. I'd rather not waste my time and energy on that.

C: 噢噢，抱歉，我把你也当成那帮小老板了。
E: Oh, my bad. I took you for one of those bosses.

C: 有些小年轻仗着自己家世厉害，来跟我谈合作居然不谈报酬…太好笑了，怎么会有这样的蠢货！
E: Some rich kids try to talk deals with me without going into my cut of the earnings... That's just ridiculous! How can there be fools like that?

C: 能给我打折吗？
E: Can you give me a discount?

C: 船长周边，限量发售，先到先得！
E: Captain's merchandise available for a limited time! First come, first served!

C: 请您放心，我只是在训练的时候管得比较严，私底下我们关系还是挺好。
E: Don't worry. I'm only this strict during training. We actually get along well in private.

C: 方案一，命名为「开拓之尾号」，尾翼配以星穹列车列车长帕姆模样的涂装。
E: Choice one, the Trailblaze's Stern. It features an insignia designed after Pom-Pom, the conductor of the Astral Express, on the tail of the airship.

C: 不过，万一我红了，还得全银河巡演，听说知更鸟小姐的下轮巡演要办整整<unbreak>152</unbreak>场，每场蹦蹦跳跳三个半系统时，我可没这精力。
E: But on second thought, if I do make it big, I'd be touring across the cosmos. I heard Miss Robin's next tour has <unbreak>152</unbreak> concerts, each with <unbreak>3.5</unbreak> system hours of non-stop singing and dancing! I'm not sure I'm up for that!

C: 银河经济、星际市场导论、跨界金融管理…学院的课程安排听起来很高大上，可实际呢？
E: Cosmic Economy, Introduction to Interastral Markets, Cross-Border Financial Management... Yeah, the academy sure put together a curriculum that sounds downright impressive. But what do you really get from those classes?

C: 说说筑梦学院？
E: Tell me about Dreamweaver Academy?

C: 告诉你个秘密吧…我的家乡非常贫穷，和富丽堂皇的梦境截然不同。在那里，即使有家庭的庇护，寻找一个能遮风挡雨的稳定场所仍然要拼尽全力。
E: I'll tell you a secret... My hometown is extremely poor. It is a stark contrast to the rich and extravagant Dreamscape. There, even if you have a family to protect you, finding a stable place to shelter from the wind and rain takes real dedication.

C: 还有问题？要是我的学生能像你这么积极就好了……
E: You have more questions? I wish my students were as interested and proactive as you...

C: 千面杀手…
E: The Thousand-Faced Killer...

C: 不记得有没有和经理聊过，我的家庭管教非常严格，父母希望我把全部心思都放在学业上，将来成为音乐家，为此对我的生活做了许多限制。
E: I forgot if I mentioned before that my family is very strict. My parents hope I will wholly focus on my studies and become a musical maestro in the future, which is why they imposed so many restrictions on my life.

C: 啊…不好意思，退款的话需要把原商品带回来哦，咱的摊位不支持仅退款服务——那样太容易被坑了。
E: Ah... sorry, you need to bring back the original item if you want a refund. Our store doesn't support refunds without that, as we're too vulnerable to being scammed.

C: 我没什么想问的。
E: There's nothing else I want to ask.

C: 你最近还好吗？
E: How are things these days?

C: 来闲聊一会儿。
E: Let's chat.

C: 那么——总有听到这个故事的人会问——既然此人无知无识，人们又要如何运用他操纵「命运」的力量呢？
E: So, people who hear this story will always ask: If this person lacks awareness, how can others possibly wield his power over "fate"?

C: 想为列车做些什么，但初来乍到，无从下手。列车长也只叫我安心待机。
E: I wanted to contribute, but I wasn't sure how. The conductor just told me to wait patiently.

C: 说来有趣，我从未想过，自己有朝一日会与无名客同行。
E: It's funny that I never imagined I would be traveling with the Nameless one day.

C: 关于「无限夫长」…
E: About the Eternal Centurion...

C: 在爱剧中跌落的人偶，扭曲自己却求而不得。
E: A puppet who fell in a romance drama. It twists itself, yet cannot obtain its desire.

C: 丰富的藏书，涵盖了梦境经济、名人传记、忆质技术等多个领域——做高素质黑帮，从我做起。
E: This rich collection of works features the Dreamscape economy, biographies of famous individuals, memoria techniques, and many other fields. If you wanna be a wise guy, you gotta start with yourself.

C: 显像管设备让你幻视了某个熟悉的舰桥，你幻想自己坐在控制室的椅子上，把逻辑推在一边，只管跟着感觉驾驶下去。
E: The cathode ray tube TV monitor makes you hallucinate a certain familiar bridge. You imagine that you are sitting in the control room's chair, shoving all logic aside, and flying the ship based on your instinct and nothing else.

C: 平滑的球体，表面有蓝白色的烟雾在浮动，像是此起彼伏的海浪，又像是流动的云团。
E: A smooth sphere with white and blue smoke floating around it. The smoke both resembles rising and falling waves and flowing clouds.

C: 到底是谁在你口袋里塞了礼物…还有…这是…小费？！
E: Just who was it that stuffed the present into your pocket... And... is this... a tip!?

C: 为什么行李箱会动？
E: Why is that suitcase moving?

C: 苜蓿草的大人物要来视察了。
E: The big shot from the Alfalfa Family is coming to perform an inspection.

C: 好不容易攒钱来度假…
E: It took me so much work to save up for a vacation...

C: 班尼先生最厉害的项目…
E: Mr. Benny's best work...

C: 为什么要拒绝我呢…
E: Why did I get rejected...?

C: 在梦里又不会坏肚子。
E: Come on, you can't really get an upset stomach in your dream.

C: 唉，投资又失败了。现在的钱怎么这么难赚……
E: Ugh... my investments busted again... Making money is so hard these days...

C: 不听实话我问你干嘛？
E: Why else would I ask?

C: 你小心点…
E: Watch out...

C: 是不是有点不对称…
E: Isn't it a bit uneven...

C: 看他们过关斩将，我内心的热血也不禁燃烧起来了！
E: I can feel my blood burning up with passion just watching them clear the obstacles!

C: 哥，要不咱换个名字吧。
E: Brother, I think we should change the name.

C: 可是我这个…这个…数据是…是有验证过，公司背书的事…你这开价也太低了吧。
E: But my... my data has... has been validated. With the IPC's endorsement... Your offered price is too low.

C: 乖，我们别玩了，等爸爸回来吧。
E: Be good. Let's not play anymore and wait for Daddy to come back.

C: 这是一个千载难逢的机会，你不懂…总之…我一定不会错过的！
E: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. You wouldn't know it if it hit you in the face... Anyway... I can't miss out!

C: 你懂什么！
E: You know nothing!

C: 我是第一个来的！
E: I was here first!

C: 我、我真的没钱了。
E: I... I really don't have any money.

C: 筑梦学院学生专用的储物柜，异常坚固，带有自动清洁功能，据传，这些储物柜是在学院建成初期，由学院教授们亲手制作的。
E: A locker exclusively for the Dreamweaver Academy students — exceptionally sturdy and comes with an auto-cleaning function. It's said that these lockers were personally crafted by the school professors when the academy was first established.

C: 艾迪恩，苏乐达的发扬者，逐梦客们的商业偶像，也是财富学院的客座教授。你的脑海里自动响起了熟悉的歌声——「喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！」
E: Aideen, SoulGlad's evangelist, the industry idol of dreamchasers, and a guest lecturer at Fortune Academy. A familiar song automatically echoes through your mind — "Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast!"

C: 课间存放学生们杂物的储物柜，你在底部翻找，除了年代久远的垃圾就是泛黄的旧书。
E: The lockers used by students to store their stuff during breaks. You rummage through the bottom — nothing but outdated trash and yellowed old books.

C: 变频制冷，一秒速冻。商家在一次运营事故中承诺保鲜一个琥珀纪，如今整日祈祷克里珀赶紧落锤。
E: With variable-speed cooling and flash freeze capabilities, the manufacturer once promised to preserve items for an entire Amber Era after an operational mishap. Now, they spend their days praying for Qlipoth to bring down the hammer soon.

C: 拿不到金奖也没关系吗？
E: So it's okay even if you don't win first prize?

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 你想起了在造物引擎上狂奔的曼妙时光，它的拳头真的很带劲。
E: You remember the wonderful times you spent running on the Engine of Creation. Its fists were really powerful.

C: 你想到了「回家故意不摸宠物」挑战，并决定实验一番——垃圾糕怡然自得地舔着尾巴，完全不顾你火热的眼神。
E: You recall the "Challenge of Ignoring Your Pet on Purpose" and decide to give it a try — while the trash cake happily licks its tail, completely unfazed by your eager gaze.

C: 是哪位好心人送我回来的？
E: Which kind-hearted person brought me back?

C: 欧洛尼斯令时间的长河奔流不止，即使你我毁灭，也会浇灌出下一个文明。
E: Oronyx's grace keeps the river of time flowing. Even if we fade away, a new civilization will eventually bud again.

C: 你哥要将你顷刻炼化？
E: Would he "instantly eradicate" you?

C: 不过…当然啦，我也知道在这种世道下，人们往往都自顾不暇，又怎么愿意花费太多心思去了解食物的历史与文化呢。这也是没办法的事嘛，哈哈……
E: But I understand... Life's busy these days, and not everyone has time to dive into food history and heritage. Guess that's just the way things are, hah...

C: 由于黑潮的缘故，这些年陆续有不少外邦人移居奥赫玛。我有幸从他们那得到了一些食谱，并结合其历史文化进行了复刻与适当的改良。这些是我比较满意的作品——
E: Over the years, many outlanders have made their home in Okhema due to the black tide. I've been fortunate enough to get some of their recipes and put my own spin on them based on the relevant history and cultures. Here are a couple of my favorites...

C: 讲讲做饭的故事！
E: Tell me more about your cooking stories!

C: 有很多能说的，我想想。嗯……
E: There's a lot. Let me think, hmhm...

C: 材料只有角猪，和一捆绿菜，老家的人，吃了两天，夸了一整个光历年。
E: The ingredients are just a hornswine and a bunch of veggies. My villagers feasted on it for two days and talked about it for a year.

C: 偷偷告诉你——我在这里给它们留了一只只有{RUBY_B#神}泰坦{RUBY_E#}才能看见的门铃。
E: Just between you and me, I've set up a secret doorbell for them, visible only to the {RUBY_B#gods}Titans{RUBY_E#}.

C: 留给{RUBY_B#旧世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}的时间不多了…很多人都悄悄地这么说。
E: Destiny hasn't got much time left for {RUBY_B#the Old World}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}... That's what many whisper in the shadows.

C: 别客气，老身也没有什么别的爱好，就喜欢看年轻人开开心心的样子。看着你们年轻人乐呵，老身自己也就一样乐呵，多好的事，哈哈。
E: You're welcome. I don't have many hobbies besides watching you youngsters enjoy yourselves. Your happiness is mine, so keep that positive vibe going, alright?

C: 有人吗？
E: Anyone there?

C: 抱歉，入场请往…啊，是您啊，客人。很高兴再见到您，有什么需要吗？
E: Apologies, this way to enter... Ah, it is you, my good guest. Glad to see you again, how may I help you?

C: 不过…我对衣物的品质要求颇高，称得上完工的成衣屈指可数，大部分都被废弃。
E: However... I have extremely high requirements for the quality of garments. My works that meet my standards are few and far between, the rest are all discarded.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 真的吗？谢谢你…这里的人不太相信我，只有你和个别人信我。谢谢你。很少有人愿意听我说这些。
E: Really? Thank you... The people around here don't trust me very much. Only you and a very small number of people believe me. Thank you. So few are ever willing to listen to me talk about this.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}刚来奥赫玛啊？欢迎来到我们伟大的城邦！有什么不懂的你可以问我，或者问那些卫兵，知无不言！
E: Are you new to Okhema, {F#girl}{M#boy}? Welcome to our great city! If you need any help, you can always ask me or the guards. We shall help in any way we can!

C: 传说中法吉娜「把水变成佳酿，使信徒尽享欢宴」，但你知道吗，这不仅仅是个神迹，更是一种象征，其深层含义是分享与和谐。
E: Legend has it that Phagousa "turns water into fine wine so that their disciples may enjoy a great feast." However, did you know that this is not only a miracle, it is also symbolism for a deeper meaning? To enjoy sharing and harmony.

C: 好嘞，跟你聊天还挺愉快的，有空记得多来和我唠唠嗑啊！
E: Cool, it's been real nice chatting with you. Come back whenever you like for the latest gossip!

C: …这话本身没错，但窗户只是用来看风景的。能从窗户翻出去的狠人，从来都是少数中的少数。
E: ...That's true in and of itself, but windows are only for appreciating the view. The ruthless few who can climb out that window are a minority indeed.

C: 每当你觉得世界很糟糕的时候，它又看起来没那么糟糕。至少像这样远远看去，人间的烟火气还是能像画卷一样美丽。
E: Just when you think the world can't get any worse, it's not that bad. At least from a distance like this, the warmth of everyday life can still make up a beautiful picture just like this painting.

C: 是的，我刚来奥赫玛不久。
E: Yeah, I just came to Okhema not long ago.

C: 他们这个说辞我起初还不信，可昨天约莫是幕匿时分，我就听到了它们在这么叫，吓了我一跳。
E: At first, I didn't believe what they said. But yesterday around the Curtain-Fall Hour, I heard them doing it, and it freaked me out.

C: …现在你还在做这份工作吗？
E: ...Do you still do this work now?

C: 而那些墙上的难除顽渍，有时确实会让我们感叹无能为力，只好暂置。至于对策，等污渍蔓延开来，将墙面整个拆除重建，也不失为一种办法。
E: As for those stubborn stains that mark the walls, there are indeed times when we feel there is nothing we can do but leave them be for the time being. That being said, destroying the entire wall and rebuilding it after the stain has spread all over is also a potential solution.

C: 我以前也是面对过黑潮的士兵。如今我虽不再踏上战场，却可以把经验传给年轻人，这也算一种荣耀。
E: I was once a soldier who stood against the black tide. Though I no longer walk the battlefield, being able to pass my experience on to the young is still a form of glory.

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 我听说城外有种名叫{RUBY_B#「执刃黑绒」}钢爪兽{RUBY_E#}的怪物。它擅长掘土，指爪夸张如剑，足以在一挥间斩断精工兵器。一般的士兵根本不是对手。
E: I hear that there's a type of monster called a {RUBY_B#Bladed Black Velvet}Steelclaw Beast{RUBY_E#} roaming outside the city. It excels at burrowing with claws as long as swords on its paws, capable of cleaving through the finest armaments in a flash. Ordinary soldiers aren't a match for it.

C: 你听到波浪缓缓翻涌、汹涌的狂涛、仿佛这小小盆中藏着一片无边的大海。而那海声中还夹杂着奇异的低语——
E: You hear the gentle rolling of waves, their tumultuous surges, like an endless expanse of ocean contained in this small bowl. And strange whispers mingle amidst tidal roars...

C: 聆听星宿之声。
E: Listen to the Voice of Constellation.

C: 你到底是什么？
E: What the heck are you?

C: 大地泰坦的子民，有力气。为了公平，智慧，瑟希斯不给。
E: Strong, Earth Titan's children are. For fairness, wisdom, Cerces gives not.

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 我的耳廓里盈满了幸福的声音。但它们就要溜走了。
E: My ears are filled to the brim with sounds of joy. But they are about to slip away.

C: 好，依我看，我们不妨继续刚才的辩论。理念与现实，究竟何者更为可靠？
E: Very well. I think that we may as well continue the debate that we were having before: Ideals or reality, which is more reliable?

C: 「圆」的知识先于现实的圆形东西而存在，「阿卡索斯」同样如此。
E: Knowledge of "circles" existed before real objects that are round. "Icatus" is the same.

C: 这些在我的画中可能会变成一团跳跃的黄色光点，穿插在深浅不一的蓝色背景中。有人说我的画很抽象，但对我来说，这就是最真实的世界。
E: In my paintings, these may transform into clusters of vibrant yellow dots, scattered across a backdrop of blues in varying shades. Some call my work abstract, but to me, it's the truest representation of reality.

C: 来，刚出锅的「四味烤红土」，您吃的时候跟我说一声，我别过脸去。
E: Here, fresh from the pot — Four Flavors Redsoil Roast. Just give me a heads-up before you dig in, so I can look the other way.

C: 另外，选红土是因为廉价好找，而干干的黄土和粘稠的黑土对它们来说算是嗜好品。要是哪天它们不开心了，作为调剂，可以混点进去！
E: We use redsoil because it's cheap and easy to find, while dry yellowsoil and sticky blacksoil are their favorite delicacies. If they're ever feeling down, you can mix some in as a treat!

C: 这是我深入研究了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为勇者们设立的修炼方式之后，又结合了{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的仪式，开创出的独门修炼秘笈——「飞瀑潜立」！
E: This is my unique training manual, "Flying Waterfall Stance," developed after thoroughly studying the training methods established by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} for warriors and combining them with the ceremonies of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}!

C: 拿着浴场来说吧，「能稳稳浮在水上不会晃的桌子」、「靠颜色变化来辨别水温的墙砖」、「几秒就能把水吸干的浴巾」…
E: Take the bath, for example: "A table that can float steadily on the water without wobbling," "Wall tiles that change color to indicate water temperature," "A towel that can dry off in just a few seconds"...

C: 哈哈，爽快！就知道朋友你是个能处的~
E: Haha, straightforward! I knew you were someone easy to get along with!

C: 唉，行吧行吧，权当是交个朋友，这条消息免费送你了……
E: *Sigh* Alright, alright, consider it a gesture of friendship. I'll give you this information for free...

C: 你这家伙……
E: You...!

C: 唉，算了算了，看在你们这么努力供大家消遣的份上，再追加一份赠品好了——去仔细瞧瞧探险队这几个月的医疗支出吧，运气好的话说不定能捉到只大岩鼠呢。
E: *Sigh* Fine, fine. Since you've worked so hard entertaining everyone here, I'll throw in a freebie — take a good look at the medical expenses for the expedition team over the past few months. If you're lucky, you might catch a big rock rat.

C: （这个人怎么鬼鬼祟祟的，前面就是黄金裔浴池，他想干什么？）
E: (What is this person up to, sneaking around like that? The Chrysos Heir bath is right ahead — what does he intend to do?)

C: 我还想问你呢。
E: I should be asking you that.

C: 哎，伊克西翁，我理解你担心城邦的安危，希望尽自己所能。但万一你失败了呢？那金血，凡人碰了可是要殒命啊！
E: Ah, Ixion... I know that you are concerned for the safety of the city, and you want to do what you can. But what if you are unsuccessful? If a mortal comes into contact with the golden blood, they will lose their lives!

C: 还有「结绳学派」，那帮家伙排外得很，仗着自己是最早创立的学派，对谁都一副高高在上的姿态——简直恨不得在门口放个牌子，上书「不懂几何者与狗不得入内」！
E: And the Nodist school. Those guys are haughty exclusionists clinging on to their status as the first school to be founded, and turn their nose up on everyone else. They might as well hang a sign over their entrance that writes, "No dogs or geometrically-challenged people allowed!"

C: 别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
E: Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!

C: 至于其他的…什么类型的知识种子都有，这个得看我们树庭的学者们最近在研究什么了。
E: As for the others... We've got all kinds of Knowledge Seeds. It all depends on what our Grove scholars have been researching recently.

C: 我是来自黑塔空间站的XS<unbreak>-9527</unbreak>，不过现在更喜欢别人像姬子小姐那样叫我「{NICKNAME}的小助理」。
E: My designation is XS<unbreak>-9527</unbreak> from the Herta Space Station, but these days I'm going by "{NICKNAME}'s assistant," much like Miss Himeko does.

C: 我想听神谕。
E: I want to hear my prophecy.

C: 退一万步说，即使悬锋人真的对雅努萨波利斯图谋不轨，只要我们以神谕统合众邦，悬锋城又有何惧？
E: Even if the Kremnoans did have a plot against Janusopolis, we need simply unite the nations through our prophecies. What is there to fear about Castrum Kremnos?

C: 打扰了，我想自己逛逛。
E: Sorry, but I'd like to explore on my own.

C: 多么清廉的大人啊，与圣殿的祭司完全不同…我对您的感激之情无以言表。阁下，若是有要了解的事，请尽管来找我。我必定知无不言！
E: Such integrity, esteemed one, so unlike the temple's priests... I'm deeply grateful. Noble one, if there's anything you wish to know, please feel free to inquire. I'll share everything I can!

C: 你对泰坦信仰怎么看？
E: What is your view on the Titan faith?

C: 请您放心，祭司们的教诲我会铭记——{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为我们指引前路，而{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的教典正是卫士的根基！
E: Rest assured, I heed the teachings of the priests. — {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guides our path, and the scriptures of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} are the foundation of every guard!

C: 留在冥界的遐蝶。
E: Castorice, who remains behind in the nether realm.

C: 嗯…我觉得平时的日常生活，就是足够令我喜欢的事情了。
E: Hmm... I think my normal, everyday life is what I really enjoy.

C: 当然可以！你想聊些什么？
E: Of course! Anything you'd like to talk about?

C: 但是…当与它面对面对峙、剑锋相交之时，那段深埋回忆中的悲惧，便会燃为奔腾的战意与怒火。
E: But when I stood face-to-face with them, crossing blades, those buried fears and sorrow ignited into a surging battle spirit and anger.

C: 身为雅努萨波利斯的圣女，她曾经受万人敬仰，却因偷窃火种而饱受敌意。那些曾发誓保护她的卫士，将矛头对准了她。
E: As the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, she was once revered by thousands, yet she suffered great hostility for stealing the Coreflame. Those guards who once swore to protect her turned their spears against her.

C: 哦，这个啊…也没什么可隐瞒的——我是靠奥赫玛之外的黑潮发财的。
E: Oh, that? It's no secret — I made my fortune outside Okhema, in the black tide.

C: 你讨厌贵族还借他们钱？
E: You despise the aristocrats, yet you still lend them money?

C: 公司欠你个offer…
E: You deserve an offer... from a certain Corporation.

C: 请您想象一座云端之上的城市，它的结构像干燥的浴球：人们在城市何处生活，那里就会「吸水」膨胀；而这被比作「水分」的介质，正是市民们的欲望和记忆。
E: Imagine a city floating above the clouds, structured like a dried bath sponge. Wherever people live, that part of the city "absorbs water" and swells. The "water" represents the desires and memories of its citizens.

C: 从此故乡，就成了我永远的精神故乡了。呵呵。
E: And so, my homeland became my eternal spiritual sanctuary. Haha.

C: 有人说过你有些…自恋吗？
E: Has anyone ever called you... narcissistic?

C: 有位树庭的哲学家想要伸手摘杏子，却被妻子责备，他说「我就是摘了，又*翁法罗斯粗口*会怎么样呢？」片刻之后，他死了。
E: There was a philosopher of the Grove who tried to pick some apricots but was scolded by his wife. He said, "So what if I picked them? What the *Amphoreus profanity* is going to happen?" Moments later, he died.

C: 迷途的人啊，可有想过自己的墓志铭？
E: Lost human, have you ever thought about your own epitaph?

C: 讲讲受人敬仰的人…
E: Those distinguished and respected...

C: 嗯…有位织者胸怀大志。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>与负日者遥相眺望</color>，期待着重新扬帆起航呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver has great ambitions. The golden thread brings news that it is <color=#dbc291ff>gazing at the Sunbearer from afar</color>, awaiting the chance to set sail again.

C: 没有记忆残晶，我们该如何追溯若虫的踪迹？等你得到之后再来找我吧。
E: Without Memory Crystal Shards, how can we trace the nymphs? Come back when you have some.

C: 亡语蝶仅靠一丝执念存留于世，没有灵魂、亦没有怀揣赐福，贵客无需在意它们。
E: Eulogistic Butterflies exist in this world by a thread of obsession, without souls or blessings. You need not pay them any mind.

C: 听说他平时羞涩怕事，羡慕他人健美的身材。但在可怕的怪物面前，他毫不犹豫地用自己的脊背护住了这个孩子……
E: They say he's normally shy and insecure, always admiring others' athletic builds. But when those frightening monsters appeared, he immediately shielded the child with his back without a second thought...

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 不太妙。怪物，一批接着一批。彩虹罩子，帮了大忙。但，人们太慌张。
E: Not good. Monsters, coming in waves. Rainbow dome, big help. But people are panicking.

C: 很多人，去了上面。哈托努斯也，战斗，带着工匠们。我们，更健壮，赞美，吉奥里亚。
E: Many went upstairs. Chartonus is also fighting, leading the craftsmen. We are stronger, praise Georios.

C: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}，这些日子，我又学会了不少字。
E: Oh, it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... I've learned many new words recently.

C: 你好，小妹妹。
E: Hello, little one.

C: 假若你真的被黑潮吓破了胆，我建议至少也别让别人看出来。
E: If the black tide really frightens you, I suggest you don't let anyone see it.

C: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 我看看…没错，贵客，这就是那位预言家的全部手稿。金丝可以从中提炼出更多信息。
E: Let me see... That's right, distinguished guest, this is the entire manuscript of the prophet. The golden thread can extract more information from it.

C: 眼下我们当然没有胜利的消息，只有一座逐渐瓦解的城市……
E: But now, we have no victory to report. Only a city slowly crumbling to ruin...

C: 软乎乎的小海豹，在水池里一摇一摆，嘟嘟的，嘟嘟的…真是可爱到不行~
E: Soft and snuggy baby seal, splishing and splashing about, all chubby and pudgy... They're just too cuuute~

C: 行吧，听你的。臭小子，那会儿连个锄头都举不起来，一转眼就要去悬锋城学剑了……
E: Alright, have it your way. Kid, not long ago you couldn't even lift a hoe, and now you're off to Castrum Kremnos to train with a sword...

C: 好呀，像你这样见识丰富的贵客，孩子们一定会欢迎的。
E: Gladly! I'm sure the kids would love meeting someone with your experience and stories.

C: 嗯，我知道！莉维娅会认真读书，学好多好多的知识。
E: I will! Livia's going to study hard and learn lots and lots of things!

C: 新来的客人，欢迎迷！你也被我的舞蹈迷住，移不开眼睛了迷？
E: Hey there, new guest. Welcome, memi! Got your eyes stuck on my dance? Can't look away, huh, memi?

C: 我也曾试图干涉它们的行为，可惜这些异象无法稳定复现，我难以定位问题的具体所在……
E: I did try to fix their behavior, but those glitches are so random I couldn't even pinpoint the source...

C: 那，要做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性些，四处看看吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and see where spontaneity leads us?

C: 嘻，{NICKNAME}也可以把它送给重要的人，把这份心意传递下去。
E: Hehe, you could also give it to someone important to you, and share these feelings with others.

C: 莫说区区一条性命，就是到了冥界，我也能为凯撒大人击鼓呐喊！
E: Should my feeble life were to be bound for the nether realm, I would still roar the Great Imperator's praises!

C: 太没公德心了。
E: How immoral.

C: 这便是预言的内容…或许背后另有所指？
E: That is the message of the prophecy... Though perhaps, it holds a deeper meaning?

C: 呃，那我怎么办？
E: Uh, what about me?

C: 看来，我也不行啊…无论如何，愿您…再次寻得良缘。但还请记得，您有一位坚定的支持者，名为仄菲克。
E: Looks like I'm unworthy as well... No matter. May you... find happiness elsewhere. But please remember that you have an ardent supporter in me, he who is named Chefik.

C: 是，刚我在广场那边看到他们了，好像说是发现了些新的矿石，正在和工匠们讨论呢。
E: Yes, I saw them at the plaza. They seem to have found some new ores, and are discussing the matter with the craftsmen.

C: 主要是版型问题，滚边堆砌一堆元素没用，版型那么差，谁穿啊。
E: It's mainly the issue with the design. There's no point in piling up all that embroidered stitches if the style is bad. Who wants to wear that?

C: …法吉娜在上，这是我对您的敬意。
E: ...Phagousa above, I offer this up to you.

C: 这才哪到哪，啊？就你们这小体格子，再不加紧锻炼，小心连学院大门都进不去！
E: What, too much to handle already? Ah, if you weaklings don't start taking training seriously, you might never make it into the academy!

C: 「无论公民大会得出何种结论，都是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕许诺的结果」，结果元老院却不愿承认公民大会得出的结果。
E: "No matter what comes of the citizens' assembly, it stands as the promised result given unto us by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}." In the end, the Council of Elders was unwilling to admit the results produced from the citizens' assembly.

C: 老师，您说…
E: Professor, you're saying...

C: 老鸟刚去找过一圈，它们个个看见我调头就飞，我这老鸟扇翅膀的速度也比不上它们……一趟下来腰酸背痛不说，孩子们一个也没带回来咕。
E: I just got done searching for a round — they turn tail and fly away the moment they see me. These old wings of mine are no match for them in speed... Not only is my back sore now, I didn't even manage to retrieve a little birdie, hoot.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 这场灾难，对你有影响吗？
E: Does this disaster affect you?

C: 好的孩子，以后有空，可以多多来聊聊。
E: Good. Kid, come and chat with me if you have time.

C: 你的每个动作和说话方式都好像精心设计过……
E: Your every movement and your ways of talking seem calculated...

C: 需要帮忙吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 除了像是现在这样招募志同道合之士外，我还在闲暇之余撰写了《废除机器人奴役法案》。虽然还是草稿，但是框架已经初步成型。
E: Other than recruiting like-minded people like now, I also compiled the Robot Slavery Abolition Act. Although it is only a draft, I've got the preliminary framework set up.

C: 空间站其他人对于你的行为怎么看待？
E: What are the other people's perspectives on your actions?

C: 没什么需要继续问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 当然，我也该去准备下潜到灵水里了，希望我能找到我的论文。
E: Well, I should get ready to dive into the spirit water too. Hope I can find my thesis.

C: 嗷呜～奇拉拉现在又该何去何从呢？
E: Awoo~ Where should Chirara go from here?

C: 你可算来了，我快要被水流冲下高台了喀！
E: Finally, you're here! I was about to get swept off this platform, crrk!

C: 我一直在寻觅虫生的意义，最后终于明白自己活着是为了什么。
E: I have long been searching for the meaning of life as a nymph. I finally figured out for what reason I live...

C: 道理我都懂，但为什么箱子这么大？
E: I get all that, but why is the box so huge?

C: 应该就是这里了…怎样才算「供奉无限」呢？
E: This should be the place... What exactly counts as "Offer Infinity" anyway?

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 在不同世界的作品中，人们更多地选择「深渊」来展示「大地」那危险而未知的一面——毕竟「大地」是如此平凡又广阔，那些高尚的品德反而会被遗忘。
E: In works across different worlds, people tend to choose "The Abyss" to showcase the dangerous and unknown side of "Earth." After all, "Earth" is so ordinary and vast that its noble virtues often fade into oblivion.

C: 嗨，又见面啦，冒险家{F#女士}{M#先生}！他们在商量联动的事呢。
E: Hey, nice to see you again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Adventurer! They're discussing the collaboration plans.

C: 别和我争抢，伙友！
E: Don't fight me over this, buddy!

C: 话，是这样，没错。
E: Indeed. You. Right.

C: 我在最远的林子里爬上一座小丘，然后抓着蒲公英降落，总算越过了那些长着尖刺的灌木和荆棘。
E: I climbed a small hill in the farthest woods and then grabbed onto a dandelion to float down, before finally making it past those prickly bushes and thorns.

C: 你来做销售！
E: You do the sales!

C: …好久不见，白厄。
E: ...It's been a while, Phainon.

C: 我的脑子是什么公共文件吗？一个两个都喜欢来擅自解读。
E: Is my brain some kind of publicly shared folder? Everyone just loves to come and interpret it as they please.

C: 「名为墨涅塔的少女在树庭求学时得到了瑟希斯的青睐，但瑟希斯发现，她的亲近实则是为了获得学术指导，两人的关系由此变得复杂了起来……」
E: "A girl named Mnestia caught Cerces' attention while studying at the Grove, but Cerces discovered that her closeness was merely to gain academic guidance, which made their relationship grow complicated..."

C: 正和我想的一样。至于如何招揽…还要略施一些小手段，等我的好消息吧。
E: Just as I thought. As for recruitment... I'll need to employ some tricks. Wait for my good news.

C: 是赛飞儿的猫咪硬币形状？
E: Is it in the shape of Cipher's cat coin?

C: 但还有诡计的恶作剧…
E: But there are still some tricky pranks...

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 在这幅画卷中，享受宁静与美好吧。
E: Savor the serenity and beauty within this painted scroll.

C: 我们最深刻的共同记忆，莫过于和织者们发生的故事了。
E: Our deepest shared memory has to be the stories with the Weavers.

C: 关于三月七…
E: About March 7th...

C: 命途行者的力量超越凡人，但仍很弱小；比起完全执掌命途的星神，就像在汪洋大海中的一滴水一样。偶尔，星神会将命途的力量直接赐给凡人，让他们成为「令使」。
E: Pathstriders possess extraordinary power, but are still insignificant compared to the Aeons, like a drop of water in a vast ocean. Sometimes, Aeons will bestow a mortal with their power, making them an "Emanator" of that Aeon.

C: 其实，作为历史爱好者，比起星神我更喜欢研究派系的诞生、发展与变革，因为它体现的是活生生的人类为了信仰和利益而走出的道途。
E: As a history buff, I would prefer to study the birth, development, and transformation of the factions rather than the Aeons. The factions represent the roads human beings chose out of faith and benefit.

C: 这当中到底发生了什么啊？
E: What exactly happened?

C: 放置货箱
E: Place crate

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}要是再求求我，我说不定可以再考虑一下。
E: If you ask me again nicely, I might think about it.

C: 我这里刚好有后记，喏，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}你就拿上吧。
E: I happen to have the postscript here. There you go, take it.

C: 不对，只是作者偷懒了。
E: No, the author is just being lazy.

C: 不错，你可是给这臭小子做榜样了！明天记得再来。在那之前，我得先想想再出点什么题……
E: Not bad. You're setting an example for the brat! Remember to come back tomorrow. I have to think of some more tests first...

C: 苏乐达我自己全喝了，我喝喝喝喝喝喝！你想喝就自己买！

E: That building block from the toy store... It definitely isn't some sinister object that caused the malfunction in the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but a treasure that awakened us! We're not damaged Tickers, we just returned to our old selves!

C: 「那么加油，祝你好运。」
E: "Good luck. I'm rooting for you."

C: 你这边进展如何？

C: 启动「太空大战争」。
E: Launch Cosmic Warfare.

C: 「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧。」
E: "You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest?"

C: 到时候我会亲自去工作室找他。要是那里也没人，我们就只能祈祷他平安无事了……
E: Then I'll go visit his studio myself. If nobody's there, all we can do is pray that he's safe and well...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 我是替于尔丹来催稿的。

C: 啊…啊啊…果然没错！这下这幅《晨曦》就是完美的作品了！

C: 要是有<color=#dbc291ff>岩烧洞螈</color>就好了啊……
E: I wish I had some <color=#dbc291ff>stone-grilled olms</color>...

C: 名字嘛，我暂时还没想好——但既然你是它的主人，这项艰巨的任务就交给你了。
E: As for the name, I haven't settled on one yet — but seeing as it's yours now, such a daunting task lies in your hands.

C: 哈哈，谁知道呢，或许是恶作剧，或许是孩子们的寻宝游戏，又或许真的是对某人来说意义非凡的宝藏。
E: Haha, who knows! Maybe it's a prank. Maybe it's some kids on a treasure hunt. Or maybe it really is a treasure that means a lot to someone out there.

C: 没问题，那我就重新讲述一遍吧。

C: 据传，这辆车原是大守护者阿丽娜的专属藏品，但那位贵公子却弃之如敝履——看来，贝洛伯格的经济水平在七百年间有了质的飞跃。
E: Rumor has it that this car is part of Supreme Guardian Alina's personal collection, but a certain rich person treats it like it is worthless. Hopefully, that means Belobog's economic growth has been booming for the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years.

C: 他们不懈为之努力，直到星核终于被彻底抑制——执着的求索者们终于实现了他们的夙愿，进而得以拥抱不见风雪的光明未来。
E: They worked ceaselessly until the Stellaron was finally confined — the seekers' persistence finally paid off as we embrace the bright future of a blizzardless world.

C: 才不是呢，你不要吓我啊！

C: …快拍啊？
E: ...Make it quick, will you?

C: 要是还不上租金，亏损事小，失信事大。商会如果失去了商铺的信任，终究是名存实亡…如果没有了商会，公司在金人巷这片商区也就没有竞争对手了。
E: If we can't pay back the rent, the financial damages will be manageable, but the reputational damage will be irreparable. If the Merchant Guild loses everyone's trust, it'll become an empty shell of its former self... and without the Merchant Guild, the IPC will have no competitors in Aurum Alley's business district.

E: I'll *deliver* us a *route* to success...

C: 我只想为当下的金人巷考虑。

C: 哈哈哈，朋友，思维要打开，我走到哪，我的店就开在哪。

C: 保护？牺牲？这不过是人类语言中模糊的概念罢了，我只会看结果。
