E: A nameless hero.

C: 「事到如今，世界仍然充满我们扮演的角色。」
E: "Even now, the world is still filled with characters that we've played."

C: 只是先知不知道，他开启的是封印灾难的箱子。
E: Unbeknownst to the prophet, he had opened a Pandora's box.

C: 在灭亡前的人们也无意追责究竟是哪一方的错。只知道那个美好的世界早已一去不返。
E: With obliteration looming large, people couldn't care less to point fingers. The only thing they were certain was that the beautiful world would be gone forever.

C: 我很期待，你会为这场思想实验带来怎样的新火花。这边请，朋友。
E: I eagerly await what new insights you will bring to this thought experiment. Please follow me, my friend.

C: 送他个测不准匣。
E: Gift him a Casket of Inaccuracy.

C: 就让她过个剑侠瘾吧。
E: Let's just play along with her tea ceremony thing.

C: 就你这样，真是仙舟游客？
E: A regular customer? You?

C: 想在十五天内练成大师还是有点难。
E: Becoming a swordmaster in a mere fifteen days is quite challenging.

C: 爷爷说过，剑无定型。这大千世界，无处不是剑，无处不是剑招。要想短时间里掌握克敌制胜的本事，你需要练会一门「绝活」。
E: Grandpa always said that everything can be a sword, and that there are endless possibilities for learning swordplay in this vast world. If you want to defeat your opponent, you'll need your own secret move.

C: 在考试之前，有一件事我要告诉你，三月小姐，我收到了斯科特的战帖。
E: Before we start the test, there's something I need to tell you, Miss March. I've received a challenge letter from Skott.

C: 斯科特专员！斯科特专员！你怎么了？
E: Specialist Skott! Specialist Skott! What's the matter?

C: 几个公司员工拔腿就跑，斯科特专员在身后手脚并用、穷追不舍。真是残酷的动物世界。
E: Several IPC workers take off immediately, and Skott pursues them on all fours.

C: 嗯，最近我们在绥园附近发现了两具「僵尸」。说是「僵尸」也不太对…受害者身上似乎没有岁阳留存，也没有明显的外伤，但却会重复做出某些奇怪的行为。
E: Mm, we found two zombies near Fyxestroll Garden recently. Well, "zombie" might not be the right word... The victims had no heliobus traces on them, nor obvious external injuries, but they kept repeating some strange behavior.

C: 可你真的快乐吗？你牺牲了亲情、友情、爱情，只为了那些虚无缥缈的信用点…你好好扪心自问一下，你真的快乐吗？
E: But are you truly happy? You've sacrificed your family, your friends, and your love, all for those meaningless credits... Ask yourself: Are you truly happy?

C: 但我才不会把钱花到「感情」这种毫无意义的事情上！因为我是一匹「孤狼」，一匹斯科特家的「孤狼」！没有敌人、没有朋友、只有猎物！
E: But I'm not about to spend my hard-earned credits on something as pointless as emotions! I'm a lone wolf! A lone wolf from the Skott family! With no enemies or friends, only prey!

C: 这夸奖我听了一点也不开心！
E: Hey, that's actually a compliment I don't want to hear!

C: 我也要喝！我也要喝！
E: I want some too! I want some too!

C: 「玩家」？
E: Players?

C: 最近？一直？在思考？
E: You? Thinking?

C: 我当然会痛，因为我也是一个平凡人。现在，斯科特，欢迎你回到平凡人的世界。
E: Of course I do, because I'm just an ordinary person too. Now, Skott, welcome back to the world of ordinary people.

C: 可是，我从来没有想到过「赤龙」就是灵砂大人啊……
E: But I never thought that Master Lingsha would be the Crimson Dragon...

C: 顺便一提，妾身会让那个{RUBY_B#椒丘}出馊点子的人{RUBY_E#}来当面给我个解释的。
E: And I will summon that {RUBY_B#Jiaoqiu}dork who came up with this rotten idea{RUBY_E#} to come forward and explain himself to me.

C: 稀有的金人司阍？也许能给我带来一些灵感。<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来工造司时，也许可以再找银狼问问。</color>
E: A rare Aurumaton Gatekeeper? That could probably give me some inspiration. <color=#dbc291ff>Perhaps we can come to the Artisanship Commission and ask Silver Wolf about it next time.</color>

C: 你，不许再提这件事了。我也能封禁你的游戏账号，你想试试吗？
E: Hey, shut it. I can block your game account too. Do you want to try it?

C: 真正的未知不应该被知识解释。
E: The real unknowns should not be explained by knowledge.

C: …问题不大，你先冷静一下。
E: ...It's nothing serious. Calm down.

C: 我被逼的。
E: I'm being forced to do this.

C: 我经常来罗浮。
E: I often visit the Luofu.

C: 那巧了，我是来打比赛的！唔…虽然，现在实在没什么获胜的信心吧，哈哈。
E: What a coincidence. I'm here to compete! Umm... Though I really doubt I've got any chance at winning, haha.

C: 我心烦意乱，现在马上就要开始第一场比赛了，状态却前所未有地差。
E: I'm so irate and I'm about to start my first match, I'm in worse shape than ever.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 贝洛伯格…抱歉，恕妾身孤陋寡闻了。不过，欢迎你来到罗浮。卢卡先生想问诊？
E: Belobog... Apologies, I'm not familiar with the name. Regardless, welcome to the Luofu. Mr. Luka, are you here for a consultation?

C: 梦貘是靠吞食忆质生存的生物。抱着它入睡可以提高睡眠质量、治疗失眠多梦、缓解焦虑抑郁。
E: The tuskpir is a creature that subsists on memoria. Hugging it while you fall asleep can raise your sleep quality, treat insomnia, and relieve anxiety and depression.

C: 好诶！谢谢卢卡先生～
E: Aw yeah! Thank you, Mr. Luka!

C: 巡海游侠是一群各自为战的「巡猎」信徒，里面什么人都有。有相对比较好说话的，也有波提欧这种血债累累的通缉犯。
E: The Galaxy Rangers are a diverse group of individualistic warriors that are disciples of The Hunt. Some are pretty easy-going, but there's also bloodthirsty wanted criminals like Boothill.

C: 嗯？你们看我干什么？
E: Huh? What are you lot looking at me for?

C: 有些人死于怪物，有些人死于匪徒…我见过很多很多死亡。那时候我觉得，是我们太弱了。只要我变得强一点，再强一点，只要强一点，我们就能战胜对手，继续活下去。
E: Some died to monsters, others to bandits... I've seen so much death. Back then, I thought we were just too weak. If I could get just a little stronger, even just a little, we could vanquish our foes, and keep on living.

C: 那我还能怎么办呢？
E: What else could I do?

C: 是你，虎克？？？
E: Hook???

C: 哈哈哈哈，什么乱七八糟的！
E: Hahahaha, that's ridiculous!

C: 但其实这次罗浮之旅最大的收获，是让我想明白了一件事。
E: In fact, the biggest takeaway from this trip to the Luofu is that it made me realize something.

C: 我不是为了得到什么而挥拳的，也不是为了证明什么而挥拳的…我甚至不是为了胜利而挥拳的。
E: I don't fight to gain or prove anything... I don't even do this for the sake of winning.

C: 万众瞩目的「铁臂」卢卡历尽千险，终于来到了彦卿大人面前！
E: All eyes are upon Luka "Strongarm," who has finally arrived in front of Yanqing after overcoming numerous hurdles!

C: 景元大人，很荣幸能得到您的接见。但我不太清楚，您为什么召我来到神策府？
E: General Jing Yuan, it's my honor to meet you, but I'm not quite sure why you summoned me here to the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 也祝你胜利，景元！如果有机会，真希望和你再打一场啊！
E: You too, Jing Yuan! If the opportunity arises, I'd love to fight you again!

C: 「驮那师父，有生以来第一次，我可以这么平静地战斗……」
E: "Master Dhyana, for the first time in my life, I was able to fight so calmly..."

C: 她没有回答。
E: She does not answer.

C: 歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭……
E: Annihilate, annihilate, annihilate, annihilate, annihilate...

C: 有什么东西阻止了杀戮，阻止了反物质方程的运行。
E: There is something that halted the action of killing, and it also stopped the activation of the Anti-Organic Equation.

C: 两位，请允许贫僧暂时告退收殓善逝的遗骸。在这场旅行的尾声，我希望将它和它的戒环葬在一个有希望的地方……葬在这里。
E: My friends, please allow me to excuse myself to gather and bury Sugata's remains. At the end of this journey, I wish to bury it together with its commandment ring in a place of hope... I wish to bury it here.

C: 真神奇啊…仙舟联盟……
E: The Xianzhou Alliance... Is truly amazing...

C: 不过就算名字再怎么花哨，到了擂台上还是实力见真章。
E: No matter how flashy their names are, only true strength matters when you step into the arena.

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 等等——我就在这里！
E: Hang on. I'm right here!

C: 网友的话有道理啊…
E: The netizens speak sense...

C: 我怎么没想到你这个战术…
E: Why didn't I think of that...?

C: 那么，开局之后卢卡选手要如何快速缩近双方的距离呢？
E: Then, how would Luka be able to close the distance quickly after the match starts?

C: 我很看好你的战术，下场你来打波提欧。
E: I've got my money on your strat. You go fight Boothill in the next match.

C: 我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽，{NICKNAME}教练，首先恭喜你和卢卡选手打赢复活赛。
E: I'm Carmella from Interastral Peace Entertainment. Coach {NICKNAME}, firstly, congratulations on your and Luka's repechage win.

C: 我看未必吧。
E: I don't think so.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 你看，不止我，六司中很多同僚都将形象授权给了庙会，让整个庙会变得生机盎然！
E: Look, it's not just me. Many colleagues in the Six Commissions have also transferred their image rights to the temple fair — the entire place will brim with vigor!

C: 所以我们特意找人写了个对话逻辑——只要对话超过<unbreak>800</unbreak>字，虚拟陪玩就会尽快结束对话，确保不会不小心超过付费线。
E: So we specially got someone to write our conversation logic — once a conversation exceeds <unbreak>800</unbreak> words, the virtual NPC will end the conversation as soon as possible to avoid having to pay for excess fees.

C: 在一个深夜里，小红和小绿一起回家。两人走进一条无人的窄巷，小绿突然惊叫一声，拉着小红冲了出去。
E: In the deep night, Scarlett and Vernon were going home together. When they walked into a deserted narrow alley, Vernon suddenly yelped in surprise, dragging Scarlett with him out of the alley.

C: 都说了只有两个选手…
E: I already told you. There were only two contenders...

C: 一天不码放货物我就浑身难受。
E: I get all irritated if I don't arrange items every day.

C: 这是校庆中最盛大的一项活动。来自不同学院的学生们会在派对上带来一场精彩的演出，用音乐来展示折纸大学的活力。
E: This is a most momentous event in our school celebrations. Students from different schools will present an exciting performance during the party, to exhibit Paperfold University's vigor through music.

C: 贝斯果然没存在感。
E: The bassist is always the most invisible one.

C: 不过也多亏了这份热情，音乐派对才能顺利举办。
E: But it's all thanks to this passion that the music party is going smoothly.

C: 我大概理解了，乱破小姐的意思是这场音乐派对是献给学生们的礼物，也是乐队成员们实现梦想的机会……
E: I believe I understand. What Ms. Rappa means is that this music party is a gift for the students, and an opportunity for band members to fulfill their dreams...

C: 很好，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的音忍集合完毕！
E: Very well, Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's sound ninja congregation is adjourned!

C: 希望她在排练时候能稍微正经点。
E: I hope she'll be a little more serious during practice.

C: 糟糕！光顾着和主公聊天，方才回忆起的曲调都忘得精光了！
E: Disaster! I have been so absorbed in our discourse that I've completely forgotten the tune I recalled!

C: ——主公！
E: ...Sound Master!

C: …星穹列车。
E: ...The Astral Express.

C: 这里还有危险？
E: Is there still danger here?

C: 大概明白了。
E: I've just about got everything.

C: 我是乐队经理。
E: I'm the band manager.

C: 去问问黑塔怎么样？
E: How about asking Herta?

C: 嘶嘶，你好。嘶嘶——
E: Zzztzzt, hello. Zztzzt...

C: 汪！汪！汪！汪！
E: Woof! Woof! Woof! Woof!

C: 只有回归，才能揭露秘密。
E: Only through regression can one's secrets be exposed.

C: 这套剧情结构都被拍烂了——如有需要，我不介意提供一点小小的推动，来帮你们摆脱这没有新意的剧本。
E: Such a plot structure is so yesterday's news. I wouldn't mind giving a little nudge if you need it and see if I can help you all breathe new life into this uninspiring script.

C: 怎么回事？我新找来的乐队呢？保安呢，那两个学生是怎么跑台上去的？
E: What's going on? Where's my newfound band? And how did security let these two students get on stage?

C: 音乐派对最重要的闭幕演出，台上的乐队却没法演奏，怎么都说不过去吧？
E: How is it possible that the band can't even perform at the most important closing show of the party?

C: 音律•狩猎——开始！
E: Sound Hunt — begin!

C: （看我悄悄溜上舞台……）
E: (Let's quietly creep onto the stage...)

C: 即便作战的盛况空前，诸位也将音律•忍法演绎得淋漓尽致，然…散场之时终至。
E: Even though the contest was unprecedentedly magnificent, every one of you played Sound Release ninjutsu with pitch-perfect brilliance. Alas... all shows must end.

C: 学分拿满了，答辩没压力，毕业后的方向也定了…嗨，就等乱破小姐带我回家了。
E: Earning full credits, no stress in appraisals, where to go after graduation's set as well... *sigh* Just waiting for Ms. Rappa to take me home.

C: 结果至上嘛，再说它也是靠自己的实力通过选拔，没什么好质疑的。
E: Results are results. Moreover, it also demonstrated its own ability to pass the selection. There's nothing suspicious about it.

C: （抓拍扑满跳起的瞬间）
E: (Snap the moment the trotter jumps up)

C: 众所周知，朋友是最宝贵的财富，尤其是当你身处险境的时候。
E: Everyone knows that friends are wealth most precious, especially when you're in dire peril.

C: ——学院代表，学院代表，你们实在让人烦躁，模样装得清高，做得相当糟糕，嘴里说着尊师重道，心里想的都是圈套。可笑！
E: ...Academy's reps, academy's reps, I hafta say you're all a huge pain, putting on a show of utter disdain. Spitting respect and morals out on your main, but traps and tricks are all you've got in yo brain! Refrain!

C: 先给我玩玩吧。
E: Let me play it first.

C: 最近测试的游戏有点多啊。
E: Feels like so many games have gone into beta testing recently.

C: 聊聊这单生意。
E: Let's talk about this deal.

C: 是一种视觉植入物。安装以后，就可以用生成算法屏蔽不想看到的内容。
E: It's a type of visual implant. After installing it, you can generate algorithms to block stuff you don't want to see.

C: 这些真菌会寄生在锡毗露蛞蝓身上，吸收它们身上的养分。并且还具备传染性，可以彻底根除绿植内的蛞蝓种群。
E: These fungi will latch on to the Tinplate Slugs as parasites and absorb their body's nutrients. And they're infectious too, completely eradicating the slugs in the plants.

C: 出票成功。三张特价特等席。
E: Tickets successfully issued. Three special discount premium seats.

C: 白天睡太多了，现在实在睡不着了……
E: I slept too much during the day, and can't sleep right now...

C: 上周{NICKNAME}不是为了睡懒觉，乱调了列车的昼夜节律系统吗？自那以后，我的生物钟就再没调过来。
E: Didn't {NICKNAME} mess around with the conductor's circadian rhythm system last week, just to sleep in? Since that day, my biological clock hasn't been able to recalibrate.

C: 可惜我还是更喜欢自然景观。
E: It's a pity I still prefer the scenic premise of nature.

C: 而且…佩佩，既然来咱们列车上做客，是不是也要帮咱们做一做值日呢？有你在，以后我干活就轻松啦～
E: And... Peppy, now that you're an Express guest, do you have to help us with Express duty too? Work will be much easier with you around!

C: 那么接下来，就按照这个节奏建造完其他区域吧～
E: Alright, let's keep the ball rolling and finish building the other areas!

C: 这只折纸小鸟似乎不能以常理对待…就算揪出来，也不会增加地图完成度。
E: This Origami Bird apparently can't be handled in the normal way... Even if you yank it out, it would not contribute to map completion.

C: 收藏品，上交！
E: Collectibles, give 'em!

C: {NICKNAME}，你可算来了。今天的课题是怎么回事？「花火的绚丽写真」…呃，咱们真的要拍这个吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're finally here. What's going on with today's task? "Sparkle's Splendiferous Memoir"... Err, are we really going to shoot this?

C: 三月七坐了下来，惶恐地看着镜头，好像那是随时会发射子弹的枪筒。你仔细想了想，也并非没有这个可能。
E: March 7th sits down and anxiously looks at the lens, as if it were a gun barrel ready to spit bullets at any moment. After consider it carefully, you conclude that such a thing is a real possibility.

C: 不如叫…「岁阳阴乐节」？
E: How about... "Heliobi Spooktacular Music Fest"?

C: 那可不嘛！就为了把弟兄们按时造出来，大工正都累倒了三个呢。
E: Obviously! Three Master Artisans fainted from fatigue just to build my buddies in time.

C: 才不是！本姑娘的剑我最清楚，跟我来！
E: No, it's not! I'm in perfect sync with my own sword. Follow me!

C: 两位师傅不要吵啦——这张照片，不如叫做「携剑游学赏风图」好了！
E: Don't fight, masters — why not call this photo "Swordbearer's Sightseeing on Study Tour"?

C: 这七天里，我们拍了匹诺康尼的街道和舞台，还拿到花火的镜头，回仙舟拍了些千奇百怪的照片…一转眼冷清下来，还真有点不适应。
E: In these seven days, we photographed Penacony's streets and stage, then we got Sparkle's lens and returned to the Xianzhou to take all sorts of bizarre photos... Now that I've calmed down, I really do feel a bit out of sorts.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 等等，你怎么替我决定了？
E: Hang on. Why're you deciding for me?

C: 扣它们的绩效！
E: Dock their pay!

C: 当然，我们已经合作了很长时间，彼此间都是有信任在的。各位的工作能力呢，我也看在眼里，很出色，符合团队的要求。
E: Of course, we've been working together for a while, so there's trust built between us. I'm also aware of everyone's abilities — outstanding and a great fit for the squad's needs.

C: 让我冲撞，我现在就要冲撞！
E: I love slamming stuff. I wanna slam stuff now!

C: 这活动是常驻的，病好再来！
E: This is a permanent event. You can come back after you've recovered!

C: (:３っ「帮我请个殡假吧」)∋
E: (:３っ "Throw me a seal-ebration of my life" )∋

C: 你们不会以为我临时参赛，毫无准备吧？看好了——
E: Think I came unprepared just because I joined last minute? Watch this—

C: 哎，被生活磨平了棱角……
E: Ah, life wore them down...

C: 茄子——
E: Cheese—

C: {NICKNAME}，现在的你是否有决心赢下奖杯？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you found the resolve to win the trophy?

C: 可这枚徽章不巧被我吞进肚子里了，我努努力应该能排出来。
E: Unfortunately, I've swallowed the badge. If I try hard enough, I should be able to get it out.

C: 我有红土饲料，你能离开吗？
E: I've got some Redsoil Feed, could you leave now?

C: 但前提是解除*裁缝女的金线*——它只信赖你们密底斯泰歇三兄弟呀！
E: But the issue is dispelling the seamstress's golden thread — it only listens to you three Mythemis brothers!

C: 泡泡想凭实力成为{NICKNAME}的伙伴，而不是靠预言。尤其是见证了缇宁大人参赛的心路历程后，泡泡认为，自己也应该像她那样「独当一面」！
E: Bubbles wants to use their own true potential to become {NICKNAME}'s partner, not just because of the prophecy. Especially after witnessing Lady Trinnon's motivations and experiences during the competition. Bubbles thinks that they should be like her and assume personal responsibility!

C: 原计划是…是这样的吗？
E: Was that... was that how it was supposed to go?

C: 你居然还用公司的产品？
E: So you're using IPC products yourself?

C: 所以正式版终于上线了？！
E: So, the official version is finally live!?

C: 由于之前的测试结果相当令人满意，经过制作团队紧张的开发，正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面。
E: Thanks to excellent test results and the dev team's hard work, the official version has finally launched for the public.

C: 还会有续作吗？
E: Will there be a sequel?

C: 剧情能长点不？
E: Can the story go on a little longer?

C: 对了，<color=#dbc291ff>那台测试版的游戏机现在已经修好了</color>，你要是感兴趣，不妨再去体验一下？
E: By the way, <color=#dbc291ff>that test version of the game console has been fixed now</color>. If you're interested, you should give it another try!

C: 刚刚有个很厉害的选手晋级了，我听闻她来自仙舟，赛车名为「十三幺」，每场比赛都伴随着不可思议的好运。
E: A top-tier racer just made it to the next round. Rumor says she's from the Xianzhou — her car's called Thirteen Orphans. Luck follows her like a stalker.

C: 感觉你们好像一直很着急！
E: Why are you in such a rush?

C: 它说「我没有说过，你赢了就可以解除诅咒」。那个，它确实没有说过……
E: It's saying "I never agreed that winning would lift the curse." And to be fair, it never actually promised that...

C: 裳裳，这幽灵小鸟确实有几分能耐。
E: Shangshang, I'll admit it, this Ghost Bird's got some skills.

C: 既然顺利结束了，干脆我们到黄金的时刻到处逛逛吧？
E: Now that everything's settled, how about we take a stroll around Golden Hour?

C: 还他宝贝的磨蹭什么呢？
E: What the fudge are you waiting for?

C: 幽灵小鸟说，其实更希望我去陪伴它…别随随便便说出那么可怕的话啊喂！
E: The Ghost Bird says it just wants me to stay and keep it company... Don't say something that creepy so casually!

C: 理论上应该如此。现在的「圣杯」只剩下了外形，内在已经和这片梦境的本质，也就是你们说的「忆质」融为一体。
E: Theoretically, yes. The Holy Grail's form remains, but its core has merged with the nature of this dream world, what you call "memoria."

C: 我不会给你搭线的。
E: I'm not playing matchmaker for you.

C: 你到底想做什么？
E: What are you up to?

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，很荣幸能让一位无名客露出这样的表情，祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
E: Hohohoho, It's an honor to see that expression on a Nameless. Enjoy your stay in Penacony.

C: 呵呵，孩子，你无耻的样子颇有我当年的风采。
E: Heh... Kid, that shameless look of yours reminds me of myself back in the day.

C: （托帕把箱子牢牢封了起来…趁此机会给调饮起个名吧。）
E: (Topaz sealed the box tightly... Now's a good chance to name the drink.)

C: 果然是您！弟子来迟了。这里的钟怎么不走呐，我以为时间还早呢……
E: It really is you! Forgive my being late. Why isn't the clock working here? I thought there was still time...

C: 将来要是惹出什么祸端…千万别说是我教的。
E: Just don't say I was the one who taught you if anything goes wrong later.

C: 承认失败有那么困难么？这是普通人的求知路上再常见不过的事。
E: Is admitting failure so difficult? It's a common part of any ordinary person's pursuit of knowledge.

C: 刀枪剑戟、甲胄丹药，均已齐备，必能确保物资供给无忧。
E: Knives, spears, swords, helmets, armor, and medicinal pellets are all prepped and ready. Supply lines are locked in.

C: 我不是仙人，但我从中也得到了快乐。
E: I'm no immortal, but that tea brings me joy.

C: 这个配方就试到这里。是时候去复原最后一份「特调配方」了！
E: That's all I have for recipe-testing. Time to recreate the final "Special Mix Recipe"!

C: 这就是现实。
E: That's just reality.

C: 难怪这么莫名其妙！
E: No wonder it feels so incoherent.

C: 你邀请托帕品尝调饮……
E: You invite Topaz for a drink...

C: 哦？据我所知，对手可是个商场老手。
E: Oh? From what I know, our opponent is quite the business veteran.

C: 这个古代遗迹是怎么来的？
E: How did the ancient ruins come about?

C: 哈哈，我果然没看错人。有你陪着，咱俩的探宝之旅真是无往不利！
E: Haha, so I was right after all. Together, our relic-hunting journey is gonna take on the world!

C: 你真是合格的寻宝者护卫，今后有机会再合作啊！
E: You really are a first-rate relic-hunter bodyguard! Let's team up again if we ever get the chance!

C: 如果在下没记错的话，您这场冒险的大决战，就是从云霞紫府这边开始的吧？
E: If I was not mistaken, the decisive battle in your adventure began right over here at the Evemist Mansion, correct?

C: 出发吧。那蜃影积怨不小，流毒无穷。切记小心行事。
E: Go forth. They have their grievances, and their vileness knows no end. Tread carefully.

C: 我什么也做不到啊！
E: This is above my pay grade!

C: 啊？是吗？在下可没机缘见幻胧，也不想见。
E: Oh, really? I've never had the chance to personally see Phantylia and I hope I never do.

C: 身形巨大…我心里稍微有数了。
E: Monstrously huge... I'm sure I can imagine.

C: 千回百转，{NICKNAME}没想到自己会再次回到起点——丹鼎司中所谓「太真丹室」的巨大炉鼎之下。
E: After all these twists and turns, {NICKNAME} never thought things would end up right back at the start: Under the almighty Aureate Elixir Furnace in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 说起来，今天走这一遭，我脑袋里多了不少灵感。
E: Speaking of which, I was left with tons of inspiration rattling around in my head after today's trip.

C: 为啥啊，这位可是咱们的老观众了，你就算不同意，高低得给个正当理由不是，光驳人家面子，倒显得咱俩无情无义了。
E: But why not? It's just doing our regular customer a favor, right? A flat-out rejection will make us seem heartless.

C: （向他讲述被阿来阿往拒绝一事）
E: (Tell him that you were rejected by Back'n & Forth.)

C: 有道理，我这就去找他们。
E: That makes sense. I'll talk with them again.

C: 「等等，三月七？」你意识到不对，猛地抬头望向眼前人，却意外发现茶庄的老板竟有好几位之多，他们长得一模一样，就连说话声也完全一致。
E: "Wait, March 7th?" At that moment, you realize that something is wrong, shooting a questioning glance at the tea house owner standing in front of you. To your astonishment, you see several identical-looking owners, all speaking to you in the exact same tone.

C: 诶诶诶？快住手快住手！
E: Wait... what are you doing? Stop it! STOP!

C: 当你还在回味「烈焰浓茶」时，明曦已经受邀来到杜氏茶庄了。
E: While you were still savoring the Flaming Potent Tea, Mingxi had already arrived at Du's Teahouse.

C: 突然你感到身下传来一股强大的力量，眼前一片黑。
E: Suddenly, you feel a powerful force from below you and your vision goes black.

C: 嘿，我就知道你会这么选！
E: Hah! I had a feeling you'd say that!

C: 主要是它…它也太可爱了吧！我实在不忍心吊高了嗓门吼它……
E: Aww, they're too cute! I can't bring myself to yell at them...

C: 什么，希露瓦你…居然是这个决胜乐园的冠军候补吗？
E: Huh...!? S—Serval's the championship contender for this Victory Zone?

C: 不值得跟那种人怄气。
E: They're not worth getting angry over.

C: 哈哈哈，这熟悉的感觉——{M#哥们}{F#姐们}说话还是这么有意思！
E: Hah, still got the sense of humor, huh?

C: 既然休息好了，那就开始今天的行程吧？
E: Since we're all refreshed, ready to head out for the day?

C: 先前那位高手玩家以极快的速度拿下了锦标赛的资格，最近在玩家圈子里引发了巨大风波——那位先生是这样讲的。
E: He asked me to mention a certain "elite player" — someone who once stormed the championship and kicked up quite the fuss in the gaming world.

C: 又回到这里了…上次来这里可差点没把咱绕晕。
E: Well, we're back... Just being here again is enough to make me feel dizzy...

C: 而且她为什么不点你的名啊？什么区别对待！
E: Seriously? And what about you? She just intentionally ignored you!? Hmph!

C: 您有头绪了吗！
E: Did you remember something!?

C: 看来你们已经相当亲密了…但还请两位能耐着性子，听完我和托帕总监的请求。
E: It appears you've grown quite attached to them... but I'd really appreciate it if you'd hear me out. Director Topaz has a request.

C: 它为什么会产生性格？
E: Why do they have their own personality?

C: 哼！哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: Boop... boop... boop...

C: 做得好！接下来请随我继续前进——
E: Task completion: Satisfactory. Maintain forward progression.

C: 它的意思好像是我们成功了…继续跟着这位「向导」吧！
E: Sounds like we did it. Let's press on.

C: 可以呀，让我想想用哪枚以太硬币来跟你对决呢…就用这个刚买来的吧。
E: Alright, let me think about which Aether Coin I want to use against you... I know, I'll use the one I just bought.

C: 等你完成了决胜乐园的考验，战胜冠军候补，就能拿着资格徽章在我这儿领福利了。
E: When you complete the Victory Zone trials and defeat a Championship Contender, you will receive Mastery Marks that you can use to claim benefits here.

C: 这不是外来者么！听说你们也报名参加了这次的锦标赛，希望能在比赛中和你们顺利会师！
E: Oh, it's the outsiders! I've heard you entered the championship. Looking forward to meeting you in the field!

C: 哼哼！哼，哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink Oink! Oink!

C: 嘿嘿，没准呢！毕竟咱现在是真正的冠军啦。
E: Who knows? I mean, we are the champions!

C: 但怎么把小桂子这样的群众也给拉下水了？这多危险！
E: But why did Little Gui have to get dragged into this? This mission is too dangerous for a civilian!

C: 寒鸦交待完捉鬼小队的事，便离开继续处理绥园事务了。
E: After Hanya delivered the task to the ghost-hunting squad, she left to continue resolving matters at Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's hunt some ghosts.

C: 没错，我是她的长期饭票！
E: That's right, I'm her long-term meal ticket!

C: 能啊，我身边这位…你别看她是狐人啊，她是仙舟一级非物质文化遗产评定专家，她对云吟超懂的好不好。下面，请藿专家为我们讲两句。
E: It sure can! This foxian beside me... well, she's actually the Xianzhou's top expert on intangible cultural heritage — she's super knowledgeable about cloudhymn magic. Huohuo, could you share some expert insight with us?

C: 事情圆满解决就好。
E: Just glad it's all over.

C: 唔…这倒是没问题，只是我不知道该怎么编呢……
E: Um... That's great and all, but I'm not good at making stuff up on the spot...

C: 绥园灾异一事，我受姐姐命令前去请回援助。在此期间，多亏了您在园中撑持，才令妖祸不致泛滥，小女子须向您致谢。
E: During the Fyxestroll Garden incident, my sister gave the order to seek reinforcements. It was thanks to your support in that critical moment that we were able to get the situation under control. I wanted to thank you.

C: 每当看到她战斗，我都深感不忍。
E: Every time she fights like that, I can't bear to watch.

C: 胡说！胡说！我从小到大都没有什么玩伴，今天难得遇到一个，你们却要抓它……
E: You're lying! I never had playmates. Today I finally found one, and you guys are trying to take them away...

C: 可是…可是，大家为了我到处奔波…我还记得，真对不住。
E: But... but... I made everyone chase after me for so long... I shouldn't have done that...

C: 这一次全都是靠了青雀小姐的帮助，咱们才能顺利收伏犀焰。
E: ...but we really couldn't have defeated Keralum without Miss Qingque's help.

C: 没错，对于一个一开始就被设计好的谜题来说，任何其他选择都是毫无意义的错误。
E: Yes, for a puzzle that was designed from the start, choosing any other path would be a pointless mistake.

C: 命运的道路只有这一条，你的选择就是早已注定的唯一答案。
E: Destiny only has one path. Your choices are just a predetermined solution to the puzzle.

C: 犀焰，从太卜身上离开！
E: Keralum, release the Master Diviner!

C: 罗浮上自幼习武的孩子倒是有不少，但要说能佩剑行走的孩子——
E: Lots of children grow up learning to use a sword on the Luofu, but for a child to be walking around with one...

C: 这些天外灵火并无善恶，就像镜面映照，只要人类自身心境澄澈，就能不受其蛊惑。
E: These cosmic flames are not good nor evil, they are simply a mirror... As long as a host's mind is clear, a heliobus cannot control them.

C: 将军……
E: General...

C: 输了就是输了——浮烟只求与将军一战，不求胜负，已经满足，接下来……
E: I have been bested, it's true... I only sought to lock horns with you, regardless of victory or defeat. Next...

C: 吸引关注…小桂子倒是很擅长，她平日里经常用我来表演杂技什么的…但在这灵异爱好者网站上，该怎么涨粉呢？
E: Speaking of attracting attention... how do we get a following on a paranormal activity website? Sounds like Little Gui's department — she used me in some of her performances just to draw a bigger crowd.

C: 每个人都离开了…每个人都离开了…
E: They've all gone... all abandoned me...

C: 什么…什么回来了？
E: ...Wh—Who's back?

C: 凭什么藿藿要受到那么多关注啊！我才是最应该被关注的人！我要孤立她！
E: Why does Huohuo get so much attention!? Hmph, I'm gonna get everyone to ignore her...

C: 我一度以为自己这样星火之精不需要爱也不需要被爱，但我错了…所以我恳求您别让我们得而复失。
E: I once thought that as a being of Starfire Essence, I never needed to love or be loved, but I was wrong... so I beg you, please don't let me lose what we've only just gained.

C: 我知道代价是什么，我早就知道，就这样吧。
E: I know the price I'll pay. I knew it all along. So be it.

C: 怎么又是你？
E: You again?

C: 这也是她在回报青雀小姐之前的帮助吧。
E: This must be her way of repaying you for all your help before.

C: 噗，符玄大人请不要在意，这只是幻觉！幻觉啊！
E: Ah, please don't take this to heart, Lady Fu Xuan! This is an illusion! Just a fantasy!

C: 很好！很好！这些点子非常完美，用不了多久，就连巴维鲁人都会爱上琼玉牌！
E: Good! Very good! All of these ideas are perfect. With these improvements, even the Bavirus will be obsessed with Jade Tiles in no time!

C: 是的，本想以普通老友的身份叙叙旧，但时间宝贵，咱们就直入主题吧。
E: That's right. I was hoping to reminisce over the past with you as an old friend, but time is money. Let's get straight to the point.

C: 其实，是太卜担心你…
E: Actually, the master diviner is worried about you...

C: 哼，这岁阳老总的脾气当真厉害哟……
E: Hmph, President Heliobus really has a ferocious temper...

C: 等等，你们之中那个…十王司专家呢？
E: Wait a minute. Where is your Ten-Lords member?

C: …你们…可算是…来了……
E: ...You... You finally... came...

C: 我已经将事情的经过传达给地衡司了，他们应该能妥善处置。
E: I have already explained the situation to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I'm sure they will be able to handle this.

C: 你们别管了，打开了就是打开了。
E: Don't worry about that. It's open, isn't it?

C: 别谦虚了，都拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: There's no need to be humble. I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哇，三月七乘客你在做什么？
E: Woah! What are you doing, March 7th?

C: 总之，你先把它找个地方关起来吧，可别又附到什么东西上去了。
E: In any case, you should imprison it somewhere. Don't let it possess anything else again.

C: 我完全相信你{NICKNAME}，你的选择就是我的选择。
E: I fully trust you, {NICKNAME}. Your choice shall be my choice.

C: 咱得向你学习……
E: I should learn from you...

C: 你害羞啦！嘿嘿，平时瞧着挺勇的，真没想到回答私密问题时却很可爱呢。
E: You're shy! Heehee, you always look so tough. I never thought you'd be so cute when it comes to personal questions like this.

C: 又是银色奖牌！
E: Another silver medallion!

C: 小桂子说的在理，不过…我方才就注意到，附近有个家伙老往我们这儿瞧……
E: Little Gui, that's reasonable enough, but... I've only just noticed, there's a girl just over there who keeps looking this way...

C: 好啦，今天又白跑一趟。咱们还是早点回去休息吧！
E: Alright, another waste of a trip today. Let's call it a day already and get some rest!

C: 不不不，这样可不好。
E: No, please don't. This is not good.

C: 那是，都是我的功劳。
E: Sure is. The credit's all mine.

C: 但我的研究实例太少了，所以想请你帮我个忙，能不能帮我培育出更多具有稀有特征的造物。
E: But I have far too few samples to research, so that's why I'd like to ask for your help in nurturing more creations with a few more rare traits.

C: 好舒服！
E: That feels so good!

C: 听到你与那只鸟的对话，隐书从书肆的柜台后翻了出来，跑到了你们面前。
E: Hearing you chat with the bird, Yinshu pops out from behind the counter and runs over to you.

C: 而且这鸟怕生得很，一开始甚至不肯离西衍先生太远…一旦看不到西衍先生就不停地啸叫。
E: It's so afraid of strangers that at first it wouldn't let Mr. Xiyan out of its sight... As soon as he strayed off, it'd start screeching.

C: 仔细一想，是有这么一回事！
E: Now that I think about it — it happened!

C: 但民众间的对立和利益集团间的博弈，并没有给法庭得出结论的时间。在审判开始的第七天，内战爆发了。
E: But division among the general public and interest groups competing with each other meant the court had no time to reach a conclusion. On the seventh day of the trial, civil war erupted.

C: 把饮料给我！…哈？怎么拿了两杯过来，你连颜色都分不清吗？！
E: Bring me my drink!... Huh? Why two glasses? Can't you even tell the colors apart!?

C: 表层是蓝色？
E: Is the top layer blue?

C: 汪！我们来玩真心话大冒险哇！
E: Woof! Let's play Truth or Dare!

C: 还要再来吗？
E: Again? Really?

C: 还有其他值得珍惜的东西。
E: There's something else worth cherishing.

C: 不介意的话，跟我回去呗？
E: Would you come back with me, if you don't mind?

C: 和你没关系吧？既然你能避免梦境坍塌的影响，就赶紧离开这里，找个安全的地方待着。
E: It's none of your business, is it? Now that you've managed to avoid the impact of the collapsing Dreamscape, leave and find a safe place.

C: 从现在起，你要定期来这家酒吧，我会为你准备美味的饮料，可以接受吧？
E: So, from now on, you'll be a regular at this lounge, and I'll make sure to serve you delicious drinks. Sounds good?

C: 快给我来杯饮料吧。要…要那个…<color=#dbc291ff>小杯，口味强烈的</color>，能让人瞬间精神的口味！各位玩家，运动后要记得补充电解质哦。
E: Give me a drink, quick. I want... that... <color=#dbc291ff>drink that's in a small glass and has a strong taste</color> — a taste that rejuvenates my spirit instantly! Players, remember to replenish your electrolytes after exercise.

C: 转着转着，我就忘了该投出的点数是大还是小了…实话说，大小真有那么重要吗？
E: Before long, I found myself forgetting if I should toss big or small... To be honest, is the number really that important?

C: （…加冰，记得多加点冰。）
E: (...Alright, I should add some more ice cubes.)

C: 我听不清！
E: What did you say? I can't hear you!

C: （…按它的习惯，应该是指放个跟动画角色有关的装饰物上去吧？）
E: (...Based on its habits, it probably means it wants a decoration related to cartoon characters?)

C: …不管怎么样，还是要采取行动！回去就想办法，要等人家的好消息呀！
E: ...Nevertheless, I must take action! I'll come up with a plan! Wait for my good news!

C: 我要的<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>。别忘了。
E: I want a glass of <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't forget.

C: 说的和心里想的完全不同，我顶讨厌这种类型！不像我，从来不隐藏炽热的心！哈哈！
E: What they say is completely different from what they really think. I hate that type! Unlike me! I never hide my fiery soul! Haha!

C: 这次先告辞了！祝您的谈话进展顺利！
E: I'll take my leave now! Good luck with your conversation!

C: 也不知道是哪个家伙在公馆里搞的破坏，触发了建造之初设计的反入侵装置，办公室里的空间被弄得一团糟。

E: Noticed something funny? These methods never prevent those who really intend to steal information. They only make us ordinary workers go in circles.

C: 吵死了啾！好想狠狠揍它们一顿啾！
E: Pipe down, tweet! I really want to teach them a lesson, tweet!

C: 好险…你没事吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: That was close... {NICKNAME}, are you okay?

C: 要拍照也不用急于这一会儿，你的假期离结束还早着呢。不过既然在这里遇到了，那正好，来和我们一起玩吧。
E: Chill out, you've still got plenty of time before your holiday's over. No need to take that photo right away. That said, since we've run into each other, why don't you join us for some games?

C: 虽然是意料之中的结果…但等我好好练习过之后，{NICKNAME}可以再和我玩一局吗？
E: I knew this would happen, but... Oh, well. I'll practice some more. When I'm done, {NICKNAME}, will you play another round with me?

C: 我原本只是顺路替托帕跑一趟，验收下项目进度，倒是未曾想还有这惊喜……
E: I was only intending to do Topaz a favor and check on the progress of this project. I certainly didn't expect to be surprised as well...

C: 什么，还可以继续玩吗？好耶——
E: What? We can continue to play the game? Yay!

C: 测试的事…就拜托您了，如果测试过程中遇到什么问题，请随时知会我。
E: We're counting on you for the test. If you run into any problems during its course, please feel free to contact me.

C: 只是…我来参赛的初衷是让世界看到贝洛伯格。如果与公司合作，会让我觉得自己的行为不那么纯粹。
E: But... my initial reason for competing was to showcase Belobog to the entire universe. Partnering with the IPC might make me doubt the purity of my actions.

C: 感谢你的提醒，我会注意的。{NICKNAME}教练，我们也该回休息室了。
E: Thanks for the heads-up. I'll keep that in mind. Coach {NICKNAME}, we should head back to the lounge now.

C: 哈哈哈，这就要靠教练你帮我严防死守啦！
E: Hahaha, coach, I'm counting on you to keep a close watch!

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}教练。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}.

C: 谢谢托帕小姐，心意我领了。但我也有我的处事原则，欠了人情债，就必须还。
E: Thank you, Miss Topaz, for your consideration. However, I abide by my principles — if I owe a favor, I must repay it.

C: 你四下环顾，却没有找到托帕的影子。

C: 我十分想见余清涂！
E: I really want to meet Yu Qingtu!

E: You mean the Party Car? Yes, it does sound upbeat. It's a pity that the Express is so quiet right now... The exact opposite of "upbeat."

C: 这个吧台，一看就很有派对的氛围。
E: This counter has a party vibe to it.

E: I never fail to impress!

C: 一天什么都没做，好累啊……
E: I did absolutely nothing today. Why am I so tired?

C: 你试着在不打扰它的状况下抽身离开…但却没能成功。
E: You try to sneak away without waking it... but can't.

C: 呜…（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}…）

E: Grumph grumph. (That's a baby name... like me!)

E: They are still a baby. There's time.

C: 没关系的，我会手把手教你！而且，工坊这边会负责承担场地和各项开支。
E: It's easy, I'll show you everything! And the workshop will cover all expenses and provide space.

All thanks to the hard work from both you and Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas!

E: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas keeps making mistakes lately. Several neighbors have complained — it sold actual baby seals as stuffed toys while managing the shop. Hard to tell if it was an honest mistake or intentional.

C: 嗡。（之前不太好，现在还行。）

C: 澎湃的大地之力在它体内奔涌。它走过奥赫玛城外的农田，之后三千个光历年里，那里的粮食亩产达到了一千八……
E: The surging power of Earth coursed through its body. After it passed through the farmlands outside Okhema, the crop yield there reached <unbreak>24,100</unbreak> pounds per acre for the next three thousand Light Calendar years...

C: 这杯子原本成对，传说是法吉娜与吉奥里亚对饮时，为两位神明所用。后来两位泰坦因管辖权势不两立，愤怒的吉奥里亚砸碎了它的那只，以回应法吉娜的挑衅。
E: Originally part of a set, this cup was used by the deities Phagousa and Georios during their divine libations. As tensions between the Titans escalated over territorial disputes, in a fit of rage, Georios shattered his cup, a stark response to Phagousa's provocations.

C: 对了，还有件谢礼要送给你——请收下这件黄金裔陶罐。我做的陶罐在奥赫玛可是一罐难求，预订单已经排到三个月后了。不过请不要告诉别人，不然要说我不公平了。
E: Here's a special gift for you — a Chrysos Heir Dolium. These jars are highly sought after in Okhema, and my waitlist extends three months out. But let's keep this between us, or they'll accuse me of playing favorites.

C: 等等，我并不是来这里给您送礼而已…您先看看这个宝贝——
E: Hold up, I'm not just here to give you a gift... Take a look at this treasure first—

C: 可那些童谣，\n都已经被传颂到……\n识字的稚童都能熟背了。
E: But those nursery rhymes,\nhave been told over and over...\nthat any literate child could recite them by heart.

C: 年岁相逝、日月相争，\n孩童不时听见同伴们破裂的声音。
E: As the years pass and the sun and moon rise and fall,\nThe children often hear sounds of their friends shattering.

C: 孩童们拉住少女的衣摆。\n「请你聆听，*我们*带来的预言……」
E: The children pull on the hem of the maiden's dress.\n"Please. Listen to the prophecy we bring..."

C: 自诩耳明嘴利的女孩，\n也敌不过那千百张多变的面孔。
E: Even the girl who prided herself on sharp ears and a clever tongue\nCould not contend with the myriad shifting face before her.

C: 祖母笑着停下缫丝，\n端上简陋的晚餐。\n「傻娃娃，这种誓言不要让泰坦听。」
E: Smiling, her grandmother stops her silk work,\nAnd offers some dinner with humble dish.\n"Silly child, don't let Titans hear such vows and promises."

C: 它向踏入试炼的少女许诺，\n世上将到处光明、再无欺瞒。
E: They made a promise to the girl who entered the trial,\nThat the whole world would be bathed in light, no more lies and deceit.

C: 远离奥赫玛的日子里，\n少女习惯了独自旅行。
E: In the days spent away from Okhema,\nThe girl grew accustomed to traveling alone.

C: 少女也曾粉饰自己的远离，\n却总瞒不过金线的问询。
E: The girl tried to mask her nonchalance,\nBut could never fool the golden thread's questions.

C:
{F#她}{M#他}陪伴你开启旅行。
<color=#9e5738>黄金裔与泰坦，
逐火与救世</color>——

这是你期待已久的冒险故事。
E:
{M#He}{F#She} walks beside you on this journey.
<color=#9e5738>The Chrysos Heirs and Titans,
the Flame-Chase and Deliverance:</color>

this is the adventure you've been waiting to find.

C: 爱是往昔的涟漪，\n让记忆的诗篇封存过往。
E: Love is the ripples of past reverie.\nLet the verses of memory gently seal what once was.

C: 巨龙的童年在黑暗中度过。
E: The giant dragon spent their childhood in darkness.

C: 当它来到地面，\n呼出星火织就的雾霭；
E: When they reached the surface,\nThey summoned mist woven of the fire of the stars,

C: 浪花舞动的旗幡下，\n燃火的冠冕明如星宿。
E: Under the banners dancing like waves,\nThe burning crown shone bright as the wheeling constellations.

C: 那时黄金战争的浪潮，\n尚未席卷这座塔兰顿的城邦——
E: Back then, the tides of the Chrysos War,\nHad not yet engulfed this city-state of Talanton...

C: 断锋的战士朗声大笑—— 「吾王擅长阳谋， 对付『诡计』确实犯难。」 「可怎地不见一尾游鱼？」
E: The warrior of the fractured blade laughed boldly... "Our sovereign is good at open strategies And struggles with Trickery." "But where is that lithe fish?"

C: *我们*不能认同您的僭举。\n您禁锢缇里西庇俄丝的分身，\n要求神权退化为王权的喉舌。
E: We cannot agree with your excessive deeds.\nYou have imprisoned Tribios's split selves,\nDemanding that divine authority regress into the ruler's mouthpiece.

C: 失群的游鱼若瞥见微光，\n便会倾鳍游向明亮。
E: Should a fish separated from its school glimpse a faint glow,\nIt will swim toward the light.

C: 因门前的女孩似柔和的云，\n平复了灼目的怒意。
E: For the girl before the door soothed their blazing anger,\nLike the soft clouds, gentleness in cumulation.

C: 众人将他比作烈日，\n要为翁法罗斯带来<color=#9e5738>黎明</color>。
E: The people likened him to the blazing sun,\nBringing to Amphoreus a glorious <color=#9e5738>dawn</color>.

C: 在那场梦里，\n他会再次醒来，\n重新成为爱笑的男孩。
E: In that dream,\nHe would awaken again,\nAnd become once more {F#the boy}{M#that boy} who loved to laugh.

C: 时至今日，\n或许宿命也不在话下。
E: And now,\nEven destiny may also be within his grasp.

C:
将魔像尽数毁去时，
他不愿加以解释，
只怕徒费心神，
于是以调笑了结追问——
E:
When the servants have all been recycled,
He deigns not to explain,
Fearing to waste his reason or muscle,
So he jokingly concludes the questioning with a chuckle —

C: 「若非此路忐忑难行，后生何以歌颂我名？」\n——名为野心。
E: "If this road is easy to walk, then future generations will not praise my name in piety."\n— Says his ambition.

C: 原本是庄严的职责吧…\n只因爱美的世人，\n误把零落片羽，当作零珠片玉。
E: What was once a sacred duty...\nwas misunderstood by the beauty-obsessed,\nwho mistook fallen shreds for priceless treasures.

C: 「看来我当云游棋士的日子到此为止咯。我期待你的乐句，毕竟你是货真价实的『王女』，还是冒牌的『吟游诗人』。」
E: "Looks like my days as a wandering chess master end here. I look forward to your melody, since you're a genuine princess as well as a fake bard."

C:
星穹列车的无名客，误入死循环的外部变量。
同为「毁灭」行者，与十二因子产生共鸣。在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，并成功引导NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>跨越智能奇点。
在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「负世」路径。

E:
A Nameless from the Astral Express. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.
Also a pathstrider of the Destruction, they resonated with the twelve factors. In the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant Time track and successfully guided NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> beyond the Intelligence Singularity.
In the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant Worldbearing track.

C: 「虚无」的令使，黄泉，无情地击倒了他。\n为公司掠夺财富是他的目标。你们因此无可避免地走向对立面，但你不辱使命，恭喜。
E: Acheron, Emanator of Nihility, defeated him mercilessly.\nHis goal is to plunder wealth for the IPC. Therefore, you two inevitably faced off each other in a confrontation. You, however, honored your duty. Congratulations.

C: 我们不过是彼此「开拓」之旅的过客…有意思的是，我也有同感。\n但正确答案果真如此吗？别心急，等到一同见证尘埃全部落定，我就会向你表明真身。
E: We are but people passing by each other's trailblazing journeys... Interestingly, I feel the same way.\nBut is this truly the correct answer? Don't be in a hurry. When we have witnessed the end of this business together, I will certainly reveal to you my true identity.

C: 「地底原来有这么多文物，怪不得这些寻宝者会冒险闯入，看来及时封锁遗迹是正确的抉择。{NICKNAME}，这些都是贝洛伯格宝贵的文化遗产…等等，你没有私藏什么文物吧？」
E: "It turns out there are so many cultural artifacts underground. No wonder these treasure hunters dare to venture in. I guess sealing off the ruins in time was the right decision. {NICKNAME}, these are all precious cultural heritages of Belobog... Wait, you're not secretly keeping any artifacts, are you?"

C: ——小心，埋伏的强敌将会发动突袭，削减你的耐力值。

C: <color=#f29e38ff>【前台】</color>的角色赋能：\n角色本体技能得到<color=#f29e38ff>强化</color>，或者获得<color=#f29e38ff>全新的战斗技能</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>"On-Field"</color> Character Empowerment:\nCharacter's base abilities are <color=#f29e38ff>enhanced</color>, or they gain <color=#f29e38ff>brand-new combat abilities</color>.

C: 可以利用<color=#f29e38ff>拆装扳手</color>，自由调配已穿戴的角色装备，以最大化提升团队战力。
E: Use the <color=#f29e38ff>Disassembly Wrench</color> to freely reassign equipped gears and maximize your team's combat power.

C: 【反造物主】、【秘所思】、【逻各斯】的攻击技能会提高【翁法罗斯的「恨」】，【恨】提高时会降低我方可回复的生命上限和可回复的战技点上限，当【恨】达到上限时战斗失败！
E: Attack abilities from "Anti-Creator," "Mythos," and "Logos" will increase "Amphorean Hatred." As "Hatred" increases, it will reduce allies' Maximum Restorable HP and Maximum Recoverable Skill Points. When "Hatred" reaches its maximum, combat ends in failure!

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的方向。可以通过<color=#f29e38ff>侵蚀隧洞</color><color=#f29e38ff>获得遗器</color>。激活后可以通过<color=#f29e38ff>导航</color>快递传送。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to unknown places. <color=#f29e38ff>Cavern of Corrosion</color> can be used to <color=#f29e38ff>acquire Relics</color>. After activation, you can teleport to its location via <color=#f29e38ff>Navigation</color>.

C: 跟踪玩法开启后，场景内将标记出一系列可供藏身的掩体，与掩体交互将进入<color=#f29e38ff>隐匿状态</color>。在隐匿状态下，跟踪目标会较难发现玩家，但请注意藏身位置不要暴露在跟踪目标的视野内。
E: When Trailing Mode is active, a series of cover spots that you can shelter behind will be marked within the scene. Interact with a cover to enter <color=#f29e38ff>Stealth Mode</color>. While in Stealth Mode, it becomes harder for the target you are trailing to discover you. However, be cautious not to hide in a spot that is directly in the target's line of sight.

C: 在幻障迷境中难以追上逃跑的白露，只能<color=#f29e38ff>引导白露逃进藏月瓠的阵法之中</color>。
E: It would be difficult to catch up to Bailu as she flees in the Illusory Maze. We can only <color=#f29e38ff>drive Bailu to run into the Lunaumbra Gourd's matrix</color>.

C: 多多关注这类人吧！补全后，会有<color=#f29e38ff>额外惊喜</color>呢，滴答！
E: Pay lots of attention to these people! You'll receive <color=#f29e38ff>additional surprises</color> once you've fixed all of them, tick tock!

C: 小心！<color=#f29e38ff>你的一举一动都会被</color>虚空中的黑暗<color=#f29e38ff>记录下来</color>，当命运的脚步<color=#f29e38ff>归零之时</color>，一个黑暗版的你将作为敌人出现，<color=#f29e38ff>沿着你刻下的命运步步前行……</color>
E: Watch out! <color=#f29e38ff>Your each and every move</color> will be <color=#f29e38ff>recorded</color> by the shadows in the void. When fate's footsteps <color=#f29e38ff>returns to zero</color>, an enshadowed version of you will manifest as an enemy and <color=#f29e38ff>process along the fate you have etched into being...</color>

C: 当开拓者自己站在不稳定的桥上时，无法对这座桥发动祷言进行回溯。
E: When the Trailblazer themself is standing atop the unstable bridge, they will not be able to activate the prayer to rewind the bridge.

E: Complete various missions in Aetherium Wars to raise your Victory Rating and unlock rewards

C: 在「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，非首领敌人在进入战斗后，生命值将大幅降低。\n注意：本关敌方首领生命值极高，可利用消灭<color=#f29e38ff>非首领敌人</color>造成的<color=#f29e38ff>溢出伤害</color>，对敌方首领造成高额伤害。
E: During "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," non-boss enemies will have their HP drastically reduced after entering battle.\nAttention: The boss's HP for this current stage is extremely high. You can use the <color=#f29e38ff>Overflow DMG</color> dealt when defeating <color=#f29e38ff>non-boss enemies</color> to deal high amounts of DMG to the boss.

C: 别忘了在银河商店中购买商品，提升各项能力。

E: Have the character in Position 1 in the team use their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color>. With <color=#f29e38ff>every <unbreak>10</unbreak> enemies hit</color> in total, they immediately regenerate <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of Energy.

E: You've still got time to surrender!

C: 怎样？要认输吗？！
E: So! Give up yet?

C: 稳住……
E: Steady...

C: 这都什么年代了，怎么还有人会为了钱工作呀？钱是手段，不是目的，工作才使人快乐…这可是最基本的道理。
E: Do you know what year it is? Who works for money these days? Money is a means, not an end. Work should make you happy... That's the most fundamental principle.

C: 临睡前的护理可马虎不得，梳尾巴的梳子得用黄杨木的，指腹抹些香膏擦在根部，再包上素云纱睡上一觉，第二天尾巴就变得既柔软又蓬松了，您瞧是不是？
E: Bedtime tail care is a must. First, you need a comb that's made of boxwood, then apply some sweet ointment to the root of the tail, and wrap it in Pale Cloud Silk and go to sleep. That way my tail will be all so soft and fluffy tomorrow. See?

C: 行商在外，无依无靠，懂些自救的手法，心里多少有个底。
E: I have no one to rely on as a traveling merchant. There is at least some security when I have some ways of saving myself.

C: 花的意义是花期本身，而非花瓣、香气或是洒下的种子。
E: The meaning of a flower lies in the duration of its bloom, and not in its petals, aroma, or the seeds it leaves behind.

C: 久疏战阵了…
E: Too long behind the lines...

C: 哦？不错不错。
E: Oh? A delightful surprise.

C: 听说剑术境界提升，身体便有所感应，原来是这般感觉……
E: I heard that when your mastery of the sword improves, you can physically feel it... so this is what it feels like...

C: 木叔叔！代我娘向你问好~
E: Uncle J! My mom sends her regards!

C: 开拓者们如需支援，开口便是。
E: Should you require aid, {NICKNAME}, you need only ask.

C: 你比以前冷静多了。
E: You're much calmer than you once were.

C: 飞行士的斗志，从未熄灭。
E: A pilot's spirit never dies.

C: 元亨利贞，诸事遂顺。
E: With favor and gain, life's free from strain.

C: 成象，效法！
E: In formation, in accordance!

C: 有时购入新剑，看中了不同的剑鞘，均很相配，不得已只能通通买了回去，但无奈一柄剑又只能配一副剑鞘……
E: Sometimes I find multiple good sheaths for a new sword, and I end up buying them all. And yet, one sword can only use one sheath...

C: 慌什么，来的都是客！
E: What's wrong? Everyone's a customer!

C: 望、闻、问…踢！
E: Look, listen, feel, kick!

C: 听病人说，至味盛苑又出了新的甜品，叫「落九天」，那糖拔丝好长好长好长……可惜，我吃不到呀。
E: A patient told me that the Garden of Gourmet released a new dessert called Fallen From the Skies. The sugar threads are suuuper looong... But I can't get my hands on it.

C: 寰宇广阔，下次相会…不知是敌是友，是生是死？
E: The universe is vast... Will we meet again as friend or foe, dead or alive...?

C: 身外浮名，如云散尽。我触犯十王司条律，仙舟便将关于我的一切统统抹去了。只是那又如何？良剑断物，仗其锋芒，而不在其名声。
E: Fame is like the clouds — fleeting and elusive. I am viewed as a sinner in the eyes of the Ten-Lords Commission, and the Xianzhou has erased my name from its memory. So be it. A sword cuts with its edge, not its name.

C: 照彻万川！
E: ...in lunar flame!

C: 长生之躯，无需疗愈…
E: Save it for your own skin...

C: 无妨。
E: A graze.

C: 龙女大人，给你带糖来啦。偷偷拿着，别给人瞧见了~
E: Dragon Lady, here's some candy for you. Keep it safe, and keep it secret~

C: 对不起…将军……
E: I'm sorry... General...

C: 云璃的气味清甜明快，就像乳香。来看望我时，她还会像小动物一样坐在我的膝上，谁能忍得住不凑近吸一口呢…啊，光回忆起来都觉得快乐……
E: Yunli's scent is fresh and sweet, just like frankincense. When she comes to see me, she's like a little animal, crawling onto my lap. Who could resist leaning down and taking in a deep breath? Even just thinking about it makes me happy...

C: 回到罗浮以后，妾身俗务缠身，只剩下了三件乐事——吃饭、调香、逗青雀。
E: Since returning to the Luofu, I've been buried in work. There are only three things that bring me joy: eating food, making perfumes, and teasing Qingque.

C: 罗浮实在是有些保守，若是在朱明，遇上这般有能力，又分毫不打算危害人间的岁阳，可是绝对不会把它给封印起来的。
E: The Luofu really is a bit conservative. If we encountered a heliobus on the Zhuming that was this capable and had no harmful intentions, we would definitely not seal it up.

C: 莫生气……
E: Get it together...

C: 沁人心脾。
E: Refreshing to the soul.

C: 一定会有法子的。
E: There'll definitely be a way.

C: 确实是奇珍万千。
E: A thousand wonders indeed.

C: 他的气味与「谐乐颂」相似，但我闻到了被掩盖住的…更真实的一面。
E: He reminds me of the "Odes of Harmony," but I caught a whiff of something behind the facade he puts on... something real.

C: 由我提问了。
E: I'm asking the questions.

C: 不用担心，只要我不抹去你的记忆，你就不会忘记我~
E: Fear not, unless I wipe away your memories, forgetting me is not an option~

C: 既定的轨迹已然显现。
E: Destiny's course is becoming apparent.

C: 好奇这柄刀吗？当它出鞘时，那些封藏其中，我曾挥舞它的记忆便会一一浮现，从「始」、经「终」…至「无」。
E: Curious about this blade? When unsheathed, every memory of having used it is unveiled... from Origin, to End... then Naught.

C: 在战斗中，我们终会找到渴求的答案。
E: We will find the answers we desire in the midst of battle.

C: 加拉赫也在？你看，我也能像你这样保护大家了！
E: Gallagher? You're here! Check it out, I can protect everyone, too!

C: 居然有这么多小费…！
E: They left such a generous tip...!

C: 五分钟，放松一下。
E: Take a quick five, and relax a bit.

C: 比起收藏已经成型的珠宝…我更着迷于打磨原石的过程。
E: Rather than collecting jewels that have already been shaped... I'm more fascinated by the process of turning an unrefined stone into a precious gem.

C: 我们所经历的一切，皆会成为生命中的丝线。感谢你，为翁法罗斯的命运，缝上了最美的纹样。
E: All that we experienced will become a thread in our lives. Thank you for embroidering the most beautiful patterns for Amphoreus's destiny.

C: 小白，累的时候，也不要太勉强自己呀~
E: Snowy, don't push yourself too hard if you're feeling tired~

C: 朝着明天，前进吧！
E: Toward tomorrow, onward!

C: 在悬锋祭典上，不论出身，优胜者将获得挑战国王的资格。先王曾利用这项规矩杀死了祖父，夺得王权，但他最终也因此陨落。可悲的循环……
E: At the Kremnos Festival, regardless of birth, the victor is granted the right to challenge the king. The former king used this rule to kill my grandfather and seize power, but he ultimately fell because of it. A pitiful cycle...

C: 老样子，我打头阵。
E: I'll take the lead. Just like the old times.

C: 怎么？有问题？什么问题？问吧。
E: Oh? You have questions? What questions? Ask away.

C: 这点代价而已……
E: A small price to pay...

C: 我不理解——「穿着华服的大地兽」，难道他们认为这个称呼很富有攻击性吗？不如下次我在学院门口挂上一块牌子：「不懂大地兽者，不得入内！」
E: I don't get it... "A dromas draped in finery"... Do they actually think that title is offensive? Why don't I put up a plaque on the academy's door next time that says "Only those who understand dromases may enter!"

C: 还不够还不够，再多我都装得下。
E: Not enough... Not enough! I can hoard even more.

C: 冷么？要不要一起去日光下走走？
E: Are you cold? Should we walk under the sun together?

C: 是潮湿的空气向我透露了谜底。
E: It was the moisture in the air that whispered the answer to me.

C: 爱臣们的爵名，皆由我亲自构思后敕封。既要兼顾威严，又需朗朗上口，成为人人传颂的美谈。你喜欢什么爵名？灰衣爵太普通，救世爵太直白……
E: The titles of my loyal subjects are all names I personally devised and conferred. They must carry both dignity and elegance, yet roll easily off the tongue, something that becomes a tale spoken fondly by all. What sort of title would you prefer? Dux Cinereus sounds too plain, and Dux Salvationis far too blunt...

C: 嘻，到人家表现啦♪
E: Hehe, it's my turn to shine ♪

C: 愿开拓之旅，永远有涟漪相伴♪
E: May the Trailblazing journey always be accompanied by rippling waves ♪

C: 警惕起来。
E: Stay alert.

C: 规则，就是用来打破的。
E: Rules are made to be broken!

C: 各就各位。
E: Take your positions.

C: 「存护」…由行动来决定。
E: Preservation is determined by our actions.

C: 保持步调一致。
E: Stay in step.

C: 贝洛伯格的人们和我一样，也是第一次看到这颗星球上原生的那片天空。
E: Just like me, the people of Belobog are also seeing the native sky of this planet for the first time.

C: 时间还早，现在去哪？
E: It's still early. Where to now?

C: Jarilo-VI
E: Jarilo-VI

C: 你和你的掩体一样可笑
E: You're as Laughable as Your Cover

C: 活动说明
E: Event Details

E: The Dahlia

C: 愿望是大家都开心！
E: My wish is for everyone to be happy!

C: 强只是一时的事情。
E: Strength is just temporary.

C: 呜…呜呜——
E: Woo... Awooo...!

E: Master the art of non-aggressive communication.

C: 无人配得上幸福
E: none worthy of felicity.

C: 不知何时拍下的照片，但那真实的触感毋庸置疑。在过去，这一幕切实地发生过了，并以此留下证明——尽管少有人知，但当一位少女回忆起曾经的美梦时，将会为此微笑。 做梦的人，也是造梦的人。造梦的人，也是做梦的人。 献出自己的往事，才能织就最美好的梦境。 人们不会沉溺其中，不愿复醒。他们会在美梦中，重新获得面对未来的勇气。 然后，向着明天。
E: A photo taken at an unknown time, but the reality of its touch is undeniable. In the past, this scene truly came to pass, leaving behind a proof of its transpiration. Though few are aware, a young girl will smile when she recalls a beautiful dream she once had. The dreamer is also the dream-maker. The dream-maker is also the dreamer. Only by offering up one's past can the most beautiful dreams be woven. People will not lose themselves within them, unwilling to awaken. In their beautiful dreams, they will regain the courage to face the future. And then, walk toward tomorrow.

C: 被镌刻在壁画上的球棒浣熊。\n\n「不论历经多少古老的时光，『开拓』的意志，都不会被磨蚀殆尽！」
E: Baseball Raccoon engraved on a mural.\n\n"No matter how many ancient ages pass, the will of Trailblaze shall never be worn away!"

C: 为战而生的兵器，「繁育」的命途行者。\n自诞生的那一刻，便注定要与自己的死敌一同化作灰烬。
E: Weapons born for war, Pathstriders of Propagation.\nFrom the moment they were born, they were destined to turn to ashes alongside their mortal enemy.

In their beautiful dreams, they will regain the courage to face the future. And then, walk toward tomorrow.

C: 树上的灾兆
E: Omen in the Trees

C: 在我将一些记忆烧掉前，可以先同你分享~
E: Let me share some memories with you before I burn them away~

E: Newbie here, please go easy on me!

C: 致幻人鱼
E: Hallucinogenic Mermaid

E: Makes one designated target have a high chance of entering "<u>Alien Dream</u>."

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target.

C: 在这片梦想之地，一切都有可能。人们为何选择沉睡？或许就像你说的一样，是为了明天，能够笑着从梦中醒来。你使用了「终末」的力量，少女所期望的烟花，如今成为了现实。
E: In this land of the dreams, all things were possible. Why do people choose to sleep? Maybe, as you said, it was for the hope of a tomorrow where they could wake up smiling. You wielded the power of Finality, making the girl's wish for fireworks come true.

C: 星期日称，三月七在到处找你，并嘱托星期日提醒你看看短信。三月七还说，<color=#f29e38ff>一些你遗漏的东西，事实上极为重要。</color>
E: Sunday said March 7th had been looking for you everywhere and asked him to remind you to check your messages. March 7th also mentioned that <color=#f29e38ff>some things you've overlooked are actually extremely important.</color>

C: 歌斐木向已逝的米哈伊尔告解。流萤得知「梦主」的计划：重现寰宇蝗灾，用恐惧迫使人们祈求「秩序」。因此歌斐木想要知晓如何得到「繁育」力量，或许AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>正是因此遇害。
E: Gopher Wood confessed to the late Mikhail. Firefly learned of the Dreammaster's plan: To recreate the Swarm Disaster, he would use fear to force people to beg for Order. Therefore, Gopher Wood wanted to know how to obtain the power of Propagation, and perhaps this was why AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> was killed.

C: 流萤希望假装你们素不相识，只是偶然相遇，她会挺身而出赶走欺负你的人。流萤还希望抱着你飞上天空时，周围是她没能看到的烟花。
E: Firefly wished to pretend you were simply strangers who had met by chance. She would step up and chase away anyone who bullied you. She also dreamed of holding you as she flew through the sky, surrounded by fireworks she never got to see.

C: 在蚀心影魔「困难」难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the Boss Enemy in the Corrupting Shadowfiend challenge in Hard mode

C: 完成第2轮定级赛，并至少获得#4点荣誉值
E: Complete the 2nd round of placement match and obtain at least #4 Honor

C: 累计购买#4只奇美拉
E: Purchase a total of #4 chimera(s)

C: 攻击气球以改变气球颜色，将场上所有气球转换为相同颜色后即可完成一轮挑战。在限定时间内完成轮次越多，奖励越丰厚。
E: Attack balloons to change their color. Complete a Challenge Cycle by changing all balloons on the field to the same color. The more Cycles you complete within the time limit, the greater the rewards.

C: 获得#2个方程所需祝福。
E: Obtain #2 Blessing(s) required for the Equation.

C: 一条命运赐福的护身符。
E: A talisman blessed by destiny.

C: 去城外闯荡。
E: Venture out beyond the city.

C: 我方目标造成的【<u>耀变</u>】伤害提高，施放终结技后，充能【<u>耀变</u>】。
E: Increases ally targets' "<u>Blazar</u>" DMG, and gains "<u>Blazar</u>" Charge after using Ultimate.

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个1星方程。战斗中自动激活所有小于等于1星的方程【该奇物可以通过事件升级】
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Equation(s) of 1-star rarity. Automatically activates all Equations of 1-star rarity or below during combat. This curio can be leveled up through Occurrences.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「火」「量子」「虚数」</color>属性角色每消耗一个战技点后，使自身暴击伤害提高，并有概率恢复战技点。
E: After a <color=#f29e38ff>Fire, Quantum, or Imaginary</color> character consumes a Skill Point, they deal more CRIT DMG, and has a chance to recover Skill Point(s).

C: 火漆商人（其二）
E: Sealing Wax Merchant (II)

C: 回合开始时，受到等同于自身生命上限一定比例的冰属性持续伤害，可叠加。
E: At the start of the turn, receives Ice DoT equal to a percentage of this unit's Max HP. This DoT is stackable.

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 家族在美梦中无所不能的关键，正是「梦主」歌斐木本人——而他亲自掩埋的阴暗罪行，或许会是调查的突破口。
E: Gopher Wood, the Dreammaster, is the key to The Family's absolute power within the sweet dream. The dark crimes he personally buried might just be the breakthrough we're looking for.

C: 「生命因何而沉睡？」——这是星核猎手此次行动的接头暗号，看来那位真正的合作者就在附近。
E: "Why does life slumber?" This is the passphrase for the Stellaron Hunters' current mission. It means the true collaborator is somewhere close.

C: 寻找适合「偷渡」的入口
E: Find an entrance for "stowaways"

C: 明明是杨叔…
E: No. It was Mr. Yang...

C: 我的记忆很完整。
E: My memories are completely intact.

C: 什么时候的事？
E: When did this happen?

C: 尽力而为吧。但愿，这只是虚惊一场。
E: I'll do my best. Let's hope this is just a false alarm.

C: 怎么了，我来帮你。保护美少女我义不容辞！
E: What's wrong? I'll help you. I can't possibly ignore a beautiful lady in trouble!
Huh...?

C: 怎么，动了你的人，要找我算账？要不先坐下来谈谈呢，我看你也挺有耐心的。
E: What, you want to settle the score with me for messing with your people? Why don't we sit down and have a chat? You seem like a patient one to me.

C: 可我在流梦礁醒来后，它不见了，也感受不到任何影响。
E: But when I woke up in Dreamflux Reef, it was gone, and I couldn't feel any effects from it.

C: 「梦主」歌斐木，他与梦境完全融汇，在匹诺康尼近乎「全知全能」。而他如今却在失去对梦境的掌控。
E: The Dreammaster Gopher Wood completely merged with the dreamscape, becoming virtually omniscient and omnipotent in Penacony. But now, he's losing his grip on the dreamscape.

C: 这是…忆质？
E: Is this... memoria?

C: 两位女士不会以为，公司在入局匹诺康尼前，毫无准备吧？
E: Ladies, you didn't think the IPC would enter Penacony unprepared, did you?

C: 第一次是如同死亡般的痛苦，我的身体被「沉眠」的翼刃贯穿，才有了后来所有的故事。剧本必定会应验，但形式…只在翻开那一页时才会显露。
E: The first time was a painful death when I was stabbed by the blade of "Dormancy," which led to all subsequent events. The script will always come true, but in a way... that will only be revealed when that page is turned.

C: 好在他与橡木家系早已异体同心，侥幸生还——却再也无法脱离美梦。
E: Fortunately, his heart was already aligned with the Oak Family, allowing him to survive by sheer luck... though he could never leave the sweet dream again.

C: 我常在想，若我们能重新面对过去的抉择，是否真会作出不同的决定？
E: I often wonder, if we could face our past decisions again, would we really make different choices?

C: 时间紧迫，我就长话短说了——<color=#dbc291ff>困住我们的梦境，足有「三重」。</color>
E: Time is of the essence, so I'll cut to the chase. <color=#dbc291ff>There are "three layers" to the dreamscape trapping us.</color>

C: 但寥寥数十人，在如此庞大的梦境面前无异于沧海一粟。我们必须寻找其他办法，在短时间内唤醒以十万、百万为单位的自由意志。
E: However, awakening a mere handful of individuals is insignificant compared to the vast number of people immersed in the dream. We must find other ways to awaken the free will of millions of people within a short period of time.

C: 人固然有强大与弱小之分，倘若「开拓」是英雄的使命，那么「同谐」的责任便是以强援弱，因为匹诺康尼的救世主，只能是匹诺康尼人自己。
E: It's true that some people are born strong, and others are born weak. If the Trailblaze is the target of heroes, then the Harmony will guarantee that the strong help the weak. Only the people of Penacony themselves can be the saviors of their homeland.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那是为了给梦中的「存护」之心，打下根基。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It was to seed the Preservation's heart into the dream.</color>

C: 活着…就是想象未来的自己，可命运从未公平。
E: To live... Is to imagine a future version of yourself, but fate is never fair.

C: 「太一」的神力，竟然……
E: The divine power of Ena actually...

C: 来吧，我想给你看些东西。
E: Come. I want to show you something.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>可在烧却「虚无」的那一刻，她说自己正在绽放，第一次…品味到活着的喜悦。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But at the moment she burned away the Nihility, she said she was blooming. She said that, for the first time... she felt the joy of being alive.</color>

C: 难怪你会来找我。
E: No wonder you came looking for me.

C: 是啊，其实…「剧本」里说的三次死亡，我还有一次没有经历。
E: Yeah. Actually... I still haven't experienced one of the three deaths written in the "script."

C: 下次见吧，终有一日……
E: See you next time. One day, one day...

C: 是每位训练家培训出的、很特别的奇美拉，在外观上就非常地有辨识度！
E: It's a very special chimera trained by each trainer, with a highly distinctive appearance!

C: 猎犬家系成员
E: Bloodhound Family Member

C: 【致幻人鱼】自身无法获得治疗和护盾效果，在被击败时会对我方全体造成大量伤害。【致幻人鱼】使用<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>可施加<color=#f29e38ff>基于目标最大生命值</color>的持续伤害效果并使持续伤害效果额外结算，使用<color=#f29e38ff>普攻</color>可解除【幻身】状态。推荐选择能够辅助【致幻人鱼】的角色，充分利用其战技造成的强力持续伤害。
E: "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" cannot receive healing or Shield effects, and deals massive DMG to all allies when defeated. Using <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> as "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" applies DoT effect <color=#f29e38ff>based on target's Max HP</color> and triggers additional DoT calculations. Using <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> dispels the "Phantom Illusion" state. It is recommended to select characters that can Support "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" to fully utilize the powerful DoT effects from its Skill.

C: 命途切换
E: Switch Paths

C: 分享
E: Something to Share
